description:
– This challenge consists of 13 (baker’s dozen) bagels and cream cheese.
– There is a 30 minute time limit for professional eaters and 60 minute time limit for amateurs. Winners get the meal for free, a custom t-shirt, photo on the wall of fame, and the progressive jackpot!
– All food must be swallowed within the time limit to count as a win. Water or other provided beverages are allowed but excessive use of soaking food (dunking) is prohibited.
– Plates, bowls, and the table must be clean of food to count as a win. There is also a 5 minute waiting period after the challenge is over to ensure there is no “reversal of fortune” before a win is declared.

title: Johnny Brusco’s 6lb “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge (Trinity)
where: Johnny Brusco's New York Style Pizza (Trinity)
description:
– This “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge features a 6 lb (2.73 kg) stromboli with all the toppings featured on Johnny’s Deluxe Pizza. It includes sausage, onions, mushrooms, green peppers, ground beef, Canadian bacon, and pepperoni. There is also a lot of shredded mozzarella cheese. There is no pizza / red marinara sauce inside the stromboli. Rather, it is served on the side in a bowl which is required to be finished as part of the challenge within the 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit.
– Fail and pay $49.99 plus tax for your meal. Winners get the entire stromboli meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– There are many Johnny’s (in Georgia) and Johnny Brusco’s restaurants all around the southeastern United States and most if not all of them can / will offer this stromboli challenge. Find and contact the location nearest you beforehand to set up your challenge so they can be prepared and ready for your challenge attempt!!
– CLICK HERE to check out the challenge terms and conditions on Johnny Brusco’s website!!

title: Tomasino’s 12-Inch “Made Man” Pizza Challenge (Lake Nona)
description:
– There are four locations and all four offer this 12-Inch “Made Man” New York Style Stuffed Carnivore / Meat Lovers Pizza Challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish this 4.5-5 pound pizza that consists of two 14 oz pizza crusts filled with lots of homemade sauce, shredded mozzarella cheese, and then six meats: ham, meatball, bacon, pepperoni, salami, and sausage.
– You do have to finish at least one red marinara sauce container as part of the challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no drink requirements.
– Winners get the ~$33 pizza meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on Tomasino’s Wall of “Made Men.”

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Kissimmee)
address: 7640 W Irlo Bronson Memorial Hwy, Kissimmee, FL 34747
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Challenge (Panama City Beach)
address: 16210 Front Beach Rd, Panama City Beach, FL 32413
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: Twenty Pho Hour’s Vietnamese Beef Pho Challenge
description: The base challenge is for one person to finish one giant bowl of Vietnamese beef pho loaded with rice noodles and broth, topped with 7 different cuts of beef meat – short rib, oxtail, eye round steak, tendon, meatball, brisket, and tripe. There are healthy vegetables and hard boiled eggs with soft yolks on top. Challengers pay $50 whether they win or lose, but winners earn a sweet t-shirt and spot on Twenty Pho Hour’s Wall of Fame.

title: Out-N-About’s “Triple XXX” Spicy Wing Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves 6 chicken wings covered in Carolina reaper based hot sauce.
– Challengers have only 3 minutes to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: RibCrib’s “Chunk Boyz” BBQ Challenge (Callaway)
description:
– RibCrib has many locations in the US but only this location offers this challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a picture on the wall of fame.

title: Arooga’s “Ghost Face Killa” Spicy Wing Challenge (Winter Park)
address: 227 S Semoran Blvd, Winter Park, FL 32792
description:
– There is many Arooga’s locations and most offer this challenge.
– These spicy wings are covered in Arooga’s “Ghost Face Killa” wing sauce.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Kruk’s “Mother Kruker” Sandwich Challenge (Ft. Myers)
address: 10041 University Plaza Dr #109, Fort Myers, FL 33913
description:
– Kruk’s Philly Steaks has 2 locations, both based in Florida, and both offer this challenge.
– This challenge involves 2 Philly cheesesteak sandwiches and 1.5 orders of fries.
– Challengers have a 29-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive $27.99 gift card and social media recognition.

title: Kruk’s “Mother Kruker” Sandwich Challenge (Naples)
description:
– Kruk’s Philly Steaks has 2 locations, both based in Florida, and both offer this challenge.
– This challenge involves 2 Philly cheesesteak sandwiches and 1.5 orders of fries.
– Challengers have a 29-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive $27.99 gift card and social media recognition.

title: Bloodhound Brew’s “Dynamite Dog” Spicy Wing Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves wings covered in Bloodhound Brew Pub’s “Dynamite” sauce.
– The “Dynamite” sauce includes ghost peppers, scorpion peppers, and much more.
– Challengers have 5 short minutes to eat 20 sauce covered wings.
– No drinks are allowed during the 5 minutes.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a small bowl of ice cream.

title: Beth’s Double D Burger Challenge (Lake Mary)
address: 223 Wheelhouse Ln Unit 1121, Lake Mary, FL 32746
description:
– Beth’s Burger Bar offers this challenge at all 3 of their locations.
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Beth’s Double D Burger Challenge (Edgewood)
description:
– Beth’s Burger Bar offers this challenge at all 3 of their locations.
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Tomasino’s 12-Inch “Made Man” Pizza Challenge (Lake Mary)
address: 920 International Pkwy, Ste #1016, Lake Mary, FL 32746
description:
– There are four locations and all four offer this 12-Inch “Made Man” New York Style Stuffed Carnivore / Meat Lovers Pizza Challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish this 4.5-5 pound pizza that consists of two 14 oz pizza crusts filled with lots of homemade sauce, shredded mozzarella cheese, and then six meats: ham, meatball, bacon, pepperoni, salami, and sausage.
– You do have to finish at least one red marinara sauce container as part of the challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no drink requirements.
– Winners get the ~$33 pizza meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on Tomasino’s Wall of “Made Men.”

title: Hard Rock Hotel’s “Kitchen Sink” Burger Challenge
where: The Kitchen (Universal Orlando Hard Rock Hotel)
description:
– The Kitchen is located on the ground floor of The Hard Rock Hotel at Universal Orlando.
– They have a giant menu, with one of the BIG features being their massive “Kitchen Sink” cake.
– You can order 1 slice of the massive 7-layer cake to share with friends and family for just $29.
– You can also take their challenge which includes one of the slices for dessert with ice cream.
– Along with the cake, there is a “Kitchen” Burger served with lots of fries and a whole fried pickle.
– There is a short 30 minute time limit. Winners earn the $50 meal free and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Wonderland’s 5lb “Cookie Dough Sundae” Ice Cream Challenge
where: Wonderland Cookie Dough and Ice Cream
address: 5781 Bayshore Rd #108, North Fort Myers, FL 33917

title: Royal Scoop’s “Kitchen Sink” Ice Cream Challenge
where: Royal Scoop Homemade Ice Cream at Berkshire Commons
description:
– Royal Scoop has 4 locations but this challenge is only available at their East Naples/ Berkshire location.
– This enormous sundae consists of 20 ice cream scoops, 2 bananas, 2 cans of whipped cream, 6 toppings, 5 waffle bowls, and 4 coated waffle cones!
– You have a 1-hour time limit to finish everything, except the kitchen sink itself!!
– Winners receive the dessert for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on the wall of fame.

title: Helen Back Pizzeria’s “Stanimal” 20-Topping Pizza Challenge
address: 1826 Lewis Turner Blvd, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
description:
– Helen Back Pizza is located in Fort Walton Beach, Florida and serves up delicious pizza!!
– This “Stanimal” Pizza Challenge weighs ~5.5lbs and is a combination of 3 specialty pizzas.
– Carnivore Pizza – Pepperoni, Sausage, Crushed Meatballs, Chicken, and Smoked Bacon.
– Herbivore Pizza – Onion, Green peppers, Mushrooms, Tomato, Black Olives, and Spinach.
– Chris Special – Sausage, Tomato, Mushroom, Artichoke Hearts, Feta Cheese, and Sriracha.
– Also as part of the challenge, for dessert, you must finish some chocolate chip cookies.
– There is a 45 minute to finish this 16″ diameter pizza loaded with over 20 tasty toppings.
– Winners earn the $30 pizza free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Helen Back’s Wall of Fame!!
– CLICK HERE TO WATCH KATINA EATS KILOS TRY THE PIZZA CHALLENGE TOO!!

title: Carolina Jax’s “Mountain” Smash Burger Challenge
description:
– Carolina Jax started as a food truck and now has a Jacksonville brick and mortar restaurant.
– For this challenge, there is a 40 minute time limit to finish around 7lbs of their deliciousness.
– The “Mountain Man” Burger has six 7oz beef smash burgers stacked and layered with toppings.
– There is 1lb of Sharp Cheddar Jack Cheese, 1lb of bacon, peppers, onions, and some sauces.
– Carolina Jax has a great Cajun Ranch and it’s smothered on both the burger and the fries.
– There is a big tray of “Mountain” Fries loaded with pulled pork, cheese, and multiple sauces.
– The challenge includes a regular or diet Cheerwine soda based out of Salisbury, North Carolina.
– Winners receive the $75 smash burger meal free, a sweet t-shirt & hat, and Wall of Fame.

title: Pizza Paradise’s 7lb Woodfired Sourdough Pizza Challenge
address: 1401 Clare Ave, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
description:
– Pizza Paradise operates inside Grandview Public Market in West Palm Beach, Florida.
– They serve wood fired sourdough pizzas along with chicken wings and sub sandwiches.
– For this challenge, you must pick two of the “Signature Pies” from their delicious menu.
– Each pizza pie weighs around 3.5 lbs total, with around 2.25 lbs coming from extra thick crust.
– Floridian – Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, Parmesan, Pineapple, Hot Cherry Peppers, & Capicola Ham.
– Burrata Pie – Prosciutto, Buratta, Basil, Tomato Sauce, Balsamic Glaze, & Extra Virgin Olive Oil.
– You are welcome to order marinara sauce to dip your crust into, to help get it all down faster.
– You can pick other topping options if desired. There is a 50 minute time limit to finish them both.
– Winners receive the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Pizza Paradise’s Wall of Fame.

title: Porky’s Bayside “Hog Wild” BBQ Ribs Challenge
description:
– Porky’s Bayside Restaurant & Marina is known for their good food and friendly island atmosphere. Their BBQ is smoked daily on the premises and they offer fresh local seafood. Share a bit of what the Keys used to be.
– For this “Hog Wild” Challenge, there is a 1 hour time limit to finish 1 full rack of Baby Back BBQ Ribs, 1 full rack of Porky’s BBQ spare ribs, 1 side of Cuban style rice, a side of Tostones (plantain chips), and for dessert, a slice of Porky’s signature deep-fried key lime pie.
– Winners receive the $75 BBQ meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Porky’s new Wall of Fame.

title: Harry’s Grill’s “Harry’s Favorites” Food Challenge
description:
– Harry’s was voted “Best Bar and Grill” and “Best Burger” on Anna Maria Island in 2017, 2019, & 2020.
– This challenge features all of Harry’s Grill’s “Favorites” which are their top selling food items.
– There is a 16oz prime rib served on a plate with a loaded baked potato plus healthy green beans.
– There are 20-25 hot wings – 1/2 flavored with buffalo hot sauce and 1/2 flavored with jerk sauce.
– There is a double Smokehouse Burger layered with cheese, pulled pork, bacon, and some veggies.
– The burger is served on a plate with some of Harry’s delicious fries and hand-dipped onion rings.
– There is a plate with 15 bacon-wrapped grilled shrimp served over Island Rice with tasty coleslaw.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish, including a slice of pineapple upside-down cake for dessert.
– Winners earn the $100 “Favorites” dinner free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Maria’s Pizzeria’s “Old World Italy” Food Challenge
description:
– Maria’s Italian fare is prepared using high quality ingredients. They use real butter, heavy cream, fresh chicken, real veal, extra virgin olive oil, the fryers use Rice Bran oil, and the cheeses are Grande Mozzarella & Romano. All dishes are prepared to order, not pre-prepped or frozen in advance. Maria’s has been owned and operated in Cape Coral, Florida since 1991 by the Giordano family.
– This Old World Italian Food Challenge features appetizers, a few entrees, and desserts as well!!
– Appetizers – Bruschetta Rustica, Fried Calamari, and Garlic Bread w/ Cheese
– Entrees – Giovanni’s Veal Special, Chicken Parmigiana, Chicken Marsala, and Italian Beef Lasagna.
– Desserts – 3 cannoli w/ chocolate chips, a slice of homemade tiramisu, and Zeppolis (donuts).
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything, including a cup of Italian soup w/ bread rolls.
– Winners receive the $100 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a coveted spot on Maria’s Wall of Fame.

title: LaMotta’s 7lb “Soprano” Italian Cold Cut Sandwich Challenge
description:
– LaMotta’s Pizzeria & Italian Restaurant recently moved from Fort Myers, FL to Cape Coral, FL.
– Whether you have always dreamed of the Italian countryside or come from an Italian family yourself, Lamotta’s beautiful cuisine and traditional atmosphere can take you back to that delightful Italian memory.
– They have a smaller sized Soprano Italian Cold Cut Sandwich on their menu w/ pepperoni, ham, Genoa salami, mortadella, capicola, Italian sausage, sliced meatballs, lettuce, tomato, fresh mozzarella, roasted peppers, provolone cheese, banana peppers, and jalapeno peppers, dressed with oil and vinegar.
– This challenge is a supersized version of that, and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the sandwich meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on LaMotta’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Pacific Counter’s “Big Wave” Food Challenge (Lakewood Ranch)
address: 11581 E State Rd 70, Ste #109, Bradenton, FL 34202
description:
– Pacific Counter is a ridiculously fresh fusion of chef-inspired cuisines & cultures, serving up a mainland mix of coastal classics in the form of Sushi Bowls & Burritos.
– A passion project of three long time friends, Pacific Counter was created to bridge the gap between healthy & tasty, traditional & new, and quick service & good service. They’ve made it their mission to not only serve good food, but also serve good vibes, becoming a true happy place for their guests.
– There is a location in St Petersburg, FL and a newer location south in Lakewood Ranch, Florida.
– This “Big Wave” Challenge was designed to be HUGE and really show off their delicious menu.
– As of 4/9/2021, the challenge is only available at the newer Lakewood Ranch, Florida location.
– There are 4 different beef hot dogs – Hawaiian Dog, Kimchi Dog, Bahn Mi Dog, and Cali Dog.
– There are 2 poke sushi bowls – Randy got Golden Hour Bowl and Island BBQ Bowl w/ barbecue chicken.
– There are 2 sushi burritos – Randy got The O. G. Tuna Sushi Burrito and the Over The Rainbow Burrito.
– Includes 2 of their spam musubi plus 2 sides – Randy got Korean kimchi and wakame seaweed salad.
– There is an order of wonton nachos & 2 bubble tea drinks – Randy got Mango Boba and Taro Milk Tea.
– Finally for dessert, challengers must also finish a giant pineapple flavored Dole Whip Float.
– There is a 1 hour time time limit to finish. Winners get $100 meal free and on Wall of Fame.
– Champions also win a sweet t-shirt and hat. Be sure to schedule your challenge ahead of time.

title: Amore Italian “Tour of Sicily” Parmesan Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Amore Italian Market and Bakery serves the Cape Coral, Florida area in Southwest Florida.
– Amore is family owned & operated, serving up authentic Sicilian-inspired Italian foods to go.
– In addition to cookies and pastries too, there is a big selection of Italian goodies to take home.
– For this “Tour of Sicily” meal, there are three different stacked Italian parmesan sandwiches.
– The top sandwich is a chicken parmesan sandwich with homemade broccoli rabe and more.
– Middle sandwich features eggplant parmesan, and the bottom – meatballs and Italian sausage.
– The challenge includes 2 Sicilian rice balls filled with beef, veggies, cheese, and deliciousness.
– Everything is surrounded by almost 1lb of Amore’s cooked red penne pasta (homemade sauce).
– There is a 30 minute time limit. Winners get the $100meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame.
(The original time limit was recently adjusted down to 30 minutes and they increased price too.)

title: Big Fred’s Route 66 “Hurricane” Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a 5lb beef burger patty topped with 10 slices of cheese and 10 strips of bacon.
– Topped with mayo, ketchup, onions, lettuce, and pickles, all on a giant baked bun.
– Burger comes with a full basket of fries and there is a 2 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Winners earn the $50 burger free plus bragging rights and a spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Mutt’s on 13th’s Burger Patty Record Challenge
description:
– Mutt’s on 13th has been serving the St Cloud, Florida area for more than 11 years now.
– Mutt’s is most known for their cheeseburgers, but they served hot dogs and other stuff too.
– For this food challenge, you must break the current burger patty record within 1 full hour.
– Before Randy tried the challenge, his friend Nathan Figueroa ate 12 burger patties w/ cheese.
– To win, he had to finish 13 beef burger patties, each topped with white American cheese.
– The burger is served with healthy vegetables, an order of fries, and a flavored milkshake.
– There were lots of milkshake flavor option available. Randy chose a Butter Pecan milkshake.
– Winners get the $41 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, Wall of Fame, and challenge naming rights.
– Now to win, you must eat a 14-patty burger with cheese plus fries and a shake (as of 7/14/2021).

title: Whole Enchilada’s 6lb Ex-Wife Burrito Challenge (Winter Garden)
address: 129 W Plant St, Winter Garden, FL 34787

title: Madison Avenue Pizza’s 32-inch Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Madison Avenue Pizza has been serving the greater Dunedin, Florida area for a few years now.
– They recently started this 32-inch diameter “That’s What She Said” 10-11 lb team pizza challenge.
– Teams of 2 people have 1 hour to finish a 1-topping 32″ pizza with any topping of your choice.
– You can order a specialty pizza if you are feeling brave, and the whole pizza weighs over 10lbs.
– There are no drink requirements. Winners earn the pizza free, sweet t-shirts, and Wall of Fame.

title: Fo’Cheezy Twisted Meltz’ “Holy Cheezus” Grilled Cheese Challenge
address: 6305 Gulf Blvd, St Pete Beach, FL 33706
description:
– There are 12 Triple O.G. Grilled Cheese Sandwiches w/ American, Aged Swiss, and Cheddar cheeses.
– There are stacks of 6 sandwiches on 2 plates, and each plate also has 1lb of delicious tater tots.
– There is Gouda fondue on top of the sandwiches and tater tots, and there is a 45 minute time limit.
– For each paying guest who orders a combo meal (maximum of 3 people), you get 5 extra bonus minutes.
– If you have 3 or most paying guests with you, then your time limit will be 1 hour to finish everything.
– That is not all. You must also finish a “skull” of homemade tomato soup topped with their croutons.
– There is over 8lbs of food total, including the soup. You better be trained and ready for this challenge!!
– Winners get the $75 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, $75 cash, and their name graffitied on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Tacos & Tequila’s Grande Burrito Challenge (Fort Myers – Estero)
address: 10952 Eagle Village Dr, Ste #425D, Fort Myers, FL 33913
description:
– Tacos & Tequila Cantina serves up Funky, Unconventional Tex-Mex at its best with popular Americana sprinkled into your favorite South of the Border treats. Fresh local products and handmade tortillas are the essence of T&T’s great food. They follow all health guidelines to provide a safe environment for in-restaurant and patio dining. They also offer delivery and takeout.
– There are two Tacos & Tequila locations in Naples, Florida and there is another in Estero / Fort Myers, Florida.
– All three locations host the challenge with the same rules and guidelines. It is a regular menu item.
– For this burrito challenge, you must choose to fill the 5 burrito tortillas with either chicken or beef.
– The burrito also includes refried beans, T&T rice, cheddar jack cheese, and more, served wet.
– It is topped with lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro, Mexican crema, and queso fresco.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no other side or drink requirements.
– This is a pay-to-play challenge, so win or lose, the meal costs $30. Win and get a sweet t-shirt!!

title: Tacos & Tequila’s Grande Burrito Challenge (Naples – Pavilion)
description:
– Tacos & Tequila Cantina serves up Funky, Unconventional Tex-Mex at its best with popular Americana sprinkled into your favorite South of the Border treats. Fresh local products and handmade tortillas are the essence of T&T’s great food. They follow all health guidelines to provide a safe environment for in-restaurant and patio dining. They also offer delivery and takeout.
– There are two Tacos & Tequila locations in Naples, Florida and there is another in Estero / Fort Myers, Florida.
– All three locations host the challenge with the same rules and guidelines. It is a regular menu item.
– For this burrito challenge, you must choose to fill the 5 burrito tortillas with either chicken or beef.
– The burrito also includes refried beans, T&T rice, cheddar jack cheese, and more, served wet.
– It is topped with lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro, Mexican crema, and queso fresco.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no other side or drink requirements.
– This is a pay-to-play challenge, so win or lose, the meal costs $30. Win and get a sweet t-shirt!!

title: Tacos & Tequila’s Grande Burrito Challenge (Naples – Davis Blvd)
description:
– Tacos & Tequila Cantina serves up Funky, Unconventional Tex-Mex at its best with popular Americana sprinkled into your favorite South of the Border treats. Fresh local products and handmade tortillas are the essence of T&T’s great food. They follow all health guidelines to provide a safe environment for in-restaurant and patio dining. They also offer delivery and takeout.
– There are two Tacos & Tequila locations in Naples, Florida and there is another in Estero / Fort Myers, Florida.
– All three locations host the challenge with the same rules and guidelines. It is a regular menu item.
– For this burrito challenge, you must choose to fill the 5 burrito tortillas with either chicken or beef.
– The burrito also includes refried beans, T&T rice, cheddar jack cheese, and more, served wet.
– It is topped with lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro, Mexican crema, and queso fresco.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no other side or drink requirements.
– This is a pay-to-play challenge, so win or lose, the meal costs $30. Win and get a sweet t-shirt!!

title: Durango’s Steakhouse’s “Oak Fire Grill” 40oz Steak Challenge
description:
– You must finish a 40 oz ribeye steak and 2 sides of your choosing in one sitting to win this challenge.
– Winners get their name on a plaque and an engraved mug that can be filled with select draft beers for $0.99 on Wednesdays!! You do not need to schedule your challenge ahead of time. Walk in and try it!!
– Please note that this is a pay-to-play challenge and the steak dinner is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Dave’s Pizza Garage’s Monster 26-inch Pizza Slice Challenge
address: 2887 Kerry Forest Pkwy, Ste #1, Tallahassee, FL 32312
description:
– Dave’s Pizza Garage offers the biggest pizza slice in all of Tallahassee, Florida (26″ long)!!
– Are you a true lover of pizza?? Do you want to see your picture up on their Wall of Fame??
– You must eat a 26″ long x 18″ wide slice of pizza loaded with at least 4 toppings plus lots of cheese.
– You must also finish a regular-sized drink and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners get the $30 pizza slice free, a sweet t-shirt, and their photo posted on Dave’s Wall of Fame!!
– Champions also get 10% off future orders for life as part of Dave’s Pizza Garage’s “Clean Plate Club.”
– The best part of all is that winners also win Dave’s “Jackpot” cash prize. Contact Dave for details!!
– Click here to see photos and get more details about the slice via their website challenge page!!
– Note: The time limit used to be just 20 minutes, and it was changed to 30 minutes. Good luck!!

title: Jerry’s “Mother Of All Burgers” Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– There is a monster stacked burger layered with 6oz beef patties and slices of cheese.
– It has pickles, onions, and fries that are smothered in Jerry’s Cajun steak sauce.
– All the food weighs around 3lbs with the fries, but this is not just a quantity challenge.
– There are 3 drops of Mad Dog 357 hot sauce on each patty (357,000 Scoville Heat Units).
– Winners earn the $39.99 meal free, $100 cash, a sweet t-shirt or hat, and Wall of Fame.
– For more rules and details, CLICK HERE to check out their website’s challenge page.

title: McGuire’s Irish Pub’s “Alka Seltzer” Triple Burger Challenge
description:
– The challenge is to pick 3 of the burgers on McGuire’s menu, and try to eat them in one sitting.
– Winners still have to pay full price for the burgers, but they get a sweet t-shirt and Wall of Fame.

title: Ricaltini’s 15 Minute Tini Burger Challenge
description:
This is a pay-to-play burger challenge. You have 15 minutes to finish and win a sweet t-shirt.
Note: The burger challenge meal is not free or discounted if you win. Good luck!!

title: Pappagallos’ 12lb MonstaGallo Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Pappagallo’s Beachside Pizzeria has been operating in Satellite Beach, Florida for many years.
– For this Monsta-Gallo Team Pizza Challenge, there is a 1 hour time limit for 2 people to finish.
– There must be 2 toppings on the entire pizza, but you may order more if your are feeling brave.
– Nathan and I got Pappagallo’s buffalo chicken pizza on my half, and Nathan ordered Hawaiian.
– There is 5lbs of crust total plus 7lbs of sauce, cheese, and toppings. This is a tough challenge!!
– The pizza is 16″ wide by 24″ long and weighs 12lbs total. Good luck and pick toppings wisely!!
– You may get marinara with your pizza to dip the crust. Please schedule in advance if interested.
– Winning teams receive the $28 pizza free plus sweet t-shirts and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Fruta Mix Winter Garden’s 5lb Fiesta Burrito Challenge
address: 15493 Stoneybrook W Pkwy, Ste #120, Winter Garden, FL 34787
description: Four 12inch tortillas filled with chicken, steak, birria, rice, beans, grilled peppers and onions, lettuce, pico de gallo, jalapenos, guacamole, sour cream, mozzarella cheese, smothered with queso dip, red and green enchilada sauce. There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish everything, so shut up and eat!! If you complete the Fiesta Challenge you win the meal for free, a $20 gift card, and a photo to be put onto their Hall Of Fame!!

title: Fruta Mix Ocoee’s “Frutamix Experience” Spicy Tacos Challenge
description:
– The challenge consists of 10 Spicy Queso Birria Tacos.
– Each bite must be taken with the Avocate Salsa and Consome.
– There is a half gallon of Aqua Fresca of your choice to drink.
– There is a quick 10 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners get the meal free, $50 in store credit, and a sweet T-shirt.
– Champions also get their name and photo on the digital Hall of Fame.

title: Big Tom’s Diner’s 2lb Cheeseburger Challenge
address: 1151 Havendale Blvd NW, Winter Haven, FL 33881
description:
– There is a 2lb stacked cheeseburger served with lots of crinkle cut French fries.
– The whole platter weighs around 3.5lbs and there is a 30 minute time limit.
– Winners receive a sweet T-shirt and a spot on Big Tom’s Wall of Champions.
– Note: This cheeseburger challenge meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Eduardo’s Lokos Tacos’ 6lb Monster Burrito Challenge
description:
– Eduardo’s Lokos Tacos started out as a food truck and is now a brick & mortar restaurant!!
– Eduardo’s has been serving the Tavares, Florida area for more than 5 years now.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish Eduardo’s 6+lb “Monster” Mexican Burrito Challenge.
– You must choose which meat you want from their many options. You can do “half and half.”
– There is Mexican rice plus refried beans and mozzarella cheese, all inside 2 large tortillas.
– Topped w/ sauces and served with 2 scoops each of pico de gallo, guacamole, and sour cream.
– Winners receive the $30 Mexican burrito free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Mashawy’s 7lb Burger Challenge
description:
– This whole Mashwy Burger Challenge weighs 7lbs and consists of lots of beef on a bun with cheese, bacon, and healthy vegetables, served with Mashawy fries and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Sebring’s 12-Scoop “Super Sundae” Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– Sebring, Florida is home to the finest and largest selection of craft and vintage bottled sodas and ice cream. They carry 200+ different flavors of sodas from all over the world, and 38+ flavors of super premium, hand-dipped ice cream, gourmet hot dogs, and more.
– For this supersized ice cream sundae challenge, you must order 12 big scoops of premium ice cream. You can choose 12 different options, or you may order 12 scoops of the same flavor.
– The ice cream is produced by Yoder’s Southern Creamery a few hours away in Sarasota, Florida.
– The sundae is topped with 2 chocolate chip cookies, bananas, a few different sauces, whipped cream, a waffle cone, sprinkles, and a few cherries on top.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire thing, with no sprinkles left behind.
– Winners receive the Super Sundae free plus a spot on Sebring Soda & Ice Cream Works’ Wall of Fame!!

title: Courtney’s Restaurant’s Burger, Fries, and Milkshake Challenge
description: Courtney’s Restaurant challenges you to finish a 2.5 pound stacked cheeseburger (five 1/2 pound beef patties) layered with lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, and onions, served with a bucket full of fries (~2 lbs) and a milkshake. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the meal free and a sweet t-shirt.

title: Roque Pub’s Half Barrel Burger Challenge
description: For this Half Barrel Burger Challenge, you have a 20 minute time limit to finish six 1/2 pound beef burger patties stacked and layered with 12 slices of cheese, 12 slices of bacon, lettuce, and tomatoes. The burger is served with chips and a pickle. The meal is not free or discounted if you win, and it is a pay-to-play, but winners receive a sweet t-shirt and spot on Roque Pub’s Wall of Fame!! No need to call ahead for this one. Walk in and try it!!

title: The Hangry Bison’s Haymaker Burger Challenge
address: 480 Orlando Ave, Ste #130, Winter Park, FL 32789
description:
– From their hand-built burgers to fine bourbon to craft beer brewed near and far, The Hangry Bison is committed to sourcing the freshest ingredients within their community.
– The Hangry Bison serves the Winter Park, Florida area from its Winter Park Village location.
– This “Haymaker” Burger Challenge is a pay-to-play challenge and isn’t normally free if you win.
– There is a bison burger, a short-rib burger, and an Italian sausage burger stacked together between 2 grilled cheese sandwiches, covered with bacon jam spread, fried onion straws, bacon, jalapenos, Pepper Jack cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and more, all topped with their bourbon sauce.
– The burger is surrounded by 5 orders of fries and there is a one sitting time limit to finish everything.
– Winners still pay $29 for the meal, but win a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Thee Burger Spot’s Burger Challenge
description: There are six 1/2 pound beef burger patties stacked and layered with cheese and bacon, served on a bun with a side of fries. Challengers have 15 minutes to finish everything. The 15 minutes starts as soon as the burger hits your table, so be prepared to eat a burger that is steaming hot. The burger is not free if you win, and costs $25 as a pay-to-play, but winners do receive a sweet t-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame!! Good luck and eat fast!!

title: Lenny’s 36-inch Team Pizza Challenge (Ocean Shore Blvd)
address: 1456 Ocean Shore Blvd, Ormond Beach, FL 32176
description: The challenge is for a team of 2 people to finish Lenny’s giant 36-inch pizza with 1 topping of your choosing, all within the 30 minute time limit. Winners receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and a team photo gets added up on Lenny’s Wall of Fame!! Be sure to call ahead in advance to schedule your challenge so they can be ready!!

title: Lenny’s 36-inch Team Pizza Challenge (Nova Rd)
address: 298 S Nova Rd, Ormond Beach, FL 32176
description: The challenge is for a team of 2 people to finish Lenny’s giant 36-inch pizza with 1 topping of your choosing, all within the 30 minute time limit. Winners receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and a team photo gets added up on Lenny’s Wall of Fame!! Be sure to call ahead in advance to schedule your challenge so they can be ready!!

title: Smokin 19’s Ten Pound “Trash Can” BBQ Challenge
Pho 13 Noodle House’s Extra Large Vietnamese Pho Challenge
address: 250 N Atlantic Ave, Ste #251, Daytona Beach, FL 32118

title: Food Wizard’s “Death Eater” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are 4 beef burger patties on a large homemade bun.
– The beef patties are layered with cheese, an egg, onion rings, and bacon.
– The burger is served with 2 lbs of their french fries loaded with toppings.
– The fries are topped with chili, cheese, fried onion bites, slaw, and sour cream.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge meal.
– Free Meal
– Free Dessert
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: There are 2 challenge meals pictured below.

title: Time Out Sports Bar’s “Titan” Burger Challenge
description:
– This monstrosity of a burger has two 1.5 pound beef burger patties in it, 1 pound of bacon, 1 pound of grilled pork belly, 10 slices of cheese, a lot of healthy vegetables (lettuce, tomatoes, and onions), and 3 onion rings, all on a very thick and dense bun. The challenge includes 1 pound of crispy tater tots.
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win this challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Munchy’s Pizza’s 28-Inch Team Pizza Challenge
address: 7400 N Federal Hwy, Boca Raton, FL 33487
description:
– This challenge features a 28″ pizza that must have at least 4 toppings on it.
– Teams of 2 people have 30 minutes to finish the pizza and two 32 oz sodas.
– Free Meal
– $200 Cash
– Wall of Fame

title: Aguila Sandwich Shop’s 6ft Biggest Cuban Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Aguila Sandwich Shop is known for their delicious Cuban sandwiches and other traditional Cuban foods.
– You must finish 6ft of Cuban sandwich which is sliced up into six foot-long sandwiches.
– Each piece weighs around 1lb so the sandwich weighs a little over 6 pounds total.
– The authentic Cuban sandwich has sliced ham topped with Cuban marinated shredded pork, Swiss cheese, pickles, mayonnaise, and mustard.
– Get ready to eat a lot of bread, but the bread will be fresh and very flavorful from a local bakery.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire sandwich.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt & hat, and a spot on their Wall of Fame!!
– Note: There are 2 challenge sandwiches pictured below, and not just one.

title: The Mini Bar’s Delicious Mini Donut Challenge
description:
– The Mini Bar specializes in serving mini donuts and there are 19 options to choose from.
– Around 3 mini donuts are equivalent to 1 normal-sized donut.
– For this challenge, you must finish 3 of each of the 19 mini donut options.
– You also must finish 3 pints of beer (your choice) or 3 pints of the extra-thick whole milk.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire spread of mini donuts and drinks.
– Winners receive the $60 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame.
– If interested, there is also a record challenge. If you can beat the previous record for mini donuts within the 45 minute time limit, you win an extra $100 gift card to be used later, in addition to all the base prizes. As of 2/20/2020, the current record to beat is 60 mini donuts.

title: Kogi Grill’s Triple Meat Korean Kogi Rice Bowl Challenge
description:
– Kogi Grill specializes in serving burritos, sandwiches, tacos, and Korean meat & rice bowls.
– They offer a Kogi Triple Meat Bowl on their menu consisting of 5oz of Beef, 5oz of Chicken, and 5oz Pork on top of lettuce mix, which is topped with chopped green onions and Gochu-Mayo sauce.
– For this challenge, you must finish a triple-sized bowl of that, served in a big paella.
– There is around 3lbs of rice, lettuce, and cabbage on the bottom which serves as the base layer.
– On top there is 1lb portions of Korean marinated beef, chicken, and pork.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything, and you can add all the Kogi Sauce you want.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame!!

title: Wacked Out Weiner’s Wackinator Hot Dog Challenge (Pensacola)
address: 6675 Pine Forest Rd, Ste #5, Pensacola, FL 32526
description:
– There are ~14 Wacked Out Weiner locations around the USA, with many of them in Alabama.
– Randy visited the Wacked Out Weiner location in Gulf Shores, Alabama, and everything was delicious!!
– There is 8 Nathan’s Famous hot dogs, totaling 1lb, inside a massive freshly baked bread loaf.
– The weiner hot dogs are topped with white mac and cheese, homemade chili, and baked beans.
– There is also sauerkraut, onions, some peppers, and a few other toppings. It was all ~5lbs total.
– There’s a 30 minute time limit. Winners get the $32.95 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame.
– Please note that other locations may have a different set of toppings on their Wackinator Challenge.
– 24-hour notice required.

title: Riviera Mexican Restaurant’s 6lb Burrito Challenge
address: 1935 SE US Hwy 19, Crystal River, FL 34429
description:
– Riviera Mexican Restaurant & Cantina serves authentic Mexican food to the Crystal River, FL area.
– For this 6lb burrito challenge, there is a one sitting time limit to finish everything on the platter.
– There are 4 large burrito tortillas filled with whatever meat(s) you wanted added – your choice.
– My burrito had 4 scoops of ground beef and 4 scoops of pulled chicken, both great options.
– There are multiple scoops of Cilantro Lime Rice and Spanish Rice, plus black & refried beans.
– In addition, it is filled with shredded Mexican cheese and served wet with 4 ladles of queso.
– The burrito supreme is topped with lettuce, tomatoes, and they write your name with sour cream.
– Winners receive the $30 burrito meal free and a spot on the Wall of Fame (drinks are optional).

title: Red Hot Tiki Scorpion Shot Hot Challenge
where: Red Hot Tiki Spicy Gourmet Market
description: The challenge is to finish one tablespoon of Scorpion Pepper Hot Sauce in a shot glass topped with an edible Yellow Armor Tailed Scorpion. Finish it and you get to keep the shot glass, graphic tee, all the pics your friends can take, and, of course, the memory. The challenge costs $25 and milk is available if you need it.

title: Fudpucker’s FUDinator Burger Challenge
description:
– The Fudinator includes three Fudburger patties weighing 1.5 lbs.
– Topped with American cheese, chili, bacon, sauteed onions & mushrooms, jalapeno, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles and fried onion straws.
– Served with fries and coleslaw and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free “Fudpucker’s”  T-shirt
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Hot Dog Shoppe’s “Pounder” Burger Challenge
description:
– Eat a 1 lb double black Angus cheese burger, double order of chili cheese fries, and a 24 oz drink.
– You have to finish everything in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Current fastest time is 8 minutes 14 seconds (as of 5/5/2019).
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Name put into monthly draw for free “Pounder Challenge.”
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Pepper’s 5lb Mexican Burrito Challenge (Capital Circle)
where: Pepper's Mexican Grill & Cantina (Tallahassee - Capital Circle)
description:
– Eat your choice of a 20″ long steak or chicken burrito weighing 5lbs total.
– Includes 3 tortillas filled with  guacamole, pico de gallo, sour cream, peppers, onions, and tomatoes, with red salsa and white salsa both on top.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– $10 gift certificate to Pepper’s to be used later.

description:

title: Pepper’s 5lb Mexican Burrito Challenge (Port St. Joe)
where: Pepper's Mexican Grill and Cantina (Port St. Joe)
address: 224 Reid Ave, Port St Joe, FL 32456
description:
– Eat your choice of a 20″ long steak or chicken burrito weighing 5lbs total.
– Includes 3 tortillas filled with  guacamole, pico de gallo, sour cream, peppers, onions, and tomatoes, with red salsa and white salsa both on top.

– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– $10 gift certificate to Pepper’s to be used later.

title: Café Panuzzo’s 5lb Monster Calzone Challenge
description:
– This challenge features a 5lb monster-sized version of their “Special” calzone listed on the menu.
– There is 3 lbs of filling enclosed by 2 lbs of pizza calzone dough.
– The ingredients include meatball, pepperoni, mushroom, ham, green peppers, onions, sausage, ricotta, and mozzarella cheeses. The vegetables are cut fresh and the components all pair very well together!!
– The calzone comes with 2 dishes of marinara sauce that are not required to be finished.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire calzone you are served.
– The calzone can also be bought to serve a family of 2-4 people.
– Winners receive the $25 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame.

title: Mashawy’s 7lb Burger Challenge
description:
– This monstrous burger comes with 7 lbs of  lean ground beef charbroiled with special Mashawy seasoning.
– Served with Mashawy fries and you have to finish everything in one sitting.
– Free Meal
– Free Mashawy T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Hub City Smokehouse’s “Hat Trick” BBQ Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The Hub City Hat Trick has 10 oz of pulled pork, 10 oz of pulled chicken, 10 oz of brisket, 3 strips of bacon, and 3 onion rings, all stacked high on a large bun.
– Comes with a side order of 8 oz of fries, 4 oz of baked beans, and 4 oz of coleslaw.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free “Hat-Trick” T-shirt
– Name engraved on Wall of Fame plaque

title: Solorzano Bros’ 20-inch “Gavone” New Jersey Pizza Challenge
description:
– This “Gavone” Pizza Challenge is hosted by the Solorzano Bros location on Webber Street.
– Solorzano Bros specializes in making Hoboken, New Jersey style pizza which is delicious!!
– For this big pizza challenge, you must finish a 20″ diameter New Jersey style cheese pizza.
– The 20″ pizza comes with 6 softball-sized garlic knots and an order of cheesy garlic bread.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Call ahead to schedule your challenge.
– “Gavone” champions win the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a $25 gift token, and Wall of Fame!!

title: John Ski’s House of “Fat Boy” Breakfast Challenge
where: John Ski's House of Breakfast and Lunch
address: 502 King St, Ste #A, Punta Gorda, FL 33950

title: Bufalucca’s “Man vs Insane” Spicy Wing Challenge
price: $6.97 is the menu price (the challenge wings may cost more)

title: Taste Pho & Noodle House’s Pho Challenge
Slow & Low BBQ’s Crazy Pork Sandwich Challenge (Viera)
description:
– Slow & Low BBQ has 2 locations serving the Cocoa Beach, Florida and Viera / Melbourne areas.
– Joel one of the owners created this pork sandwich challenge and it has been available for years.
– There is 2.5lbs of juicy BBQ pulled pork topped with 12oz white BBQ sauce and 1 pint coleslaw.
– There are also 9 American cheese slices plus red onions and pickles, all on a thick 1+ pound bun.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no other drinks or sides required.
– Winners receive the $40 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.

title: Slow & Low BBQ’s Crazy Pork Sandwich Challenge (Cocoa Beach)
address: 306 N Orlando Ave, Cocoa Beach, FL 32931
description:

title: Pirana Grille’s “Bus” Burger Challenge
address: 241 N US Hwy 1, Ormond Beach, FL 32174
description:
– 3 lbs of beef stacked and layered with 6 slices of cheese, bacon, and grilled onions.
– Includes mushrooms, red/green peppers, sausage, chorizo sausage, bacon, and jalapenos.
– Topped with lettuce, tomatoes, onions, onions rings, and a fried egg with some sauce.
– The burger is surrounded by 2 lbs of french fries with some coleslaw and pickle spears.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything on the plate.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Main Street Pizza’s 36″ Monster Pizza Challenge
description: There is a 36″ diameter pizza with lots of cheese that must be finished in less than 30 minutes by a team of 2 people. You can add up to 3 toppings but extra toppings are not required. Successful finishers win the pizza for free along with sweet t-shirts and a team photo up on the restaurant’s Wall of Fame.

title: The Revolution Ice Cream Anarchy Challenge (Brandon)
description:
– There are 24 scoops of ice cream total, featuring 2 scoops of each of their 12 original flavors.
– There are a few toppings added on top, but nothing too crazy.
– The entire food challenge weighs around 6 lbs total, so make sure you’re ready!!
– You are not allowed to order heated or warm up your water – only room-temperature water.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame!!

title: The Revolution Ice Cream Anarchy Challenge (Seminole Heights)
description:
– There are 24 scoops of ice cream total, featuring 2 scoops of each of their 12 original flavors.
– There are a few toppings added on top, but nothing too crazy.
– The entire food challenge weighs around 6 lbs total, so make sure you’re ready!!
– You are not allowed to order heated or warm up your water – only room-temperature water.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame!!

title: Rico’s Pizzeria’s 24″ Big Richie Pizza Challenge
description:
– The base of the pizza consists of 6 lbs of dough, sauce, and cheese.
– There are 6 lbs of toppings added. You must choose at least 3 different options.
– You can add as many as you want, and the total will still equal 6 lbs.
– The weight of each toppings will get divided proportionately based on how many you chose.
– Example: If you pick 3 toppings, you will get 2 lbs of each one. (Pick 6 = 1 lb / each)
– There is a 45 minute time limit for you and a partner to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirts
– Wall of Fame
– $150 CASH

title: Texas Cattle Company’s 5lb Steak Challenge
description:
– The challenge features a 5 lb top sirloin steak, one roll, and one house salad.
– There is a 1 hour and 15 minute time limit to finish everything (75 minutes).
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: The Sugar Factory’s King Kong Sundae Challenge
description: Sugar Factory Orlando has a specialty dessert called the King Kong Sundae. It contains 24 scoops of ice cream, a whole can of whipped cream, walnuts, cakes, sprinkles, M&M’s, 4 waffle cones, 3 unicorn lollipops, pretzels and much more. People who can finish the whole sundae may possibly win prizes (contact the restaurant for details), but either way the meal is not free or discounted.

title: Teak Neighborhood Grill’s Teak Burger Challenge (Maitland)
The Broken Yolk’s Iron Man Omelet Challenge (Carrollwood)
address: 10428 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
description:
–  12 egg omelet filled with mushrooms, onions, and cheese
– Smothered with their special chili and more cheese
– Includes a huge pile of homefries and 2 large biscuits
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Name on Special Plaque

title: The Rock N Roll Ribs “Appetite Of The Beast” Challenge
address: 4651 N State Rd 7, Coral Springs, FL 33073
description:
– Finish the challenge within 1 hour and get the meal FREE
– You also get a Free Shirt and your photo on the Wall Of Fame

title: Double D’s Porky Pig Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Sandwich filled with pulled pork, pulled chicken, sausages, and tri tips
– Topped with coleslaw and onion rings, all sandwiched between Texas Toast
– The challenge includes a large order of BBQ loaded cheesy French fries
– Everything must be finished within the 45 minute time limit
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame
– Free Meal ONLY if you break the record (19:22 as of 4/12/2015)

title: Pizza Xtreme’s 28-inch Xtreme Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Pizza Xtreme has been serving the Orlando, Florida area for years now, offering not only delicious pizza, but also sandwiches, salads, calzones, pastas, wraps, chicken wings, and more.
– This Xtreme 28″ Pizza Challenge has been available for years, and lots of teams have tried it.
– There is a 1 hour time limit for 2 people to finish a 1-topping pizza along with two 22oz drinks.
– The base pizza with 1 topping costs $30 and you are able to add more toppings if you’d like.
– Winners receive the pizza meal free plus sweet t-shirts and a team photo on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Redd’s Fueling Station’s Redd Hot Burger Challenge
address: 2320 W County Hwy 30a, Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459
description:
– Five 6 oz burger patties stuffed with jalapenos, onions, & cream cheese
– It’s a super-sized version of their “Matt’s Jalapeno Popper Burger”
– Topped with habaneros, veggies, pepper jack cheese, and pickled onions
– everything is served between 2 English muffins with 1 also in the middle
– 1 lb of sweet potato fries are included along with a 40 minute time limit
– 2 Rolling Rock draft beers are also included but can be substituted
– You must contact and give the restaurant at least 24 hours notice
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: The Whole Enchilada’s 6lb Ex-Wife Burrito Challenge (Plantation)
Allen’s Chain Of Lakes Sundae Challenge
description:
– 11 scoops of ice cream with 6 toppings
– 15-minute time limit
– Free Shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Tomasino’s 12-Inch “Made Man” Pizza Challenge (Winter Springs)
address: 5229 Red Bug Lake Rd, Winter Springs, FL 32708
description:
– There are four locations and all four offer this 12-Inch “Made Man” New York Style Stuffed Carnivore / Meat Lovers Pizza Challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish this 4.5-5 pound pizza that consists of two 14 oz pizza crusts filled with lots of homemade sauce, shredded mozzarella cheese, and then six meats: ham, meatball, bacon, pepperoni, salami, and sausage.
– You do have to finish at least one red marinara sauce container as part of the challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no drink requirements.
– Winners get the ~$33 pizza meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on Tomasino’s Wall of “Made Men.”

title: Tomasino’s 12-Inch “Made Man” Stuffed Pizza Challenge (Orlando)
description:
– There are four locations and all four offer this 12-Inch “Made Man” New York Style Stuffed Carnivore / Meat Lovers Pizza Challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish this 4.5-5 pound pizza that consists of two 14 oz pizza crusts filled with lots of homemade sauce, shredded mozzarella cheese, and then six meats: ham, meatball, bacon, pepperoni, salami, and sausage.
– You do have to finish at least one red marinara sauce container as part of the challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no drink requirements.
– Winners get the ~$33 pizza meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on Tomasino’s Wall of “Made Men.”

title: Dixie Grill’s Dixie Devil Wing Challenge
address: 5101 S Dixie Hwy, West Palm Beach, FL 33405
description:
– You must eat 6 extra spicy wings within 4 minutes to win the challenge
– You are required to sit for 7 full minutes total (4 minute time limit + 3 minute afterburn)
– Whether you finish in 1 minute or in 3 minutes & 59 seconds, you must sit for 7 full minutes
– No breaks or drinks are allowed during the challenge, but you may use one napkin
– Free T-shirt (For winners only)
– Picture on Wall of Fame and social media
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Frontier Steakhouse’s 6 Pound Steak Challenge
description:
– This 6lb steak is served with baked potato and salad
– There is a 75 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free license plate

title: Munchie’s Fire In The Hole Wing Challenge
description:
– You must eat 10 of these super-hot wings in 20 minutes.
– After completing, you have to endure a 10-minute afterburn.
– You may not feel quite right for a few days, but you will be a winner.

Burritos Restaurant is well known by locals for it’s tasty food, large portions, good prices, and laid back ambiance.
– There are 6 big burrito tortillas needed for this challenge filled with Mexican rice and refried beans.
– You can choose which meat(s) you want in your burrito – steak, ground beef, chicken, and/or pork.
– It also contains lettuce, cheese, tomatoes, and whatever other fillings/toppings you want added.

– The “Mongo” Burrito is served wet and topped with red & green sauces plus sour cream, guacamole, and pico de gallo. This all weighs 1-2lbs in addition to the base 8-9lb burrito. Good luck if decide to try it!!

– Winners receive the $100 Mexican burrito free, a sweet t-shirt, $100 cash, and Wall of Fame!!

(You must call ahead and schedule your challenge. Only available Tuesdays – Thursdays.)

title: Restaurant Tombo’s Hawaiian Loco Moco Challenge
address: 91-050 Fort Weaver Rd, Ewa Beach, HI 96706
description: There are ten 6 oz beef hamburger patties, 10 fried eggs, and 5 scoops of white rice, all covered with delicious brown gravy and served with 5 scoops of Hawaiian macaroni salad on the side. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the loco moco meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Island Sausage’s Hawaiian “Sausage Fest” Challenge
description:
– Challengers must finish one of each of the 6 handcrafted gourmet sausages available on the menu, served with 3 different orders of loaded fries. The toppings for those rotate, so your loaded fries might be different than what is in the photos. The sausage options might change too, depending on the season and time of year that you take the challenge. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners earn the $100 meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Aina Grill’s 6lb Hawaiian Loco Moco Burrito Challenge
description:
– There are 2 burrito tortillas filled with 5 scoops of fried rice, a habanero salsa, and 4 hamburger patties.
– The burrito is smothered with brown gravy and cheese, topped with 4 fried eggs that have runny yolks.
– The challenge includes 3 scoops of macaroni salad. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $45 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Aina Grill’s Wall of Fame.

title: Noods Ramen Bar’s Big Japanese Ramen Bowl Challenge
price: $45 (or $65 if you get sick inside restaurant)
description:
– There is a giant bowl of Japanese ramen equal to 4 normal-sized portions.
– There is just a 20 minute time limit to finish everything, including the broth.
– You cannot add ice to the broth to cool it down, or separate the noodles from the broth.
– Winners receive the $45 supersized bowl of ramen plus a free bowl of ramen next time.
– Please note that if you get sick inside the restaurant, there is an additional $20 cleanup fee.

title: Honolulu Burger Co’s “Aloha” Burger Challenge (Waikiki)
description:
– A tall 8-patty burger, served with 2 orders of fries and a milkshake.

– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– This challenge is known as the “King Kamehameha” Burger Challenge at the Makiki / Beretania location.
– Note: The Kaimuki / Waialae location doesn’t offer this burger challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Tante’s Island Cuisine’s Loco Moco Challenge
description:
– This delicious dish has 4 hamburger patties that weigh 2 lbs, served on 8 scoops of rice.
– Topped with 8 eggs and gravy and there is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: M.A.C. 24/7’s “MAC Daddy” Pancake Challenge
description:
– This is a pile of three 14″ pancakes with plenty of butter and all the syrup you want.
– They have multiple topping options on their menu, and you must choose one.
– There is a 90-minute time limit for this challenge to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Cool Cat Café’s 808 Burger Challenge (Lahaina Maui)
description: – Cool Cat Cafe has 3 locations, and all offer this challenge.

title: Honolulu Burger Co’s “King Kamehameha” Burger Challenge (Makiki)
description:
– A tall 8-patty burger, served with 2 orders of fries and a milkshake.
– Each layer represents a different burger they have on their menu.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– This challenge is known as the “Aloha” Burger Challenge at the Waikiki / Kalakaua location in the Waikiki Food Hall (3rd floor) that is part of Royal Hawaiian Center.
– Note: The Kaimuki / Waialae location doesn’t offer this burger challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Waha Grill’s “Spicy Waha” Burger Challenge
description:
– Waha Grill is home to three food challenges – The “Meat the Challenge” burger challenge, the “Triple Waha” burger challenge, and the “Spicy Waha” challenge.
– The “Spicy Waha” burger challenge consists of a “Extreme Heat Burger” and an order of their spicy fries. The Extreme Heat Burger has grilled onions, grilled habaneros, grilled mushrooms, lettuce, tomatoes, pepper jack cheese, a spicy burger patty, all topped with a ghost pepper habanero Carolina reaper sauce. The spicy fries are topped with a ghost pepper habanero seasoning.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire burger and fries. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: Waha Grill’s “Triple Waha” Burger Challenge
description:
– Waha Grill is home to three food challenges – The “Meat the Challenge” burger challenge, the “Triple Waha” burger challenge, and the “Spicy Waha” challenge.
– The “Triple Waha” burger challenge consists of a 3 patty stacked burger and small side of fries. There are three (3) 0.5lb burger patties stacked between a bun. You may choose a cheese of your choice.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish the entire burger and fries. Successful completions will get a picture up on their wall of fame.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion. The picture below is not the actual challenge, but rather a picture of their normal Waha Burger. The actual challenge has three patties.

title: Waha Grill’s “Meat The Challenge” 5lb Burger Challenge
description:
– Waha Grill is home to three food challenges – The “Meat the Challenge” burger challenge, the “Triple Waha” burger challenge, and the “Spicy Waha” challenge.
– The “Meat The Challenge” burger challenge consists of a 10 patty stacked burger and small side of fries. There are ten (10) 0.5lb burger patties stacked between a bun.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire burger and fries. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: Sully’s GastroPub’s Burger Challenge
description: Sully’s GastroPub offers a giant burger available for families and groups of people. It can also be taken on as a challenge!! Choose any burger from the menu and it can be supersized. Be careful though, since some of the choices are bigger and heavier than the others, due to having more toppings. Teams of two people get 45 minutes to eat the entire burger served with 2lbs of hand-cut fries. Individuals get 45 minutes to eat just the burger, without fries. There are no drinks required. The solo challenge might be cheaper, but the team challenge costs $60 if you fail. Winners get the meal free plus a sweet Sully’s T-shirt and a spot on the Wall of Fame!! If you are interested in trying the challenge, be sure to call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance to make sure Sully’s has a large bun available. Good luck and be sure to win before you begin!!

title: Burly Burger’s “Brigham” Cheeseburger Challenge (Idaho Falls)
description: There are four Burly Burger locations around the Salt Lake City area in Utah, and there is another Burly Burger hamburger restaurant in Idaho Falls, Idaho. All five offer this 10-Patty “Brigham” Cheeseburger Challenge, named after Brigham Young who led the Mormons to Utah back in 1847. There is a one sitting time limit to eat TEN 1/3 pound 50/50 beef hamburger patties stacked up high and layered with cheese slices. The beef patties are fresh-never-frozen and made with 50% beef brisket and 50% beef chuck. There is lots of homemade “Burly Sauce” or “Fry Sauce” and there are some healthy vegetables on the bottom of the burger. Randy Santel was given TWO large orders of their fries, as shown in the photos, but everyone else seems to get just one large order as shown in the other photo below. Challengers must finish a large milkshake and there is a one sitting time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $47 burger meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on the Burly Burger location’s Wall of Fame!! Contact the restaurant ahead of time to schedule your challenge if interested.

title: Flying Pie Pizzeria’s “Habanero Pizza” Challenge
description:
– This is a spicy pizza challenge consisting of an 8-inch triple habanero pizza.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the pizza for free, and the rest of your bill is 50 percent off during that visit.
– Challenge is only available in the summer, so make sure to call ahead to confirm availability.

title: Diamond Lil’s “50-oz Rib Eye” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 50-oz rib eye steak, choice of soup, salad, bread, baked potato, or french fries, corn on the cob, dessert, and a beverage.
– There is a 50-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $95 dollar meal for free.

title: Indian Creek Steakhouse’s 72oz Ribeye Steak Challenge
description: For this challenge, there are multiple ribeye steaks, cooked to your liking, that all add up to 72 ounces total, or 4.5 pounds. Along with the steaks, you must finish a piece of fried bread, a side salad, a bowl of baked beans, and a baked potato. There is a 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $113 steak dinner meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!! Note: Please contact the restaurant ahead of time if interested to schedule your challenge in advance.

title: Big Jud’s Burger Challenges (Ashton)
description:
– Big Jud’s has 4 locations, all based in Idaho, and all offer multiple challenges.
– This location offers 3 burger challenges!
– They offer a 1lb, a 2lb, and an even bigger challenge called the “Man VS Food” burger challenge.
– The 1lb and 2lb challenge burgers are topped with cheese, ketchup, mustard, mayo, pickles, onions, tomatoes, and lettuce.
– The “Man VS Food” burger consists of 2 1lb patties, 10 bacon slices, 2 layers of mushrooms, 2 layers of blue cheese crumbles, Swiss cheese, mayo, tomato, and lettuce.
– The challenges include 1lb of French fries or tater tots.
– You must also finish a large soda or other non-water beverage.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish all of them.
– Winners of the 1lb burger challenge receive a spot on the wall of fame.
– Winners of the 2lb burger challenge and the “Man VS Food” burger challenge receive a free meal, a free t-shirt, and a spot on the wall of fame.
– CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THE RULES AND WALL OF FAME!!

title: Big Jud’s Burger Challenges (Meridian)
description:
– Big Jud’s has 4 locations, all based in Idaho, and all offer multiple challenges.

– The “Man VS Food” burger consists of 2 1lb patties, 10 bacon slices, 2 layers of mushrooms, 2 layers of blue cheese crumbles, Swiss cheese, mayo, tomato, and lettuce.

description:

– This challenge consists of a 2ft long sandwich, which you are allowed to pick from any of their sandwich options and customize to your liking, a bag of chips, and a 32oz drink.
– Challengers have 20 minutes to finish the meal.
– Winners get a free t-shirt and a spot on the wall of fame.

title: Big Jud’s 2lb Burger Challenge (Archer)
description:
– Big Jud’s has 4 locations, all based in Idaho, and all offer multiple challenges
– Just like the 1lb burger challenge, but this one has a 2nd patty.
– Two 1lb burger patties topped with cheese, veggies, and sauces.
– The challenge includes over 1lb of French fries or tater tots.

title: Westside’s 18″ Death By Pizza Challenge (Post Falls)
description:
– There are around 40 Westside Pizza locations, with most of them being around the Pacific Northwest United States.
– Almost all of them offer an 18-inch “Death By Pizza” Challenge loaded with lots of tasty toppings.
– The “Death By Pizza” is their most popular specialty topping option w/ 5 meats plus a lot more!!
– Toppings: pepperoni, Canadian bacon, sausage, beef, real bacon, canned pineapple, mushrooms, black olives, onions, and green peppers.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish the pizza, including all the toppings. Substitutions are allowed.
– Winners receive the $32.99 pizza free (price can vary based on location), a sweet t-shirt, $50 cash, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– If you are a location’s 1st winner or if you break the time record, you get an extra $50 cash ($100 total).
– At some locations, you can walk in and try it, but you are encouraged to schedule your attempt in advance.

title: The Ranch’s “Scotsman” Triple Barnyard Burger Challenge
description:
– A Triple Barnyard Burger has 3/4lbs beef, 3 eggs, 3 slices of bacon, 3/4lbs pulled pork, 3 slices of provolone cheese, and BBQ sauce. All that is served with cheese chili cheese fries, a basket of garlic or truffle fries, and 12 shortbread cookies dipped in chocolate. There is a one sitting time limit to finish everything you are served, and the challenge might also include finishing your choice of soda.
– This is kind of a different challenge. The challenge period goes on for 90 days, before starting over again. Each person pays $40 for the meal, win or lose, and $10 from each challenge goes towards a jackpot. At the end of each 90 day period, the finisher with the fastest time gets the jackpot. Good luck and Win Before You Begin!!

title: Stella’s Ice Cream’s “Bulldog” Sundae Challenge (Nampa)
description:

– Free Meal

address: 920 N Hwy 41, Ste #1, Post Falls, ID 83854
description:

– 5 lbs dough + 4 lbs cheese + 2.5 lbs sauce + 10.5 lbs meat toppings (listed below)
– 5 meat toppings: pepperoni, Italian sausage, Canadian bacon, salami, and bacon

title: The Garage Cafe’s “Hemi” Burger and Fries Challenge
description:

title: Coach’s Corner Bar & Grill’s “Champions Platter” Food Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a four patty stacked burger (each Angus beef patty weighs 1/2lb), topped with bacon, lettuce, tomato, and onion.
– In addition to the burger, there is a 1lb side of fries, a side of mac and cheese, 6 homemade egg rolls (delicious!), and 12 bone-in gochujang wings.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get a sweet t-shirt and $50 gift card.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted for completion.

title: Bill’s Toasty’s Ten Patty Burger Challenge
description:
– Bill’s Toasty is home to three different burger challenges, all three very similar, with the only difference being the number of patties on the burger.
– This ten patty burger challenge consists of a stacked burger with ten 8-ounce beef patties, each with a slice of cheese of your choice. There’s also some healthy vegetables on top.
– In addition to the burger, you have to choose one side and a beverage as part of the challenge.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get a sweet t-shirt, a $20 gift card, and recognition on their Facebook page with a shout-out for finishing.
– NOTE: The picture below is for their six patty burger challenge.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Bill’s Toasty’s Eight Patty Burger Challenge
description:
– Bill’s Toasty is home to three different burger challenges, all three very similar, with the only difference being the number of patties on the burger.
– This eight patty burger challenge consists of a stacked burger with eight 8-ounce beef patties, each with a slice of cheese of your choice. There’s also some healthy vegetables on top.
– In addition to the burger, you have to choose one side and a beverage as part of the challenge.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get a sweet t-shirt, a $15 gift card, and recognition on their Facebook page with a shout-out for finishing.
– NOTE: The picture below is for their six patty burger challenge.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Bill’s Toasty’s Six Patty Burger Challenge
description:
– Bill’s Toasty is home to three different burger challenges, all three very similar, with the only difference being the number of patties on the burger.
– This six patty burger challenge consists of a stacked burger with six 8-ounce beef patties, each with a slice of cheese of your choice. There’s also some healthy vegetables on top.
– In addition to the burger, you have to choose one side and a beverage as part of the challenge.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get a sweet t-shirt, a $10 gift card, and recognition on their Facebook page with a shout-out for finishing.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Reds Rolls’s “3’s A Crowd” Food Challenge
description:
– The “3’s A Crowd” challenge is a unique one that consists of 12 sausage rolls of your choice, a 12-inch Vegemite roll, and a milkshake flavor of your choice.
– Reds Rolls is an Australian bakery, and Vegemite is a savory Australian food spread, so how appropriate!
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, photo on the wall of fame, and the progressive jackpot. Each failed attempt of the challenge adds $10 to the pot.
– NOTE: You must schedule this challenge at least 24 hours in advance, so please contact the restaurant if you are interested in taking the challenge on.

title: Old World Pizza of Elmwood Park’s “Enorme” 18” Pizza Challenge
where: Old World Pizza of Elmwood Park
address: 7230 W North Ave, Elmwood Park, IL 60707
description:
– The “Enorme” pizza challenge is an 18” diameter double decker pizza with one topping. Additional toppings can be added for an additional charge, but we would recommend against that if you’re doing the challenge!
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire pizza. Successful completions win the meal for free, an exclusive trophy t-shirt, and a spot on the restaurant’s wall of fame.
–  NOTE: This challenge is only available on Mondays.

title: Good Times Grill’s “GTG” Burger Challenge
description:
– The “GTG” Burger challenge consists of 2 grilled cheese sandwiches as the buns, 5 ribeye blend patties, 1 Frisco sandwich, 2 fried eggs, and 10 strips of bacon.
– In addition to the stacked burger, there is a side of their spicy cheese curds and a 32oz Lemon Shakeup required.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge platter and drink. Successful completions win the meal free, a GTG challenge t-shirt, eternal bragging rights, and a place in the GTG Hall of Fame.

title: Bobbie Lane’s BBQ’s “Smokehouse Beast” BBQ Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists a giant BBQ meat platter and sides. It includes 1lb brisket, 1lb pulled pork, 1lb smoked turkey, 1/2 rack of ribs, 4 smoked sausages, 3 large sides of your choice, and 4 pieces of Texas toast.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge platter. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame. If you do not complete the challenge, your picture goes up on their wall of shame!

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Chicago)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Small Town Scoop’s “Big Muddy Monster” Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant ice cream sundae composed of 27 four-ounce scoops of ice cream, brownies, bananas, toppings, whip cream, and cherries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae. Successful completions win the meal for free, a t-shirt, a coffee mug, and go on the wall of fame. As a bonus, the person with the fastest completion time at the end of the calendar year wins $250!
– If you still finish the ice cream sundae in one sitting, but not under the 30 minutes, you do not get the meal for free, but do get a t-shirt and picture on the wall of fame. You also qualify for the $250 end of year cash prize.

title: Smoked N Smashed’s “Smashed & Loaded” Burger Challenge
description:
Brave challengers have just 30 minutes to finish three giant items from the Smoked N Smashed menu. There is a quadruple smash cheeseburger loaded with healthy vegetables on a Brioche bun, and for dessert you must finish a large flavored frozen custard milkshake. The largest part of this challenge is a supersized version of their Loaded Twisted Fries which consists of Twisted Fries loaded with cheeses and other saucy toppings plus a meat of your choosing. This is a pay-to-play food challenge that costs $25 whether you win or lose.
Winners get a sweet t-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame!!

title: La Fuente’s 5-6lb Mexican Burrito Challenge (Fairfield)
description:
– You have a 30 minute time limit to finish this 5-6 pound burrito served wet and covered with queso.
– There are three large flour burrito tortillas filled with beef steak meat, shredded chicken, and fried bacon.
– The burrito is also filled with Mexican rice, and ask for some refried beans to help it all go down faster.
– Winners get the $30 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– There are three La Fuente locations (currently) and they all offer this giant Mexican burrito challenge.

title: La Fuente’s 5-6lb Mexican Burrito Challenge (Flora)
description:
– You have a 30 minute time limit to finish this 5-6 pound burrito served wet and covered with queso.

– The burrito is also filled with Mexican rice, and ask for some refried beans to help it all go down faster.

– There is a short 15 minute time limit to eat TWENTY (20) of Gustavo’s street tacos.

address: 360 S Randall Rd, North Aurora, IL 60542
description:
– This challenge consists of 12 pancakes smothered in regular or sugar-free syrup, with only one cup of water allowed.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $29.99 meal for free, a $10 gift card, and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Fernando’s “Mega Crazy Meat Burrito” Challenge
