– Winners receive the $43.99 meal for free, a koozie, and a free margarita. (If you’re lucky, you might also get a free T-Shirt!)

title: Caliendo’s 2ft-Long “Bada Bing” Sub Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Caliendo’s Restaurant & Bar has served the Winfield, Illinois area for many years now.
– Caliendo’s offers three different food challenges on the menu, including this sub sandwich challenge.
– They also host a “Hitman” Burger Challenge and 5lb “Wise Guy” Italian Calzone Challenge.
– The challenge used to consist of a 24″ or 2′ long sandwich, but now there are four 6″ sandwiches.
– Each 6″ sandwich has lots of capicola, salami, and Mortadella luncheon meat (cold).
– The meats are topped with provolone cheese, some healthy vegetables, and Italian salad dressing.

Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

description:

– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $68 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

Winners receive the $49.99 meal for free, and a free T-Shirt.

– Winners receive the $75 meal for free, their pictures on the Wall of Fame, and free custom T-Shirts.

– Winners receive their $98 meal for free, their pictures on the Wall of Fame, and free T-Shirts.

title: The Dirty Bird’s “Big Berty” Eating Challenge
description: There are 2.5 pounds of crinkle cut fries topped with 1 giant fried pork tenderloin, 5 chicken strips, 2 quarter-pound cheeseburgers, and 1/2 pound of juicy BBQ pulled pork, all smothered with cheese sauce. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the $50 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on The Dirty Bird’s Wall of Fame!!

description:
Cantina 52 serves up 11 different delicious tacos and you get 30 minutes to finish one of each. There are no modifications allowed and winners get a sweet Cantina 52 t-shirt and a spot on the Hall of Fame!!
*Please note that the tacos are not free or discounted if you win.

– You do not need to call ahead and schedule your challenge. Try it anytime and good luck!!
– Winners receive the meal free, a $25 gift card to be used later, and a spot on the Wall of Fame!!
– Champions also receive a sweet “I FLAPJACKED THE STACK!!” t-shirt proclaiming victory!!

where: The Brown Cow Ice Cream Parlor
description:
– 21 scoops of ice cream (1 scoop of each of their 21 flavors)
– Topped with mounds of whipped cream, nuts, sprinkles, and a cherry
– The 7lb ice cream sundae must be finished in 15 minutes to win
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Chick’s “Big Ass” Team Chicken Lip Challenge (By The River)
description:
– Chick’s has 2 locations, both based in IL, and both offer this challenge.
– 25 chicken lips smothered in buffalo flavored lip sauce
– Each chicken lip includes 4 ounces of hand cut chicken breast
– Served with 16 ounces of ranch or blue cheese dressing (or Lip Sauce)
– There is also a giant ice cream pie that is added for a sweet dessert
– You and a friend have 1 hour to finish everything, including the dressing
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $75 gift card

title: The Mega Cheesie’s Sandwich Challenge (Belmont)
description: – Note: A 3-day notice is required before attempting this challenge.

title: Charlie Parker’s Giant Pancake Challenge
description:
– This stack of pancakes is not only tall, but it is wide as well.
– 4 dinner plate sized pancakes must be eaten in one sitting.
– The 4 pancakes are equal to 12 of their standard pancakes.
– The challenge must be ordered before 12 pm noon.
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Bartolini’s 10lb Meatball Sandwich Team Challenge (4 People)
description:
– 40 Bartolini Meatballs on A 3 Foot Turano French Bread with 1.5 LBS of Red Gravy
– 1.5 LBS of Melted Mozzarella Cheese & 1 LB of Roasted Green Peppers
– For this challenge you share it with 3 friends (4 total) (Each person must eat their 1/4)
– There is a 15-minute time limit to finish everything on the board
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– If your team breaks the 4 min & 48 sec team record, you win $1000 cash!! (amateurs only)

title: Bartolini’s 10lb Meatball Sandwich Team Challenge (3 People)
description:
– 40 Bartolini Meatballs on A 3 Foot Turano French Bread with 1.5 LBS of Red Gravy
– 1.5 LBS of Melted Mozzarella Cheese & 1 LB of Roasted Green Peppers
– For this challenge you share it with 2 friends (3 total) (Each person must eat their 1/3)
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish everything on the board
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– If your team breaks the 4 min & 48 sec team record, you win $1000 cash!! (amateurs only)

title: Bartolini’s 10lb Meatball Sandwich Team Challenge (2 People)
description:
– 40 Bartolini Meatballs on A 3 Foot Turano French Bread with 1.5 LBS of Red Gravy
– 1.5 LBS of Melted Mozzarella Cheese & 1 LB of Roasted Green Peppers
– For this challenge you share it with a friend (Each person must eat their half)
– There is a 45-minute time limit to finish everything on the board
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– If your team breaks the 4 min & 48 sec team record, you win $1000 cash!! (amateurs only)

title: Bartolini’s 10lb Meatball Sandwich Challenge (Solo)
description:
– 40 Bartolini Meatballs on a 3 Foot Turano French Bread with 1.5 LBS of Red Gravy
– 1.5 LBS of Melted Mozzarella Cheese & 1 LB of Roasted Green Peppers
– You must break the current house record (6 minutes & 51 seconds as of 10/30/2018), set by Molly Schuyler.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt (whether you win or lose)
– $2,500 CASH!!
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Windhill Pancake Parlor’s 12-Egg “Ironman” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– Windhill Pancake Parlor has been serving the McHenry, Illinois area for many years now.
– This Ironman Breakfast Challenge has been available for most of those years with few winners.
– There are three 4-egg omelets, each filled with green peppers, mushrooms, onions, and cheese.
– Each omelette gets covered with chili and more cheese, and you can add more stuff if you want to.
– The challenge includes a giant “unhealthy” portion of American fries (potatoes) plus 2 buttermilk biscuits.
– The pecan bread eaten at the end of Randy’s video was just optional. No drinks are required either.
– Winners pay just $2.00 for their meal and they also earn a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame plaque.
– Please call ahead and schedule your challenge at a non-busy time if you’re interested in trying.

title: Chick’s “Big Ass” Team Chicken Lip Challenge (On The Square)
description:
– Chick’s has 2 locations, both based in IL, and both offer this challenge.
– 25 chicken lips smothered in buffalo flavored lip sauce
– Each chicken lip includes 4 ounces of hand cut chicken breast
– Served with 16 ounces of ranch or blue cheese dressing (or Lip Sauce)
– There is also a giant ice cream pie that is added for a sweet dessert
– You and a friend have 1 hour to finish everything, including the dressing
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $75 gift card

title: The Hope & Anchor’s “Fat Bastard” Burger Challenge
description:
– 2lbs of beef stacked high on a bun (triple cheeseburger), served with 1lb of fries.
– You have to finish everything in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Picture on their Facebook page
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Di Nico’s Giant Slice Challenge (La Grange)
address: 42 S La Grange Rd, LaGrange, IL 60525
description:
– These slices each weigh over 1lb, and you have to eat 2 of them.
– There is a 30-minute time limit for this challenge.
– Only available on Mondays.
– Free Shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Suzy’s Swirl’s “Big Joe” 64oz Frozen Yogurt Challenge
description:
– Suzy Swirl Frozen Yogurt has 2 locations, both based around the Chicago, IL, but only this one offers this challenge.
– Note: This challenge is only available in March.

title: Nonna’s Giant Slice Pizza Challenge (Oak Lawn)
address: 9602 S Cicero Ave, Oak Lawn, IL 60453
description:
– Nonna’s Pizza has 3 locations, all based on in the Chicago, IL area, and all offer this challenge!
– These pizza slices are over 1lb each.
– Not only must you eat one, but you have to eat another one.
– Only offered on Mondays.
– Winners receive the meal for free and a free t-shirt

title: Nonna’s Giant Slice Pizza Challenge (Crestwood)
description:
– Nonna’s Pizza has 3 locations, all based on in the Chicago, IL area, and all offer this challenge!
– These pizza slices are over 1lb each.
– Not only must you eat one, but you have to eat another one.
– Only offered on Mondays.
– Winners receive the meal for free and a free t-shirt.

title: The Big Timmy Burger Challenge (Gurnee)
description:
– Timothy O’Toole’s has 4 locations, all based around the Chicago area, and all offer this challenge.
– A tall, tall burger with 2 1/2lb burger patties, cheese, bacon, fried onion strings, lettuce, tomato, pickle, red onion, and BBQ sauce.
– Served with Irish style fries (similar to loaded cheese fries)
– (Used to only include fries and onion rings but that recently changed)
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: The Big Timmy Burger Challenge (Chicago)
description:
– Timothy O’Toole’s has 4 locations, all based around the Chicago area, and all offer this challenge.
– A tall, tall burger with 2 1/2lb burger patties, cheese, bacon, fried onion strings, lettuce, tomato, pickle, red onion, and BBQ sauce.
– Served with Irish style fries (similar to loaded cheese fries)
– (Used to only include fries and onion rings but that recently changed)
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: The Rockstar Burger Challenge (Lakeview)
description:
– Rocks has 2 locations, both based in Chicago, IL, and both locations offer this challenge.
– A 4-layered burger weighing about 3lbs with all of the toppings
– Served on a pretzel bun with 1lb of fries (It all weighs 4lbs total)
– There is a 30 minute time limit (only available at this location)
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Lucky’s Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Pick any 3 of Lucky’s special overstuffed sandwiches.
– They each have meat, coleslaw, and fries in the sandwiches.
– Each sandwich weighs around 1.5 pounds
– Free meal if finished under 30 minutes
– One sandwich free if finished under an hour
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
CHECK OUT THEIR CHALLENGE PAGE ON THEIR WEBSITE!!

title: Jake Melnick’s XXXX Hot Wing Challenge
description:
– These wings have dreaded Carolina reaper, Trinidad scorpion, ghost pepper, and habanero hot sauce on them.
– You need to eat 8 of them in one sitting to win.
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Flame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Colonial Café’s Kitchen Sink Sundae Challenge (St Charles)
address: 1625 E Main St, St Charles, IL 60174
description:
– A pile of ice cream with lots of bananas, syrup, and plenty of toppings.
– Free bumper sticker
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Colonial Café’s Kitchen Sink Sundae Challenge (Naperville)
description:
– A pile of ice cream with lots of bananas, syrup, and plenty of toppings.
– Free bumper sticker
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Lindy’s 18 Scoop “Beast” Sundae Challenge
description:
– 18 scoops of ice cream, 2 apples, 6 bananas, lots of sauces, & some brownies
– Vanilla wafers & whipped cream
– All topped with some cherries
– 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: The challenge is only available at this location.

title: Alexander’s “Beefeater’s Club” Challenge (Springfield)
description:
– Alexander’s Steakhouse has 3 locations, all based in IL, and all offer this challenge.
– 48 Ounce (3 Pounds) Top Sirloin, a Salad, and a Baked Potato
– Served with a piece of Grilled Texas Toast
– 1 hour time limit
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free T-shirt or $20 gift card
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Alexander’s “Beefeater’s Club” Steak Challenge (Normal)
description:
– Alexander’s Steakhouse has 3 locations, all based in IL, and all offer this challenge.
– 48oz (3lbs) Top Sirloin, a Salad, and a Baked Potato
– Served with a piece of Grilled Texas Toast
– 1 hour time limit
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Alexander’s “Beefeater’s Club” Challenge (Peoria)
description:
– Alexander’s Steakhouse has 3 locations, all based in IL, and all offer this challenge.
– 48 Ounce (3 Pounds) Top Sirloin, a Salad, and a Baked Potato
– Served with a piece of Grilled Texas Toast
– 1 hour time limit
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free T-shirt or $20 gift card
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Prime Quarter’s 40oz “Beefeater” Steak Challenge (Princeton)
description:
– There are three Prime Quarter Steak House locations in Wisconsin and Princeton, Illinois.
– Their famous 40oz Beefeater Steak Challenge has been attempted thousands of times.
– Brave challengers must finish a 40oz “Beefeater” sirloin steak along with a piece of Texas toast, a baked potato, and a side salad made from their popular all you can eat salad bar.
– There is a 75 minute time limit to finish the base challenge. Winners still pay $42 for the steak dinner but they get a Prime Quarter medallion that they can bring back anytime for a $35 credit off their next meal.
– Please note: There are TWO “Beefeater” Steak Challenges pictured. The challenge is to finish just one.

title: Bandidos Grill n Cantina’s 20 Taco Challenge
description:
– The 20 taco challenge consists of 20 tacos, each with ground beef or marinated chicken, topped with lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese inside a soft or hard shell.
– There is a very short 10 minute time limit to finish all 20 tacos. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, $25 gift card, and picture up on the restaurant’s wall of fame.
– NOTE: This challenge is only available on Tuesdays, and is only available at the Wabash location.

title: Bandidos Grill n Cantina’s 20” “Mega” Burrito Challenge
description:
– The “Mega” burrito challenge is a 20” long burrito stuffed with ground beef or chicken, rice, beans, lettuce, sour cream, and tomatoes. It is topped with cheese sauce, red sauce, and pico de gallo.
– There is a very short 15 minute time limit to finish the entire burrito. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, $20 gift card, and picture up on the restaurant’s wall of fame. Losers get a challenge sticker just for their valiant challenge attempt.
– If a group of people want to try the challenge, everyone orders it, and the first person who finishes will get it for free. The remainder of the group will still have to pay for each burrito.
– NOTE: This challenge is only available at the Wabash location.

title: Backroads BBQ’s “The Mountain” BBQ Challenge
address: 1404 W South St Ste 200, Lebanon, IN 46052
description:
– The Mountain starts with 2 hoagie rolls and is topped with 1.5lbs of pulled pork, 1.5lbs of brisket, and 1lb of sausage. It is then topped with 12oz of coleslaw, 5oz of crispy fried onions, and BBQ sauce.
– There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish the entire BBQ platter. Successful completions win the meal for free, a hat and apron, and a photo on the wall of fame for endless bragging rights.

title: Rush Off Main’s “Da Bears” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 20-inch Italian beef sandwich loaded with cheese and peppers.
– In addition to the sandwich, a large side of tater tots or fries is required for the challenge.
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish the entire sandwich and tater tots or fries. Successful completions win the meal for free, a $50 gift card to be used later, and a t-shirt.

title: Oink Smokehouse’s 7lb “Totcho” Tater Tot Nachos Challenge
description: The challenge features all four of the signature totcho dishes on Oink’s menu: Smoked Rueben Totchos, Brisket Totchos, Triple Pig Totchos (with pulled pork, chorizo, and bacon), and Buffalo Chicken Totchos. There are four pounds of fried tater tots that serve as the base, and those are all smothered with about one pound (1 lb) of Oink’s homemade white queso / cheese sauce. It all weighs 7 pounds total and there is a 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $75 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt, a $100 gift card to come back and use later, and spot on Oink’s Wall of Fame!! Call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance if interested.

title: Family Pizza & BBQ’s “26-Inch Family” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This is a 26-inch team pizza challenge for 2 people, topped with bacon, black olives, cheese, green olives, green peppers, ham, mushrooms, pepperoni, and sausage.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $50 dollar meal for free and their picture on the restaurant’s website.

title: Giordano’s “Deep Dish Pizza” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 14-inch medium deep dish cheese pizza.
– There is a 25-minute time limit to beat the challenge.
– Winners receive their picture on the Wall of Fame and a free T-Shirt.
– If you beat the current record, you also get the $22.45 meal for free, and one free pizza every month for an entire year.
Note: This meal is only free if you beat the current record.

title: Burlington Boathouse’s “Here Piggy” Loaded Fries Challenge
description:
– A 4.5 pound bag of fries is cooked and then the fries are topped with 1.5 pounds of juicy pulled pork. All that is smothered with lots of nacho cheese and BBQ sauce. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Note: The coleslaw, green peppers, and red onions in the photo were optional and not required.
– Winners receive the $33 loaded fries meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the Wall of Fame.
– Champions also win the cash jackpot which goes up each time somebody fails the challenge.

title: AJ’s Burgers & Beef’s Burger Challenge
address: 302 Vine St Suite 150, West Lafayette, IN 47906
description:
– This challenge consists of 8 1/3-lb burger patties with cheese, plus 4 toppings of choice, along with a large side of loaded fries.
– There is a 13-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners who finish in under 13 minutes receive the $30 meal for free, their picture on social media, and a $25 gift card.
– Finish in under 30 minutes and get a free T-Shirt.
– Challenge is only available after 5 PM.

title: Whiskey Bent Bar and Grill’s “Brillo Burger” Challenge
address: 5250 E US Hwy 36 Suite 120, Avon, IN 46123
description:
– This challenge consists of three 7-oz beef patties, 4 slices of Texas toast, 6 slices of bacon, 3 slices of American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickle, along with a 1-pound side of fries.
– There is a 20-minute time limit.
– Winners receive the $29.99 meal for free, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Burlington Boathouse’s “Monster” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This is a challenge for two people. It consists of a 10-pound pizza with at least 1 topping of your choice.
– The pizza toppings can be split into halves if desired. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winning teams receive the $80 pizza free, sweet t-shirts, a spot on Wall of Fame, and the cash jackpot!!

title: Fox’s Pizza Den’s “Big One” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This is a 15-pound pizza challenge for teams of 3, and it consists of a 30-inch “Big One” pizza with 3 toppings of choice.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish the challenge, and a 15-minute wait period after.
– Winners receive their $74.64 meal for free, a $100 gift card, bragging rights, and their picture on the Wall of Fame.
Note: Challenge must be scheduled 24 hours in advance.

title: Reme Restaurant’s “Mega Burrito” Challenge
address: 2683 E Main Street Suite 113, Plainfield, IN, United States, 46168
description:
– This challenge consists of a 6-lb “Mega Burrito” stuffed full of beef, onion, tomato, lettuce, rice, beans, and cheese, and covered in sauce.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete this challenge.
– Winners receive the $49.99 meal for free, their picture on the restaurant’s social media, and a free T-Shirt.

title: El Mazatlan’s “Taco Takedown” Team Challenge
address: 900 W National Hwy Suite 9, Washington, IN 47501
description:
– This team challenge consists of 50 soft-shelled tacos weighing about 4-ounces each, filled with your choice of ground beef, chicken, steak, or shrimp.
– There is a 36-minute time limit to finish the challenge.
– Winners receive the $120 meal for free, two $40 gift cards, $50 cash each, and free T-Shirts.

title: El Mazatlan’s “Taco Takedown” Solo Challenge
address: 900 W National Hwy Suite 9, Washington, IN 47501
description:
– This solo challenge consists of 50 soft-shelled tacos weighing about 4-ounces each, filled with your choice of ground beef, chicken, steak, or shrimp.
– There is a 46-minute time limit to finish the challenge.
– Winners receive the $120 meal for free, a $40 gift card, $100 cash, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Freshieez Pizza Challenges
description:
– Freshieez has 4 different pizza challenges to choose from, ranging from 7 to 10 pounds, all with different time limits and prizes.
– Each challenge consists of 1 medium bread chip with two 2-ounce dipping sauces, a 20-inch pizza with 2 meat and 2 vegetable toppings of choice, 1 medium dessert chip with 14-ounces of choice of fruit topping along with two 2-ounce frosting cups, and a milkshake. (The pizza will be cut down or additional toppings will be added to fit the weight of chosen challenge.)
– The current record must be beaten to win the challenge, or if challenge is undefeated, specific time limits are in place.
– Currently only the 7-pound challenge has been defeated, with the current record being 21:25. The 8, 9, and 10-pound challenges have 40, 50 and 60-minute time limits respectively.
– Winners will receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, a free T-Shirt, and a cash prize.
Note: This restaurant only has outdoor seating, so plan accordingly. They also require a 48-hour notice to try the challenge.

title: Link Tavern’s “Beast Burger” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 4.5-pound burger containing 7 beef patties, 7 slices of cheese, 3 pickle spears, lettuce, onion, and tomato, plus a 1-pound side of fries and a drink.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $35 meal free and their picture on social media, along with a bucket, mouthwash, a roll of Tums, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Hacienda’s “Big Juan” Burrito Challenge
description:
– This is a 4+ pound burrito challenge only offered during the month of April, and it consists of a wet burrito filled with choice of shredded pork, chicken, beef, or ground beef, along with other fillings such as cheese, lettuce, and tomato, and then covered in sauce.
– There is a one-sitting time limit.
– Challengers get a free T-Shirt just for ordering the $13.99 Big Juan burrito, and if completed, also receive a free hat and their picture on the Big Wall of Fame.
Note: Meal is not free or discounted if you win, and challenge is only offered during the month of April.

title: Rugie’s Dugout “Rugie” Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play challenge consisting of a big burger containing four 1/2-lb beef patties, Swiss and American cheese, 8 slices of bacon, and topped with lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickle, along with a 1-pound side of tater tots.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive their picture on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Breakroom Pub and Grill’s “Messy” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are four “Crystal Mess” Burgers from the menu. Each includes an 8oz beef hamburger patty, 2 slices of cheese, 2 strips of bacon, 2 ounces each of ranch dressing and BBQ sauce, and 2 ounces of sauteed onions. Texas Toast is used as the buns and the challenge includes one pound of crinkle-cut fries.
– There is a time limit of 45 minutes and 40 seconds to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $36.99 meal for free, their picture on the “Messy” Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Rivertown Grill’s “Big Joe” Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a pizza weighing 5.5 pounds with over 15 toppings, including 100 pepperoni’s, 1 pound of cheese, sausage, ham, mushrooms, onions, black and green olives, green peppers, banana peppers, and bacon.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete this challenge.
– Winners receive the $64.99 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Heroes, and $100 cash.
– Must call ahead to schedule.

title: Prime Time Pub & Grill’s “Meet the Meat” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of two 1-pound Prime Time signature burgers, including their “Meet the Heat” burger that is loaded with chipotle mayo and jalapenos, and their “Prime” burger that is loaded with pulled pork and bacon, topped with a 1/3-lb mozzarella stick and a whole jalapeno, along with 2 big scoops of their mac and cheese.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete this challenge.
– Winners receive their $49 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Knuckle Sandwich’s Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of two 1-pound burgers fully dressed, along with 2 pounds of french fries.
– Must be completed in 45 minutes or less.
– Winners receive their $38 meal for free, a free T-Shirt, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a trophy.

title: Mar Concession’s “Nacho Average BBQ” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 4 pounds of BBQ nachos covered in melted cheese, jalapenos, and homemade bourbon BBQ sauce, along with two 1-pound smash burgers topped with grilled onions.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the challenge.
– Winners receive the $75 meal for free.

title: Fat Santa’s 16-Inch Pizza Challenge w/ 16 Toppings
description:
– This challenge consists of a 16-inch pizza weighing in at 6 to 6.5 pounds, and is topped with 16 different toppings including beef, Italian sausage, pepperoni, crumbled sausage, ham, bacon, chicken, mushroom, onion, tomato, green pepper, black olives, banana pepper, jalapeno, green olive, and pineapple.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish the whole pizza challenge.
– Winners receive their $28 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Best Bet’s “Double All In” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 6-7 pound heap of potatoes, mixed with scrambled sausage, 6 scrambled eggs, diced ham, green peppers, onions, and jalapenos, topped with cheese.
– In keeping with their poker theme, the restaurant has the eater draw from a deck of cards to determine their time limit, which can range from 30 minutes to 1 hour.
– Winners receive 50% off of their $31.50 meal, and a free T-Shirt.

title: The Acme’s “YACME” Challenge
address: 1105 E State Blvd, Fort Wayne, IN 46805
description:
– This challenge consists of 8 ounces each of breaded pork tenderloin, pulled pork, crack chicken, brisket, smoked bacon, chicken wings, and mac and cheese, along with a side of onion rings, fries, mozzarella sticks, and fried pickles, and choice of water, soda, or beer (if 21+).
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $70 meal for free, and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Schwatzer’s German Jagerschnitzel Challenge
description:
– You must finish 1 kg (2.2 lbs) of their jägerschnitzel with pommes frites as fast as you can!!
– Finish in less than 1 hour (60 minutes) and win a free shirt plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.
– Finish in less than 30 minutes and win the meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and Wall of Fame.
– Finish in less than 20 minutes and win all that plus some “gummies.”
– Finish in less than 10 minutes and win everything above plus a cool winners hat/cap.

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Steak Challenge (Indianapolis)
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: Strings Ramen’s “Monster Hell” Ramen Challenge (West Lafayette)
address: 103-105 N Chauncey 202 South, West Lafayette, IN 47906
description:
– Strings Ramen has 6 locations, all in the Midwest, and all offer this challenge.
– Shoyu broth base with Chinese Tian Jing red chili, Szechuan chili bean sauce, Thai chili, Piquin chili, Ghost peppers, and Scorpion pepper.
– Topped with Asari, ground pork, crispy pork skin, and hot pepper and chili made from “hell.”
– Served with broth, one glass of water, and there is a 20-minute time limit.
– Click here to check out the restaurant’s website challenge page!!
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– $50 Gift Card Certificate

title: Bub’s “Big Ugly” Pounder Burger Challenge (Westfield)
description:
– Bub’s Burgers has 4 locations, all based in Indiana, and all offer this challenge.
Bub’s is famous for their “Big Ugly” Pounder burger which consists of a 1lb (after being cooked) beef patty on a 1/2 pound bun served with lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, onions, and a sauce of your choice. You have a one sitting time limit to finish as many as you can, and you must finish 100% of one plate before moving on to the next, including your chosen sauce. Bub’s burgers are delicious, and you will surely enjoy this challenge!! You still pay around $25 per burger no matter how many you eat, but your prize increases as your number increases:
1 “Big Ugly” Burger – 4″ x 6″ picture hanging in the restaurant location.
2 “Big Ugly” Burgers – 8″ x 11″ picture hanging in the restaurant location.
3 “Big Ugly” Burgers – Poster-sized picture hanging in the restaurant location.
4 “Big Ugly” Burgers – Life-size poster of you hanging in the restaurant location.
5 burgers – Immortalized on the menu (all locations) with a new burger named after you.

title: Lazy Cow’s “Crazy Bailey” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
address: 204 E Chestnut St, Corydon, IN 47112-1108, US Corydon, IN 47112
description:
– This challenge involves 16 ice cream scoops of your choice. No toppings are required!
– Challengers must beat the current record to win the challenge.
– The current record, as of 7/31/2022, is 3 minutes and 41 seconds.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on the wall of fame.

title: Barking Cow’s “Pig Trough” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– The Barking Cow has 2 locations, both based in the Muncie, IN area, but only this location offers this challenge.
– This challenge consists of 3 scoops of ice cream, sauce, toppings, a brownie, whipped cream, and a cherry.
– You get to pick all the flavors of ice cream, sauce, and toppings!
– Challengers have 15 minutes to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you complete the challenge.

title: El Potro’s “Mi Abuelito” Mexican Burrito Challenge
description: There is lots of beef steak (carne asada) and pork carnitas plus a few scoops each of Mexican rice and refried beans. Everything is inside four large burrito-sized flour tortillas and it is all topped with shredded cheese, queso cheese sauce, and plenty of fresh pico de gallo. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners earn the $32 “Mi Abuelito” Mexican burrito meal free plus a spot on El Potro’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Trax BBQ’s “Half Sheet” Carolina Barbecue Platter Challenge
description:
– Andrew and Whitney Klein are Indianapolis locals whose passion for cooking with fresh, locally-sourced ingredients. They opened Trax BBQ after a successful run as a pop-up restaurant at Scarlet Lane Brewing Company. Trax BBQ offers Carolina-style BBQ, included pulled pork, ribs, and brisket.
– CHALLENGE: Eat an entire Half Sheet Combo* which is 36 oz of smoked meats, 32 oz of sides, 4 oz pickles, 6 hush puppies, and 2 slices of Texas Toast in 60 minutes or less.
– *8 oz Brisket, 8 oz Pulled Pork, 8 oz Pulled Chicken, 2 Sausages, 8 oz slaw, 8 oz mac & cheese, 8 oz green beans or potato salad, 6 hush puppies, 4 oz pickles, 2 slices of Texas Toast – NO SUBSTITUTIONS!!
– WINNERS land on the WALL OF FAME, get a Merch pack and a $60 FREE meal. Good luck!!
– LOSERS get to pay $60 for their meal PLUS land a special place on the WALL OF SHAME and a doggie bag for the leftovers!!
– Please note that the broccoli salad and banana pudding eaten during the video were optional.

title: Rose Brothers’ 24-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza Challenge
description:
– This 24-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza is topped with pepperoni, ham, bacon, sausage, hamburger, and cheese.
– Challengers can attempt to eat this whole 7-8 pound pizza solo or with one partner.
– Solo challengers get a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– 2 person teams have 30 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive the pizza free, sweet t-shirts, and a photo on the Wall of Fame.

title: Decoys’ “Triple Insanity” Burger Challenge
address: 1729 E US Highway 20 Michigan City, IN 46360
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: The Standard’s 10 Scoop Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 10 ice cream scoops (you can’t select the same flavor more than once), 5 choices of toppings, whipped cream, and cherries.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish the whole dessert.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt and a picture on the wall of fame.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted, if completed.

title: Las Islas’ 2ft-Long Anaconda Burrito Challenge
address: 101 W Morton St, Oakland City, IN 47660
description:
– This is a 2ft-long burrito stuffed with ground beef, shredded chicken, beef, and pork.
– Also stuffed with lettuce, rice, beans, sour cream, and pico de gallo.
– It is topped with red burrito sauce and cheese sauce.
– Everything must be finished in 30 minutes to win the challenge.
– Free meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Pav’s “Hebron Heart Attack” Quadruple Burger Challenge
address: 642 N Main St, Ste #642, Hebron, IN 46341
description:
– There are four beef burger patties stacked and layered with bacon.
– Also layered with mozzarella sticks and some tasty marinara sauce.
– There are four sets of buns and it comes with a side of loaded “Irish” Fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything you are served.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Mexico Lindo’s 8lb Monster Burrito Challenge (Portage)
description:
– There is a monster-sized burrito filled with your choice of meat, with rice, beans, cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, bell peppers, and onions.
– Served wet and topped with red and green sauces plus melted queso (cheese).
– Served with fries, coleslaw, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Free Certificate

title: Mexico Lindo’s 8lb Monster Burrito Challenge (Knox)
description:

title: Caracas Bistro’s 27-Inch “Pepito” Sandwich Challenge
address: 236 W Edison Rd, Ste #1, Mishawaka, IN 46545
description:
– 27-inch “Pepito” sandwich on a soft roll.
– Filled with eggs, cheese, lettuce, tomato, avocado, guacamole, onions, beans, and sauces.
– There is a 8-minute time limit to finish everything.
– The challenge is only held on Thursdays.
– Free Meal
– Bragging Rights

title: Taphouse on Edge’s “Randy Santel” Monster Melt Challenge
address: 1803 South Bend Ave, South Bend, IN 46637
description:
– There are four 1/2 pound beef burger patties between 5 grilled cheese sandwiches.
– The burgers and sandwiches are sliced in half and loaded tater tots are placed in the middle.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Taphouse on the Edge’s “Monster Melt” Burger Challenge
address: 1803 South Bend Ave, South Bend, IN 46637
description:
– There are two 1/2 pound beef burger patties between 3 grilled cheese sandwiches.
– The burgers and sandwiches are sliced in half and loaded tater tots are placed in the middle.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Super Tortas Indy’s Monster Torta Challenge
description:
– The Monster Torta consists of smoked pork, steak, ham, turkey, two fried eggs, a hot dog, sausage, cheese, mayo, tomato, avocado, and jalapenos.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to finish everything and get the victory.
– Advance notice is required so be sure to call ahead and schedule your challenge.
– Free Meal
– $100 Cash
– Wall of Fame

title: DT Kirby’s Massive Street Food Challenge
description: With DT Kirby’s “Recipe for Disaster” Street Food Challenge, you are given a special menu and you get to choose which items you want to eat during your challenge. You must choose an appetizer and then a burger, sandwich, and hot dog. There are 4-5 options for each category and the three entrees each come with a side. You get sides of fries, hand-cut crispy chips, and onion rings. You must also finish a mandatory 1-liter glass of Old Style Beer which originated in Chicago, Illinois. There is a 35-minute time limit to finish everything and get the meal free and a sweet t-shirt. You also get on the Wall of Fame if you have a top 5 finishing time. At the 35-minute mark, if they think you might finish in less than 45 minutes, they can bring in a “reliever” which is a 1-1.5lb item that contains 1/2lb of beef. If you can finish the base challenge plus the extra item, you win the same prizes.

title: Bullpen Bar & Grill’s Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 lbs of beef divided between 6 patties.
– Slice of cheese, lettuce, and tomato on each patty.
– One bun plus one side of fries
– Must finish burger and fries in 45 minutes.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: One Eyed Jack’s Titanic 2 Handed Tenderloin Challenge
description:
– You must finish a huge 5 lb fried tenderloin sandwich
– You must also finish a 2 lb bowl of fried tater tots
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Kizuki Ramen & Izakaya’s Ramen Challenge
description:
The Ramen Challenge bowl is equivalent to 4 bowls of ramen.
The challenger must finish in 30 minutes. No sharing allowed.
You must finish everything in the bowl, including the broth.
If you succeed, the ramen is FREE. If you fail, you pay $60.
You must sign a waiver before participating.
You may choose any ramen. All of them come with four soft-boiled eggs.

title: Howie’s Big Biscuits and Gravy Challenge
description:
– About 17 normal sized biscuits smothered with a gallon of sausage gravy.
– The total of the biscuits is 2 pounds, and the total of the sausage gravy is 12 pounds.
– Total weight is 14lbs with a 1-hour time limit to finish it all
– Free Meal
– Certificate Of Completion
– Free T-Shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Hawg “N” Sauce’s Hawgzilla Trough Challenge
address: 6580 Leonard Rd N, Mount Vernon, IN 47620
description:
– A whole Chipa-Hawg
– A whole Ida-Fry
– An Ida-Hawg
– 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt

– Wall Of Fame

title: The Industrial Revolution Burger Challenge
description:
– There are four 1 pound burger patties stacked and layered with cheese
– There is also 1 full pound of pot roast layered in between the patties
– The challenge includes a side of fries/wedges or sweet potato fries
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything on the plate
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: The Waka Dog Cafe Challenge
address: 1809 South Bend Ave, South Bend, IN 46637
description:
– 2 huge footlong hotdogs on sesame seed hotdog buns topped with fries, coleslaw, pulled pork, onions, peppers, jalapenos, pickle spears, chili, cheese, and onion rings.
– The challenge weighs about 4.5 pounds and has a 30-minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Kelsey’s Six Pound Steak Challenge
description:
– There is a 6 lb steak plus a few sides.
– Soup or salad plus a potato side of your choice.
– You must also finish 1 slice of delicious bread.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– You must call ahead at least 4 days in advance.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Bub’s “Big Ugly” Pounder Burger Challenge (Bloomington)
description:
– Bub’s Burgers has 4 locations, all based in Indiana, and all offer this challenge.
Bub’s is famous for their “Big Ugly” Pounder burger which consists of a 1lb (after being cooked) beef patty on a 1/2 pound bun served with lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, onions, and a sauce of your choice. You have a one sitting time limit to finish as many as you can, and you must finish 100% of one plate before moving on to the next, including your chosen sauce. Bub’s burgers are delicious, and you will surely enjoy this challenge!! You still pay around $25 per burger no matter how many you eat, but your prize increases as your number increases:
1 “Big Ugly” Burger – 4″ x 6″ picture hanging in the restaurant location.
2 “Big Ugly” Burgers – 8″ x 11″ picture hanging in the restaurant location.
3 “Big Ugly” Burgers – Poster-sized picture hanging in the restaurant location.
4 “Big Ugly” Burgers – Life-size poster of you hanging in the restaurant location.
5 burgers – Immortalized on the menu (all locations) with a new burger named after you.

title: Bub’s “Big Ugly” Pounder Burger Challenge (Zionsville)
description:

title: Barn Town Brewing’s “Barn Town” Breakfast Burrito Challenge
address: 9500 University Ave Suite 1110, West Des Moines, IA 50266
description:
– The “Barn Town” Breakfast Burrito is a 5lb burrito stuffed with breakfast sausage, bacon, chorizo, black beans, scrambled eggs, pico de gallo, avocado spread, and cheddar cheese. It is wrapped in melted cheddar cheese and banana peppers and topped with sour cream and guajillo sauce.
– In addition to the giant burrito, there is a side of breakfast potatoes.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish the entire burrito and breakfast potatoes. Successful completions win a sweet Barn Town t-shirt!

title: Tootsie’s Ice Cream and More’s “Tootsie’s Takedown” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of their Tootsie Burger and Tootsie Takedown, both of which are regular menu items.
– The Tootsie Burger has a 1/2lb beef patty and is topped with American and Swiss cheeses, crispy onion rings, and is served with chopped pickles and onions plus ketchup and mustard.
– The Tootsie Takedown is a sundae with 2 chocolate chip cookies, 32 oz of soft serve ice cream, 4 mounds of whipped cream (each which are topped with a tootsie roll), caramel drizzle, chocolate sauce, and sprinkles.
– There is a short five minute time limit to finish both the Tootsie Burger and Tootsie Takedown ice cream. Successful completions win the meal for free, a photo on the wall of fame, and a sweet t-shirt.
– There are no drinks allowed during the challenge and the ice cream tray must not drip liquid when turned over.

title: J&A Tap’s “Amanda’s Big Breakfast” Challenge
address: 440 N Dubuque St, North Liberty, IA 52317
description:
– This challenge consists of a large meat lovers omelet, smothered hash browns, a full stack of pancakes, a half order of biscuits and gravy, and a side of toast.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire breakfast platter. Successful completions win the meal for free and a voucher for another free meal on their next visit.
– Following completion of the challenge, there is a 30 minutes waiting period before the win is declared to ensure there are no reversals of fortune.
– NOTE: This restaurant has two food challenges, the Big John Burger and Amanda’s Big Breakfast. You may only complete one of the challenges, you are not allowed to return after beating one and attempt to try the other.

title: 5th Quarter Bar & Grill’s “Heater” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 2 fried tenderloins, 2 hamburger patties, grilled onions, jalapeños, mango habanero sauce, & pepper-jack cheese. There is also 1 pound of fries included.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 meal for free, a spot on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Whiskey House’s “Big Dude” Burger Challenge
where: The Whiskey House and Bourbon Grill
address: 2510 SW White Birch Dr, Ankeny, IA 50023
description: There are 2 big beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with bacon, Pepper Jack cheese, Cheddar cheese, fried onions, freshly chopped onions, lettuce, pickles, Whiskey House Mushrooms, hot peppers, and a homemade spicy sauce on a normal sized hamburger bun. The burger is served with a side of fries and there is a 7 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the double cheeseburger meal free plus their photo posted on The Whiskey House’s “Big Dude” Wall of Fame!!

title: Front Street Pub’s 5lb Pork Nachos Challenge
description:
– Having been in continuous operation since 1992, Front Street Brewery is the oldest brew pub and second oldest brewery, in the state of Iowa. It was the 300th craft brewery to be established in the United States. The brewery’s humble beginnings started with a 7-barrel brewhouse in the basement of the current Pub & Eatery location, located on River Drive in downtown Davenport. The 100+ year old building is nestled along the banks of the Mississippi River, in downtown Davenport, Iowa, in what was known from the late 1800’s into the early 1900’s as the “Bucktown” neighborhood.
– One of Front Street Pub & Eatery’s top selling items is their loaded pork nachos, so they decided to create a man vs food challenge and supersize it up to weighing over 5 lbs total.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to feast on an ~85oz tray of loaded pork nachos with 1lb of tortilla chips fried in house, all covered with 2lbs of juicy pulled pork and 1lb of nacho cheese sauce.
– All that gets topped with pico de gallo, a lime sour cream sauce, roasted corn, and jalapenos.
– You can order an optional beer with your challenge but there are no drinks or side items included.
– Winners earn their $35 pork nachos meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Bents’ Smokehouse’s “Jason’s Belly Buster” Breakfast Challenge
Jethro’s “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Des Moines)
where: Jethro’s BBQ n’ Bacon Bacon (West Des Moines)
description:
– Jethro’s BBQ now has 8 great locations serving the greater Des Moines, Iowa metropolitan area.
– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.
– The 4lb sandwich is loaded w/ lots of Adam’s favorite foods he gets when he visits Jethro’s BBQ.
– There is a spicy pickle, bun, pork tenderloin, buffalo chicken tenders, white cheddar sauce, fried cheese cubes, 1lb Texas brisket, Applewood smoked bacon, cheeseburger, and 1lb of waffle fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!! If not interested in trying the challenge, it can be ordered to split.

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Southside)
description:

– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.

description:

title: Mullets’ Massive Pigs In A Blanket Pancake Breakfast Challenge
description:
– Mullets opened on June 14th, 2010. It’s a riverside roadhouse with a two-tiered patio, great views of downtown, large outdoor fun area and all your favorite sports heroes…in mullets.
– Just across the river from Principal Park, Mullets is sure to be a great place to stop before and after I-Cubs games, in the middle of a long day on the bike trail, and for a fun weekend breakfast spot. Do you have some classic mullet pictures of your own? Don’t be shy, post them on their Mulletin board!!
– Mullets is well known for their delicious breakfast dishes, so started this Pigs In A Blanket Challenge to show off not only their breakfast menu, but also their tasty BBQ lunch and dinner options.
– Brave challengers have 1 hour to finish a stack of 4 sweet cream buttermilk plate-sized pancakes.
– Each pancake weighs around 1lb and they are each separated by layers of 1/2lb BBQ pulled pork.
– The pancake breakfast stack is topped with 6 sunny-side-up eggs that serve as the meal’s crown.
– Champions win the $40 breakfast meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.
– Call ahead to schedule your challenge beforehand. They can’t do it on weekends or while busy.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Urbandale)
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.
– This 28″ diameter pizza is loaded with at least 3 toppings (2 have to be meat).
– You can choose from the gourmet / specialty options too.
– The entire pizza weighs around 10 lbs.
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish it.
– 1 person can attempt this challenge, as well.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $200 in gift card certificates.
– $500 to the first duo who can finish it under 14 min and 30 sec.
– $1,000 to the 1st person who can beat the solo record of 16 min and 30 sec.

title: Back Shop’s 30-inch “Dump Truck” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Back Shop Pizza is an old automotive shop converted into a giant pizzeria and arcade.
– Their newer 30-inch “Dump Truck” Team Pizza Challenge went viral in 2021.
– Teams of 2 people have 1 hour to feast on a 30-inch pizza with 1 topping of their choosing.
– You can split the pizza into halves and even order a 2nd topping like Randy & Katina if you are feeling brave.
– There are no drinks or other sides required. Please call in advance to schedule your challenge.
– Winning teams earn the $60-68 pizza free, sweet t-shirts, $60 in gift cards to use later ($30 for pizza/food and $30 for the arcade), and their team photo gets posted on the Wall of Fame.

title: Cactus Bob’s “Showdown” Spicy BBQ Sandwich Challenge
description: Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: B&B’s “Killossal” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge is a combination of this restaurant’s 4 most famous sandwiches.
– The massive sandwich has 4 cheeseburger patties, vegetables, deli meats, and a pork tenderloin.
– Challengers have a 20-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, bragging rights, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Papa Juan’s “Bad Boy” Burrito Challenge
address: 5505 Center Point Rd NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
description: – This gigantic 6lb burrito is stuffed with rice, beans, diced jalapenos, taco meat, grilled chicken, grilled steak, chorizo, 5 types of cheese including Ghost Pepper and Carolina Reaper, Mexican veggies all topped with lettuce, tomato, onions, sour cream and their homemade hot salsa.

title: Oskaloosa Pizza Den’s 30-inch “Big Den” Pizza Challenge
description:
– There is a 30-inch “Big Den” pizza loaded with up to 4 toppings of your choosing.
– They sell the pizza mostly for parties, but you can try it as a solo challenge. Contact them about the details and prizes, and to schedule your “Big Den” Pizza Challenge ahead of time.

title: Still Smokin BBQ’s “Ole 96er” 6lb Prime Rib Challenge
address: 104 W Madison St, Mt Ayr, IA 50854
description:
– This prime rib platter includes 6 lbs of prime rib plus 6 large sides and 6 bread rolls.
– Side options – potato salad, coleslaw, mac & cheese, green beans, baked beans, baked potato, or fried taters.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Good luck lol you will definitely need it.
– You only have to pay $50 for the $140 meal.
– Wall of Fame

title: Legends American Grill’s “Monster” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Legends American Grill has been serving the Marshalltown, Iowa area for many years.
– Lots of people have attempted this Monster Burger Challenge since they first started it.
– There is toasted sourdough bread topped with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, breaded Iowa pork tenderloin, sautéed onion, 2 Angus beef patties, ham, crisp bacon, sliced pepperoni, Monterey Jack cheese, hand-breaded & fried onion rings, and creamy melted queso, topped with more bread.
– Served with a double serving of their signature waffle fries, and a 30-minute time limit to finish.
– Winners receive the $39.99 cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame!!

title: Brick and Ivy Rooftop’s Chicago Dog Challenge
description:
– A Chicago-style hot dog, Chicago Dog, or Chicago Red Hot is an all-beef frankfurter on a poppy seed bun, originating from the city of Chicago, Illinois.
– Brick & Ivy Rooftop is the best sports bar in Altoona, Iowa, serving up Jumbo Chicago Hot Dogs.
– It is a Chicago Cubs themed restaurant, named after the brick and ivy at Wrigley Baseball Field.
– For this food challenge, there is a one sitting time limit to eat 8 of their Jumbo Chicago Dogs.
– Each has a 1/4lb jumbo beef hot dog topped with yellow mustard, sweet green pickle relish, onion, sport peppers, diced tomatoes, and a fried pickle spear. The fried pickles are delicious!!
– Each is served in a genuine poppy seed bun from Chicago, completely loaded with toppings.
– Winners receive the $30 hot dog meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.
– The top three fastest times have a special Wall of Fame board hanging up in the restaurant.

title: Pizza World’s 24-Inch “Big World” Team Pizza Challenge
address: 4201 42nd St NE, Ste #140, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
description:
– This “Big World” Challenge features a 24-inch thick-crust pizza that weighs around 15 pounds.
– This is a challenge for teams of 2 people and the pizza must have at least 1 topping. There is 5lbs of dough, 5lbs of cheese, and 5lbs of the topping.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything, with no bathroom or smoke breaks.
– As far as we know, the challenge is only available at the Cedar Rapids, Iowa location.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirts
– Wall of Fame (losers go on the Wall of Shame)

title: Foodie Garage Eatery’s “Late Riser” Burger Challenge
description: This “Late Riser” Challenge features a 5 pound burger and bun served with lettuce, tomatoes, onions, bacon, and cheese. You must also finish 1 pound of fries plus 3 sodas and 2 glasses of water. You have 30 minutes to finish the challenge meal and win a free t-shirt and Wall of Fame post on their social media pages. Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Foodie Garage Eatery’s Pancake Breakfast Challenge
description: There is a 25″ diameter pancake, 4 eggs, 4 sausage patties, 1 pound of bacon, 1 pound of American fries or hashbrowns, 2 glasses of milk, and 1 glass of orange juice. You have 30 minutes to finish and win a free t-shirt and wall of fame post on their social media pages. Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Sfumato Pizzeria’s “6 Pie” Neapolitan Pizza Challenge
description:
– Sfumato Pizzeria serves 9 different specialty Neapolitan wood fired pizzas on their menu.
– You must choose 6 of them. Each pizza has 9oz of dough and is easier to eat when hot.
– My choices below – Marinara, Pepperoni, Italian Sausage, PBR, Fig & Caper, and Barbecue.
– The challenge also includes a pint of beer, a scoop of gelato ice cream, and a slice of their signature chocolate cake for dessert. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything you are served.
– Winners receive the meal free and a spot on their Wall of Fame (and possibly now a sweet t-shirt)!!
– Good luck if you attempt this challenge, and be smart with which options you choose!!

title: Dr. Getwell’s “Heart Attack” Burger Challenge
description:
– One and a half pounds of ground chuck and half a pound of BBQ pulled pork on a bun.
– Topped with four slices of cheese, lettuce, tomato, bell peppers, and onions.
– Served with a pound of fries and there is a 20-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Chicharo’s Mexican Grill’s 7lb Burrito Challenge
description:
– The gigantic burrito weighs a whooping 7 lbs. and is fully loaded with seared marinated steak, rice, beans, lettuce, tomato, cheese, and your choice of house salsa.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour and there are no bathroom breaks allowed.
– Free Meal
– Free burrito once a week for 1 year.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame (social media)

title: Bud’s Cafe’s “Belly Buster” 12-Egg Breakfast Omelet Challenge
description:
– Bud’s Cafe has been serving the Estherville, Iowa area for many years now, located downtown.
– This “Belly Buster” Omelet Challenge has been around since the now owner Diane took over.
– There are 12 (1 dozen) real eggs mixed with 1lb of hash browns and lots of shredded cheese.
– There are 3 meats – bacon, sausage, and ham – and everything is topped with more cheese.
– The food challenge includes 3 pieces of Texas Toast and the caramel pecan roll was optional.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything, and make sure you give it time to cool off.
– Winners earn the $35.99 breakfast meal free plus a spot on Bud’s Cafe’s Wall of Fame.

title: J&A Tap’s “Big John” Burger Challenge
address: 440 N Dubuque St, North Liberty, IA 52317
description:
– This burger comes with 2 lbs of beef, cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and grilled onions on a homemade bun.
– Comes with 1.5 lbs of Kick Azz tots and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– NOTE: This restaurant has two food challenges, the Big John Burger and Amanda’s Big Breakfast. You may only complete one of the challenges, you are not allowed to return after beating one of these and attempt to try the other.

title: Canteen Lunch in the Alley’s Eating Challenge
description:
– The canteen sandwich consists of ground beef, cheese, ketchup, mustard, onions, & pickles.
– You must eat 14 of them to win the challenge. Each canteen costs $3.85 and weighs ~ 1/2 lb.
– There is a 90 minute time limit to finish everything (You can eat more canteens if you want).
– Free Meal
– $50 Cash
– Free T-shirt and Hat
– Wall of Fame

title: Papa’s Pizzeria’s “Lake Monster” Sandwich Challenge
address: 214 Van Dom St, Polk City, IA 50226
description:
– Eat a burger with a small thin “Meatza Pizza” as the base.
– Fried pork tenderloin, 3/4 lb bacon cheeseburger, and 4 chicken strips.
– Macaroni and cheese sauce, lettuce, and a homemade top bun.
– You can choose a different cheese if you’d like for the burger.
– Served with 12 oz of onion rings and a 20 minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: Blue Iguana’s 6lb Wanna Iguana Burrito Challenge
address: 201 N Cody Road, Le Claire, IA 52753
description:
– 6 pound carne asada burrito with rice & beans
– There is a 24 oz draft beer included as well
– You have just 30 minutes to finish everything
– Free Shirt
– Wanna Iguana Hall Of Fame
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: Rube’s 52oz Belly Buster Top Sirloin (Waukee)
description:
– A huge 52 ounce sirloin, served with 2 sides
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Shirt
– Picture on Wall Of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Rube’s 52oz Belly Buster Top Sirloin (Montour)
description:
– A huge 52 ounce sirloin, served with 2 sides
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Shirt
– Picture on Wall Of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Altoona)
description:
– Jethro’s BBQ now has 8 great locations serving the greater Des Moines, Iowa metropolitan area.
– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.
– The 4lb sandwich is loaded w/ lots of Adam’s favorite foods he gets when he visits Jethro’s BBQ.
– There is a spicy pickle, bun, pork tenderloin, buffalo chicken tenders, white cheddar sauce, fried cheese cubes, 1lb Texas brisket, Applewood smoked bacon, cheeseburger, and 1lb of waffle fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!! If not interested in trying the challenge, it can be ordered to split.

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Ankeny)
description:
– Jethro’s BBQ now has 8 great locations serving the greater Des Moines, Iowa metropolitan area.
– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.
– The 4lb sandwich is loaded w/ lots of Adam’s favorite foods he gets when he visits Jethro’s BBQ.
– There is a spicy pickle, bun, pork tenderloin, buffalo chicken tenders, white cheddar sauce, fried cheese cubes, 1lb Texas brisket, Applewood smoked bacon, cheeseburger, and 1lb of waffle fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!! If not interested in trying the challenge, it can be ordered to split.

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Drake)
description:

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Johnston)
where: Jethro's BBQ n' Pork Chop Grill (Johnston)
description:
– Jethro’s BBQ now has 8 great locations serving the greater Des Moines, Iowa metropolitan area.
– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.

title: Jethro’s 5lb “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge (Waukee)
address: 9350 University Ave, West Des Moines, IA 50266
description:
– Jethro’s BBQ now has 8 great locations serving the greater Des Moines, Iowa metropolitan area.
– This “Adam Emmenecker” Sandwich Challenge was made famous via Man vs Food: Des Moines.
– Adam Emmenecker was a popular basketball player who did very well at nearby Drake University.
– The 4lb sandwich is loaded w/ lots of Adam’s favorite foods he gets when he visits Jethro’s BBQ.
– There is a spicy pickle, bun, pork tenderloin, buffalo chicken tenders, white cheddar sauce, fried cheese cubes, 1lb Texas brisket, Applewood smoked bacon, cheeseburger, and 1lb of waffle fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!! If not interested in trying the challenge, it can be ordered to split.

title: Hacks Steak Shack’s “Big Kansan” 75oz Steak Challenge
description:
– This challenge, the “Big Kansan” consists of a 75oz sirloin steak, giant salad, large dinner roll and butter, and oversized baked potato with fix-ins.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and get to sign the winners wall at the restaurant.
– NOTE: You must schedule this challenge in advance, so please do call ahead and schedule a time with the restaurant if you are interested in trying the challenge.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Topeka)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Manhattan)
description:
