title: Barleycorn’s “The Judge” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play challenge consisting of 3 pounds of pulled pork, ham, and jalapeno sausage, wedged between a 12-inch sub roll with two slices of rustic bread in the middle, topped with onions, sweet and sour slaw, and BBQ sauce, along with three signature sides.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a free T-Shirt and their picture on the Wall of Fame.
Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast Team Pizza Challenge (Coffeyville)
description:
The challenge features one of Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast-sized pizzas and teams of two people must pick one topping in addition to all the delicious cheese. There is a 45-minute time limit to finish the whole pizza that weighs between 9 and 10 pounds. The pizza costs around $55.99 plus tax if your team loses, but winning teams receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and they get their team photo posted up on the location’s Wall of Fame. If interested in trying this challenge too, please contact your nearest location to see if they too are participating and find out their rules and prizes.
– Free Meal
– T-shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: Bigg’s “Bigger Smoke” BBQ Burger Challenge
address: 7th St and Main St, Galena, KS 66739
description:
– Biggs Smoke Trailer and Catering is a mobile food truck based in the Joplin, MO/ Galena, KS area.
– This challenge contains 2 double-double grilled cheese BBQ cheeseburgers with each containing 3 grilled cheese sandwiches, two 6oz cheeseburger patties, and 12oz of pulled pork
– The sides are 160z of potato salad, 160z of baked beans, and 160z of coleslaw.
– The meal is served with 4 cans of soda of your choice that you must also finish.
– You have 30 Minutes to finish everything!
– Winners receive the delicious meal for free, along with a free shirt and Wall of Fame.
– Losers have to pay $90 for the meal.
– Note: You must give the owner a 24-48 hour notice before your attempt of the challenge.

title: Bigg’s “Big Smoke” BBQ Burger Challenge
address: 7th St and Main St, Galena, KS 66739
description:
– Biggs Smoke Trailer and Catering is a mobile food truck based in the Joplin, MO/ Galena, KS area.
– This double-double grilled cheese BBQ cheeseburger contains 3 grilled cheese sandwiches, two 6oz cheeseburger patties, and 12oz of pulled pork
– The sides are 80z of potato salad, 80z of baked beans, and 80z of coleslaw.
– The meal is served with 2 cans of soda of your choice that you must also finish.
– You have 10 Minutes to finish everything!
– Winners receive the delicious meal for free, along with a free shirt and Wall of Fame.
– Losers have to pay $45 for the meal.
– Note: You must give the owner a 24-48 hour notice before your attempt of the challenge.

title: The Pennant’s “El Gigante” Burger Challenge
description:
– The Pennant is the place for heavenly food and delightful drinks. Killer burgers, scrumptious salads, mouth-watering milkshakes and more. All of this with a focus on using local ingredients and supporting their local Topeka community.
– The Pennant is also the place for a great time. Grab your quarters and head upstairs to over 50 vintage arcade games. Take an electronic trip down memory lane with Pac-Man, Galaga, Pole Position and the crowd favorite, Skee-Ball. Or, hangout in the beer garden overlooking Kansas Avenue and the coming soon Cyrus Hotel. Maybe bowling is your jam, so head downstairs and jump on one of our four bowling alleys. Don’t worry, they can always put the bumpers up if you need them. The Pennant. Come for the great food and drinks, stay to play!
– This “El Gigante” has a 30 minute time limit to finish a gigantic burger served with some fries.
– There is a giant 3.5lb beef burger patty topped with 8 thick-cut strips of bacon plus a Thai peanut sauce and lots of wild berry jam. It’s all placed on a football-shaped bun. The challenge includes an order of French fries. The poutine gravy and cheese Randy added in photos were both optional.
– This is a pay-to-play food challenge. Everyone pays $50 for the hamburger meal. Winners get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame. Losers get a shirt proclaiming they failed and a picture posted on the Wall of Shame. Could you finish this whole hamburger challenge in 30 minutes??

title: Ballers Sports Bar’s “Big Baller” Burger Challenge
description:
– This colossal burger is 3lbs with 1/2lb of bacon and then 2lbs of fries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything without a restroom break.
– Winners get the $29.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: West Side Burgers’ 4-3-2-1 Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish four 3/4 lb cheeseburgers plus 2 lbs of fries.
– Winners get the $25 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Rookies Sports Bar’s Flaming Trojan Horse Burger Challenge
description:
– 2 lbs of delicious ground beef split into 4 patties that are stuffed with jalapenos.
– Layered with pepper jack cheese, lettuce, tomato, bacon, an onion ring, hot sauce, and BBQ sauce.
– Served with 1 lb of fries, and there is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– The food must be kept down for at least 5 minutes after to finish eating to win.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Chu My’s Kitchen Pho Challenge
address: 2208 W Wyatt Earp Blvd, Dodge City, KS 67801
description:
– There are 3 lbs of pho rice noodles and 3 lbs of beef meats (brisket, meatballs, steak, and tendons)
– There are also some veggies added and the bowl is then filled with delicious pho broth.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the whole challenge bowl, including the broth.
– You must read and sign a waiver before ordering and beginning the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Phelp’s Hog Heaven’s Spicy “Hot Rib” Challenge
description:
– You must finish 4 big ribs covered in an extra spicy BBQ sauce.
– They all must be finished in one sitting without any “help” (liquids or sauces/dressings).
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of “Flame”
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: R-B Drive In’s “Belt-Buster” Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 lbs of beef on a homemade bun with cheese and bacon.
– Topped with onions, lettuce, tomato, and served with 1 lb of onion rings.
– Served with a 44 oz soda and there is a 1-hour time limit to finish it all.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Burnt Offerings BBQ’s “Bigfoot” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The Bigfoot is piled with 5 lbs of grilled and smoked meats that have been slow cooked.
– The variety of meat options include pulled pork, bacon wrapped pork loins, ribs, and comes with three sides that include beans, coleslaw, and a specialty potato salad.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour to win the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– Wall of Fame

title: Grandstand’s Finish Line Burger Challenge (Paola)
description:
– The Finish Line Burger comes with four 1/3 lbs patties topped with 2 slices of bacon, 4 slices of cheese, 1 slice of ham, 1 smoked sausage, lettuce, tomato, onion, and condiments.
– Served with over 1 lb of french fries and there is a 15 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Two Brothers Mining Co’s “Brutus Buster” Burger Challenge
where: Two Brothers Mining Co. (inside Kansas Crossing Casino)
description:
– Two Brothers Mining Co operates inside Kansas Crossing Casino in Pittsburg, Kansas.
– The restaurant serves up delicious barbecue smoked meats, wings, burgers, and sandwiches.
– This “Brutus Buster” BBQ Cheeseburger Challenge has been available for many years now.
– There are two beef burger patties topped with slices of American cheese with 6oz portions of both juicy BBQ pulled pork and smoked beef brisket. That is all sandwiched between two American grilled cheese sandwiches that serve as the buns. It is topped with bacon and fried onion tanglers.
– The burger is surrounded with fries topped with homemade chili and a ladle of queso sauce.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. The beer in the video was just optional.
– Winners earn the $30 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and a spot on the Wall of Chompions!!

title: Tiger Burgers’ Ambush Slider Challenge
description:
– This challenge includes 20 sliders and a 1 lb side of fries.
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: El Charro’s 6lb Burrito Azteca Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a burrito filled with chicken, beef, rice, beans, and lettuce, then smothered in red sauce and cheese, and covered with tortilla chips.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, a free T-Shirt, and $200 cash.

title: Burrito King’s “King” Burrito Challenge
description:
– You must finish a triple-sized burrito stuffed with every meat and salsa they serve.
– The burrito also includes cheese, lettuce, sour cream, guacamole, peppers, and onions.
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Free Drink
– Wall of Fame

title: Sake2me’s Japanese Fire Roll Sushi Challenge
description:
– A large very spicy sushi roll filled with Ghost Peppers and other spicy ingredients
– 30 minute time limit
– You must call ahead because the head chef is the only person that knows how to prepare it.
– Free Meal
– Your picture goes up on the Wall Of Warriors
– Free shirt proclaiming victory

title: Do-B’s “Fear the Reaper” Burger Challenge
description:
– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish this spicy burger.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Old Shawnee Pizza’s 29″ “Big Joe” Pizza Challenge (Shawnee)
description:
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish a huge 29″ diameter pizza.
– There must be at least 1 topping added to the pizza.
– You may also choose from the gourmet pizza options.
– You must call ahead at least 2 hours in advance.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– $100 Cash (total)
– Note: The challenge is only available at their Shawnee location

title: Big Larry’s Burger Challenge
address: 328 S Meridian Ave, Valley Center, KS 67147
description:
– This burger is not stacked too high, weighing in at about 2.5lbs
– Served with some fries, and everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Hat
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: The 3lb Speck Burger Challenge
description:
– 3lbs of beef on a large bun with lots of toppings
– Served with a large mound of fries
– There is a 45-minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: 23rd Street Brewery’s Everest Burger Challenge
description:
– The Manly Stanley is a high stacked burger with several delicious layers of beef and onions
– The challenge is to eat two of them in one sitting along with a side of french fries
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Kaylah’s Place’s “Hillbilly Holler” Breakfast Burrito Challenge
description:
– The “Hillbilly Holler” Breakfast Burrito Challenge consists of a dozen eggs, over a pound of sausage, a medley of peppers and onions, and a generous blanket of melted cheese inside four large tortillas. The entire burrito is placed on top of two hefty servings of potatoes. The entire plate is smothered in rich sausage gravy then topped with two perfectly cooked over-medium eggs.
– There is a 1 hour time time limit to finish the entire challenge. Successful completions win the meal for free, bragging rights, and spot on their wall of fame.
– NOTE: The burrito must be eaten as is (no sauces or additional items can be used to help complete it) and the only beverage allowed for the challenge is water.

title: Ramen House’s “Behemoth” Ramen Bowl Challenge
description: Pick a ramen option from the menu and they supersize it up to a “Behemoth” bowl equivalent to 4-5 normal-sized portions of ramen. Brave challengers have just 30 minutes to finish everything, including the broth. Winners get the $50 Japanese food meal free plus a sweet hat and a spot on Ramen House Louisville’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Eubank Pizza’s “Double Decker EBA” Pizza Challenge (Eubank)
description:
– This pizza challenge consists of an “Everything But Anchovies” double decker pizza, with 11 toppings on the bottom layer and 11 toppings on the top layer, plus a 20 oz soft drink of your choice. There is a 45 minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a $25 gift card, restaurant swag, and their picture on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame.
– There is another Eubank Pizza location nearby in Somerset, KY that offers both food challenges as well.

title: Eubank Pizza’s “Grand Slam” Food Challenge (Eubank)
description:
– This challenge consists of a medium deep dish pizza with 5 toppings, a large 1-topping thin crust pizza, a spicy Italian beef sandwich with onion rings, a BBQ bacon double cheeseburger with loaded waffle fries, and a 20 oz drink. Beginners and amateur “eaters” get 1 full hour (60 minutes). Professional eaters just get 45 minutes as a time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a $25 gift certificate, restaurant swag, and their picture on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame.
– From the online menu: “Large 1 Topping Thin, 12′ Deep Dish with 5 Toppings (2 Meats & 3 Veggies), Italian Beef & Onion Rings, BBQ Bacon Double Cheeseburger with Loaded Waffle Fries”
– There is another location in Somerset, Kentucky that offers both food challenges as well.

title: Between The Lakes Tap House’s 70 Chicken Wings Challenge
address: 1940 J H O'Bryan Ave, Grand Rivers, KY 42045
description: The challenge is to eat 70 of their deep fried chicken wings within 45 minutes, along with a 14 oz basket of fries. There are two buckets used for the challenge, with 35 chicken wings in each bucket. There are multiple chicken wing sauces that you can choose from, and each bucket gets it’s own flavored sauce of your choosing. You can order a dry rub with not sauce if you want to and are feeling brave. The fries are just seasoned and placed in the middle of the two buckets on a tray. There are no drinks or other sides required, and everything must be finished within the 45 minute time limit. The challenge costs $118 plus tax if you fail. Winners earn the giant chicken wing dinner meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the “Buckets of Wings” Wall of Fame!!

title: Eubank Pizza’s “Grand Slam” Food Challenge (Somerset)
description:
– This challenge consists of a medium deep dish pizza with 5 toppings, a large 1-topping thin crust pizza, a spicy Italian beef sandwich with onion rings, a BBQ bacon double cheeseburger with loaded waffle fries, and a 20 oz drink. Beginners and amateur “eaters” get 1 full hour (60 minutes). Professional eaters just get 45 minutes as a time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a $25 gift certificate, restaurant swag, and their picture on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame.
– From the online menu: “Large 1 Topping Thin, 12′ Deep Dish with 5 Toppings (2 Meats & 3 Veggies), Italian Beef & Onion Rings, BBQ Bacon Double Cheeseburger with Loaded Waffle Fries”
– There is another location in Eubank, Kentucky that offers both food challenges as well.

title: Eubank Pizza’s “Double Decker EBA” Pizza Challenge (Somerset)
description:
– This pizza challenge consists of an “Everything But Anchovies” double decker pizza, with 11 toppings on the bottom layer and 11 toppings on the top layer, plus a 20 oz soft drink of your choice. There is a 45 minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a $25 gift card, restaurant swag, and their picture on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame.
– There is another Eubank Pizza location nearby in Eubank, KY that offers both food challenges as well.

title: Red State BBQ’s “Red State Reckoning” Challenge
description:
– This is a BBQ challenge consisting of a full slab of ribs, 1 pound each of pulled pork, brisket, sausage, and wings, a 1/2-lb chicken sandwich, 3 sides, and peach bread pudding.

– Winners receive the meal for free, a bottle of sauce, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Marcella’s “Ultimate Hot Food” Challenge

description:
– This is a pay-to-play spicy food challenge consisting of a peach reaper burger containing garlic aioli, a beef patty, onions, mozzarella, peach Carolina reaper sauce, and a brioche bun, an atomic hot dog containing chili mixed with 357 sauce, four pepper cheese sauce, and onions, sweet Carolina tenders with buffalo sauce and sweet chili reaper sauce, scorpion ranch fries with scorpion pepper ranch, diced tomatoes, onions, and shredded lettuce, along with a spicy brownie and spicy lemonade.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a $1o dollar gift card and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: La Torta Loca’s 8lb “El Nono” Torta Challenge (Crescent Springs)
description:
– This challenge features a massive 8 pound Mexican torta sandwich with pork, steak, chorizo, ham, hot dog meat, eggs, chicken, bacon, avocado, healthy veggies, sauces, and more!!

– Winners receive the $49.99 meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on La Torta Loca’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Giovanni’s 30-Inch Pizza Challenge (Prestonburg)
description:

– Winners of the solo challenge will receive the $45.78 meal for free, and $100 dollars in cash.

Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: La Torta Loca’s 8lb “El Nono” Torta Sandwich Challenge (Florence)
description:

– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

title: Jack Brown’s “Deep Fried Oreo” Challenge (Lexington)

– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

title: Jungle Food Truck’s “Ultimate Jungle Food Truck” Challenge

-Winners will receive $100 cash, a free T-Shirt, and their meal for free.

title: Jungle Food Truck’s “Original Jungle Food Truck” Challenge

– Challenge must be completed in 30 minutes or less.
– Winners will receive $50 cash, a free T-Shirt, and their meal for free.

title: Milano Italian “Godfather” Calzone Challenge (Louisville)
description:
– Milano Italian Restaurant has 3 locations in Louisville, Mt. Washington, and Louisville, Kentucky.
– This 5lb “Godfather” Calzone Challenge is available at all 3 locations – please call-in advance to schedule your challenge so they can make sure they are ready to accommodate you and your guests.

title: Sub Station II’s “Monster” Sub Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Sub Station II has many locations, but only the Florence, KY location offers this “Monster” Challenge.
– The eating challenge features a supersized version of the “Super Special” Sub Sandwich on the menu. It has the following cold deli meats: ham, salami, pepperoni, turkey, bologna, and capicola. This sandwich also has three layered cheeses: Provolone, White American, and Swiss. The “Monster” Sandwich also has tomatoes, lettuce, pickles, onions, oil, vinegar, and more!! The challenge includes 1lb of seasoned fries and challengers must also finish an extra large 32 oz fountain drink. Those who finish everything within one hour (60 minutes) earn the $60 cold cut deli meat sandwich meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Sub Station II’s “Monster” Sub Challenge Wall of Fame!! Please call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance if interested.

title: Rootie’s “Homicide” Spicy Wing Challenge

– Challengers have 10 minutes to finish every wing.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and your photo on the restaurant’s TVs.

title: Christi’s “Big Dixie” Burger Challenge
description: – Challengers can choose whatever toppings they want for this challenge.

title: Hoggy’s “Hog Wild” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge

title: Porgie’s “Georgie Porgie” Specialty Hot Dogs Challenge
description:
– Porgie’s Hotdog & Soda Shoppe was opened in 2021 in dedication to George (Porgie) Berry. He was a big man with an even bigger personality. Porgie loved camping, watching old westerns, and listening to American Trilogy by Elvis. He was the kind of person who would be proud of anything dedicated to him. His son Chris and Chris’ wife Emilie love that they are able to keep his memory and spirit alive by sharing some of his favorite things with their community. Porgie’s forte is specialty hot dogs, barbeque, handmade sodas, and ice cream.
– For this “Georgie Porgie” Hot Dog Challenge, challengers have 1 full hour to feast on 8 of the 16 specialty hot dogs on the menu plus a 1lb order of either loaded BBQ tots or loaded chili cheese fries. The challenge also includes a large fountain drink of your choice plus desserts – a funnel cake w/ powdered sugar, some deep-fried Oreo’s, and deep-fried banana bites.
– Winners earn the $75 hot dogs meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Porgie’s Wall of Fame.

title: Week-End Burger’s 5x5x5 Cheeseburger Challenge

There are 25 smash hamburger patties total, and each patty is topped with a slice of cheese. Finish all five burgers within 30 minutes and win the $75 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt, a $25 gift card to go back and use later, and a spot on Week-End Burger’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that after every 7 to 10 people try this challenge, it “graduates” and becomes bigger. After enough people try this 5x5x5 Burger Challenge, it will be enlarged up to a 6x6x5 Challenge with five delicious 6-patty cheeseburgers. Contact the restaurant for more details and to set up your challenge in advance if interested.

– You must finish 4 of their banh mi sandwiches, and each has 1.5x the meat of a normal sandwich.

– Anthony’s Italian Deli has been serving the Baton Rouge, Louisiana area for over 30 years (1978).
– They are known for their delicious muffoletta sandwiches, Po-boys, pastas, salads, and desserts.
– The main feature of this “I Love Muff” Challenge is their signature New Orleans Style Muffolettta with Capicola, Genoa Salami, Ham, Mortadella, and Provolone Cheese topped with their famous olive mix.
– There is a Godfather Sandwich (the sandwich you can’t refuse) with American Prosciutto, Genoa Salami, and Provolone Cheese topped with Romaine lettuce and their own marinated peppers and dressing.
– There is an Italian Deli Special on muffoletta bread with Capicola, Genoa Salami, Ham, Mortadella, and Provolone Cheese topped with Romaine lettuce, tomatoes, marinated onions, and their own dressing.
– The challenge also includes 1/2 a Meatball Po-boy, 1/2 an Italian Sausage Po-boy, and a big slice of Anthony’s delicious lasagna served with Anthony’s cajun pasta salad w/ added meats and cheeses.
– There is a 45 minute minute time limit to finish everything, including some Tiramisu for dessert.
– Winners earn the $74 Italian meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Anthony’s Wall of Fame.

description:
This challenge has a 3 lb patty on a huge homemade bun with 2 lbs of vegetables, bacon, cheese, and onion rings within the burger. The challenge has recently added a large order of fries and a large milkshake to the challenge as well. There is a 1 hour time limit now due to the addition of the fries and milkshake.
If you win you get a T-shirt and your picture and name on the “Wall of David.”

title: Bobby Hebert’s Cajun Cannon Burger Challenge
description: – Challengers have 30 minutes to finish the challenge.

description: – Bullchicks has several locations, and they all offer this challenge.

address: 4225 Nicholson Dr, Ste #101, Baton Rouge, LA 70808
description:
– Pluckers has many locations and they all offer this challenge.
– You must finish 15 “Fire In The Hole” spicy wings
– You can choose bone-in or boneless wings
– Each bone-in jumbo wing is around 3.5″ long
– They must all be finished in 15 minutes
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Flame
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: Creole Creamery’s Tchoupitoulas Challenge (Uptown)
description:
– The Tchoupitoulas is a sundae as big as its name — our most outrageous specialty made with eight scoops of ice cream and your choice of eight toppings served in grand fashion with whipped cream, cherries, and wafers.
– This is only available as a challenge at the Uptown location.
– Name on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted
– Note: This is a cash-only establishment. Credit cards are not accepted.

title: Acme Oyster House’s 15 Dozen Oysters Challenge (Baton Rouge)
description:
– Acme Oyster House has 6 locations, all based in the southern US, and all offer this challenge.
– Each 1 dozen oysters is served on an individual tray (they vary in size).
– You must eat 15 dozen in less than 1 hour to win the challenge.
– You may attempt to break the house quantity record by 1 full dozen.
– You can eat them with a fork or use your hands and “slurp” them.
– Escorted restroom breaks are allowed, per the official rules.
– You should call ahead to make sure they have enough oysters.
– Free Hat and T-Shirt inside a special mesh gift bag.
– Name on location’s plaque or Wall Of Fame.
– You get 1/2 off all 15 dozen oysters (see below about required tip).
– If you break the location’s record, all of your oysters are free!! (some additional rules apply).
– NOTE: Regardless whether you win or lose, there is an 18% required tip for the shuckers.
– NOTE 2: If you want to film yourself, you must contact their management team for permission.

title: East Gate BBQ’s Big Skinny Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Four 8 oz black Angus burgers on a 24″ loaf of French bread topped with 1.5 lb pulled pork, 1.5 lb brisket, and cheddar & pepperjack cheeses. It’s finished with grilled onions, tomatoes, cabbage, pickles, sauteed mushrooms, mayonnaise, and mustard.
– Served with 1 lb of fries and there is a 1 hour & 45 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt

title: The Pickle Barrel’s Son Of A Botch Challenge
description:
– Over 3lbs of beef with several other meats draped on the beef
– Served on an extra large bun with a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt

title: Habacu’s Mexican Grande 5lb Burrito Challenge
description:
– A 5 lb burrito loaded with meats, beans, and rice, topped with plenty of queso.
– There is a 30 minute time limit for this challenge to finish everything.
– Note: This challenge is supposed to be around 5-6 lbs. When Mitch went to attempt this challenge, they showed him a photo from a phone of “his” burrito on a scale weighing a proper amount. Then they brought out the huge burrito shown in these pics, which obviously weighs more than 5-6 lbs. Attempt at your own risk.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $30 Gift Card

title: Jack Daniel’s Da Big A$$ Burger Challenge
where: Jack Daniel's Bar & Grill @ L'Auberge Casino
description:
– 7 half pound patties
– 7 cheese slices
– 7 sauces
– The fries are optional
– 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Bar-B-Que Station’s Ultimate Brisket Burger Challenge
description:
– A huge amount of brisket with lots of pulled pork as well
– Everything is smothered in barbecue sauce and served on a huge bun
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Certificate of completion
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Gap Farms’ Big Hoss 78oz Steak Challenge
description:
– 78 ounce steak with baked potato, salad and toast.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Challenge is only available on Fridays 5-9 pm.
– You must call ahead to schedule 1 day in advance.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– 2 free steak dinners

title: The Mugshots Burger Challenge (Covington)
description:
– Three 1/2lb beef patties separated by layers of bread and cheese and toppings
– Served with 1lb of fries
– 12 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt

title: Ellsworth Indoor Golf and Grill’s 16” Stuffed Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 16” pizza stuffed inside another pizza, with stuffed crust! There is 70oz (4.4lbs) of dough topped with sauce, cheese, and pepperoni. You may also add other toppings if you wish.
– In addition to the pizza, you must finish a 20oz beer or soda.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire pizza and soda or beer. Successful completions win the meal for free, $50 cash, a sweet t-shirt, and a photo on the wall of fame. If you are unsuccessful, you will pay for the meal and go up on the wall of shame.

title: Salted Butter Farm’s “Knife’s Edge” Burrito Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a triple burrito, nachos, rice, and beans with salsa, sour cream, and guacamole. The challenge is customizable, allowing you to choose which proteins you want, you can even make it vegan! Regardless of choices, the challenge will hover around five pounds in weight.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to complete challenge. Successful completions earn the meal for free and a spot of their wall of fame.

title: Mister Bagel’s Baker’s Dozen Combo Bagel Challenge
description:
– There are 13 different bagels from the Mister Bagel menu, each served with cream cheese.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire bagel challenge (pay-to-play challenge).
– The challenge costs $30. Winners get a $25 Mister Bagel Gift Card to be used later.
– Champions also win a specially made sweet t-shirt, a Mister Bagel travel mug, and Wall of Fame!!
– Each year, the person with the fastest time for the challenge wins a special hoody sweatshirt.

title: Mister Bagel’s 18-inch Breakfast Pizza Challenge (Forest Ave)
description: There are many Mister Bagel locations around the Portland, Maine area, but the original Forest Ave bagel shop is the only location that hosts this challenge. There is a 30 minute time limit to feast on an 18″ diameter breakfast pizza with 1.5 pounds of dough and 12-16 ounces total of two different homemade cream cheeses (1/2 garlic cream cheese and 1/2 jalapeno cream cheese). There is no white sausage gravy on this pizza, but it is topped with 4 diced sausage patties, 4 ounces of diced ham pieces, and 4 oz of bacon bits. The pizza is also topped with mozzarella and provolone cheeses. Finish within 30 minutes and win the $36 breakfast pizza meal free, plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Mister Bagel’s Wall of Fame. If you beat the current time record though, you will also win the additional incentive $100 cash prize!! Contact Mister Bagel (Forest Ave) if interested to find out what the current time record to beat is!! Note: This location can get pretty busy, so you may want to call ahead if interested to find out when they can best accommodate your challenge.

title: End Zone Pizza’s 30-Inch “Gridiron” Team Pizza Challenge
description: For the base challenge, there is a 45 minute time limit for teams of two people to eat a 1-topping 30″ diameter pizza, or one person can try to finish Maine’s largest pizza solo within 90 minutes (1.5 hours). Challengers must keep the pizza down for at least 10 minutes after they are finished, to officially win the challenge. You cannot go to the bathroom or leave the table once the timer has started. The whole pizza weighs between 11 and 12 pounds, depending on toppings, and costs between $50 and $75, depending on toppings. Note: The base 1-topping pizza costs $50 and weighs closer to 11 lbs. Winners receive the pizza free plus sweet T-shirts and Wall of Fame!!

title: Appalachian Trail’s Sundae Summit Challenge
description:
– If you dare…try our Summit Sundae Challenge…starting with a banana, then 14 scoops of ice cream (one for each state the AT crosses), Snickers candy bar (hikers’ favorite food), a handful of M&M’s and an AT Cafe’s famous doughnut. All of that is topped with chocolate syrup, whipped cream & cherries.
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free Sticker
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Sylvia’s Hibernator Breakfast Challenge
description:
– A giant breakfast platter featuring eggs and lots of meats
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Wooster Street’s 22″ Stuffed Pizza Challenge (Naples)
description:

– It’s about 1″ think and weighs between 10 and 11 pounds
– You and a partner have 1 hour to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free Hats
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $50 gift card (total)

title: Original Rocky’s Cascade’s 28-Inch Team Pizza Challenge
where: The Original Rocky's Pizza Cascade & Creative Kitchen
description:

– Winners receive the $52 dollar meal for free, and a $100 dollar cash prize.
– 36 hours notice is required if you want to attempt this challenge.

title: Brew Brothers’ “Gregg’s” Burger Challenge
description: – Winners also receive a free t-shirt.

– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

– Free T-shirt

– Finish it all in 30 minutes and it’s FREE!! $28.75 if you fail.

title: Pho Saigon’s Man vs Pho Challenge

– You must call ahead to schedule your challenge. Thanks!!

– Free Shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: MaGerk’s Cheese Steak King Sandwich Challenge

description:

– Wall of Fame

title: Blue Agave’s El Toro Grande 2′ Burrito Challenge

– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Chick & Ruth’s Man vs Food Colossal Challenge
description:
– Chick and Ruth’s Delly in Annapolis, MD offers 4 food challenges.
– You must finish everything within 1 hour.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: PLAY Arcade’s “Play With Your Food” Challenge
description:
– The “Play With Your Food” Challenge is composed of different “stages”, each of which must be finished to win.
– “Stage 1 – Beef Slider Beach” consists of six of their Juicy Lucy cheese stuffed sliders. Each slider has a 3oz cheese stuffed patty with garlic onion jam on a brioche bun.
– “Stage 2 – Puzzle Pass” is a 1lb platter of fully loaded golden Tetris tots, which is topped with 1/4lb of chopped bacon, 1/2lb of melted cheese, and scallions.
– “Stage 3 – Choose Your Destroyer” is your choice of one specialty pizza.
– “Stage 4 – Mount Dessert” is a freshly baked chocolate chip cookie skillet topped with Oreo crumble, vanilla ice cream, chocolate chips, chocolate sauce, caramel sauce, whipped cream, and a cherry.
– You may start with any stage you want, but once you start eating that stage, you have to finish before moving onto another stage of the challenge.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish all the stages. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and Polaroid up on the restaurant’s wall of fame. Losers get $5 in tokens and walk away with the bill!

title: Elm Center Cafe’s “Esper Bowl” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This challenge, named after professional eater and Massachusetts’s own Geoff Esper, is a breakfast bowl consisting of five pounds of tater tots covered with cheddar jack cheese, a double portion of ham, bacon, sausage, and kielbasa, a double portion of peppers, mushrooms, onions, tomato, and spinach, six eggs, sausage gravy, scallions, and some various house seasonings.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire breakfast bowl. Successful completions win the meal for free and a spot of the restaurant’s wall of fame.

title: G Pub’s “Fame or Shame” Burger Challenge (Providence, RI)
description:
– This challenge consists of two leaning burger towers, which are each compiled of four double cheeseburgers stacked between grilled cheese sandwiches. Each burger is topped with house cheese sauce, applewood bacon, fried onion rings, lettuce, tomato, and MOB sauce.
– In addition to the burger towers, there are four buffalo chicken sliders set among 1lb of chili cheese fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire platter including the sides. Successful completions win the meal for free and a spot of the wall of fame. Fail and you will earn a spot on the wall of shame.

title: G Pub’s “Fame or Shame” Burger Challenge (Plymouth, MA)
description:
– This challenge consists of two leaning burger towers, which are each compiled of four double cheeseburgers stacked between grilled cheese sandwiches. Each burger is topped with house cheese sauce, applewood bacon, fried onion rings, lettuce, tomato, and MOB sauce.
– In addition to the burger towers, there are four buffalo chicken sliders set among 1lb of chili cheese fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire platter including the sides. Successful completions win the meal for free and a spot of the wall of fame. Fail and you will earn a spot on the wall of shame.

title: Palace Pizza’s Party Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge is a team challenge and consists of one of their 16” x 24” specialty pizzas.
– In addition to the pizza, there is a 24oz side of fries and 2 liter of soda required.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire pizza, fries, and 2 liter of soda. Successful completions win the meal for free, a spot of the wall of fame, and $100 cash.

title: Off The Rails’s “Chuckwagon” Burger and BBQ Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of their Swine & Dine BBQ platter and their Yee-Haw Burger, which are both regular menu items. The Swine & Dine is composed of a half rack of ribs, 1/2lb of pulled pork, and two Texas Lolli-pops (double smoked bacon wrapped sausage with bbq and slaw). The Yee-Haw Burger is composed of two beef patties, American and cheddar cheeses, four slices of bacon, spicy bbq, topped with an onion ring cowboy hat.
– In addition to the above, there is a side of mac and cheese, fries, cornbread, and cole slaw.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire platter and sides. Successful completions win the meal for free, some Off the Rails swag, and a spot of the wall of fame.

title: Schoolhouse Ice Cream’s “Sundae Bucket” Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant ice cream sundae composed of 10 scoops of ice cream of your choice, 10 toppings of your choice, 4 whole bananas, and an entire can of whipped cream. Of the 10 toppings, 5 must be wet toppings (syrups) and 5 must be dry toppings (nuts, candy, etc).
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae. Successful attempts receive the ice cream sundae for free and a picture on the Schoolhouse Ice Cream’s wall of fame board.

title: Anthony’s “Great Beef-Bino” Roast Beef Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 18” roast beef sub topped with homemade onion rings, lots of bbq sauce, and American cheese. There are a few options to get different variations of the sub, so be sure to ask if you are interested in attempting the challenge.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish the entire sub. Winners get a sweet t-shirt.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: Nick’s 30″ Pizza Challenge
description:
– Nick’s Place has offered a few different challenges in the past.
– This 30-inch pizza challenge can be only cheese, but you can also get toppings on there, if you prefer.
– 1 person has 1 hour to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free and a free t-shirt.

title: Yoki’s 10lb Japanese Tonkotsu Ramen Bowl Challenge
description:
– This ramen bowl weighs 10 lbs total (4.54 kg), but that includes broth as well, so has the difficulty of a typical 7lb/3.2kg 4 star challenge. There are lots and lots of ramen egg noodles served with corn, bamboo, spinach, soft-boiled egg halves, and some chashu pork belly slices. There is a 35 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners get the $50 ramen meal free plus $100 in YōKi gift cards to come back and use later!!

title: Teddy G’s Big “Mac Attack” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are four 1/2 pound beef hamburger patties (2 lbs total).
– Topped with 8 strips of applewood smoked bacon and lots of homemade macaroni & cheese.
– Served on a demi bread loaf with over 1 lb of fries and 15 pickle chips.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: DiBlasi’s 30-Inch Steak and Cheese Sandwich Challenge
description:
– There is a 30-inch long Italian bread baguette loaf split into three 10″ long sandwich buns.
– There is 1.5 lbs of inside skirt meat and 1/2 pound of white American cheese slices.
– No substitutions are allowed and you cannot add anything to the sandwich either.
– You are only allowed to order ketchup, mayo, BBQ sauce, or their spicy sauce with the sandwich.
– This is a pay-t0-play challenge, so the sandwich costs $40 plus tax whether you win or lose.
– Finish the whole 30″ Steak and Cheese Sandwich within 30 minutes and win $30 in gift certificates to come back and use later, and you’ll get your name and finishing time engraved on their Wall of Fame plaque along with the year you completed the challenge. It is best that you call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance to ensure they have the 30″ long baguette available for you. Good luck and win before you begin!!

title: The Boynton Restaurant’s Spicy BBQ Ribs Challenge
description:
– 1.5 pounds of ribs smothered in an extra spicy BBQ sauce
– You must finish all the meat in one sitting without “help”
– You may not use any sauces or liquids during the challenge
– Free Boynton T-shirt
– Free Boynton Bucket
– Photo on Wall Of Fame

title: Clyde’s 10 Gallon Burger Challenge
description:
– A large burger patty with lots of chili and veggies
– The burger is served with fries and pickle slices
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish it all
– Must be as-is. There are no substitutions allowed.
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Four Sea’s 16 Scoop Hurricane Sundae Challenge
description:
– 16 scoops of tasty ice cream, topped with plenty of syrup and nuts
– There is a 30 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: La Famiglia Giorgio’s “Lil Al’s” Challenge
description:
– La Famiglia Giorgio’s Restaurant offers 4 pasta challenges!
– This is simply a huge pile of pasta
– The meal weighs around 4.5 pounds.
– Free T-shirt
– Note: meal not free or discounted

title: La Famiglia Giorgio’s Chicken Parmigiana Challenge
description:

– Chicken parmigiana to the extreme. Lots of delicious cheese and chicken.
– The meal totals up to around 5 pounds.
– Free T-shirt
– Note: meal not free or discounted

title: La Famiglia Giorgio’s Meatballs & Sausage Challenge

title: La Famiglia Giorgio’s Lasagna Challenge

title: Cheers Boston’s Norm Burger Challenge (The Replica)
description:

– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Cheers Boston’s Norm Burger Challenge (The Original)
description:

– Served with an order of delicious fries

– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Newport Creamery’s Awful Awful Milkshake Challenge (Fall River)
description:
– Newport Cafe has 10 locations, all based in the northeastern U.S., and most of them offer this challenge.
– Each milkshake is about 24 oz, and the challenge is to drink 3 of these large shakes.
– There is no set time limit, so you just have to finish all 3 in one sitting.

title: Momma’s Dessert Bar’s “Big Momma” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge

description:
– This challenge consists a giant ice cream sundae served in an oversized martini glass. There are 15 scoops of ice cream of your choice, 3 toppings of your choice, hot fudge, caramel, and whipped cream.
– There is a short 15 minute time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: Farmer’s Tavern Burger and Fries Challenge
description:
– This burger challenge consists of six 8 oz patties, ham, and bacon. There is plenty of lettuce, tomato, mayo, cheese, ketchup, mustard, onions, and pickles across all layers of the burger.
– In addition to the giant stacked burger, there is a 1lb side of their fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire burger and fries. Winners get a sweet t-shirt and go up on Farmer’s Tavern’s wall of fame.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: 76th Street Truck Stop Diner’s “6 Pack” Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– The 76th Street Truck Stop Diner offers this delicious “6 pack” cheeseburger challenge. Each burger has two 1/4 pound patties and is topped with two slices of cheese. Adding additional toppings is optional.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish all six burgers and win the challenge.
– Winners receive a free challenge t-shirt and go up on the restaurant’s Facebook wall of fame.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: The Milkshake Spot’s “I Want It All” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
address: 250 N State St, Big Rapids, MI 49307
description:
– This challenge consists of a 21-scoop ice cream sundae (one of every flavor on the menu). There is also a generous portion of whipped cream on each scoop with nuts and cherries too.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 meal for free, a shirt, and go on their social media Wall of Fame.
-NOTE: This is a seasonal business that is only open during the warmer months. Please check with the restaurant on their specific open and closed dates for the season.
Screenshot

title: Auction House Cafe’s Pancake Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This pancake breakfast challenge consists of three of their giant, plate-sized pancakes.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything and complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $7 meal for free, a $25 gift card, and spot on their social media Wall of Fame.

title: Dacey’s Sportsbook & Taphouse’s “Red Hot Wing” Challenge
description:
– This is a spicy challenge consisting of 10 of the restaurant’s spiciest wings.
– There is a 5-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the wings for free, $10 added to their Firekeepers Casino Rewards account, and their picture on social media.

title: Snow’s 7lb Footlong “Sasquatch” Pork and Bison Burger Challenge
description: There is a 1 hour time limit to feast on 1 lb portions of four different meats (4lbs of meat total), including cooked applewood smoked bacon (weighed after being cooked), sliced ham, juicy chopped/diced pork tenderloin, and bison (buffalo) meat. The bison meat is locally sourced from Circle K Ranch on Michigan’s Upper Peninsula. The meats are all topped with lots of melted shredded cheese and served over a bed of grilled mushrooms & onions, lettuce, tomatoes, and pickles. All that is served on/between a freshly baked footlong (12″) Italian bread loaf that serves as the burger/sandwich bun. The huge burger is served with 1 lb of Snow’s delicious fries. Winners get the $69.99 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Snow’s Wall of Fame for completing the “Sasquatch” Burger Challenge. Please contact Snow’s ahead of time to schedule your challenge in advance if interested.

title: Kearsley Kone’s Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– This is a huge ice cream challenge starting with an 8-inch Belgian waffle, then topped with 13 scoops of ice cream of any flavor, four toppings of choice, two peanut butter wafers, two sauces, four peanut butter cups, whipped cream, sprinkles, nuts, and cherries.
– Those who complete the challenge in one sitting will get the $45 meal for free, their name on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– If the challenge is finished in 30 minutes or less, the owner will also donate $200 to the Children of Fallen Patriots foundation.

title: Toarmino’s 24-Inch Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 24-inch, 7-pound pizza with one topping of choice.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish the challenge, but if someone beats the current record of 22:27, they get to rename the challenge.
– Current name for the challenge is “Jack Legath Did It Faster.”
– Winners receive the $30 meal for free and their name and time on the Wall of Fame.

title: Motz’s Burgers Record Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play burger challenge consisting of as many double cheeseburgers as you can eat in a 30-minute time span.
– Each burger consists of two 1/8-pound patties, onions, and cheese.
– The current record is 10 burgers, and the record must be beaten to win the challenge.
– Winners receive their picture on the Wall of Fame, a hat, and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: JoJo’s Shake Bar’s “Sweet 16” Burger and Milkshake Challenge (Detroit)
description:
– This challenge consists of a 16-oz burger, 16-0z loaded waffle fries, a 16-oz beer of choice, and a 16-oz  milkshake of choice.
– There is a 16-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free hat, and a $100 gift certificate.

title: Red Knapp’s “Mother Of All Burgers” Challenge
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of 3 pounds of beef, a 1-pound bun, and 1 pound of fries.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $80 meal for free.

title: Big Ken’s Bar-B-Q’s Supersized Full Menu BBQ Challenge
description:
– This challenge includes everything on Big Ken’s Bar-B-Q menu.
– The menu has expanded, and this challenge is now larger than it started out originally.
– There is a 1/2 rack of Big Ken’s BBQ ribs, lots of barbecue pork rib tips, a beef sausage hot link, six (6) smoked chicken wings (3 original and 3 hot wings), a 1/2 smoked chicken, and a big order of pulled pork nachos topped with juicy pulled pork, nacho queso sauce, baked beans, and more. The full menu platter challenge also included sides of homemade baked beans, corn, Mexican corn, lots of fries, and three burgers / sandwiches. There is a beef cheeseburger, a pulled BBQ chicken sandwich with coleslaw, and a pulled pork sandwich with coleslaw. For dessert, challengers must finish an order of Big Ken’s homemade peach cobbler, and along the way, you must finish a large cup of Big Ken’s flavored full-sugar lemonade (multiple options to choose from).
– Brave challengers now have 45 minutes to finish everything.
– Note: The original challenge had a 30 minute time limit (and in the video below).
– Winners receive the $100 BBQ meal for free, a free sweet T-Shirt, and a spot on Big Ken’s Wall of Fame.
The original challenge looked like this, with 2 winners and a 30 minute time limit:
The supersized challenge platter now looks like this, with a 45 minute time limit:

title: Port Hope Chill Zone’s “Triple Ice Cream” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a really big triple scoop of ice cream in a waffle cone.
– There is a one-sitting time limit to finish the challenge.
– Winners receive their photo on the restaurant’s social media Wall of Fame.
– This ice cream shop is only open seasonally, so make sure to check online before heading in to try the challenge!
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Tipsy McStaggers’ “50 In 15” Wing Challenge
description:
– This challenge consist of 50 marinated bone-in wings.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $45 meal for free, a $25 gift card, and their picture on social media.

title: Vizzy’s 14-Inch “Vizz-A-Nater” Team Deep Dish Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a multi-layered, extremely thick Detroit-style deep dish pizza weighing in at around 7-7.5 pounds total. You pick which pizza you want from the menu, and the toppings/fillings are adjusted so that the pizza weighs 7-7.5 pounds. There is a 20-minute time limit for two people to finish this pizza challenge as a team. Your team can also get your pizza toppings split into halves, if each partner wants something different.
– Winning teams receive their $60 pizza meal free, sweet t-shirts, and a team photo on Vizzy’s Wall of Fame!!
– Note: Vizzy’s also offers a 45-Minute Solo 6 Pound “Vizz-A-Nater” Pizza Challenge if interested!!

title: D’Nicio Parlour’s “Dare To Be Great” Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This is a 10+ pound ice cream sundae challenge consisting of 21 scoops of hand-dipped ice cream.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $89.99 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Heidi’s “Darn Good Cookie” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a dozen of Heidi’s Darn Good Cookies along with a pint of milk.
– There is a 25-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $28 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– Losers receive their picture on the Wall of Shame, and they get to take home their leftover cookies!
– An additional record has been added to the challenge to eat as many cookies as possible in 25 minutes. Current record is 18 cookies!

title: Las Tortugas Taqueria “Taco Champion” Challenge
address: 40850 Van Dyke Ave, Sterling Heights, MI 48313
description:
– This is a taco challenge consisting of as many tacos as you can eat in one sitting, with meat of choice, a double tortilla, and topped with onions and cilantro.
– Current record is 56 tacos.
– Winners receive their picture on the Wall of Fame, a free T-Shirt, and a percentage off of their meal based on how many tacos they were able to finish. (For example, 50 tacos is 50% off.)

title: Que Pasa Taqueria’s “Taco Challenge”
description:
– This challenge consists of 14 tacos with double tortillas, filled with meat of choice and topped with onion and cilantro.
– There is a short 10-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $38 meal for free, their picture with the title belt on the Wall of Fame, a free T-Shirt, and 10% off all future purchases for life.

title: Crossroad Family Restaurant’s “Beast Burrito” Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play burrito challenge weighing in at 5.5 pounds, and it is stuffed with meat, cheese, rice, and veggies.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete this challenge.
– Winners receive their picture on the Wall 0f Fame and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Basement Burger Bar’s “Beast Burger” Challenge
description:
– This is a 7-pound challenge consisting of a burger with 2 pounds of beef and 8 slices of bacon topped with cheese, a 2.5 pound side of chili cheese fries, and a 32-oz milkshake.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and they get to keep the big cup that the milkshake is served in.

title: Dawn’s Cafe’s “Big Ben” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This is a breakfast challenge consisting of a 6-egg omelet containing at least 1 choice of meat, 2 choices of vegetables, and 1 choice of sauce, along with 1 pound of your choice of potatoes, a full order of biscuits and gravy, choice of toast or pancakes, and 1 large glass of milk or juice.
– There is a 30-minute time limit. Winners receive the $30 meal for free, their name and time on the leaderboard, and a free T-Shirt.

title: BC’s “Sarge” Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 20-inch, 9-topping Sarge Deluxe pizza.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive their $61.37 meal for free, coupons for 52 more free pizzas, a free T-Shirt, and a plaque on the Wall of Fame.
– Losers receive a T-Shirt and a plaque on the Wall of Shame.

title: Sunrise Cafe’s “Big Sammy” Breakfast Challenge
address: 117 E Coolidge Ave, Battle Creek, MI 49017
description:
– This challenge consists of a quadruple-sized Hangover Skillet, which contains hash browns, scrambled or over easy eggs, cheese, choice of meat sandwiched between two pancakes, enough sausage gravy to feed 4 people, and topped with a toasted marshmallow.
– There is a one-sitting time limit.
– Finishers receive a free T-Shirt.
Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Vizzy’s 14-Inch “Vizz-A-Nater” Solo Deep Dish Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a multi-layered, extremely thick Detroit-style deep dish pizza weighing in at around 6 pounds total. You pick which pizza you want from the menu, and the toppings/fillings are adjusted so that the pizza weighs 6 pounds. There is a 45-minute time limit to finish this challenge, solo all by yourself.
– Winners receive their $50 pizza meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Vizzy’s Wall of Fame!!
– Note: Vizzy’s also offers a 2-Person Team “Vizz-A-Nater” Pizza Challenge if interested!!

title: North Grove Brewers’ “Knockout” Pizza and Grinder Challenge
description:
North Grove Brewers started this “Knockout” Challenge in October 2023. There is a 45 minute time limit to eat your choice of 4 of their signature 12-inch pizzas (excluding the Garden ‘Za) plus their Rocky IV Italian Beef Grinder sandwich. Everything must be eaten at the bar under staff supervision and once the timer starts, you cannot leave your spot/area. The challenge is only available Monday through Thursday and please call ahead of time to schedule your challenge if possible.
Finish within the 45 minute time limit and earn your $75 meal free plus an item of their merch and a $50 gift card to be used later. Winners also get a spot on the “Knockout” Wall of Fame. Finish in more than 45 minutes but still in one sitting and they will give you 50% off the price of your meal. Win before you begin!!

title: Barry G’s “Dog Bowl” Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 16 scoops of giant homemade ice cream (1 of every flavor), 3 toppings, whipped cream, and cherries.
– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish the dessert.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on their social media wall of fame.

title: Mavrix’s 25 Wing Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves 25 lightly breaded, boneless wings.
– Challengers have a 1-hour time limit to finish all the wings.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt and a spot on the wall of fame.

title: The Bomb’s 2lb Burger Challenge
address: 1829 S Cedar St Imlay City, MI 48444
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

description: – This challenge consists of 2 BBQ burger sandwiches and a giant side of “Mac Loaded Cutters” (fried potatoes topped with macaroni & cheese plus chopped up prime rib). There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.

title: Esther’s Grande “El Jefe” Mexican Burrito Challenge
Nest Diner’s “Shermanator” Sandwich Challenge

title: Pueblo Viejo’s “El Grito” Burrito Challenge
description:

– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Crave Shack “Big Kahuna” Burrito Challenge
address: 1103 N Clinton Ave, St Johns, MI 48879
description:
– This massive burrito is packed with rice, black beans, pinto beans, 3 types of meat, lettuce, cheese, salsa, sour cream, and their special Crave sauce.
– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish the whole burrito.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and get to sign their name on the surfboard wall of fame.

title: Amore’s “Beast” Burger Challenge
description:
– Challengers have one sitting to complete the burger.

title: Old Detroit Bar’s 2lb I-75 Burger Challenge (Troy)
description:
– Old Detroit Burger Bar has several locations and most offer this challenge.
– There are four 1/2 lb Angus beef burger patties (2 lbs total) stacked and layered with grilled onions, bacon, mushrooms, American, Swiss, Cheddar, and Pepper Jack cheeses. The burger is served with a side of Thousand Island dressing plus your choice of waffle fries or tater tots.

title: Dog Central’s “Most Hot Dogs Eaten In 2 Hours” Record Challenge (Women)
address: 111 E Michigan St, Mt Pleasant, MI 48858
price: Varies based on hot dogs ordered
description:

– If you are able to beat the record, you get all the chili hot dogs for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on their wall as the current women’s record holder.

title: Benny’s 28-Inch Pizza Challenge (Kalamazoo)
description:
– Benny’s Pizza has many locations, with most offering a 28-inch pizza challenge!!
– Note: The challenge is now the same for both amateurs and professionals, but the cash prize is different.

title: Falcon’s Nest’s “Falconator” Breakfast Burger Challenge
description:
– This “breakfast” challenge consists of a burger, sausage, bacon, cheese, vegetables, and peanut butter topped pancakes as buns!
– The burger creation comes with 3 different sides (fries, onion rings, and their homemade chips).
– Challengers have 45 minutes to finish the meal.
– Winners get their meal for free, a custom t-shirt, and a spot on the wall of fame.
– Losers have to pay $26.99 for the meal.

title: La Casa Fierro’s “Pablo’s Big” Taco Challenge
description:
– The “Big Taco” is a homemade 13-inch deep-fried tortilla loaded with beans, ground beef, lettuce, tomato, cheese and sour cream. There is a super-short 15-minute time limit to finish the taco!
– Winners receive a free t-shirt that gives you a free taco upon each visit, and a spot on the wall of fame!
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed within the time limit.

title: Bear Track’s “Big Bear Belly Buster” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This challenge is composed of eggs, hash browns, sausages, bacon, toast, 2 giant pancakes, and an order of biscuits and gravy (all show and listed in the menu image below)!!
– You have 30 minutes to finish everything. Losers pay for the $39.99 American breakfast meal.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free Bear Track Inn T-shirt, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.
– Note: This restaurant is open seasonally (They typically take a break during January and February).

title: Guido’s “Big G” 16″ Deep Dish Pizza Challenge (Sault Ste. Marie)
where: Guido's Premium Pizza (Sault Ste. Marie, MI)
address: 2673 Ashmun St, Sault Ste. Marie, MI 49783
description:
– This solo challenge consists of a 16″ by 16″ 16-slice Detroit-style deep dish “Super Deluxe” pizza that is covered with 9 toppings (substitutions are possible if necessary).
– The toppings include green bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, pepperoni, pineapple, ham, and more, in addition to the Mozzarella and Muenster shredded cheeses.
– You have a 1 hour time limit to finish this 7 pound pizza sliced up into 16 square pieces/slices.
– Winners receive the $32 pizza for free, a free t-shirt, and a $25 gift card to come back and use later.
– Champions also get their picture enshrined on a table inside Guido’s Sault Ste. Marie, MI restaurant!!
– Note: This is the only Guido’s location that offers the “Big G” as a solo pizza challenge.

title: Lori’s Ice Cream’s 5lb Banana Split Challenge
description:
– This banana split includes 6 bananas, whipped cream, nuts, cherries, fruits, and pounds of ice cream.
– Contestants have 2 Hours to finish the whole thing.
– Winners receive the ice cream for free, a t-shirt, a spot on the wall of fame, and a trophy.

title: Catmando’s “Grim Cheeser” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– There is a whole “Evil Edna” sandwich with all the usual toppings, including 1lb of bacon and 1lb of ham.
– It comes with over 1lb of fries and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $25 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: The Comet Classic Diner’s “Comet” Burger Challenge
description:
– The “Comet” Burger is a triple cheeseburger with 3 beef patties stacked and layered with melted cheese, bacon, lettuce, onions, tomatoes, pickles, and sauces, all in between 2 grill cheese sandwiches for buns. The burger is served with a side of fries and there is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive a sweet free t-shirt and spot on the “Comet” Wall of Fame!!
– Note: This is a pay-to-play challenge so the meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Dairy Dayz’ “Dayz Haze” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description: – 10 scoops of hard ice cream (your choice of flavors), a bunch of sundae toppings, whip, nuts, and cherries. Eat it by yourself in 1 hour or less, and it is free. Plus you get a t shirt and a place on their Wall of Fame board!!

title: Corner House Parlor’s “Pig’s Platter” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– You have to eat 5 different flavors of ice cream plus 2 bananas and 5 toppings of your choice.
– Whipped cream and nuts are optional, and everything must be finished in one sitting to win.
– Finish it all and get your name and photo posted on the Wall of Fame.
– Note: This is a pay-to-play challenge so the sundae is not free or discounted if you win.
– Note #2: Corner House Ice Cream Parlor is openly seasonally during the summer months.

For healthy appetites, if you can finish it all in one sitting with hash brown and toast, you win a free sweet t-shirt, a coffee mug, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Maggie’s Cafe’s “Viking” Pancake Breakfast Challenge
description:
– Four eggs any style, hash browns, 4 bacon slices, 4 sausage links, 1 slice of ham, and 3 pancakes with toast.
– Finish everything (no modifications) in one sitting and get your name and photo on Maggie’s Wall of Fame!!
– If you finish the challenge in 30 minutes or less, you also win a free t-shirt.

title: Tony’s of Shields’ Giant Deli Grinder Sandwich Challenge
description:
– There is a giant deli grinder with turkey, ham, and bacon strips.
– It is topped with lettuce, tomatoes, red onions, cheese, and sauces (mayo is one of them).
– Served with fries topped with gravy, plus a large flavored milkshake of your choosing.
