– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: The Spotted Cow’s Ultimate Ice Cream Challenge (Adrian South)
description:
– This sundae has 19 big scoops of ice cream. You choose the flavors!!
– You can add as few or as many toppings as you want for the challenge.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The ice cream sundae is not free or discounted.

title: The Spotted Cow’s Ultimate Ice Cream Challenge (Adrian North)
description:
– This sundae has 19 big scoops of ice cream. You choose the flavors!!
– You can add as few or as many toppings as you want for the challenge.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The ice cream sundae is not free or discounted.

title: The Spotted Cow’s Ultimate Ice Cream Challenge (Tecumseh)
description:
– This sundae has 19 big scoops of ice cream. You choose the flavors!!
– You can add as few or as many toppings as you want for the challenge.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The ice cream sundae is not free or discounted.

title: City Limits’ Triple Bypass Burger Challenge
description:
– The burger has three 10 oz ground chuck patties.
– Topped with lettuce, pickles, onions, and cheddar cheese.
– Served with 1lb of fries and everything must be finished within one sitting.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Thompson’s Pizza’s Monster 30-inch Team Pizza Challenge
address: 20700 W Old US Hwy 12, Chelsea, MI 48118
description:
Teams of 3 have 30 minutes to complete a 30” stuffed crust pizza with 3 toppings of their choice. If finished within 30 minutes or less, the meal is free and each team member gets a sweet t-shirt.
The pizza consists of 5 pounds of dough, 3 pounds of cheese, lots of sauce, and 3 pounds of toppings.
NOTE: This challenge is only available during the month of October.

title: Sparty’s Coney Island Restaurant’s Secret Pancake Challenge
address: 300 N Clippert St, Ste #5, Lansing, MI 48912
description: Apparently, this pancake challenge is not listed on Sparty’s menu or well advertised, but you can ask your served about it and he or she will know about it. You get 3 platter-sized pancakes and you must finish them in 1 hour or less. Winners get the $7 meal free and a sweet t-shirt.

title: Swiss Swirl’s “Brooklyn Dump” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– The “Brooklyn Dump” is a jumbo ice cream sundae with 32 ounces of your choice(s) of ice cream flavors topped with chocolate syrup, caramel, butterscotch, marshmallow sauce, peanut butter, M&M’s, Reese’s Pieces, Oreo’s, Whoppers, and Butterfinger pieces. You must finish the whole thing in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The sundae is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Old Iron Bar & Grill’s “Hoginator” BBQ Pork Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Old Iron Bar & Grill has been serving the Grant, Michigan area delicious BBQ & food since 2012.
– This 5lb “Hoginator” BBQ Pork Sandwich Challenge has been around for most of those years.
– There is 1lb of smoked sliced ham, 1lb of cooked bacon (3lbs raw bacon), and 1lb pulled pork.
– All that meat is served on a giant sourdough bun topped with lots of Old Iron Bar’s BBQ sauce.
– The sandwich comes with a 1lb side of hand-cut fries and there is a 1-hour time limit to finish.
– Winners earn the $59.95 sandwich meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Barn Door’s “Sorry Bastard” Burger Challenge
address: 3029 S Coldwater Rd, Mt Pleasant, MI 48858
description:
– There is over 1 pound of beef on this burger, split up between 3 burger patties.
– Stacked and layered with mayo, lettuce, tomato, bacon, onion rings, and American cheese.
– Served with 1 pound of fries, and there is a 20-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Ale Mary’s Beer Hall’s “Burritozilla” Burrito Challenge
address: 316 S Main St, Royal Oak, MI 48067
description:
– Four pound burrito filled with chicken, Spanish rice, cheddar, guacamole, peppers, onions, baja sauce, queso, and pico de gallo. There is a 10-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Big Burrito’s “Don’t Even Think About It” Burrito Challenge
description: A 3 ft long grilled burrito that includes your choice of meat, beans, lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese and sour cream. Finish in 12 minutes or less and get the meal free plus your name on the Wall of Fame.

title: Screams Ice Cream’s “Gravedigger” Sundae Challenge
where: Go to Hell, MI (Screams Ice Cream)
description:
Three large scoops of ice cream, a twinkie, pretzel sticks, gummy worms, cherries, and many other toppings. If you finish in one sitting, you get a certificate claiming your death.
Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Cornwell’s Turkeyville Ice Cream Parlour’s “Super Tom” Challenge
description:
– 15 dips (scoops) of ice cream of your choice and 5 toppings of your choice.
– Finish in 15 minutes or less and get it free plus your name and time on the wall of fame.

title: Yogi’s Diner’s “Ben’s Ultimate Breakfast” Food Challenge
address: 2070 V W Ave E, Vicksburg, MI 49097
description:
– Ben’s Ultimate Breakfast Challenge consists of 10 eggs, sausage, ham, bacon, tomatoes, green peppers, onions, mushrooms, and cheddar cheese all covered with sausage gravy.
– Contestants must finish everything in 30 minutes, including the pancake, toast, and hash browns.
– Free Yogi’s T-Shirt
– Name & Photo on Yogi’s “Hall-O-Fame”
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Fox’s Pizza Den’s “Big One” Pizza Challenge (Battle Creek)
address: 12898 Beadle Lake Rd, Ste #100, Battle Creek, MI 49014
description:
– This is a 30″ pizza cut into 52 slices with 3 toppings of your choice, made with 4.5 lbs of dough.
– Contestants must finish everything in 52 minutes and it’s a team challenge for two people.
– Free Meal
– 1 large pizza per participant each month for a year.
– Wall of Fame

title: Winter Inn’s 50 Wing Challenge
description:
– Eat 50 wings tossed in your choice of sauces that includes buffalo, chili-pepper lime, garlic parmesan, teriyaki, kentucky bourbon, barbecue, honey mustard BBQ, or sweet habanero.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– The challenge is available anytime and if you are brave enough, you can also try to break the wing record!!
– The current record is 80 wings. You’ll need to eat 81 to win the $100 jackpot!!
– Free Meal
– Free Winter Inn T-shirt
– $25 gift certificate to be used later
– Wall of Fame
– If you can break the record, you win the jackpot!!

title: Hoppies Tavern’s “Colossus” Burger Challenge
description:
– This giant burger challenge starts with a 4lb patty which is topped with 8 slices of cheese, a head of lettuce, 3 whole tomatoes, and a 1/2 jar of pickles. This is all sandwiched between a giant 3lb bun.
– In addition to the giant burger, there is 1/4 of a case of fries required for the challenge.
– The colossus will feed 8 people but if 1 person eats it all, it’s free!!
– There is no set time limit. Everything just has to be finished in one sitting.
– The meal costs $150 as it is without cheese, or $160 with cheese.
– 24 hour notice required & a credit card deposit is required too.

title: Bread Basket Deli’s Double-D Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Over 1 foot long with 2 pounds of corned beef
– Served between 2 pounds of fresh baked Rye bread
– 1 pound of coleslaw and 12 slices of Swiss cheese
– 8 ounces of Russian dressing plus 1lb of fries
– The 7lb challenge has a 45-minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– (The challenge is only available at the Lincoln Park location.)

title: The Wooden Shoe’s Southern Slam Omelet Challenge
description:
– Twelve eggs, American cheese, diced onion, sausage, hash browns, topped with a layer of sausage gravy.
– You must also finish a side item along with the omelet: pancakes, toast, or hash browns.
– Eat this enormous omelet in 45 minutes or less and receive a free T-shirt and your picture on our wall.
– You also get the meal free as well!! (The challenge in reality is a bit bigger than these pics show.)

title: Flannigan’s Three Pound Burger Challenge
description: This 3 pound burger has all fixings and loaded fries. It’s FREE if you finish it in 30 minutes or less. And you get a t-shirt, and your name and picture will go on the Wall of Fame! If you don’t finish it……it will cost you $30.

title: Meat Southern BBQ’s “Boss Logg” Ultimate Carnivore Challenge
description:
The Boss Logg* – 18 layers of pure metal on a bun in the form of pork, brisket, 2 burger patties, bacon, fries, gravy, cheddar, ‘merican and pepper jack cheese, hot garlic sauce, jalapenos, and a sunny side egg.
ULTIMATE CARNIVORE FOOD CHALLENGE……If you can eat The Boss Logg with 1 side and our Made to Order Mac-N-Cheese with 2 ingredients you will receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, a beer on the house, and your picture on the wall!!

title: Pho Lucky’s Big Bowl Pho Challenge (Novi)
description:
– This big bowl of pho includes 2lbs of beef and 3lbs of noodles.
– You do not need to drink the broth.
– There is a 1 hour time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Pho Lucky’s Big Bowl Pho Challenge (Southfield)
description:
– This big bowl of pho includes 2lbs of beef and 3lbs of noodles.
– You do not need to drink the broth.
– There is a 1 hour time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: B & C Pizza’s 18″ Party Pizza Challenge (Bay City | East Side)
address: 476 N Tuscola Rd, Bay City, MI 48708
description:
– B & C Pizza has 3 locations but only this location offers this challenge.
– 18″ party pizza that weighs around 7lbs total with toppings
– (A verified measurement was 7.15lbs and 1.25″ thick x 17.25″-17.75″ diameter)
– 8 toppings: pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon, mushrooms, green olives, onions, & green peppers
– You may substitute one of the toppings if desired, especially if you have any “allergies”
– There is a 1-hour time limit: Everything must be swallowed before time expires
– Wall Of Fame
– $100 Cash (minus the price of the pizza)*
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted*
– *(You must pay for the pizza in advance, and then you get $100 if you win)
– Note: You may win only once per year, but are allowed to win multiple times

title: The Hut’s “Lucchesi” Burger Challenge
description:
– This storied 5 lb. hamburger has only been eaten once in the allotted 1/2 hour time limit, and it was by a man named Lucchesi. If you can eat this within a half hour, not only is it FREE — we will name it after you!
– You must call to schedule your challenge at least 2 days ahead of time.
– Free Meal
– Naming Rights

title: Tipsy McStaggers’ Tipsy Tower Burger Challenge
description:
– This burger has 5 beef patties stacked and layered with cheese, veggies, and bacon.
– It is served with about 1lb of fries, coleslaw, and 2 pickle spears.
– There is a quick 20-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Downtown Trini’s & Margarita Joe’s Taco Record Challenge
description:
– Eating one taco may be pretty simple, but the challenge is to break the record.
– The record to beat is 40 and you have 1 hour to finish all 41 (as of 7/11/2020).
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Trini’s & Joe’s Taco Wall Of Fame Challenge
description:
– Eating one taco may be pretty simple, but the challenge is to eat 13 of them.
– You have to eat all 13 or more in one sitting.
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: The Corner Bar’s 20 Chili Hot Dogs “Hall Of Fame” Challenge
description: – Finish 20 or more chili hot dogs within the 4 hour time limit and win them all free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!! There are names all over the restaurant as decorations. Finish 12 and get on the Hall of Fame (not free or discounted). Finish 20 or more, and they are all free!! You do not need to schedule your challenge in advance. Good luck and enjoy!! The hot dogs are less than $3/each.

title: The Corner Bar’s 12 Chili Hot Dogs “Hall Of Fame” Challenge
description: – Eat 12 or more chili hot dogs within the 4 hour time limit and you get your named added to the Hall of Fame that hangs all around the restaurant. The chili hot dogs cost about $3 each. Finish 20 or more and you win them all free!! Good luck!! Note: This particular challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Pho Lucky’s Big Bowl Pho Challenge (Redford)
description:
– This big bowl of pho includes 2lbs of beef and 3lbs of noodles.
– You do not need to drink the broth.
– There is a 1 hour time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Sporty’s Suicide Sauce Wing Challenge
description:
– There are a dozen wings served with suicide sauce
– They must all be finished in one sitting
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Dog Central’s “Man vs Food” DC Hot Dog Challenge
address: 111 E Michigan St, Mount Pleasant, MI 48858
description:
– Dog Central has been serving the Mount Pleasant, Michigan area for many years now.
– There are five different food challenges available, all involving Dog Central’s hot dogs.
– This 3ft DC Hot Dog Challenge was featured on Man vs Food: Grand Rapids, Michigan.
– Challengers must pick 3 different foot-long signature hot dogs from their giant menu.
– The 3 loaded hots dogs are served over 1.5lbs of fries and topped with onion rings.
– You must also finish a large fountain drink, and water is not allowed as an option.
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish everything. Be sure to win before you begin!!
– Winners earn the $25 hot dog meal free, a sweet t-shirt, $10 cash, and Wall of Fame.
Click here to check out the restaurant’s website challenge page!!

title: The Dare To Be Great Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This is a giant pile of ice cream, 21 scoops to be exact
– Topped with nuts, syrup, and lots of whipped cream
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: El Mariachi’s “Hay Caramba” 7lb Mexican Burrito Challenge
description:
– This 7 lb burrito is filled with meats, rice, beans, and veggies.
– It is covered in enchilada sauce, sour cream, and guacamole.
– There is a 45 minute time limit for this entire challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Arturo’s Super Burrito Challenge
address: 305 N Beacon Blvd, Grand Haven, MI 49417
description:
– This burrito is served dry and is loaded with delicious meats and veggies.
– The burrito weighs around 6 pounds (but it does vary greatly in size) and there is a 30-minute time limit.
– Free Meal OR Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Murdog’s Top Dog Burger Challenge
description:
– This is almost 2lbs of beef, topped with some veggies
– Served on a huge bun with a 1-hour time limit
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Tios’ 5lb “Mount Nacheesmo” Challenge
address: 401 E Liberty St, Ann Arbor, MI 48104
description:
– 5 pounds of nachos covered in beef, chicken, beans, cheddar and jack cheeses, tomatoes, green peppers, black olives, lettuce, onions, sour cream and guacamole. There is a 45-minute time limit for this challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: They can’t do this challenge during busy hours (11am-2pm, 5pm-8pm)

title: Parkway Pizza’s 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza Challenge (Roseville)
address: 1909 Lexington Ave N, St Paul, MN 55113
description: Eat a 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza within 30 minutes or less and win your $33 pizza meal free, plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Parkway Pizza MN location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Up In Smoke BBQ Platter Challenge
address: 2848 2nd St S, Ste #105, St Cloud, MN 56301
description: There is a full rack of BBQ pork ribs that weighs around 3.5 to 4 pounds. The challenge includes 1lb of their smoked beef brisket, 1/2 pound of smoked pulled chicken, 1/2 pound of juicy pulled pork, 3 full smoked & fried chicken wings, two pieces of their cornbread, and two 1 pound side items – BBQ beans and creamy white macaroni & cheese. The whole platter weighs just over 8 lbs total, or 3.64 kg, which does include the weight of the bones in the ribs and chicken wings. Finish everything within 45 minutes and get the $120 barbeque platter free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Up In Smoke BBQ’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Rosallini’s 96oz “Dough-Zone” Italian Calzone Challenge
description: There is 1.5 lbs of homemade dough wrapped around 1.5 lbs (24 oz) of mozzarella cheese, 6 oz of Cheddar cheese, and lots of meats and vegetable toppings/fillings of your choosing. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $49.99 calzone meal free plus a t-shirt and spot on Rosallini’s Wall of Fame.

title: Bites Grill & Bar’s Quadruple Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to feast on four 1/2 pound beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with 4 different cheeses (8 slices total), 8 strips of bacon (2 per patty), and lots of healthy vegetables. The cheeseburger challenge includes 2 pounds of sides, either tater tots or fries. You can order 1 lb of each!! Winners get the $49.95 burger meal free plus some sweet Bites merch and a spot on their Wall of Fame.

title: Reuan Thai Restaurant’s Pad Thai and Egg Rolls Challenge
description: Challengers have just 1 hour to feast on an entire half-tray of Pad Thai with their own choice of meat(s). The challenge includes an order of six (6) fried egg rolls, and winners earn the $65 Asian food meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Merlin’s “Big Stack” Pancake Challenge
description:
– Challengers have one sitting to finish this stack of pancakes.
– Losers of this challenge end up with their picture on the wall of shame.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: SMOAK BBQ’s Bucket Burger Challenge
description:
Are you up for a challenge? SMOAK BBQ’s Bucket Burger is 2 grilled cheese sandwiches, 2 hamburger patties, bacon, BBQ pulled pork, jalapeno cheddar sausage, fried Nashville Hot Chicken, cheese curds, and smoked pastrami topped with 2 Texas Twinkies served with fries and a bottle of coke. Finish it all in under 30 minutes and receive a T-Shirt plus a bottle of BBQ sauce, and your picture will go up on The “Bucket” Wall of Fame!
NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: The Big G Pub & Grub Double Cheeseburger Challenge
address: 105 County Saint Aid Hwy 16, Beardsley, MN 56211
description: The “Big G” Challenge is to finish TWO of the double cheeseburgers pictured plus 1 pound of sides and a tall glass of liquid (beer, soda, or water w/ no ice). Each burger has two 1/2 pound beef patties, 4 slices of cheese, and 6 slices of bacon. Healthy vegetable toppings seem to be optional. For side options, you can choose between either fries, tater tots, potato wedges, hash browns, or Sidewinder fries. If you can finish everything in less than 30 minutes, you win the $30 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Big G’s Wall of Fame.

title: The Nicollet Diner’s “Barbarian” Breakfast Food Challenge
Parkway Pizza’s 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza Challenge (St Louis Park)
address: 6325 Minnetonka Blvd, St Louis Park, MN 55416
description: Eat a 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza within 30 minutes or less and win your $33 pizza meal free, plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Parkway Pizza MN location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Parkway Pizza’s 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza Challenge (Northeast)
description: Eat a 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza within 30 minutes or less and win your $33 pizza meal free, plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Parkway Pizza MN location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Parkway Pizza’s 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza Challenge (Longfellow)
description: Eat a 16-Inch “Carnivore” Pizza within 30 minutes or less and win your $33 pizza meal free, plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Parkway Pizza MN location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Nelson’s “Lumberjack” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge (St Paul)
address: 454 Snelling Ave S, St Paul, MN 55105
description:
For $10-$12 you can try to eat 5 softball-sized scoops of ice cream (your choice of flavors) with 3 toppings in one sitting. If you can finish it all, you get your name and photo posted on the location’s Wall of Fame.
Note: The sundae is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Nelson’s “Lumberjack” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge (Stillwater)
description:
For $10-$12 you can try to eat 5 softball-sized scoops of ice cream (your choice of flavors) with 3 toppings in one sitting. If you can finish it all, you get your name and photo posted on the location’s Wall of Fame.
Note: The sundae is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Silver Dollar Saloon’s 74oz Sirloin Steak Challenge
Patrick’s “Chuck Norris” Tuesday Trivia Night Burger Challenge
description: This giant burger meal is normally just a large food item that you can order for yourself, or split with your family. On Tuesday evenings though which is Trivia Night at Patrick’s on 3rd, you can take the “Chuck Norris” on as a solo food challenge. Trivia starts at 7 pm and you need to be there at the beginning of trivia. You must sit and eat at the bar so the trivia host and staff can keep an eye on your progress as well as make sure you aren’t sharing your meal. The burger challenge is explained in the image below, with two 18 oz beef patties topped with 8 strips of bacon, 6 slices of American cheese, with a grilled cheese in the middle, served with 2 sides of your choice. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and other swag as well.

title: B-52’s Mother Of All Burgers Challenge (Lakeville)
description:
There is a one hour time limit to feast on 2 lbs of Juicy Lucy burger patties (four 1/2 pound burgers) topped with bacon-wrapped cheese curds, fried onion tanglers, fried eggs, healthy lettuce & tomatoes, and lots of charred scallion-bacon aioli. The challenge includes a large basket of B-52’s fries and costs $50 whether you win or lose. Finish within one hour and you win a sweet t-shirt and $25 gift card to come back and use later. Your name and photo also get added to the location’s Wall of Fame!! There is another B-52 location in Inver Grove Heights!!
Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge.

title: The Nook’s Hot Damn Wing Challenge
address: 492 Hamline Ave S, St Paul, MN 55116
description:
– There are 14 colossal wings dipped and tossed in a sauce made with habanero peppers.
– No drinks or dipping sauces are allowed.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: C.K. Dudley’s Burning Wings of Fire
description:
Six wings coated in signature hot sauce!
Eat them all in under 6 minutes and you will get a t-shirt and free meal.

title: Iron Horse Bar & Grill Burning Wings of Fire
description:
Six wings coated in signature hot sauce! (So hot they are literally on fire)
Eat them all in under 10 minutes and you will get a t-shirt and free meal.

title: Iron Horse Bar & Grill 218 Burger
description: 2.18 lbs/.99kg  of Ground Beef topped with 4oz of cheddar-jack cheese, 1lb of pulled pork and twelve strips of bacon on a 10 inch sourdough bun. It also comes with 1lb/.45kg of fries and a pickle spear. Clean your plate withing 2 hours and 18 minutes, and get free drinks all night long!

title: Two Scoops’ Tornado Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
timeLimit: "Before all the ice cream is melted"
description:
– 20 scoops of delicious ice cream (1 scoop of each flavor they serve).
– Topped with hot fudge and your choice of 1 other topping.
– It is also topped with whipped cream and cherries.
– You must finish before all the ice cream is melted.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: The Well Sports Tavern & Grill Food Challenge
address: 35 Coon Rapids Blvd NW, Coon Rapids, MN 55448
description:
– Contestants have one hour to finish 16 jumbo wings (can pick any sauce), a burger with two grilled-cheese sandwiches as the buns, a side of fries or tater tots, celery and dipping sauce, and a 22 ounce beer.
– Free T-Shirt
– You get the meal half-price ($17.50)
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free if you win.

title: Meisters’ Two Pounder Burger Challenge
description:
– A creation that includes 2 pounds of Hereford beef; six pieces of Colby, Swiss, American and pepper jack cheese; three burger buns; homemade cheese curds; onion rings; pickles; and hand-cut French fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: The Vermilion Club’s 24″ Bamboozeler Pizza Challenge
description:
– One challenger must finish a 24″ diameter pizza that is big enough to feed six to nine hungry adults.
– There are no toppings requirements, other than the base cheese pizza layer. You can add some though!!
– Finish within 1 hour and get the pizza meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Hoppers Bar’s “Belt Buster” Burger Challenge
description:
– For the base challenge, contestants have 1 hour to finish TWO “Belt Buster” Double Cheeseburger platters. Each burger has 2 beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with 4 cheese slices and 4 strips of bacon (2 each per layer). Each burger is served with 1lb of crinkle cut fries. There is a one hour time limit to finish everything.
– Finish two “Belt Busters” within 1 hour and win the $45 meal free plus sweet Hoppers merch and a spot on the Wall of Fame.
– You can also try to finish THREE “Belt Buster” Burger platters. Finish all three within one hour and get everything included as part of the base challenge, but some extra Hoppers merch and the $100 cash incentive!!

title: Lynde’s Pancake Stack Challenge
description:
– You must finish 3 plate-sized pancakes in less than 20 minutes.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Mainline Bar’s Iron Horse Burger Challenge
Betty’s Pies’ “Pig Trough” Dessert Challenge
description:
– 3 slices of pie, 4 scoops of ice cream, more toppings, and a banana
– You must finish within the 20 minute time limit
– Free T-Shirt
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted

title: Racks Sports Bar & Grill’s 3lb Steak Challenge
description:
– 3 lb sirloin steak + side salad + large bowl of mashed potatoes + 2 pieces of Texas toast.
– All fat and gristle but be eaten, but this is a premium cut, so there isn’t much.
– The salad consists of mixed types of lettuce, shredded cheese blend, tomatoes, croutons, cucumbers, real bacon bits, and optionally your choice of salad dressing. It is a large salad that weighs about 2 lbs total.
– You have 40 minutes to finish everything on the platter.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame photo with the Racks Gals!!

title: Joey Nova’s New York Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– 19″ XL pizza with double dough and extra cheese
– 5 meat toppings of your choice (see below)
– Choices: pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon, meatballs, Canadian bacon, chicken, and steak
– There is a 30 minute time limit for you and a partner to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free Shirts (Or Hats/Visors)
– Wall Of Fame
– You each get a $50 gift card

title: Joey Nova’s New York Solo Pizza Challenge
description:
– 19″ XL pizza with double dough and extra cheese
– 5 meat toppings of your choice (see below)
– Choices: pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon, meatballs, Canadian bacon, chicken, and steak
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything by yourself
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt (Or Hat/Visor)
– Wall Of Fame
– $100 Gift Card

title: Andy’s Hometowne 30-Inch “Monstrosity” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Three people get 1 hour to finish Andy’s 30″ diameter “Monstrosity” Pizza.
– There must be one topping, and the pizza can be split into halves.
– You can order more toppings if you want and are feeling brave.
– You can also try the challenge as a team of just two people.
– The pizza weighs around 11-12 pounds, depending on toppings chosen.
– Winning teams get the pizza free plus a team photo on Andy’s “Monstrosity” Wall of Fame!!

title: Leo’s Double Jumbo Burger Challenge
description:
– Two 1/2 lb burger patties
– Served between Texas Toast with cheese
– Side of onion rings
– 20 minute time limit
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted

title: Bridgeman’s La La Palooza Challenge
description:
– 1lb burger with fries and an 8 scoop sundae
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Spaulding’s Spike Burger Challenge
description:
– Six quarter pounder patties with loads of toppings
– Served with 1lb of fries
– 15 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: The Double Nookie Supreme Burger Challenge
address: 492 Hamline Ave S, St Paul, MN 55116
description:
– Two stacker burgers with plenty of toppings
– Served with 1lb of fries
– Everything weighs around 3 pounds total
– It all must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: B-52’s Mother Of All Burgers Challenge (Inver Grove Heights)
address: 5639 Bishop Ave, Inver Grove Heights, MN 55076
description:
There is a one hour time limit to feast on 2 lbs of Juicy Lucy burger patties (four 1/2 pound burgers) topped with bacon-wrapped cheese curds, fried onion tanglers, fried eggs, healthy lettuce & tomatoes, and lots of charred scallion-bacon aioli. The challenge includes a large basket of B-52’s fries and costs $50 whether you win or lose. Finish within one hour and you win a sweet t-shirt and $25 gift card to come back and use later. Your name and photo also get added to the location’s Wall of Fame!! There is another B-52 location in Lakeville!!
Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge.

title: Big Daddy’s “Belly Buster” Burger Challenge
description:
Your mission, if you choose to accept it, will be to finish their “Belly Buster” Burger with hand-cut fries. If you can complete this monumental task, great things await.
You will officially be featured on Big Daddy’s Burgers’ “Wall of Fame” upon successful completion of the “Belly Buster” Burger with fries, and you might also need a nap.
Two half-pound beef patties
Pepper Jack and cheddar cheeses
Bacon, ham, BBQ sauce, and sautéed onions
1 lb of fries with a one sitting time limit
Complete the “Belly Buster” and they will add your photo to their Wall of Fame.
6 lbs of beef patties (twelve 1/2 lb patties)
24 pieces of bacon
24 slices of cheese
2 lbs of fries
1 hour time limit
If you can complete THIS challenge, then your meal is free. You will earn a Big Daddy’s T-shirt, and your photo will be added to their Wall of Fame.
CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THEIR WEBSITE CHALLENGE PAGE!!

title: Firebird’s Sourdough Pizza & Gourmet Burgers’ “Challenger”
description:
– The “Challenger” Sandwich challenge consists of 24 oz of a meat of choice (burger, fried chicken, or grilled chicken), 4 pieces of American cheese, 2 pieces of bacon, grilled jalapeños, grilled mushrooms, grilled onions, and banana peppers with pepper jack cheese, grilled Mac and cheese, grilled tomato, 2 over easy fried eggs, house aioli, lettuce, onion, pickles, and fries.
– In addition to the giant sandwich, there is a large side of their specialty GTO fries, which are fries topped with bacon, creole aioli, and cheddar cheese.
– There is a short 15 minute time limit to finish the entire sandwich and fries. Successful completions win the meal for free and go up on the wall of fame.

title: Serendipity Creamery’s “SC” Team Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
address: Suite A, 114 E 3rd St, Long Beach, MS 39560
description:
– The “SC” Team Ice Cream Sundae Challenge consist of 12 giant scoops of ice cream, 6 toppings, whipped cream, and cherries. The ice cream and toppings are up to the challengers.
– This is a two-person challenge. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire ice cream sundae as a team. Successful completions win the ice cream for free and go up on the wall of fame.

title: Deals’s “Bigfoot Club” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of three “oversized” club sandwiches from their menu – (1) Oversized Big Club, (1) Oversized Italian Club, and (1) Oversized Cajun Club. Each oversized club sandwich must have at least 3 toppings and any condiments or drinks are optional.
– In addition to the three club sandwiches, there is a 1lb side of potato salad and 3 pickle spears.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire three sandwiches and all the sides. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: Monster Subs’ 2 Sub Sandwiches Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves 2 sub sandwiches that consist of your choice of meats, lettuce, and your choice of 3 toppings.
– Challengers have 25 minutes to finish both sandwiches.
– Winners receive the meal for half price, a free t-shirt, a spot on the wall of fame, and a shout-out on their Facebook.

title: Italia Pizza Cafe’s “Big Mama” Team Pizza Challenge
address: 1306 Goodman Rd East Suíte 101, Southaven, MS 38671
description:
– This pizza challenge requires 1 topping of your choice.
– You and your partner can choose as many toppings as you would like but you must pay for the extras if you lose.
– Note: A 24-hour notice is recommended for this challenge.

title: Early’s “Muddy Creek Monster” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge includes a 2lb stacked cheeseburger with 1lb of fries and a 32oz drink.
– Challengers have 20 minutes to finish the whole meal.
– Winners receive the meal for free a spot on their wall of fame.

title: Mi Toro “El Rey” Burrito Challenge
description:
– This massive 5lb burrito has a short time limit of 5 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free.

title: Fox’s 30-Inch “Big One” Team Pizza Challenge (Clinton)
description:
– This huge pizza has one topping and weighs in around 11 lbs.
– You and a friend have an hour to finish the entire thing
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– 1 free pizza a month for a year
– Note: You must book the challenge at least 24 hours in advance

title: The Scratch Kitchen’s 7lb Heavenly Fruit Nachos Challenge
where: The Scratch Kitchen Food Truck (Ocean Springs)
description:
– The Scratch Kitchen is a food truck located on Food Truck Square in Ocean Springs, Mississippi.
– They are known for their Heavenly Fruit Nacho platter in addition to all their other menu items.
– Their food challenge is a supersized version with the base layer being their tasty “Cinnacrisps.”
– The “Cinnacrisps” are topped with fresh blueberries, sliced strawberries, grapes, and sliced kiwi.
– All that is drizzled with lots of Ghirardelli White Chocolate and their homemade caramel sauce.
– There is also a few scoops of whipped cream and their amazing cheesecake dip (from scratch).
– There is a 30 minute time limit. Winners earn the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame.

title: A Slice Of The Apple’s New Yorker Sandwich Challenge
Velvet Cream – The Dip’s Gallon of Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– Velvet Cream, also known as The Dip, opened up back in 1947 in Hernando, Mississippi.
– They have 2 food challenges!
– For this new food challenge, you must finish one full gallon bucket of ice cream in one sitting.
– You can choose as many flavor options as you desire, or just go with one option exclusively.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on their Wall of Fame plaque.

title: Uncle Bubba’s Big 7lb BBQ Smokehouse Challenge
description:
– Uncle Bubba’s Barbecue & Smokehouse is located in Hernando, Mississippi.
– There is a 2lb burger that consists of four 1/2 lb beef patties stacked with cheese and veggies.
– There is a 2lb Memphis pulled pork sandwich topped with delicious coleslaw.
– There is a 1lb beef brisket sandwich topped with a horseradish sauce.
– The challenge includes a 1lb basket of Uncle Bubba’s fries and a 1 hour time limit.
– For dessert, challengers must finish 1lb of pecan cobbler with vanilla ice cream.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Betcha Come Back’s “Smoky Joe” BBQ Nachos Challenge
where: Betcha Come Back Catering and BBQ
description:
Betcha Come Back Catering and BBQ is owned by Joe Woods and the business is portable, not in just 1 location. If interested in trying this “Smoky Joe” BBQ Nachos Challenge yourself, contact Joe to set up your challenge and get the location figured out. There is a 1/2 rack of BBQ ribs, 1 lb of pulled pork, 1 lb of baked beans, coleslaw, pickled jalapenos, cheese sauce, and BBQ sauce, all smothering a pile of round tortilla chips. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. The challenge costs $50 if you fail to finish within the time limit.
Winners receive the meal free, and you also get $50 cash which is a great prize!!

title: 10th Inning Bar and Grill’s “Show-Stopper” Burger Challenge
description:
– Four 1/2 lb juicy burger patties (2 lbs total) stacked between five grilled cheese sandwiches.
– Layered with eight slices of yellow and white American cheeses with eight slices of smoked bacon.
– The burger also features some healthy lettuce and onions to add fiber to your diet. 🙂
– Served with fries, tater tots, or onion rings, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish it all.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt that says, “I beat the Show-Stopper!”
– Wall of Fame

title: Shrimp Factory’s 36-inch Shrimp Po’Boy Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Three foot Po’Boy sandwich with two pounds of fried shrimp.
– Topped with dill pickles, tomato, lettuce, mayo, and melted butter.
– Served with “Factory Debris” fries (looks similar to Canadian poutine).
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Simple Burger’s “Not So Simple” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are two 6 oz burger patties, a 6 oz turkey patty, a 6 oz grilled chicken breast, and a 6 oz veggie patty.
– Topped with a 4 oz hot dog, bacon, cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickle & onion all on a white, wheat or sweet bun.
– Served with a large order of fries.
– There is a 15 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Otis & Henry’s “Dinner Warriors” Steak Challenge
address: 777 Isle of Capri Pkwy, Lula, MS 38644, USA
description:
Challenge includes a 72 oz steak, bowl of baked beans, cornbread muffin, and baked potato.
Everything must be eaten in under 45 minutes. It costs $30 to enter.
T-shirt
Wall of Fame
$250 in FanPlay
Contact restaurant to find out if it is free or not if you finish (may or may not be).

title: Velvet Cream’s “Big Dipper” Milkshake Challenge
description:
– Velvet Cream offers 2 ice cream challenges.
The Big Dipper Challenge has no time limit other than you must finish before they close up shop for the night. Therefore, this challenge rewards not the fast, but those with big capacity. It consists of a Monster Burger with 2lbs of meat plus bacon, cheese, lettuce, pickle, onion, tomato, a large order of bacon cheese fries or chili cheese fries and most importantly, the feature of this challenge which is a 60 oz milk shake. They let you choose any one of their 250+ flavors. (Note: You may not go to the bathroom or get sick.)
If completed, you win the meal free, a t-shirt, and a spot on their wall of fame!!

title: Taste of Detroit Double Triple Burger Challenge
description:
– Six 1/2 lb burger patties and 4 buns total.
– Stacked & layered with cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and pickles.
– Topped with ketchup, mustard, and mayonnaise.
– The challenge includes 1 lb of fries and a 20 oz drink.
– There is a 10 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Name on Wall of Fame

title: T’Beaux’s Blues Le Roux’s Swamp Monster Burger Challenge
description:

– Onions, peppers, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and three sauces
– The challenge includes 1 lb of french fries and a 20 oz drink
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– Minor substitutions are allowed (ask restaurant for details)
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Maria’s Cantina’s “Double Dog Dare You Burger” Challenge
Maria’s Cantina’s Ocho-Cinco 5lb Burrito Challenge

– Note: The burrito is not free or discounted. You pay for it whether you win or lose.

– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

address: 101 N Douglas Conner Dr, Starkville, MS 39759
description:

– Served with 1lb of fries
– 12 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt

title: The Mugshots Burger Challenge (Meridian)
description:
– Three 1/2lb beef patties separated by layers of bread and cheese and toppings
– Served with 1lb of fries

description:

description:

description:

title: Mo Wings’s 50 Chicken Wing Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of fifty (50) of their specialty breaded boneless chicken wings.
– In addition to all of the wings, you must finish 5 sauces and an order of sidewinder fries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the wall of fame.

title: Lake Vibez’s “Barnyard Stax” Burger Challenge
description:
– This giant burger challenge is composed of two 1/3lb local Missouri grown angus beef patties, an 8oz breaded chicken breast, 4 slices of cheese (your choice), 6 slices of hickory smoked bacon, lettuce, onion, and mayo stacked on a triple brioche bun with fried green tomatoes.
– In addition to the giant burger, there is a side of their fried house chips, some french onion dip, and kosher dill pickles. A 16oz soda with no ice is also required.
– There is a short 15 minute time limit to finish the entire burger and sides. Winners get the meal for free.

title: El Poblano Mexican Restaurant and Bar’s “Da Garbage Disposal” Burrito Challenge
where: El Poblano Mexican Restaurant and Bar
description:
– This giant burrito is stuffed with various meats, rice, beans, lettuce, tomatos, and cheese. It is topped with a generous portion of delicious queso!
– There is a short 25 minute time limit to finish the entire burrito. Winners get the meal for free, naming rights of the burrito, and a $50 gift card.

title: Mulberry Tree Saloon’s “Dr. Scrivello & Cavity Fries” Loaded Waffle Challenge
description:
– The “Dr. Scrivello & Cavity Fries” Loaded Waffle Challenge consists of a 1.5lb steak burger sandwiched between 2 Belgian waffles. Included also is candied bacon, zomberry sauce, cherry-maple syrup and marshmallow fluff within. It is topped with 2 orders of their cavity fries (Cinnamon Toast Crunch fries).
– In addition to the loaded waffle, the challenger must also finish 4 drinks of their choice.
– There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge platter and drinks. Successful completions win the meal free and an “I Survived The City Morgue” t-shirt.

title: Bluewood Brewing’s “Death Wish” Spicy Wing Challenge
description:
– The “Death Wish” spicy wing challenge consists of 10 wings smothered in their “Death Wish” wing sauce.
– There is a short 8 minute time limit to finish all the wings with nothing to drink. Successful completions win the wings for free, $35 gift card, and get to add a tally mark to the winner board.

title: Viet Pho Vietnamese Restaurant’s 10lb Pho Challenge
address: 3132 Elm Point Industrial Dr, St Charles, MO 63301
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant 10lb bowl of pho. There are 3lbs of noodles, 3lbs of meat (brisket, thin sliced beef, and meatballs), and 4lbs of house-made beef broth.
– There is a 35 minute time limit to finish the bowl of pho (including the broth). Successful completions win the meal for free and $100 cash.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Challenge (Kansas City)
address: 2510 NE Vivion Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Chappy’s Diner’s “MOAB” Triple Burger Challenge
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to eat a 3-patty triple bacon cheeseburger served with over 1lb of fries and a chocolate chip cookie. The two sets of buns are delicious grilled cheese sandwiches, and the three main layers feature a beef hamburger patty, a tender fried chicken breast, and a juicy piece of fried pork tenderloin. Each layer is topped with cheese and bacon slices. There is over 1lb of hand-cut fries and for dessert, you must finish a 4 ounce chocolate chip cookie. Winners get the $30 pork, chicken, and beef burger challenge meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on Chappy’s “MOAB” Wall of Fame!! Good luck and win before you begin!!

title: Walkers Branson’s “Chipocalypse” Spicy Walking Taco Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant walking taco that can be customized to your liking. It starts with a family sized bag of chips of your choice. There are many different options and it will depend on what stock they have in at the time. It is then topped with shredded chicken and ground beef, cheese, lettuce, sour cream, jalapeños, salsa, corn, and beans. The real challenge is the habanero and ghost pepper sauces that top the walking taco.
– There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish the entire walking taco. Successful completions win the meal for free, a photo on the wall of fame, a sweet t-shirt, and $100 cash.

title: Creekside Grill’s “Grand Slam” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– The Creekside Grill is located inside the Echo Bluff State Park, and is home to this giant breakfast challenge.
– This challenge consists of six giant plate-sized pancakes, six orders of sausage, six orders of bacon, six orders of eggs, and two large drinks of your choice.
– There is a short 30 minute time limit to finish the entire breakfast platter and the two drinks. Successful completions win the meal for free, a photo on the wall of fame, and a free shirt or hat.

title: Thacker’s Mini Pub’s “Hunky Chunk” 4lb Burger Challenge
description: *Note: The restaurant recently extended the time limit to one hour (60 minutes).

title: Steve’s Hot Dog Flight Challenge
address: 3145 S Grand Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63118
description:
– This challenge includes 8 half hot dogs of their most popular hot dogs, including the St. Louis, Bacon Jamaican, Chicago Dog, Bacon Cheeseburger, Backyard BBQ, Hawaii 5-0, Chili Cheese, and Gorilla Mac.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a bottle of Honey Chipotle BBQ Sauce.
– If you beat the current record of 2:30, the $38 meal is free and you get a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win, unless you beat the current record.

title: Grace Meat + Three’s “Jake & Elwood” Chicken Challenge
description:
– This challenge is equal to 4 whole chickens.
– You can do this challenge with normal chicken or spicy chicken.
– Challengers must do this challenge at the bar.
– Winners receive the meal for free and a free t-shirt.
– Winners, who do this challenge with spicy chicken, receive an extra gift basket of restaurant swag along with the free meal and free t-shirt.

title: Burrito-Ville’s “Dirty Thirty” Team Loaded Fries Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a huge mound of chicken and cheese covered fries and 2 drinks.
– Winners receive the meal for free and you get a stainless-steel dish.

title: Captain Corner’s “Bigfoot” Burger Challenge
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Macarena’s 7lb “Anaconda” Burrito Challenge (Kansas City)
address: 5171 NE Chouteau Trafficway, Kansas City, MO 64119
description:
– There are Macarena’s Mexican Food locations in Liberty, MO (original) and Kansas City, MO.
– This Supreme “Anaconda” Mexican Burrito Challenge is available at both. Please call in advance!!
– There are 4 giant burrito sized flour tortillas filled with your choice of meat(s) plus Mexican rice.
– There are scoops of refried beans plus lettuce, pico de gallo, sour cream, and shredded cheese.
– The burrito is served dry and there is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire thing.
– Winners receive the $32.95 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Gibby’s “Great Gibby” Burger Challenge
address: 9a Paul Parks Dr., St. Clair, MO 63077
description:
– This stacked bacon cheeseburger challenge involves 3 1.5lb seasoned beef patties, red onions, lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, mayo, and huge buns.
– Challengers have 1 hour to finish the whole massive burger.
– Winners receive $300!

title: Trackside’s Burger Challenge

– The Grand Slam Food Challenge is offered at most locations, all with a 30 minute time limit.
– There is a “Woody” Burger with a smash burger patty & bacon between 2 grilled cheese buns.
– The burger comes with fries and there are 12 tasty boneless wings with your choice of sauce.
– The main feature is a large St Louis style pizza topped with a few different meats plus cheese.
– There are 6 fried tacos topped with lettuce, cheese, and hot sauce, similar to Jack in the Box (but bigger).
– Winners who finish in under 30 minutes earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Bigg’s “Bigger Smoke” BBQ Burger Challenge
address: 7th St and Main St, Galena, KS 66739
description:
– Biggs Smoke Trailer and Catering is a mobile food truck based in the Joplin, MO/ Galena, KS area.
– This challenge contains 2 double-double grilled cheese BBQ cheeseburgers with each containing 3 grilled cheese sandwiches, two 6oz cheeseburger patties, and 12oz of pulled pork

– Losers have to pay $90 for the meal.
– Note: You must give the owner a 24-48 hour notice before your attempt of the challenge.

title: Bigg’s “Big Smoke” BBQ Burger Challenge
address: 7th St and Main St, Galena, KS 66739
description:
– Biggs Smoke Trailer and Catering is a mobile food truck based in the Joplin, MO/ Galena, KS area.
– This double-double grilled cheese BBQ cheeseburger contains 3 grilled cheese sandwiches, two 6oz cheeseburger patties, and 12oz of pulled pork
– The sides are 80z of potato salad, 80z of baked beans, and 80z of coleslaw.
– The meal is served with 2 cans of soda of your choice that you must also finish.
– You have 10 Minutes to finish everything!
– Winners receive the delicious meal for free, along with a free shirt and Wall of Fame.
– Losers have to pay $45 for the meal.
– Note: You must give the owner a 24-48 hour notice before your attempt of the challenge.

title: Carmen’s Apples’ 60oz Triple Breakfast Burrito Challenge
description:
– Carmen’s Apples & More has been serving the Joplin, Missouri area for many years now.
– There are many different candies available, and they now serve breakfast and lunch.
– The breakfast menu has giant breakfast burritos available, with your choice of meat(s).
– A giant flour burrito tortilla is filled with 6 real eggs, 12 fried tater tots, and shredded cheese.
– You can fill your burrito with ham, bacon, sausage, or none. Each weighs around 20oz total.
– For this “60oz in 60 Minutes” Challenge, you have 1 hour to finish 3 of these ~20oz burritos.
– Winners receive all three $5.99 burritos free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.
– Randy chose to eat a 4th breakfast burrito and help start an additional record eating challenge.
– If you can break his record set in the video by eating 4.5 breakfast burritos or more, you get all the base prizes, and you get to name the challenge too. There may be an additional incentive prize as well. Please contact the restaurant for details or just to schedule your challenge ahead of time so they can be ready.

title: Hotshots’ “Grand Slam” Eating Challenge (Wentzville)
description:
– There are 14 Hotshots Sports Bar locations around the USA, with most around St Louis, MO.
– The Grand Slam Food Challenge is offered at most locations, all with a 30 minute time limit.
– There is a “Woody” Burger with a smash burger patty & bacon between 2 grilled cheese buns.
– The burger comes with fries and there are 12 tasty boneless wings with your choice of sauce.
– The main feature is a large St Louis style pizza topped with a few different meats plus cheese.
– There are 6 fried tacos topped with lettuce, cheese, and hot sauce, similar to Jack in the Box (but bigger).
– Winners who finish in under 30 minutes earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Hotshots’ “Grand Slam” Eating Challenge (St Charles)
address: 1636 Country Club Plaza Dr, St Charles, MO 63303
description:
– There are 14 Hotshots Sports Bar locations around the USA, with most around St Louis, MO.
– The Grand Slam Food Challenge is offered at most locations, all with a 30 minute time limit.
– There is a “Woody” Burger with a smash burger patty & bacon between 2 grilled cheese buns.
– The burger comes with fries and there are 12 tasty boneless wings with your choice of sauce.
– The main feature is a large St Louis style pizza topped with a few different meats plus cheese.
– There are 6 fried tacos topped with lettuce, cheese, and hot sauce, similar to Jack in the Box (but bigger).
– Winners who finish in under 30 minutes earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Macarena’s 7lb Mexican “Anaconda” Burrito Challenge (Liberty)
address: 416 E Mill St, Ste B, Liberty, MO 64068
description:
– There are Macarena’s Mexican Food locations in Liberty, MO (original) and Kansas City, MO.
– This Supreme “Anaconda” Mexican Burrito Challenge is available at both. Please call in advance!!
– There are 4 giant burrito sized flour tortillas filled with your choice of meat(s) plus Mexican rice.
– There are scoops of refried beans plus lettuce, pico de gallo, sour cream, and shredded cheese.
– The burrito is served dry and there is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire thing.
– Winners receive the $32.95 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Judy’s Truck Stop Triple Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– There are three 1 lb cheeseburgers with your choice of toppings (none required).
– Extra topping options include lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and/or dill pickles.
– Served with 1 lb of fries and there is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: MacCheesy’s 8lb Deluxe Macaroni and Cheese Challenge
address: 2202 S Rangeline Rd B, Joplin, MO 64804
description:
– MacCheesy opened about 4 years ago in Joplin, Missouri and will soon start expanding.
– The main feature of this challenge is a 12-inch diameter skillet filled with mac and cheese.
– The most popular deluxe flavor at MacCheesy is their Chicken, Bacon, and Ranch option.
– The entire skillet of deluxe macaroni and cheese weighs 7lbs total and is super cheesy.
– Along with the macaroni and cheese, you must finish a 20oz deluxe flavored milkshake.
– The three milkshake options are Smore’s, Birthday Cake, or else Strawberry Shortcake.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Winners get the delicious $55 meal free!!
– Champions also get a sweet t-shirt and their name & photo gets added to Wall of Fame!!

title: The Big Slice’s 21-inch NY Style “Beast Mode” Pizza Challenge (Kansas)
where: The Big Slice NY Style Pizzaria (Kansas)
address: 4126 S Kansas Expy SUIT 112, Springfield, MO 65807
description:
– There are two Big Slice locations in Springfield, Missouri but only the “Kansas Expressway” location offers this challenge.
– The Big Slice has lots of specialty slice options, and one is Beast Mode with all their toppings.
– For this challenge, you must finish an entire 21-inch diameter Beast Mode New York pizza.
– The entire pizza with all of their 21 toppings (seriously) weighs around 7 lbs total (2 lbs crust).
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything and win the $30 pizza free plus Wall of Fame!!

title: Highway 51’s “Big Daddy Express” Triple Burger Challenge
description:
– Highway 51 Express has a triple cheeseburger on their menu that is layered with lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and pickles.
– You must eat 3 of the giant triple cheeseburgers within 1 hour to win. Fries are included.
– Free Meal
– Note: Only 1 of the burgers is pictured. You must eat 3 of them within 1 hour.
– Note: This challenge is only hosted in June and July.

title: Brewskeez’ Champion Chicken Wing King Challenge
description:
– The theme for this delicious food challenge is definitely the number 55.
– There is a 55-minute time limit to finish 55 jumbo breaded chicken wings.
– Each wing is covered with Brewskeez’ award-winning wing sauce.
– There are other sauce options to choose from as well if interested.
– Along with all the wings, challengers must also finish a handful of French fries.
– Winner receives a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you complete it.

title: Rebel Pig’s Ultimate BBQ Horseshoe Explosion Challenge
description:
– There are 2 slices of Texas Toast at the base of this challenge meal.
– There are 3lbs of seasoned waffle fries topped with 3 different BBQ meats.
– There are 1/2 pound portions of juicy chicken, BBQ pulled pork, and BBQ beef brisket.
– All that is topped with over 1lb of cheesy queso plus lots of Rebel Pig’s homemade BBQ sauce.
– All that is finally topped with a 1/3 rack of delicious barbecue pork ribs.
– The challenge includes 2 small sides of your choosing and a slice of homemade cornbread.
– Challengers get 45 minutes to finish everything on the platter.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Hotshots’ “Grand Slam” Eating Challenge (Fenton)
description:
– There are 14 Hotshots Sports Bar locations around the USA, with most around St Louis, MO.
– The Grand Slam Food Challenge is offered at most locations, all with a 30 minute time limit.
– There is a “Woody” Burger with a smash burger patty & bacon between 2 grilled cheese buns.
– The burger comes with fries and there are 12 tasty boneless wings with your choice of sauce.
– The main feature is a large St Louis style pizza topped with a few different meats plus cheese.
– There are 6 fried tacos topped with lettuce, cheese, and hot sauce, similar to Jack in the Box (but bigger).
– Winners who finish in under 30 minutes earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

title: Tony’s Market & Italian Deli’s “Super Nano” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The challenge includes a massive Italian sausage sub sandwich.
– The sandwich consists of two 1 lb. homemade meatballs, 1.5 lbs. of Italian Sausage, and 1/2 lb. of provolone, Romano, and mozzarella cheese all on a 16 oz. loaf of Italian bread.
– Contestants must finish everything in 30 minutes and must call in advance to book the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: A 48-hour notice is required before your attempt.

title: Raging Bull Steakhouse’s “Big Ron” Burger Challenge
description:
– In 1989 Ron Castleman started the Vintage House, and unfortunately due to cancer he never got to see his dream of the building being passed down to his family. He wanted it to continue to be a place for his accounting firm and a restaurant.
– Raging Bull Steakhouse offers the Warrensburg community a new and exciting sit-down restaurant. They offer fresh, delicious, creative food items and a fun atmosphere.
– There are eight 1/2 pound 50/50 beef burger patties (4lbs total). They are each made up of 50% beef brisket and 50% beef chuck, ground up by the restaurant in house. – The 8 burger patties and stacked and layered with 8 cheese slices (Cheddar, Swiss, Pepper Jack, and Gouda), 8 bacon strips, and lots of healthy vegetables (pickles, lettuce, tomatoes, and onions), all on a normal sized hamburger bun.
– Challenge includes 24oz of Raging Bull’s seasoned fries and a 20oz soft drink of your choosing.
– There are also TWO 20oz milkshakes required as part of the challenge, also of your choosing.
– 30 minute time limit. Winners earn the $90 meal free plus sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.
– Please call ahead to schedule your cheeseburger challenge in advance if interested in trying it.

title: Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast Team Pizza Challenge (St Joseph)
description:
The challenge features one of Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast-sized pizzas and teams of two people must pick one topping in addition to all the delicious cheese. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the whole pizza that weighs between 9 and 10 pounds. The pizza costs around $55.99 plus tax if your team loses, but winning teams receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and they get their team photo posted up on the location’s Wall of Fame. If interested in trying this challenge too, please contact your nearest location to see if they too are participating and find out their rules and prizes.
– Free Meal
– T-shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast Team Pizza Challenge (Joplin)
description:
The challenge features one of Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast-sized pizzas and teams of two people must pick one topping in addition to all the delicious cheese. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the whole pizza that weighs between 9 and 10 pounds. The pizza costs around $55.99 plus tax if your team loses, but winning teams receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and they get their team photo posted up on the location’s Wall of Fame. If interested in trying this challenge too, please contact your nearest location to see if they too are participating and find out their rules and prizes.
– Free Meal
– T-shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: TJ’s 27″ “MegaBeast” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– For this pizza challenge you get the option between meat lover’s/ carnivore toppings or “the works” toppings.
– The 27″ pizza is covered with toppings and they are piled on.
– The works includes pepperoni, ham, sausage, beef, onion, green peppers, mushrooms, black olives, and tomatoes.
– The carnivore includes pepperoni, Italian sausage, sausage, beef, bacon, and ham.
– Comes with 2 pitchers of beer or soda which cannot be shared.
– There is a 45 minute time limit for a team of 2 people to finish it.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirts
– Wall of Fame
– Note: A few days notice is recommended before your attempt.

title: Gusano’s 30″ “Big G” Team Pizza Challenge (Joplin)
description:
– Gusano’s has several locations, and they all offer this challenge.
– There is a 30″ pizza covered with 3 different toppings.
– There is a 1-hour time limit for 2 people to finish it.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: Norma’s Diner’s 15-Egg Omelette Challenge
description:
– 15-egg omelette filled with cheese, veggies, and meats.
– Served with 4 pieces of toast and 1 lb of hash browns.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: West Main Pizza’s 26″ Pizza Challenge
address: 1931 W Main St, Jefferson City, MO 65109
description:
– You must finish a 26″ diameter 1-topping pizza covered with 3 different cheeses
– There is a 1-hour time limit and drinks are included in the price of the challenge
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– You win the progressive jackpot that goes up every time somebody fails the challenge!!

title: The Corner Mexican Food’s Family Burrito Challenge
description:
– You must finish a 6-7 lb burrito filled with rice, beans, and your choice of meat(s)
– The burrito also includes lettuce, onions, and cilantro.
– Note: Guacamole can be added for $10 extra.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– 6 months of free meals at the restaurant (see restaurant for details)
– Wall of Fame

title: T’s Redneck Pork Chop Challenge
description:
– A 5 lb (80 oz) pork chop, a baked or sweet potato, salad, and dinner roll
– The pork chop measures around 10.75″ long by 10″ wide by 1.5″ to 2″ thick
– You do not have to eat the fat, potato skin, or any condiments / glazing
– You may cut one bite before time begins to make sure it’s cooked right
– You cannot stand up once time begins and there is a 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Purdy’s Stony Hill Hall’s Purdy Monster Burger Challenge
description:
– A 1 lb burger stuffed with mushrooms, cheese, and bacon
– The stuffed burger patty weighs around 3 pounds total
– Served on a large homemade bun with lots of veggies
– Served with fries which brings the meal to 4.5 lbs (2 kg)
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Mama’s On The Hill’s Hill Of Spaghetti Challenge
description:
– 4.5 pounds of spaghetti noodles and marinara sauce
– Topped with a massive meatball that weighs 3 pounds
– The meal is 13″ high served in a 13″ diameter bowl
– The 7.5-pound challenge must be finished in one sitting
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt / Hat / Bib (depends on what they have in stock)
NOTE: This restaurant is inconsistent with their portions of spaghetti!!
Sometimes there is more and sometimes there is less, depending on the day.

title: The Crown Candy Milkshake Challenge
address: 1401 St Louis Ave, St. Louis, MO 63106
description:
– Five 24oz milkshakes or malts
– Pick any flavors you want
– 30-minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Name on plaque

title: Habanero’s 747 Jumbo Jet Burrito Challenge
address: 1008 SE Blue Pkwy, Lee's Summit, MO 64063
description:
– This 5lb burrito is over 20″ long and is loaded with delicious meat, cheese, beans, and rice
– There are also vegetables and it’s served “wet” topped with plenty of sauce
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Westport Flea Market’s “Super Flea” Burger Challenge
description:
– This high stacked burger has 50oz of beef with 10 strips of bacon, 6 slices of cheese, and 6 pieces of bun
– The burger is basically five 10oz burgers stacked up on top of each other
– The burger is served with 2lbs of fries
– There is a 30-minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on the Wall

title: The Bubba Lew’s Boot Challenge
description:
– A 3-layer stacker burger with cheese & toppings
– served with nearly 1lb of fries
– An 88oz Das Boot of beer
– You must finish everything in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Free meal if record broken

title: Pointer’s Pizza’s 28″ Pointersaurus Pizza Challenge
address: 1023 S Big Bend Blvd, St Louis, MO 63117
description:
The Pointersaurus is a 28″ two meat or four vegetable topped pizza that weighs over 10 pounds! It is one of the world’s largest delivered pizzas! The Largest, Fastest, and Most Delicious Dinosaur in History!
– Two people must consumer the ENTIRE pizza in ONE HOUR without leaving the customer area at Pointer’s
– The pizza must have any combination of TWO meat toppings or FOUR vegetable toppings
– ALL crusts and toppings must be swallowed ENTIRELY for the contest to be ruled complete
– Competitors must pay $50 in advance. In the event of winning the contest, the $50 will be refunded along with a check for $500
– A maximum of SIX spectators are allowed in the customer area at any given time, and must stay out of the competition area
– Contestants must call at least ONE DAY in advance for reservations to try the challenge, preferred to be at 3pm any day of the week. Any derivations are at the manager’s discretion.
– Napkins may not be used to absorb pizza juices.
– Promotion and photographs of your success may be used by Pointer’s Delivery
– If you slay the beast, your name will appear on the hall of fame. Winners also receive t-shirts.
– (Courtesy: www.pointersdelivery.com)

title: Stuffed 406’s “Stuffer” Donut Breakfast Sandwich Challenge
description:
– Stuffed 406 is a donut shop that offers morning donuts, breakfast sandwiches, donut ice cream sandwiches, and brownies! They also are home to this delicious and giant donut breakfast sandwich challenge.
– The “Stuffer” challenge starts with a 9” diameter, approximately 1lb donut, which is stuffed with sausage, bacon, cheese, and “stuffed sauce” (which they say is to die for!)
– In addition to the donut sandwich, there is a side of their hash brown scramble, which is composed of about 1lb hashbrowns with cheese, green onions, bacon, and topped with more of the “stuffed sauce”.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire sandwich and hash browns. Successful completions win the meal for free, a spot on the restaurant’s wall of fame, and a specialty item named after you added to the menu.
– NOTE: You do have to book and pay for this challenge one day ahead, so make sure to call them ahead of time!

title: Big Arm Resort & Casino’s “Flossie” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a stacked burger with three 10 oz hamburger patties, topped with pepper jack cheese, onion rings, brisket, jalapeños, friend pickles, and red onions. In addition to the burger, there is a one pound side of fries and one large pickle.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything and complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a shirt, a mug, and a picture up on the Wall of Fame.
-NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: The Cracked Egg’s 12-Egg Breakfast Omelet Challenge
description:
– There is a giant breakfast omelet made with 12 eggs, your choice of meat, a healthy vegetable, and cheese.
– The omelet is served with a large portion of hash brown potatoes on an oversized 14″ metal pizza pan.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything and win the breakfast meal free plus a t-shirt or hat.

title: Tippy Cow’s “Cow Tipper” Burger Challenge
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Burger Bunker’s “The General” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are 2 big “Malmstrom” burgers plus full sides of french fries and onions rings.
– Burgers topped with American cheese, bacon, lettuce, tomato, pickles, mayo, onions, and burger sauce.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything on your platter.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: KEG Family Restaurant’s “Mega Kegger” Burger Challenge
description:
– There is over 3 pounds of ground beef patties stacked on a homemade bun.
– Topped with cheddar cheese slices, tomatoes, lettuce and onions.
– The burger is served with a big pile of fries and a 21 oz milkshake (we think).
– Challengers must finish everything in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Nap’s Grill’s Bitterroot Beast Burger Challenge
description:
– Three 12 oz burger patties topped with onions, mushrooms, and bacon
– Served with 1 pound of fries and a 16 oz milkshake (your choice of flavor)
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Stella’s “Monster Cakes” Pancake Challenge
description:
– You must eat 4 Monster Cakes of your choice in one sitting.
– You can choose between buttermilk, wheat, or gluten-free (upcharge).
– The pancakes weigh 3.25 lbs total and each one is 9″ diameter x 1/2″ thick.
– Free Cinnamon Roll
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Bull Mountain Grille’s 78oz Steak Challenge
description:
– This challenge consist of a 78 oz ribeye steak and heaping serving of loaded mashed potatoes.
– It also includes a side salad and large doughy dinner roll topped with sugar butter
– The ribeye cannot be cooked above medium temperature and is served butterflied.
– The salad includes lettuce, radicchio, cucumber, carrots, and your choice of dressing.
– The mashed potatoes are loaded with sour cream, butter, shredded cheddar cheese, chives, and bacon bits.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything (the steak is about 9″ long x 9″ wide x 2.125″ high).
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– (Previous winners can only win again if they beat their previous time.)
– (The current record holder gets 10% off everything as long as he or she holds the record.)

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Omaha)
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Bellevue)
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Warm Cookie’s Ultimate Cookie Ice Cream Sandwich Challenge
address: 3700 S 9th St, Suite A, Lincoln, NE 68502
description:
– The Warm Cookie – Delivering baked-to-order Warm Cookies anywhere in the Lincoln city limits. Gift wrapped with a handwritten greeting and delivered for free. Make someone’s day. Send Warm Cookies!!
– The Warm Cookie offers 10 extra delicious Warm Cookies on their regular (non-seasonal) menu.
– Options: Chocolate Chip, Gluten Free Chocolate Chip, Peanut Butter, Cranberry White Chocolate, The Rachel (w/ oatmeal, chocolate chips, and butterscotch), Snickerdoodle, Oatmeal Raisin, Monster Cookie, Sugar, and M&M Cookies.
– For this challenge, one of each cookie makes up part of a layer, and there are two layers total.
– There are 10 portions of vanilla ice cream sandwiched in between the top and bottom cookies.
– There is a 35 minute time limit and this is the world’s biggest ice cream sandwich challenge.
– Winners earn the $35 dessert meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Lincoln)
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.
– This 28″ diameter pizza is loaded with at least 3 toppings (2 have to be meat).
– You can choose from the gourmet / specialty options too.
– The entire pizza weighs around 10 lbs.
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish it.
– 1 person can attempt this challenge, as well.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $200 in gift card certificates.

title: J’s “Pierce Pounder” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Vietnamese Restaurant La Vista’s XXL Pho King Challenge
description:
– There is a huge bowl of Vietnamese pho. You choose the protein you want.
– There is lots of noodles, and you must finish the broth to win the challenge.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish, and this is a pay-to-play challenge.
– The challenge meal costs $24.95. Winners get a $20 gift certificate to use later.
– Champions also win a sweet free t-shirt and spot on the Pho King Wall of Fame!!

title: Big Red Restaurant’s “Big Red” Burger Challenge (Norfolk)
description:
There are three 1/2 lb burgers, that’s right, 1.5 lbs of FRESH BEEF, six slices of bacon, cheese, lettuce, tomato, and onion. Finish the burger and a side of your choosing, and win a free dessert!! Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge. It costs $16.99 plus tax.
Descriptive write-up by Stephanie Wu – “The challenge is to eat a stacked burger with three 1/2-lb. patties, 6 slices of bacon, your choice of cheese (American, Swiss, cheddar, or pepper jack), lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, and onions on a brioche bun; and served your choice of a side [fries, tater tots, hashbrowns, mashed potatoes (with wither white or brown gravy), baked potato (after 4 PM), steamed vegetable medley, cottage cheese, cole slaw, corn, side salad, onions rings ($1 extra), waffle fries ($1 extra) cup of soup ($1 extra)] (try any side loaded with cheddar jack cheese and bacon bits for $1.59 extra). Burger toppers are extra. One sitting time limit!”

title: Big Red Restaurant’s “Big Red” Burger Challenge (Fremont)
description:
There are three 1/2 lb burgers, that’s right, 1.5 lbs of FRESH BEEF, six slices of bacon, cheese, lettuce, tomato, and onion. Finish the burger and a side of your choosing, and win a free dessert!! Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge. It costs $16.99 plus tax.
