description:
There are three 1/2 lb burgers, that’s right, 1.5 lbs of FRESH BEEF, six slices of bacon, cheese, lettuce, tomato, and onion. Finish the burger and a side of your choosing, and win a free dessert!! Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge. It costs $16.99 plus tax.
Descriptive write-up by Stephanie Wu – “The challenge is to eat a stacked burger with three 1/2-lb. patties, 6 slices of bacon, your choice of cheese (American, Swiss, cheddar, or pepper jack), lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, and onions on a brioche bun; and served your choice of a side [fries, tater tots, hashbrowns, mashed potatoes (with wither white or brown gravy), baked potato (after 4 PM), steamed vegetable medley, cottage cheese, cole slaw, corn, side salad, onions rings ($1 extra), waffle fries ($1 extra) cup of soup ($1 extra)] (try any side loaded with cheddar jack cheese and bacon bits for $1.59 extra). Burger toppers are extra. One sitting time limit!”

title: Loop Brewing Co’s Dalton 28″ Pizza Challenge
description:
– There is a delicious 28″ pizza. You choose the 2 different toppings.
– Extra cheese and extra sauce do not count as toppings.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– This is a team challenge for 2 people.
– Free Meal
– Free “Dalton” T-shirts
– $100 Gift Card (per team)

title: Ralston Cafe & Ice Cream Shoppe’s Griffinator Challenge
description:
– The Griffinator is a sweet and delicious challenge.
– It features 12 scoops of ice cream, a banana, nuts, Oreo’s, and chocolate drizzle.
– There is a 36 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Bailey’s Breakfast & Lunch’s Porkasaurus Challenge
description:
– This is all things pork: bacon, sausage patty + links, ham steak, Canadian bacon, and Andouille sausage.
– These all sit on a bed of red taters with jack & cheddar cheese, 3 eggs, a buttered biscuit, and toast.
– All this served with a side of sausage gravy and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free “I Tamed the Porkasaurus” T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: eCreamery’s Dundee Dozen Ice Cream Challenge
Nebraska Brewing Company’s Death Pizza Challenge
address: 7474 Towne Center Pkwy, Ste #101, Papillion, NE 68046
description:
– A super spicy large pizza covered with death sauce (ghost peppers)
– There is also andouille sausage, jalapenos, habaneros, pepper jack cheese, and more
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. It is HOT!!
– Free Meal
– Free Bottle Of Beer
– Naming Rights

title: Stella’s “Stellanator” Burger Challenge
description:
– Eat the Stellanator, which is the burger, taller than a baby, consists of (6) 6.5 oz burger patties, 6 fried eggs, 12 pieces of bacon, 6 pieces of cheese, grilled onions, lettuce, tomatoes, jalapenos, and Peanut Butter all on a bun served with a basket of fries. There is a 45-minute time limit. Hundreds have tried, but few have won.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Old Chicago’s Volcanic Pizza Challenge
description:
– This pizza is of normal size, but it is loaded with spicy peppers.  Give it your best shot!
– There is an 8 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Frank’s 30-inch “Big Joe” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Frank’s Pizzeria has been located at 132nd & Dodge (Linden Market) for many years now.
– Teams of 2 brave challengers have 1 hour to finish a 30″ diameter pizza weighing 12lbs/5.45kg.
– Teams have 3 pizza options to choose from – Meat Lovers, Veggie Lovers, or a mix of both.
– Winners get the massive $80 pizza free plus sweet t-shirts and a team photo on Wall of Fame.

title: Cappy’s Big Momma Burger Challenge
description:
– This burger has well over 5lbs of beef
– It’s stacked with bacon, cheese and other toppings
– Served with 2lbs of fries
– 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $200 cash

title: Evel Pie’s “Reaper” Spicy Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge is “the worlds spiciest pizza”. The pizza arrives with a huge flame. It is composed of habanero chili sauce, chili pepper infused mozzarella, sriracha-marinated chorizo sausage, and sliced habanero peppers.
– The challenge is to eat three slices of the pizza. You are not allowed to use ranch or drink milk. You can drink water, soda, or alcoholic beverages (if of legal drinking age) during the challenge.
– There is a short 10 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get their name on the wall of flame, a Reaper t-shirt, and social media posts announcing your victory.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted for winning the challenge.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Challenge (Las Vegas)
address: 9635 Bermuda Rd, Unit #190, Las Vegas, NV 89123
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Area15’s “Beast’s Feast” Challenge
address: 3215 S Rancho Dr Ste 140, Las Vegas, NV 89102
description:
– This challenge consists of 2 pounds of beef, 1 pound of bacon, one pound of cheese, onions, lettuce, tomato, pickle, and thousand island dressing, all on an entire loaf of King’s Hawaiian bread, topped with 4 signature potato tornadoes, and served with a 1-pound side of fries.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $88 dollar meal for free.

title: Sayulita’s “Mecca” Burrito Challenge
address: 3999 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119
description:
– This whole burrito is wrapped in bacon.
– Challengers have one sitting to finish the whole burrito.
– Winners receive the meal for free.

title: La Vencindad’s Food Challenges
address: 953 E Sahara Ave suite e-27, Las Vegas, NV 89104
description:
– La Vencindad in Las Vegas, NV offers 3 food challenges!
– The “La Super Torta Cubana” Challenge consists of refried beans, tomatoes, onions, avocado, crispy bacon, ham slices, grilled chicken, sausage, Mexican chorizo, grilled beef, breaded beef, an egg omelet, melted Monterrey Jack cheese, pickled jalapeno, and telera bread.
– The “El Super Sombrero” taco challenge is a 4-person team challenge.
– The “El Super Sombrero” taco challenge has only a 5-minute time limit.

title: Stacks & Yolks’ “Get Stacked, Get Yolked” Pancake Challenge (Las Vegas | North Jones Blvd)
address: 3200 N Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89108
description:
– Stacks & Yolks has 2 locations, both based in Las Vegas, NV, and both offer this challenge!
– 10 massive pancakes stacked high (8.5″ tall)
– The pancakes can significantly vary in size
– They are about 9″ in diameter by .75″ thick
– 10 scrambled eggs (on separate plate)
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: Dawg House’s “Bucket” Wing Challenge
address: 3000 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89109
description: – You can do this challenge solo or with a partner!

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Steak Challenge (Las Vegas)
where: Dick's Last Resort (Las Vegas - Excalibur Hotel & Casino)
address: 3850 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89109
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: Tacos & Beer’s 17 Tacos Challenge
address: 3900 Paradise Rd A, Las Vegas, NV 89169
description:
– This challenge consists of 17 tacos and 4 of their miniature beers!
– Challengers have only 15 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a free pint glass.

title: PK Oyster Bar’s 8lb Voodoo Seafood Pasta Challenge
address: 333 W St Louis Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89102
description:
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish a giant 8 lb bowl of PK Oyster Bar’s “Voodoo” Seafood Pasta that is equivalent to 6 normal-sized portions of the pasta they regularly serve as part of their menu.
– There is roughly 42 oz of cooked pasta noodles served with lots of grilled chicken, 42 pieces of shrimp, lots of diced andouille sausage, spicy Voodoo cream sauce, dried red pepper flakes, and then some healthy vegetables too. The “Trinity” is included which consists of green/red peppers, celery pieces, and onions. There is lots of diced tomatoes served on top, and the whole dish weighs around 8 pounds, 3 ounces.
– Winners receive the $200 bowl of pasta free and get a sweet T-Shirt plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Shokku Ramen’s “Shinigami” Spicy Ramen Challenge (Las Vegas)
address: 3889 Spring Mountain Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89102
description:
The Japanese Grim Reaper, Death Bringer, or “Shinigami” is as daunting as their challenge! Measuring over 4 MILLION Scoville units of heat, the Shinigami Challenge is Las Vegas’ SPICIEST ramen challenge! Anyone brave enough to attempt this challenge has 8 minutes to finish over 24 ounces of Tonkotsu broth, loaded with over 3 pounds of noodles and toppings! All challengers are required to sign a waiver, and winners will receive their meal for free and have their pictures immortalized on our Wall of Warriors!
Can you handle The Shinigami Challenge? Here are the rules to participate:
Any challenger attempting The Shinigami Challenge:
– Must be 18 years or older and sign Shokku Ramen’s release of liability waiver.
– Must declare all food allergies (if any) to management before beginning the challenge.
– Will receive three portions of Shinigami Ramen.
– Will have 8 minutes to complete the entire bowl, including all of the broth and toppings in one sitting. The bowl must be empty of all contents before time has elapsed to be declared victorious.
– Will be disqualified if the challenger gets up to use the restroom or steps outside.
– If the challenger fails, they must pay for the Shinigami Challenge.
If the challenger emerges victoriously, the winner will receive the meal free of charge along with a Shokku Ramen gift card worth $25. Also, their picture will be posted on The Wall of Warriors and featured on their social media pages.
CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THE RESTAURANT’S WEBSITE CHALLENGE PAGE!!

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Las Vegas)
address: 6629 Las Vegas Blvd S STE 120, Las Vegas, NV 89119
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Slice of Vegas’ 9lb “Double Down” Pizza Challenge
where: Slice of Vegas Pizza Kitchen & Bar

description: – Note: The restaurant prefers a 3-4 hour notice before attempting the challenge.

– You must finish a 7.2lb Italian beef and sausage combo sandwich with cheese, hot and sweet peppers, and a small bag of fries in 30 minutes or less. It is over 2 feet long and extra juicy due to all the Italian beef.
– CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THE RESTAURANT’S CHALLENGE PAGE!!

– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

– Smothered with their special chili and more cheese
– Includes a huge pile of homefries and 2 large biscuits
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Name on Special Plaque

title: Public House’s “Do It In Public” Quadruple Burger Challenge
address: 3900 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119
description:
– There are 4 massive & loaded double cheeseburgers stacked high.
– Served with a basket of loaded fries and a 22 oz deluxe milkshake.
– There are also some pickle spears served on the pallet.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $80 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt.

title: Bar Code Burger Bar’s BFB Big Freakin’ Burger Challenge

description: Challengers have 10 minutes to eat a stacked burger with five 7 oz beef burger patties, strips of bacon on every patty, blueberry BBQ sauce, onion straws, pulled pork, 2 buns throughout, and ghost pepper cheese. Along with this burger there is 9 oz of french fries. Winners receive the burger meal for free and a free sweet t-shirt!!

title: Wildwest’s 6-Patty “Chipper” Burger Challenge
description:
– The Chipper includes six 8 oz patties, 3 eggs, bacon, and other toppings, all on a bun.
– Contestants must finish everything in 30 minutes, including the 1 lb of fries.
– A waiver must be signed prior to participating in the challenge.
– There is another challenge where one has to finish 6 hot wings in 3 minutes to get them for free.
– Free Meal
– Free custom-made T-Shirt
– Wildwest Burgers is a food truck that is not open every day. Follow their Facebook page linked above to find out where they will be next, or contact them to set up a challenge!!

title: Omelet House of Henderson’s 3lb “Monster” Burger Challenge
description:
– The Omelet House of Henderson, NV offers 2 food challenges! They offer this burger challenge and an omelet challenge!
– This monstrous burger comes with a fresh lean ground beef patty cooked to your liking and topped with American cheese, lettuce, bacon, tomato slices, and Thousand Island Dressing.
– The burger challenge includes a side of potato spuds (chips) or French fries
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win this cheeseburger challenge.
– Note: This hamburger challenge is only available at the Henderson location.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you finish / win.

title: Omelet House of Henderson’s “King” Breakfast Omelet Challenge
description:
– The Omelet House of Henderson, NV offers 2 food challenges! They offer this omelet challenge and a burger challenge!
– This monster breakfast omelet has 12 eggs, cheddar cheese, onions, ham or sausage, and peppers.
– Served with a side of hash browns / breakfast potatoes plus a few pieces of toast.
– Everything must be finished in 1 hour to win this tasty breakfast food challenge.
– Note: This breakfast omelet challenge is only available at the Henderson location.
– Free  T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you finish / win.

title: Mint Indian Bistro’s Inferno Curry Challenge (Paradise)
address: 730 E Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89119
description:
– Mint Indian Bistro has 2 locations, both based in Las Vegas, NV, and both offer this challenge.
– This devilishly spicy curry bowl is made with made with ghost pepper, habaneros, and several other chili peppers. You get your choice of lamb, chicken or veggie base protein to eat with the curry (price will vary).
– You have to finish everything in one sitting, and you must sign a waiver to compete.
– The challenge is available annually throughout the month of October.
– Click here to check out the restaurant’s challenge page!!
– $50 Mint Indian Bistro gift card
– Wall of Flame
– Entry into a drawing for complimentary dinner entrees for a year.
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

description:

where: Joy Luck Noodle Bar (Inside Harrah's Reno)
description:

– There are 3 quarts of broth which must also be finished within the 1 hour limit
– Free Hat
– Wall Of Fame
– Certificate Of Achievement
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: Stacks & Yolks’ “Get Stacked, Get Yolked” Pancake Challenge (Las Vegas | South Durango Dr)
address: 7150 S Durango Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89113
description:
– Stacks & Yolks has 2 locations, both based in Las Vegas, NV, and both offer this challenge!
– 10 massive pancakes stacked high (8.5″ tall)
– The pancakes can significantly vary in size
– They are about 9″ in diameter by .75″ thick
– 10 scrambled eggs (on separate plate)
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: The Middlegate Station Monster Burger Challenge
description:
– 1-1/3 pound angus beef burger on a sourdough mini boule
– Topped with lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, and red onions
– Also topped with cheese, onion rings, olives, and a pepper
– Includes fries and everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Shirt or baby monster “onesie” for your baby
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted

title: Fox & Hound Smokehouse’s Menu Burger Challenge
description:
– The Menu Burger is a combination of all the Fox and Hound favorites, starting with a personal pepperoni pizza, a healthly portion of BBQ pulled pork, a couple fried eggs, a juicy bacon cheeseburger, chili cheese garlic fries, and a bun … then, stacked with Philly cheesesteak and a teriyaki chicken sandwich with pineapple and jalapenos under the top bun … and, finally, complimented with a side of six hot wings.
– There is also a side salad and challengers have 1 hour to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Set the record and you get to name it

title: Pizza Plus’ Super Monster Mondo Challenge (Sparks Vista Blvd)
description:
Note: This challenge is based off of the restaurant’s “Original Pizza Plus Combo” option which also now includes linguica and anchovies (optional) in addition  to the ones listed on the photo.

title: Chuckwagon Restaurant’s Monster Burger Challenge
description:
– More than 1 lb of beef on a normal bun, served with some fries.
– There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free T-Shirt
– Certificate of Completion
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: La Salsa Cantina’s “El Champion” Burrito and Margarita Challenge
where: La Salsa Cantina Mexican Restaurant - Miracle Mile Shops
address: 3663 Las Vegas Blvd S Ste 380, Las Vegas, NV 89109
description:
– The burrito is just over 2 pounds and is delicious, but that is only the beginning of this challenge.
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to defeat this food challenge.
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Born & Raised’s Bar Gamble Slider Challenge
where: Born And Raised Sports Bar & Restaurant
address: 7260 S Cimarron Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89113
description:
– The challenge is to eat all 16 varieties of BAR’s sliders.
– Served with an order of Anchor Fries with buffalo ranch sauce.
– There is a 30 minute limit to finish everything on the platter.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– NOTE: The picture used and video are both from when Randy Santel attempted the challenge. There were 15 sliders and Anchor Fries with a 1 hour time limit. The challenge has since been enhanced to include 16 sliders with the Anchor Fries, within 30 minutes. Good luck!!

title: The Dillinger Gauntlet Food Challenge
description:
– This is a stacked burger with two 1/2 lb beef patties topped with 12-14 oz bbq beef brisket, 4 strips of Applewood-smoked bacon, and 4 slices of cheddar cheese on 4 bun slices, served with a double serving of lettuce, onions, and pickles on the side. There are also 5 sides: fries, sweet potato fries, onion rings, Asian cole slaw, and cinnamon swirl bread pudding with raisins, peaches, and vanilla ice cream. It is all homemade.
– The burger is 4.5″ in diameter by 5.25″ high and everything weighs 4.75 lbs. (No substitutions)
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything including the 5 sides
– Note: You will be disqualified if you “get sick” immediately after finishing the challenge
– Free Meal
– Bragging Rights

title: The 401 Tavern’s “Wimpy’s” Smashburger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant stacked burger composed of smash patties, which are topped with some cheese, caramelized onions, and bacon. The entire burger is topped with some delicious onion rings.
– In addition to the burger, there is a large side of fries, mac and cheese, and a pint of beer.
– NOTE: There is no water or other beverages allowed during the challenge, but you may order another beer if you need any more liquids during the challenge.
– There is a short 20 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free, a certificate of completion, small trophy, and photo hung in the Hall of Fame.

title: The Hydro Tavern’s “Mountain Man” Food Challenge
description:
– The “Mountain Man” food challenge consists of a giant quadruple bacon cheeseburger, a basket of onion rings, 4 mozzarella cigars (mozzarella sticks), 6 buffalo wings, 1lb of poutine, and a dessert of your choice.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free, a “I Conquered The Mountain” t-shirt, and picture on the wall of fame.

title: Georgina’s Pizzeria’s 28 Inch Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge is for teams of two people to finish a 28” diameter cheese pizza. More toppings can be added if desired, however it is not required.
– There is a 28 minute time limit to complete the challenge. Successful completions win a $50 gift card, a miniature trophy, and bragging rights. For every attempt of the challenge, the restaurant makes a donation to a local charity in your honor.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: Oceanside Sandwich Shop’s “Monstah” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of two of their “Monstah” subs. A Monstah sub is 20” and can be any of their speciality sandwiches (except the vegetarian). Oceanside Sandwich Shop offers many different unique and tasty subs!
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish both subs. Successful completions win the meal for free, a spot of the wall of fame, and the progressive cash jackpot. Every time someone loses the challenge, $5 is added to the pot.

title: Tuckaway Tavern’s “Big Ass” Quadruple Burger Challenge
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to finish four giant burgers with a side of Tuckaway’s fries in the middle. This is a unique restaurant food challenge because the head chef chooses which four huge burgers from the menu that a challenger will get. So, every person gets a different combination of craft, gourmet burgers from what past challengers have received. Finish all four cheeseburgers with a side of fries within 30 minutes and win the $60 burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt of your choice, a $100 gift card to use at the restaurant, butchery, and/or market, plus a coveted spot on their Wall of Fame!! Please note that this restaurant is crazy busy at most times of the day and during most evenings, especially when there is a lobster roll special or BOGO deal available. You may want to call ahead if interested to see when would be best for them to accommodate your challenge.

title: Charlie’s 6lb Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves a massive bacon cheeseburger with six 6 oz patties, 18 bacon slices, and triple layered with 1 ft long fried mozzarella buns!
– The burger is joined by a 1 lb side of fries and you have 40 minutes to finish the whole ~8 pound meal (it was 8.2lbs for a previous challenger who weighed it with a personal scale).
– Winners receive the $49 meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on their wall of fame.

title: Blue Bay Seafood and Steaks’ “Blue Bay” Burger Challenge
address: 3381 Province Lake Rd, East Wakefield, NH 03830

title: KC’s Rib Shack’s “Feedbag Shovel” BBQ Challenge
description:
– There are about 8 lbs of barbecue meats and sides served on a shovel wrapped with aluminum foil.
– There is a full rack of BBQ pork spare ribs, which weighs roughly 4-4.5 lbs, including bone weight.
– There are half-pound portions (each) of juicy pulled pork, smoked beef brisket, smoked chicken breast, and smoked Italian sausage. That is all served with two sides of your choosing and 2 pieces of homemade jalapeno cornbread. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything served on your giant “Feedbag Shovel.”
– Note: The advertisement and menu item shows that the platter includes two 16 oz sides and four pieces of cornbread, but the actual solo challenge only includes two pint-sized (8 oz) sides of your choice plus 2 pieces of the homemade jalapeno cornbread. It’s also available for families and groups of friends to share.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Rick’s “143 Main St” Burger Challenge
description:
– This includes two 8 oz beef patties, bacon, onions, mushrooms, jalapeño, chipotle BBQ, cheese, braised short rib, gyro meat, breast, Andouille sausage, habanero, and eggs all stacked on three Texas toast grilled cheese.
– Also served in the challenge are french fries and a root beer float.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free “Rick’s” T-shirt
– Note: The challenge meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Chez Vachon’s 5lb Grand Poutine Challenge
description:

description:
– Hollow Spirits Distillery in downtown Albuquerque, New Mexico is a restaurant as well!!

– For this challenge, there are two 2lb 50/50 beef burger patties stacked and layered with lots of Cheddar cheese. There is plenty of bacon served on top with New Mexican green chilies too.
– The burger patties are made with 50% beef short rib and brisket, and then 50% beef chorizo.
– There are two over-easy fried eggs on top with Chipotle mayo on the top and bottom bun.
– They use a giant freshly baked sourdough bun and the challenge includes a portion of fries topped with shredded parmesan cheese and bacon bits. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. The Old-Fashioned cocktail and alcohol drank in this video was optional and just to promote Hollow Spirits.
– Winners earn the $98 cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

Come in and try our insane challenge if you dare! The Towering Inferno is a one pound double decker burger topped with pepper jack cheese, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and our home made Inferno sauce.  The Inferno sauce (w/ ghost peppers) is so hot it has made grown men cry for their mama after one bite!! Also comes with a large order of fries topped with gooey cheddar cheese sauce, chopped bacon and fresh habanero peppers! If you win – you get your picture on our wall of fame, a $25 gift card and a really cool T-shirt!! (This is all straight from their website challenge page.)

title: Brick Lane’s Phaal Curry Challenge (Downtown)
description:
– Brick Lane Curry House has 3 locations, all based in the Northeastern US, and all offer this challenge.
– This is an average size bowl of curry, but it’s extremely spicy.
– You must finish the curry in one sitting. The rice is optional.
– There are multiple meat options to choose from.
– Certificate of Completion
– Free pint of beer after the challenge
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: John Brown’s “Satan is Real” Spicy Wing Challenge
description:
– You must eat 10 extremely spicy wings in 5 minutes or less
– You may not drink anything or use any “help” during the challenge
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $50 gift card

title: Swingbellys’ Swingbelly BBQ Challenge
address: 909 W Beech St, Long Beach, NY 11561

title: Hickory BBQ’s Eat The Feast Challenge
description:
– 2 full racks of ribs
– Pulled pork and smoked sausages
– 1/2 chicken, brisket, and turkey
– 4 sides of your choosing
– The 7 lb challenge has a 2 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Free Hat
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Broadway Lights Diner’s Alex Burger Challenge
description:
– Roughly 2lbs of meat, served with some toppings on a large bun.
– You must finish the entire meal in one sitting.
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: The Glenwood Pines 4 Pinesburger Challenge
description:

– The vegetables are optional and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free T-shirt

title: The 2 Ton Tony’s 2 Ton-Za Pizza Challenge
description:

– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts

title: The Say Cheese Pizzasaurus Rex Challenge
description:
– Medium cheese and pepperoni pizza topped with 1lb ribeye meat
– Topped with grilled onions, red & green peppers, and Monterrey Jack cheese
– Includes a large serving of hot & spicy fries along with 4 slices of garlic bread
– Served on a 16″ pizza tray piled 5″ high. There is a 45-minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Avellino’s 5lb Pizza Challenge
description:
– This pizza is about 20″ in diameter and it weighs 5 lbs.
– There are no topping requirements for the challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish all of it.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $75 gift card

title: The Boar’s Nest Pig Pen Nacho Platter Challenge
address: 1263 Patten Mills Rd, Fort Ann, NY 12827
description:
– A huge order of nachos topped with chili with beans, jalapenos, olives, and tomatoes
– There is also shredded cheddar cheese, lettuce, sour cream, and salsa
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Cheeseburger Cheeseburger’s 2 Pounder Burger Challenge
description:
– Roughly 2lbs of meat, served with some toppings on a normal sized bun.
– You must finish the burger in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Cheeseburger Cheeseburger’s 1 Pounder Burger Challenge
description:
– Roughly 1lb of meat, served with some toppings on a normal sized bun.
– You must finish the burger in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Brawler’s Back-Alley Barrel Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This sandwich has brisket and several other meats stacked up high
– It weighs around 3.5 lbs and there is a 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Special Gift
– Note 1: Challenge only available weekdays 11 am – 3 pm
– Note 2: You must pre-order the challenge at least 24 hours in advance.

title: Traust Brewing Company’s “Berzerker Burn” Spicy Wing Challenge
address: 128 S Main St, Mt Holly, NC 28120
description:
– The “Berzerker Burn” spicy wing challenge consists of six wings coated in their spicest sauce.
– There is a very short 6 minute time limit to finish all the wings. Successful completions win the wings for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on the restaurant’s wall of fame.
–  NOTE: There are no beverages allowed during the challenge.

title: Bull City Solera’s “Burgerrito and Milkshake” Burrito Challenge
description:
– The “Burgerrito” consists of a 100% NC grass-fed burger patty cooked to order, rolled up in a burrito with curly fries, a fried egg, caramelized onions, lettuce, spicy beef mustard, and garlic aioli.
– The challenge is to eat two “Burgerritos” and drink a 24oz milkshake (vanilla or chocolate).
– There is a short 15 minute time limit to finish both “Burgerritos” and the milkshake.
– After all food is consumed, there is a 15 minute waiting period before declaring your victory, to make sure you don’t get sick, which will result in disqualification.
– Winners receive bragging rights!! There is a special prize for the person who finishes the challenge the fastest and sets a new record time.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.
– CLICK HERE to check out the restaurant’s challenge page and schedule your challenge!!

title: Johnny Brusco’s 6lb “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge (Mooresville)
where: Johnny Brusco's New York Style Pizza (Mooresville)
address: 108 Argus Ln, Suite C & D, Mooresville, NC 28117, USA
description:
– This “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge features a 6 lb (2.73 kg) stromboli with all the toppings featured on Johnny’s Deluxe Pizza. It includes sausage, onions, mushrooms, green peppers, ground beef, Canadian bacon, and pepperoni. There is also a lot of shredded mozzarella cheese. There is no pizza / red marinara sauce inside the stromboli. Rather, it is served on the side in a bowl which is required to be finished as part of the challenge within the 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit.
– Fail and pay $49.99 plus tax for your meal. Winners get the entire stromboli meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– There are many Johnny’s (in Georgia) and Johnny Brusco’s restaurants all around the southeastern United States and most if not all of them can / will offer this stromboli challenge. Find and contact the location nearest you beforehand to set up your challenge so they can be prepared and ready for your challenge attempt!!
– CLICK HERE to check out the challenge terms and conditions on Johnny Brusco’s website!!

title: Jack Brown’s “Deep Fried Oreo” Challenge (Greenville, NC)
where: Jack Brown's Beer & Burger Joint Greenville NC
description:
– This challenge consists of as many deep fried Double Stuf Oreo’s as you can eat.
– This challenge has a one-sitting time limit.
– To win, the current record must be beaten.
– Record resets at the beginning of every year; contact the Jack Brown’s location nearest you to find out the current record to beat!
– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

title: Jack Brown’s “Hamburger” Challenge (Greenville, NC)
where: Jack Brown's Beer & Burger Joint Greenville NC
description:

description:
– This challenge consists of a large bbq burger, loaded fries, and a root beer float.
– The bbq cheeseburger has a 1lb patty topped with 6oz of brisket, 6oz of pork, and 4oz of bacon.
– The fries are covered in 6oz of queso and 6oz of meat.
– The root beer float is 22oz and is made with 5 vanilla ice cream scoops.
– Challengers have 30 minutes to complete the whole meal.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on their wall of fame.

title: Aviator’s “Imperial Moco Loco” Spicy Wing Challenge
Rustic Burger’s 15lb Team Burger Challenge (Spring Lake)
address: 237 Skyland Plaza Shopping Center #100, Spring Lake, NC 28390
description:
– Rustic Burgers serves this challenge at both of their locations (Fayetteville and Spring Lake).
– This massive burger comes with 12 fried eggs, 12 American cheese slices, 12 tomato slices, 24 bacon strips, 12 onion slices, and 24 pickle slices.
– The burger patty weighs 9 lbs and the bun weighs 3 lbs.
– The fries that come with the burger weigh in at a whopping 4lbs.
– You and a partner have a 1 hour time limit to complete this beast of a challenge.
– Winning teams win $250.
– Challengers can take on the challenge solo for a winning prize of $500 with a 2 Hour time limit.
– There is a $25 deposit, and losers pay an extra $50.
– Note: They need a 24-hour notice beforehand so call to schedule your challenge ahead of time.

title: Rustic Burger’s 15lb Team Burger Challenge (Fayetteville)

title: The Baker’s Box’s “Kessel Run” Monster Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The Baker’s Box serves pastries, breads. gourmet sandwiches, wraps, salads, and dinners.
– They have been operating in the Hendersonville, North Carolina area for a few years now.
– The restaurant is Harry Potter and Star Wars themed, where the challenge gets its name from.
– The sandwich includes 1lb ham, 1lb turkey, and 1lb of roast beef which they cook & slice there.
– There is 4 slices each of Cheddar, Swiss, and Provolone cheeses, layered between the meats.
– The bread for the sandwich is a 1lb challah bun, and it is topped with some healthy vegetables.
– The veggies include fresh locally-sourced lettuce, tomatoes, and tasty bread & butter pickles.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish, which gets referred to as “12 parsecs” (from Star Wars).
– Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and their name & photo goes on the Wall of Fame.

title: Cinnaholic’s “Monster Stack” Vegan Cinnamon Roll Challenge
address: 6461 Old Monroe Rd, Ste F, Indian Trail, NC 28079
description:
– Cinnaholic has locations all over the USA, including one in Indian Trail, North Carolina.
– The brand got famous on ABC’s “Shark Tank” and is known for serving 100% vegan foods.
– The food is also all dairy/lactose free and cholesterol free (note: it is not all gluten free).
– The base of this “Monster Stack” Challenge is 8 of Cinnaholic’s vegan cinnamon rolls.
– They are all topped with soy-based icing and chocolate chips, making this so very delicious!!
– There are 6 big scoops of edible chocolate chip cookie dough, and then 2 smaller scoops.
– The whole challenge weighs just over 6lbs total and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish.
– Winners get the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a photo gets posted on the Wall of Fame.
– Contact your local Cinnaholic to see if they are offering this cinnamon roll challenge too.

title: V Pizza’s “Comeback Story” Neapolitan Pizza Challenge (Cary)
description:
– There are multiple V Pizza locations around the southeast USA, mostly in Florida.
– This pizza challenge is only available at the Cary, North Carolina restaurant location.
– There are four delicious 13″ diameter Neapolitan (Naples-style) pizzas from the menu.
– Pizza Margherita Classico, Pizza Napoli, Pizza Carnivora, and Pizza Mac-Attack.
– You must eat the four pizzas in that order and each one has about 11 oz of dough.
– There are 15 different jumbo Italian wings, with 3 different flavor options (5 of each).
– The 3 options are V Signature, Calabrian (spicy), and Cryin’ Hawaiian (the spiciest).
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. The whole challenge weighs around 7lbs.
– Winners earn the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on V Pizza Cary’s Wall of Fame.

title: Shuckin’ Shack’s “Meggah Greggah” Lobster Roll Challenge (Wilmington)
description:
– There are ~15 Shuckin’ Shack Oyster Bar locations around the USA in NC, SC, GA, MD, and FL.
– Some of the locations will offer this challenge too. Contact the location nearest you for details.
– It is surely offered where Randy attempted the challenge at this downtown Wilmington, NC location.
– There is a 5lb lobster roll with over 4lbs of fresh lobster served on a 22.5″ French baguette loaf.
– The lobster roll is served with 1/2lb coleslaw and 1.5lbs French fries with a 1 hour time limit.
– Winners receive the $150 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– You can order the challenge meal for your family or group, since it is now a featured menu item.

title: The Milk Road’s Impossible Belgian Waffle Challenge
description:
– The Milk Road Coffee just started this eating challenge at their location in Jacksonville, North Carolina.
– They specialize in serving authentic Belgian-style waffles just like the street food found in Belgium.
– For my particular challenge in the video below since we didn’t know any better, there was a 40 minute time limit. The time limit is 1 hour for everyone moving forward.
– Eating challengers must finish 26 waffles equivalent to about 6lbs, plus a bottle of Topo Chico mineral water and a “quad” flavored (caramel) iced coffee with 4 shots of espresso.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on The Milk Road’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Appalachia Cookie Co’s 6lb Impossible Cookie Challenge
description:
– Appalachia Cookie Co serves the local Boone, North Carolina area, but can also ship their cookies nationwide!!
– They make a 17″ diameter 6lb chocolate chip cookie that is equivalent to 3 dozen normal-sized cookies.
– Challengers have 1 hour to finish the whole cookie, and may drink whatever liquids they choose.
– You can dip the cookie pieces in milk (they have a few options) if you think that will work for you.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Bad Daddy’s “Fat Daddy” Burger Challenge (Gastonia)
address: 2211 E Franklin Blvd, Ste #120, Gastonia, NC 28054
description:
– There are ~40 Bad Daddy’s Burger Bar locations all around the United States (see website).
– This Fat Daddy Challenge is now available in Gastonia, NC plus at other participating locations.
– There are five 10oz burger patties stacked and layered with 9 different delicious cheeses.
– There are some healthy vegetables on the burger – tomatoes, lettuce, pickles, and onions.
– There are 3 types of bacon – 8 jalapeno, 8 Applewood smoked, and 8 breaded and fried.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything, including the 3oz slider added to the top.
– There are 7 fried sides – regular fries, sweet potato fries, fried pickles, onion rings, and tater tots.
– There is also fried deviled eggs and a stack of their fried homemade chips. So many side items!!
– Winners receive the $75 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and their name & photo on the Wall of Fame!!
– Contact the location nearest you to find out if they are offering this Fat Daddy Burger Challenge.

title: Morgan’s Dairy Bar’s “Cow Pile” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
– Morgan’s Dairy Bar & Calf-A offers this ice cream challenge in Stanley, North Carolina.
– You must get 25 scoops of ice cream with a max of 8 of their flavor options available.
– You must also choose 5 different topping options to be added to your massive sundae.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $49.99 sundae free.
– Champions also get a sweet t-shirt and spot on Morgan’s Dairy Bar’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Si! Señor Modern Mex’s Chubby Burrito Challenge
description:
– The extra large Chubby burrito is filled with chicken, pork carnitas, onions, peppers, black beans, guacamole, lettuce, cheese, chipotle cream, and green sauce.
– Contestants must finish everything in 25 minutes and no bathroom breaks are allowed
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Beaches N Cream’s Bad Decision Ice Cream Challenge
address: 3316 Holden Beach Rd SW, Supply, NC 28462
description:
– The Bad Decision Challenge includes eating 16 scoops of ice cream with toppings.
– Contestants must finish everything in 45 minutes without any vomiting.
– Contestants must call in advance to book their challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Aviator’s King Kong Boilover Burger Challenge
description:
– The challenge includes a massive King Kong burger weighing 5.5 lbs and a side of fries.
– The King Kong burger consists of two 1/2 lbs. patties, 1 lb. of BBQ, 1 lb. of brisket, cheese, bacon, 3 pickles, a fried egg, fries, sour cream, lettuce, tomato, mayo and 2 onion rings all on a bun.
– Contestants must finish everything in 30 minutes.
– Free Meal (*We think, and you may want to double check.)
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Mac’s Fatboy Sandwich Challenge (Greensboro)
description:
– Mac’s Speed Shop has 8 locations, all based around the Carolinas, and all offer this challenge.
– There is a 1lb breakfast sausage patty topped with fried pickles & coleslaw
– Topped with pulled pork, beef brisket, bacon, pimento cheese & queso
– Also topped with 3 ounces of their spicy “Mac’s Burnout Sauce”
– The sourdough bun weighs around 1lb and is very tough to chew
– Notes: The sauce is not that spicy, and you may not dunk the bun
– The 5lb BBQ sandwich is served with a 1/2lb side of mac & cheese
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything on your platter
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Mac’s Fatboy Sandwich Challenge (Matthews)
description:

title: The Grilled Ginger Vietnamese Pho Challenge
description:
– This includes 1.5 lbs of noodles, 1 lb of vegetables or bean sprouts, 1 lb of protein either chicken or beef, and 64 oz of broth. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– The current record time is 25 minutes and 37 seconds.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– $45 Grilled Ginger Gift Certificate

title: Go Burrito’s Monster Burrito Longboard Challenge (Salisbury)
description:
– There are many Go Burrito locations and most of them offer this burrito challenge.
– You must schedule your burrito challenge in advance with at least 24 hours notice.
– There is supposed to be only 5 burrito tortillas filled with two scoops of 4 different meats.
– The four different juicy meats are steak, chicken, shredded beef, and marinated pork.
– The base consists of 2 scoops each of white rice, brown rice, pinto beans, and black beans.
– The burrito is filled with lettuce, pico de gallo, a spicy habanero salsa, sour cream, and more.
– The burrito is served wet and topped with queso cheese sauce and red enchilada sauce.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish. Winners get the $35 meal free and a sweet t-shirt.
– If you win, you get on the Wall of Fame. If you lose, your photo goes on the Wall of Shame.

title: StokeRidge Tavern’s 72oz Steak Challenge
description: StokeRidge Tavern runs a promotional 72 oz steak challenge, and they post details on their FACEBOOK PAGE. Check out their page and contact them for more details.

title: Dooley’s 5lb Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a massive burger topped with cheese, veggies, and sauces, served on a big bun.
– The rest of the plate is filled with fries and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish.
– The restaurant says it weighs around 5 lbs total, but that hasn’t been verified.
– Please call ahead in advance to schedule your challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Jukebox Pub’s Fat Biatch Sandwich Challenge
description: You have to eat 3 Fat Biatch sandwiches in less than 30 minutes. The Fat Biatch has nacho cheese, beer-battered onion rings, crinkle-cut fries, a mix of bell-peppers and jalapenos, chicken strips, and shaved-steak on a toasty yet tasty bread bun. If you finish everything, you win a $50 gift certificate. You still have to pay for the meal but you can use the gift certificate to pay for your meal.

title: Joe’s Oasis Pierogi Team Challenge
description: Note: The picture used is the 2.5 lb pierogi for the solo competition. You each have to eat 1!!

title: Calabash Creamery’s Kitchen Sink Sundae Challenge
description:
– 24 scoops of ice cream (one of everyone they serve).
– 20 toppings (one of everyone they serve).
– Topped with whipped cream and cherries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish it all.
– If not during peak season (winter), they serve 12 varieties (2 scoops of each).
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Mary’s Gourmet 3 Pancake Challenge
description:
– These pancakes are dinner plate sized and each one weighs 1 pound.
– You must eat 3 of them in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: El Cerro’s “El Papi Grande” Burrito Challenge (341 S College Rd)
where: El Cerro Grande (341 S College Rd)
description:
– This 7 lb burrito is loaded with delicious meats and veggies.
– It is covered with tomatoes, lettuce, sauce, sour cream, and guacamole.
– There is a 1 hour time limit for finishing the entire burrito.
– The challenge is only available at this S College Rd location.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: The Roast Grill Chili Dog Challenge
description:
– This challenge is divided into two different divisions, a mens division and a women’s division.  You have an hour to beat the record in your division.  As of February 2019, the men’s record is 27 and the women’s record is 15.
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

description:

– The wings are extremely spicy and they will burn!!

– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

– Topped with pulled pork, beef brisket, bacon, pimento cheese & queso
– Also topped with 3 ounces of their spicy “Mac’s Burnout Sauce”
– The sourdough bun weighs around 1lb and is very tough to chew
– Notes: The sauce is not that spicy, and you may not dunk the bun
– The 5lb BBQ sandwich is served with a 1/2lb side of mac & cheese
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything on your platter

description:
– This challenge consists of a 1/2-lb each of pulled pork, smoked brisket, pulled turkey, and corkscrew shrimp, along with 8 chicken wings, 4 ribs, 2 sausages, and sides of asparagus, mac and cheese, pork and beans, coleslaw, and cornbread.

– Winners receive a $100 gift card, and a free T-Shirt.

description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of four 1/2-lb burger patties, 1 pound of bacon, 1 pound of brisket, 2 fried eggs, layers of beer cheese sauce, barbecue sauce, and spicy pickles, and topped with 2 bacon wrapped stuffed jalapenos, along with a 1-pound side of fries.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a $50 gift card and their picture on the Wall of Fame.
– Losers get their picture on the Wall of Shame.
Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Fargo | 45th St.)
description: – Sickie’s Garage has 8 locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Fargo)
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.
– This 28″ diameter pizza is loaded with at least 3 toppings (2 have to be meat).
– You can choose from the gourmet / specialty options too.
– The entire pizza weighs around 10 lbs.
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish it.
– 1 person can attempt this challenge, as well.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $200 in gift card certificates.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Grand Forks)
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.

title: Dakota Burger Company’s “Burgerpocalypse” Challenge
description:
The Burgerpocalypse consists of 2 pounds of burger, 9 slices of cheese, the entire bun, and one pound of your choice of fries or tots. You will have 30 minutes to finish! If you want to give it a shot, it has to be scheduled so please call the restaurant and set up a day and time in advance!!
Winners earn the meal free, a sweet free t-shirt, and a spot on Dakota Burger Company’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Finish Line’s Giant “Rudland” Burger Challenge
description:
– The gigantic Rudland burger weighs around 5 pounds. There are six 1/2 lb patties, 10 slices of pepper-jack cheese, 20 slices of pepperoni, and 10 slices of bacon, all on Texas toast.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour, including the 1 lb of fresh cut fries served with the burger.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: The Lunchbox Eatery’s Pancake Stack Challenge
address: 101 E Main St, Fort Ransom, ND 58033
description:
– You get 30 minutes to finish a stack of 4 plate-sized pancakes
– Winners receive the meal free, a shirt, and spot on their Wall of Fame

title: Mr and Mrs J’s 12 Egg Pig Out Omelet Challenge
where: Mr and Mrs J's Family Restaurant
address: 318 Hwy 2 Bike Path, Devil's Lake, ND 58103
description: Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: JD’s BBQ’s Double Man Burger Challenge
description:
– Four 1/2 pound burger patties
– 8 slices of bacon & 8 slices of tomatoes
– Lettuce, mayo, & 2 fried pickle spears
– Served with french fries and onion rings
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Fargo | Fiechtner Dr.)
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Bismarck)
description:
– Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.
– Only at this location, this challenge consists of 4 of their most popular burgers.
– Their 4 most popular burgers are the Sickies, the Hangover, the Twin Cam, and the Chowzilla.
– The Sickies burger consists of peppered bacon, pulled pork, a fried egg, BBQ sauce, American cheese, onion rings, and a splash of hot sauce.
– The Hangover burger consists of grilled ham, 2 peppered bacon strips, 2 fried eggs, American cheese, and a glazed doughnut bun.
– The Twin Cam burger consists of peppered bacon, nacho cheese, and grilled cheese buns.
– The Chowzilla burger consists of 2 beef patties, pepperjack cheese, fried jalapenos, fried pickles, peppered bacon, spicy “OH YEAH” sauce, and Texas toast.

title: Big Willy’s Frac Attack Burger Challenge
description:
– 2 grilled cheese sandwiches
– 2 8 oz hamburger patties
– Cajun sauce & caramelized onions
– Crispy fried onions and meaty chili
– All served on a bed of fries
– Must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: The Parrot’s Cay’s Heat Elite Wing Challenge
description:
– The challenge is to eat 7 really spicy wings.
– You only have 5 minutes, so eat fast!!
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Chido’s Tacos’s Burrito Challenge
description:
– This burrito challenge is filled with ground beef, shredded chicken, rice, beans, cheese, and pico de Gallo. It is wrapped with a few flour tortillas and topped with enchilada sauce and more cheese.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire burrito. Successful completions win the meal for free, a $40 gift card, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: TheFeed’s “Bigfoot” Burger and Fries Challenge
description:
– This giant burger challenge consists of four ½ lb Wagyu patties, topped with 12 slices of provolone, roasted garlic aioli, lettuce, tomato, red onion, pickles, bacon, and bacon jam on a toasted Italian Boule.
– In addition to the giant burger, there is 1lb of fries and a drink of your choice.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire platter and drink.
– Winners get the meal for free, a photo added to the challenge wall, and sweet Feed t-shirt.

title: San Jeanetta’s Table’s “Beat Tank” Chicken Sandwich Challenge
address: 7714 Montgomery Rd, Unit H, Cincinnati, OH 45236
description:
– This chicken sandwich challenge consists of two of their gigantic Joe Chicken Sandwiches. There are 8 different sandwiches to choose from on their menu. Each option features a giant hand-breaded chicken breast.
– In addition to the sandwiches, there is a large side of their Angie Fries. There are 5 different variations of the Angie Fries on their menu. They each start with a base of crinkle cut fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire platter.
– Winners get a $50 gift card, a sweet t-shirt, picture on the wall of fame, and get to rename the challenge,
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Curly’s Pizza & Sub’s Speed Challenge
address: East Gate Shopping Center, 2100 Harding Hwy, Suite 22, Lima, OH 45804
description:
– This is a speed challenge consisting of a 12-inch sub, a medium order of cheesy bread, 12 boneless wings, and a slice of cake.
– Challenge must be completed in 5 minutes or less.
– Winners receive the $40 meal for free and a cash prize.

title: Big Dog’s Pizza’s 18-Inch “Double Dog Dare You” Calzone Challenge (Mason)
description:
– There are two Big Dog’s Pizza locations and both offer this 18″ diameter “Double Dog Dare You” Calzone Pizza Challenge. Please call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance, at either location.
– Two people have just 30 minutes to eat an 18″ diameter calzone filled with at least three meats or healthy vegetables, plus lots of mozzarella cheese. The sauce is served on the side and not inside the calzone. Two dough balls used to make a normal 18″ pizza are used for the top and bottom of the calzone.
– You can try the challenge solo by yourself, but the time limit is still 30 minutes. You can tag in a partner to help you at any time, if needed. Winners get the $60 calzone pizza free plus a sweet t-shirt or hat, and a spot on the Big Dog’s Pizza location’s Wall of Fame.

title: Big Dog’s Pizza’s 18-Inch “Double Dog Dare You” Calzone Challenge (West Chester)
address: 7967 Cincinnati Dayton Rd, Suite M, West Chester Township, OH 45069
description:
– There are two Big Dog’s Pizza locations and both offer this 18″ diameter “Double Dog Dare You” Calzone Pizza Challenge. Please call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance, at either location.
– Two people have just 30 minutes to eat an 18″ diameter calzone filled with at least three meats or healthy vegetables, plus lots of mozzarella cheese. The sauce is served on the side and not inside the calzone. Two dough balls used to make a normal 18″ pizza are used for the top and bottom of the calzone.
– You can try the challenge solo by yourself, but the time limit is still 30 minutes. You can tag in a partner to help you at any time, if needed. Winners get the $60 calzone pizza free plus a sweet t-shirt or hat, and a spot on the Big Dog’s Pizza location’s Wall of Fame.

title: Clubhouse Pizza Holgate’s 30-Inch “Heavyweight” Pizza Challenge
description:
– Two people have 30 minutes to eat an entire 30″ diameter “Heavyweight” Meat Lovers Pizza. There are three 22 ounce dough balls that are combined to make up the crust. 66 ounces is equal to 4.125 pounds, which is almost 2 kilograms. The pizza is loaded with cheese plus lots of homemade sauce, along with five (5) different meats – ham, bacon, ground beef, sausage, and pepperoni.
– Winning teams get the pizza free plus sweet t-shirts and a team photo on the Wall of Fame!!

title: CBCB’s “Monday Burger” Challenge
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of 4 beef patties, layered with cheese, onion rings, and lettuce, and served with a side of fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a $30 dollar gift certificate, a cold beer, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– Challenge is only offered on Mondays between the hours of 5:30 and 7:30.

title: Roma’s Pizza & Pasta’s 36-Inch Italian Stromboli Challenge
description: There is a 3-foot-long (36″) stromboli made with Roma’s homemade pizza dough, filled with pepperoni, sausage, and lots of 100% mozzarella cheese. There are four marinara sauce containers served on the side, which are required to be finished as part of the challenge. Teams of two people get 15 minutes to finish everything, and most 2-person teams actually fail to finish it all!! Brave individuals are welcome to try to finish everything solo by themselves with a longer 30 minute time limit. There are no drinks, desserts, or other side items required. Winners get the $50 Italian food meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Roma’s Wall of Fame!!

title: PJ’s “Ten-Pound Team Pizza” Challenge
description:
– This is a team pizza challenge for two people, consisting of a 24-inch pizza with two toppings of choice.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $55 dollar meal for free, a gift card, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Little River Bar & Grill’s “Big Double Donk” Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play burger challenge consisting of four 1/2-lb patties served with 2 grilled cheese sandwiches as buns, topped with onion rings, and served with a side of fries.
– There is a one-sitting time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive bragging rights and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Curly’s 30-Inch Team Pizza Challenge
address: East Gate Shopping Center, 2100 Suite 19, Lima, OH 45804
description:
– This is a team challenge for two people consisting of a 30-inch, 14-pound pizza with 2 toppings of choice and two 32-oz drinks with no ice.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $60 dollar meal for free, a picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and a $50 dollar cash prize.

title: JC’s Restaurant’s “I’m Going For It” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 3 chargrilled 1/2-lb burger patties, choice of cheese, and bacon, along with a small side of fries.
– There is a one-sitting time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive bragging rights and their picture on the restaurant’s Facebook page.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: B-ROX Grill & Swill’s “Big Shot” Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a giant burger challenge consisting of 8 patties, ham, pepperoni, mozzarella sticks, onion rings, tomatoes, lettuce, banana peppers, and mayo, served with a side of fries.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $42 dollar meal for free and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Pearl Road Tavern’s “PRT Burger” Challenge
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of six 1/2-lb ground beef patties, topped with 12 slices of bacon, 12 slices of cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion, and topped with a pierogi, along with 2 pounds of fries, and served with a pickle on the side.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $45 dollar meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Hunter’s Five Star Dive Bar’s Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of four 1/2-lb burger patties, layered with cheese, tomato, lettuce, onion, and bacon, along with a 1-pound side of fries.
– There is a 40-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 dollar meal for free.
– Challenge is only offered during the months of winter.

title: Club Lounge At LSNP’s “Sports Challenge Burger”
where: The Club Lounge At Lost Nation Sports Park
description:
– This is a burger challenge piled high with Buffalo chicken, beer cheese, Philly beef, bacon-cheddar kegs, peppers and onions, two 7-oz beef patties, tangy Club sauce, fried pickles, onion petals, Italian dressing, ham, salami, Provolone cheese, marinara sauce, and mozzarella cheese, along with a side of loaded tater tots.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 dollar meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Glazed Donut Eatery’s “Dirty Thirty” 30 Donuts Challenge
description:
– Challengers have 1 hour to finish 30 glazed yeast donuts, which each weigh around 3 ounces.
– Contestants must also finish one 16oz 2% milk, one 16oz strawberry milk, and one 16oz chocolate milk.
– Winners receive the $45 dollar meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– Must call to schedule 24 hours in advance so they have time to prepare all 30 of your donuts.

title: J-Cups “Gigantor” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This is an 11-pound, 30-inch team pizza challenge for 2 people, consisting of 5 toppings of choice. (5 different toppings can be chosen for each half.)
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $65 dollar meal for free, social media recognition, and a free T-Shirt.

title: The Willow Warrior “Burger, Fry, & Shake” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 12 1/8-lb burgers, 2 pounds of fries, and a 32-oz milkshake.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $30 meal for free, a free T-Shirt, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a jackpot that starts at $100 and goes up another $10 every time someone loses.

title: Daddy & Kay’s 24-Inch Pizza Challenge
where: Daddy and Kay’s Pizza and Cheesecakes
description:
– This challenge consists of a 24-inch pizza with 2 toppings of choice.
– There is a 24-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $30 meal for free, a $24 voucher, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.
– If you are able to complete the challenge in under 10 minutes, you also win $100.

title: Sweetwater Chophouse’s “Tomahawk Steak” Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play challenge consisting of a 40-oz Tomahawk Ribeye served with two sides of truffle chive mac & cheese along with grilled asparagus.
– There is a one-sitting time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive their photo on the Wall of Fame.
Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Rusty Taco’s “Taco Takedown” Challenge
description:
– This is a pay-to-play challenge consisting of 13 different street tacos, one of each taco that is offered on the menu.
– There is a 30-minute time limit.
– Winners receive their picture with the belt on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Grandad’s “Sweet 16” Pizza Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 16-inch, 4-pound pizza with 3 (or more) toppings of choice.
– Excluded toppings include scallions, cinnamon, garlic, almonds, and feta.
– There is a 40-minute time limit.
– Winners receive their pizza for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– Grandad’s Pizza and Pub has multiple locations in Ohio, but only the Hilliard location offers the challenge.

title: Fitzy’s Old Fashioned Diner’s “Kitchen Sink” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 6-egg omelet, served with 6 strips of bacon, 6 sausage links, 1 pound of home fries, and 2 grande pancakes.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete this challenge.
– Winners receive their $29 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Luckey Junction’s Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a 4-pound burger challenge consisting of six 1/2 lb patties with cheese and 1 pound of fries.
– This challenge has a 30-minute time limit.
– Winners receive the meal for free, and a gift card.

title: Campus Pollyeyes’ “Large Order” Breadstick Challenge (Findlay)
description:
– Campus Polleyes has 3 locations, all based in OH, but only their Findlay location offers this challenge.
– This challenge involves a large order of their breadsticks with 1 pizza topping of your choice stuffed inside, along with cheese.
– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish all 6 stuffed breadsticks.
– Winners receive a spot on their wall of fame.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: The Fillin’ Station’s “Cheesinator” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a giant burger with two burger patties, eggs, bacon, and onion rings, all sandwiched between two deep fried grilled cheeses as the buns.
– Challengers have 30 minutes to finish.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a spot on the wall of fame.

title: Almost Heaven Ice Cream’s “Goliath” Challenge (Hartville)
description:
– Almost Heaven Ice Cream has 3 locations, all based in OH, and all offer this challenge!
– 5 banana splits in one huge bowl combined.
– 15 big scoops of ice cream plus 5 bananas.
– 5 scoops each of vanilla, chocolate, and strawberry.
– The sundae is also loaded with sweet toppings.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish.
– It weighs around 7.5lbs / 3.4kg but remember ice cream is easier to eat 🙂
– (In reality it’s a 3-star challenge difficulty-wise.)
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Almost Heaven Ice Cream’s “Goliath” Challenge (Alliance)
description:
– Almost Heaven Ice Cream has 3 locations, all based in OH, and all offer this challenge!
– 5 banana splits in one huge bowl combined.
– 15 big scoops of ice cream plus 5 bananas.
– 5 scoops each of vanilla, chocolate, and strawberry.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Norman)
address: 119 W Boyd St, Ste #104, Norman, OK 73069
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Jefe’s 5lb Mexican Burrito Challenge
description:
– Jefe’s Mexican Cocina Y Cantina serves the best Mexican food in town. Be their guests and have an enjoyable experience with an authentic Mexican meal right there in Broken Arrow, OK. Choose from a huge selection of tequila at the bar. This is the perfect place to make memories with those who like things spicy.
– Jefe’s has offered their Cheesy 5lb Steak and/or Chicken Burrito Challenge for many years now.
– There are four huge flour burrito tortillas stuffed with chicken or beef, or you can do 1/2 and 1/2.
– There are a few scoops each of refried beans and Mexican rice, topped with cheese and veggies.
– There is some avocado included, and everything is topped with Jefe’s cheesy white queso sauce.
– The 5lb platter includes 1/2lb of nacho chips topped with more queso sauce and pico de gallo.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything. You have to swallow before time expires.
– Winners receive the $30 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Jefe’s Wall of Fame!!

description:

– One is their all-meat TENBYSIMMO Pizza with pepperoni, canadian bacon, genoa salami, pastrami, ground beef, house made Italian sausage.
– The second is their DEMARCO OF BROOKLYN Pizza – Brooklyn pizza homage to Dom Demarco of Di Fara Pizzeria on Avenue J in Brooklyn. This pizza, like Dom’s, has the same DOP San Marzano tomatoes he uses with slices of our house made fresh mozzarella. Fresh picked basil, Pecorino Romano and first pressing extra virgin olive oil from the Puglia region of Italy.
– Both pizzas combined weigh around 7 pounds (3.2kg) total, so win before you begin!!
– There are no drinks or other side items required as part of this pizza challenge.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast Team Pizza Challenge (Kellyville)
description:
The challenge features one of Simple Simon’s 29″ Beast-sized pizzas and teams of two people must pick one topping in addition to all the delicious cheese. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the whole pizza that weighs between 9 and 10 pounds. The pizza costs around $55.99 plus tax if your team loses, but winning teams receive the meal free, sweet t-shirts, and they get their team photo posted up on the location’s Wall of Fame. If interested in trying this challenge too, please contact your nearest location to see if they too are participating and find out their rules and prizes.
– Free Meal

– Wall of Fame
