title: Hwy 66 Diner’s Big “Brutus” Burger Challenge
where: Hwy 66 Diner (Inside Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Tulsa)
description:
– 2 lb burger patty plus 12 strips of bacon and 12 slices of American cheese.
– 12 slices of tomato, 12 slices of onion, 1/2 lb lettuce, 1 lb toasted bun, and 1 dill pickle.
– Served with over 2 lbs of fries and a classic 24 oz milkshake with a 1-hour time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: The Fat Boys 28″ Gut Buster Pizza Challenge (Lawton)
description:
– Fat Boys Pizza has 2 locations, both based in Oklahoma, but only this location offers this challenge.
Note: The pizza is not free or discounted. You pay for it beforehand and just get $300 cash if you win.

title: Kendall’s “Chicken Fry” Chicken Fried Steak Challenge
description:
– Three 1 pound chicken fried steaks
– 2 scoops of mashed potatoes or fries
– Side salad & 2 servings of green beans
– There is a biscuit and 2 cinnamon rolls.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish.
– Time starts as soon as you cut into your food or take your first bite.
– You may stand during the challenge and dunking is allowed too.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Papa Angelo’s 20″ Empire Pizza Challenge
description:
– This 20″ is thick and weighs in at around 6 lbs.
– Must have 2 meat toppings and 1 veggie topping (3 total).
– You have 45 minutes to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Eugene)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Port of Subs’s 2ft Sandwich Challenge (Bend)
address: 63056 Lower Meadow Dr Suite 160, Bend, OR 97701
description:
– Port of Subs offers a version of this challenge at a couple of their locations.
– This challenge consists of a 2ft long sandwich, which you are allowed to pick from any of their sandwich options and customize to your liking.
– Challengers have 20 minutes to finish the sandwich.
– Winners get the meal for free.

title: Darlings Marina’s 5lb Burger Challenge
description: Five pounds of smoked ground beef, wrapped in bacon, and stuffed with brisket, pulled pork, bacon, cheese or your choice of menu items (chili cheese dogs, mashed potatoes, mac & cheese, roast beef, etc). It’s $80.00 unless you alone can eat the whole thing in less than 40 minutes…then it’s free. They need a week’s notice and you’ll need to sign a waiver. The challenge doesn’t appear to include any side items like fries or onion rings.

title: Phil’s 7.5lb Sandwich Challenge
address: 2834 Pacific Ave, Ste D, Forest Grove, OR 97116
description:
– This is a 7.5 lb sandwich with ham, turkey, roast beef, pepperoni, cotto, capicolla, genoa salami, and pastrami.
– All that is topped with cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, mayo, horseradish, and peppers.
– Served with a drink, and there is a 40 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Tangent Inn’s “Kraken” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are three 1/2lb beef patties stacked and layered with cheddar, Swiss, and American cheeses.
– It also has 1/2lb of pastrami and 8 slices of bacon.
– Topped with healthy vegetables – lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and pickles.
– Surrounded with fries and tater tots, and there is a 30-minute time limit to finish.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Chicken Bonz’s “All You Can Eat” Wings Record Challenge
description:
– You have 1 hour to eat as many of their chicken wings as you can.
– Your goal is to break the current quantity record within the hour.
– As of 3/8/2020, the current record is 86 hot wings in one hour.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Gift Certificate

title: The TP in Chiloquin’s “Moto Moto” Burger Challenge
description:
– The “Moto Moto” burger comes with three 1/2 lb Hippo patties, lettuce, tomato, onions, pickles, and cheddar cheese topped with Hippo sauce all on specially ordered 6″ Hippo buns.
– The challenge also includes two 1/2 orders of steak fries and a 21 oz drink of your choice.
– As many drink refills as the contest requires are allowed and fry sauce, to help with the fries, is also provided.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Advance notice is preferred so please call ahead and schedule your challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free “I Challenged Moto Moto” T-shirt
– Wall of Fame (on Facebook)

title: Stubborn Mule’s 5lb Burger Challenge
description:
– The 5 lb. burger includes a large beef patty, lettuce, tomato, onion, tomatoes, cheese, and sauce all on a bun.
– Contestants must finish everything in 35 minutes, including 1 lb of fries.
– The challenge will be entering its 5th year and still no one has finished it.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Father Hen’s “Triple Bypass” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The Triple Bypass includes 1 lb of brisket, 1 lb of pulled pork, and a 1 lb crispy chicken fillet all on a bun. Served with your choice of two 1 lb sides and some BBQ sauce.
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win the challenge.
– Free “Father Hen’s Texas BBQ” T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Father Hen’s Dragon Chili Challenge
description:
– Eat 16 oz of brisket chili spiked with ghost pepper powder.
– There is a 15 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free “Father Hen’s Texas BBQ” T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Arena Sports Bar’s “Chernobyl” Hot Wings Challenge
description:
– Eat 15 scorching hot wings tossed in house-made sauce jacked up with smoked & dried Ghost Pepper chilies.
– The wings are served with a 16 oz beer or soda. There is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Exclusive Chernobyl Challenge Winner T-Shirt
– Picture on their Wall of Fame

title: Newport Cafe’s Super Ultimate Monster Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a delicious 8lb homemade burger served on a 10-inch homemade bun.
– Topped with lettuce, tomatoes, onions, grilled onions, pickles, ham, 8 fried eggs, cheddar cheese, and thousand island dressing.
– There is a 40-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Rudy’s Steakhouse’s 3lb Tomahawk Challenge
description:
– This includes Rudy’s giant 3 lb Tomahawk Steak.
– Comes with sides of salad, asparagus, and a starch (usually mashed potatoes).
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Please call ahead at least 2 hours in advance.
– Free Meal
– Free “Conquered Carnivores” T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Silver Falls Country Store’s Gigantopithecus Burger Challenge
description:
– Giant sesame seed bun
– 1.5 lbs of premium 80/20 ground beef
– 3 slices each of cheese, bacon, and ham
– 3 over easy eggs and 3 pieces of lettuce
– 3 tomato and 2 onion slices plus 1 avocado
– Pickles, mayo, mustard, and ketchup
– 1 lb of your choice of fries, tots, or jojos
– Finish in one sitting and win a free t-shirt and your name on the Wall Of Fame
– If you beat the current record you also win the entire meal FREE

title: Witham Truck Stop’s Double Awesome Burger Challenge
description: Witham Truck Stop Restaurant or Witham’s as it’s affectionately known is a travel center located in Medford, Oregon. They offer a food challenge that includes a two pound hamburger (two 1 lb patties) that is arranged between three buns. The burger comes standard with 4 slices of bacon, lettuce, tomato, and pickles. Onions and Cheese are optional. Additionally the burger is served with a huge mound of french fries. Instead of fries you can also choose homemade potato salad, coleslaw, soup, or green salad. In order to successfully complete the challenge one must consume the entire burger and every last french fry (or other side) in 60 minutes or less. Winner still pays for the meal but receives a free t-shirt that bears the name and logo of the restaurant. They also get their name and photo posted on the Wall Of Fame.

There is a 1 hour time limit.

title: Craft 2700’s “2700 Beast” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– The “2700 Beast” challenge is a large platter consisting of one smash burger, one Nashville chicken sandwich and one craft cheesesteak. These three items are stacked on top of one pound of wings, a large portion of a mix of French fries and sweet potato fries, and pretzel bites.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge platter. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Challenge (Philadelphia)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Family Fixin’s’ “Pure Spite” Wing Challenge

– This is a pay-to-play spicy wing challenge consisting of a half-dozen full size wings tossed in “Pure Spite” sauce.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge. 20 minutes to finish the wings, and a 10-minute afterburn period.
– A glass of regular or chocolate milk will be set in front of the challenger for the duration of the 30 minutes, but if touched by the contestant before the challenge is over, the contestant is disqualified.
– Winners receive a free order of ice cream and a shout-out on social media.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.

– There is a 25 minute time limit to complete the challenge.

– $5 from every burger purchased goes to the Mid-Atlantic Air Museum to help restore the P-61 Black Widow airplane.

title: Wheel Restaurant’s “Skook” Grilled Cheese Challenge
description: Wheel Restaurant began with a smaller grilled cheese sandwich challenge, and we helped them debut this newly enhanced “Skook” Ultimate Grilled Cheese Sandwich Challenge. The initial challenge featured this same thick-cut white bread from Minersville Bakery along with 24 slices of 6 different cheeses (Swiss, Muenster, white American, provolone, mozzarella, and cheddar). It now also features 1lb of delicious kielbasy from Kowalonek’s Kielbasy Shop and 10 potato and cheese pierogies from Mrs. T’s Pierogies. Challengers have 30 minutes to finish the sandwich served with a 12oz bowl of tomato bisque soup, 6 large croutons, and a 12oz bottle of Yuengling lager beer. Winners receive the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!! Good luck and enjoy it!!

title: Pine House Kitchen’s “Cookie Monster” Skillet Dessert Challenge
description:
Pine House Kitchen & Bar offers two different food challenges. They host a 50 Chicken Wings Challenge and also this team or solo “Cookie Monster” Skillet Dessert Challenge. There is a 10 minute time limit for a team of two people to finish a whole 2lb chocolate chip cookie cooked and served in a very hot cast-iron skillet, topped with 15 scoops of ice cream plus more toppings. If feeling brave, you can also try this challenge solo all by yourself. Winners get the $25 cookie skillet dessert free plus sweet t-shirts, a spot on the Wall of Fame for beating the dessert challenge, and $200 cash (team members each get $100). Call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance to ensure that the kitchen is ready for you. Good luck, eat quickly, and win before you begin!!
Note: In the photo, there is a normal-sized cookie skillet with just one scoop of ice cream, for comparison, and that is not required to be finished in order to win the challenge. That was just ordered for Katina’s video.

title: Pine House Kitchen’s 50 Chicken Wings Challenge
description: Pine House Kitchen & Bar offers two different food challenges. They host a solo or team cookie skillet dessert challenge plus this 50 Chicken Wings Challenge. There are 50 chicken wings served in a bucket, consisting of 25 drums and 25 wings. They are all tossed in a homemade spicy buffalo hot sauce. All 50 wings must be finished within the very short 20 minute time limit. Winners get the $50 bucket of wings free plus a sweet T-shirt, a spot on Pine House’s Wall of Fame, and most importantly, free wings for a full year!! Note: Winners get an order of 12 wings per week for a year. Call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance if possible, so the kitchen can have the wings counted out and ready for you!! Good luck and win before you begin!!

title: Spike’s Junkyard Dogs’ “Kennel Club” Hot Dog Challenge
description:
– For the base “Kennel Club” Jumbo Hot Dog Challenge, challengers get 90 minutes to eat just 6 of their massive 100% beef hot dogs. The hot dogs themselves weigh 1/2 pound each (just the meat), and Italian bread baguettes are used as the hot dog buns. One baguette is split in half so two of the hot dogs can be assembled. There are no topping requirements. You can order the hot dogs plain or get as many toppings you want. There are many specialty hot dog options to choose from on the menu as well. This is a pay-to-play food challenge so you pay for the hot dogs ordered whether you win or lose, which cost around $5-$6 each, depending on the toppings ordered. Winners get a sweet T-shirt and their photo posted on Spike’s online Wall of Fame.
– There is a “Part B” for this challenge too, for those who feel like eating A LOT of hot dogs. If you can break the current record within the same 90 minute time limit, you win all your hot dogs free plus the sweet t-shirt and top spot on Spike’s Wall of Fame. As of 9/1/2025, the current record to beat is 21 hot dogs. That means you must eat 22 hot dogs to break the record and win the challenge. You cannot win by eating 1/2 of a hot dog more (21.5).

address: 4700 Hwy 17 S, North Myrtle Beach, SC 29582
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: O.D.’s Pavilion’s “Waterdog” Ice Cream Challenge
address: 91 S Ocean Blvd North Myrtle Beach, SC 29582
description:
– This challenge consists of 7 ice cream scoops, 5 toppings, and a waffle plate.
– You get to choose the ice cream flavors and the toppings.
– Challengers only have 5 minutes to finish the sundae and the waffle plate.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt and a souvenir plate.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.
– Note: This ice cream shop is open only seasonally.

title: Benny’s 28-inch Pizza Challenge (Summerville)
description:
– Benny’s Pizza has many locations, with most offering a 28-inch pizza challenge!!
– Note: The challenge is now the same for both amateurs and professionals, but the cash prize is different.

title: Benny’s 28-inch Pizza Challenge (Charleston)
description:
– Benny’s Pizza has many locations, with most offering a 28-inch pizza challenge!!
– Note: The challenge is now the same for both amateurs and professionals, but the cash prize is different.

title: Benny’s 28-inch Pizza Challenge (Mount Pleasant)
address: 433 W Coleman Blvd, Mount Pleasant, SC 29464
description:
– Benny’s Pizza has many locations, with most offering a 28-inch pizza challenge!!
– Note: The challenge is now the same for both amateurs and professionals, but the cash prize is different.

title: Bay Street Biergarten’s 6lb Oktoberfest Bratwurst Challenge
description:
– Bay Street Biergarten is located in historic downtown Charleston, SC off East Bay Street.
– In celebration of 2020 Oktoberfest, they started this 6lb Kamikaze Bratwurst Challenge.
– There is a 3.5lb (weight) 12″ long x 4″ diameter smoked sausage served on a pretzel bun.
– The 1.5lb Oktoberfest Bavarian pretzel bun can be served with beer cheese (it’s optional).
– The brat includes sauerkraut, a Brussel sprout coleslaw, and German macaroni & cheese.
– There is also horseradish, a spicy mustard, and the challenge includes 2 big pints of beer.
– The beers were “München on Hops” by Devils Backbone Brewing Company (Bavarian IPA).
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the tasty $50 meal free!!
– Champions also earn a sweet t-shirt and a spot on Bay Street Biergarten’s Wall of Fame.

title: Fam’s Brewing Co’s 14-inch Deep Dish Chicago Pizza Challenge
where: Fam's Brewing Co. featuring Famulari's Pizzeria
description:
– Fam’s Brewing Co is part of the Famulari’s Pizzeria family, with a brewing company attached.
– There are many great Famulari’s Pizzeria locations all around the Charleston, SC metro area.
– This challenge features a 14″ diameter deep dish Chicago style pizza that must have 1 topping.
– You can order a specialty pizza like I did for the video, if you are feeling brave. If you do, good luck!!
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the pizza which weighs 5-6 lbs, depending on your toppings.
– The beers drank in the video below were only to promote the brewing company. None are required.
– Winners receive the $30 pizza free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that this challenge is only available at the Fam’s Brewing Co James Island location.

title: Crooked Oak Tavern’s “Dirty Myrtle” Tomahawk Steak Challenge
description:
– Crooked Oak Tavern operates in Conway, South Carolina inside Black Water Market.
– They are a “farm to table” restaurant mainly using fresh and locally-sourced ingredients.
– There is a juicy 64oz tomahawk ribeye steak plus a delicious 1lb gourmet crab cake.
– Side items: 1.5lbs of southern mac and cheese, 1.5lbs of “Dirty Myrtle” loaded fries.
– For dessert, you must finish a giant slice of Samoas (Girl Scout Cookies) cheesecake.
– The challenge also includes a 22oz Dirty Myrtle Double IPA beer by New South Brewing.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Losers must pay $215 for the whole meal.
– Winners get the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Crooked Oak Tavern’s Wall of Fame.

title: DiCarlo’s “Slay The Tray” Ohio Valley Pizza Challenge
description:
– DiCarlo’s is known for serving delicious Ohio Valley style pizza in Myrtle Beach, SC.
– They serve square-cut pizza and Ohio Valley style pizza is explained in the introduction.
– For this “Slay The Tray” Challenge, you must eat a 16″ x 16″ pizza with at least 1 topping.
– I picked out 6 toppings for mine, to add some vegetables in addition to the top pepperoni.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire pizza that is served in a 16″ square box.
– Winner receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a coveted spot on DiCarlo’s Wall of Fame.

title: Gilroy’s 28-inch Team “Slammer” Pizza Challenge
description:
– 2 people have 1 hour to eat an entire 28-inch diameter multi-topping pizza.
– Contact the restaurant beforehand to schedule your “Slammer” Challenge.
– Free Meal
– $500 in cash

title: Pop Pops Pit BBQ’s $100 Fat Guy Burger Challenge (Murrells Inlet)
description:
– There are four delicious Legend Burgers and each is served on a homemade bun.
– Each Legend Burger weighs 1 pound and the challenge includes around 1 pound of fries.
– Burgers include 1/4 lb pulled pork, a slice of cheese, 4 slices of bacon, and 3 onion rings.
– Each burger is also topped with jalapenos, mac & cheese, hot sauce, and BBQ Sauce.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– $100 Gift Certificate

title: Guiseppi’s 28-Inch “Big Unit” Pizza Challenge (Hilton Head Island)
address: 50B Shelter Cove Ln, Hilton Head Island, SC 29928
description:
– One person has 1 hour to finish a 28-inch diameter pizza.
– The pizza must have at least 1 topping besides cheese.
– The challenge is available at both Giuseppi’s locations.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Guiseppi’s 28-Inch “Big Unit” Pizza Challenge (Bluffton)
description:
– One person has 1 hour to finish a 28-inch diameter pizza.
– The pizza must have at least 1 topping besides cheese.
– The challenge is available at both Giuseppi’s locations.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Pop Pops Pit BBQ’s $100 Fat Guy Burger Challenge (Myrtle Beach)
description:
– There are four delicious Legend Burgers and each is served on a homemade bun.
– Each Legend Burger weighs 1 pound and the challenge includes around 1 pound of fries.
– Burgers include 1/4 lb pulled pork, a slice of cheese, 4 slices of bacon, and 3 onion rings.
– Each burger is also topped with jalapenos, mac & cheese, hot sauce, and BBQ Sauce.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– $100 Gift Certificate

title: Ike’s Korner Grill’s “Wall of Fame” Burger Challenge
description:
(4) beef patties, (2) thick slices of bologna, (15) slices of bacon, (6) ounces of cheese, (2) eggs, lettuce, tomato, mustard, mayonnaise, chili, jalapeños, and slaw, served on a hamburger bun with french fries. Also includes your choice of drink. Pass the challenge and get your picture on the Wall-of-Fame & a T-shirt.
If completed in 45 minutes it’s FREE plus the t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Mac’s Fatboy Sandwich Challenge (Greenville)
description:
– Mac’s Speed Shop has 8 locations, all based around the Carolinas, and all offer this challenge.
– There is a 1lb breakfast sausage patty topped with fried pickles & coleslaw
– Topped with pulled pork, beef brisket, bacon, pimento cheese & queso
– Also topped with 3 ounces of their spicy “Mac’s Burnout Sauce”
– The sourdough bun weighs around 1lb and is very tough to chew
– Notes: The sauce is not that spicy, and you may not dunk the bun
– The 5lb BBQ sandwich is served with a 1/2lb side of mac & cheese
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything on your platter
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Pitt Street Pharmacy’s Grilled Cheese Record Challenge
description: Pitt Street Pharmacy in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina serves delicious grilled cheese sandwiches via their soda fountain, and they host a grilled cheese sandwich record challenge!! If you can beat the current record in less than the 1 hour time limit, you win all your sandwiches free, a sweet t-shirt, and your name will go to the top of their leader-board as the new record holder. As of October 2019, the record to beat is now 29 sandwiches. Each sandwich consists of 2 lightly-buttered slices of sandwich white bread, 2 slices of American cheese, and a little bit of mayonnaise. FYI you must beat the record by one whole sandwich, and not just by half of one.

title: Frank’s Mega Burrito Challenge
description:
– This burrito is served wet and includes lots of delicious meat, cheese, and veggies.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the 4.5 lb burrito challenge
– Free T-shirt
– Pictures on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: 1720 Burger Bar’s Cobra Commander Challenge
description:
– There are four 7 oz burger patties topped with pulled pork.
– There are lots of fried onion straws plus 1 lb of chili.
– Hot ham & cheese sandwiches serve as the buns.
– There are six delicious “tater bombs” (fried mashed potatoes).
– The 2.5 kg challenge has a 45 minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– Bragging Rights

title: Columbo’s 28″ Atlas Pizza Challenge
description:
– This pizza has plenty of toppings and weighs about 11 lbs.
– You and a friend have 45 minutes to finish it all.
– Free Meal
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: The Bushido Seppuku Spicy Sushi Challenge
description:
– You must eat 10 sushi pieces covered with an extra spicy sauce
– You have only 1 hour to finish all 10 of them on the plate
– Bushido Headband
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Free appetizer of the chef’s choosing per visit for life!! (when you wear the headband)
– Note: The challenge meal is not free or discounted

title: Big Billy’s Belt Buster Burger Challenge
Fox’s 30″ Big One Pizza Challenge (Florence)
description:
– This huge 30″ pizza is loaded with 2 toppings
– The entire pizza weighs around 12 pounds
– You and a friend have an hour to finish it
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $100 cash

title: Huckleberry’s “Gut Buster” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 2.5lb beef burger patty on a 12 inch oversized bun with cheese, onions, lettuce, pickles, and tomatoes. You are also able to get different variants of the burger including: BBQ Bacon Cheddar, Habanero Cheeseburger, Jalapeño, Mushroom Swiss, Bacon Blue, or Kraut Swiss.
–  In addition to the giant burger, there is a large side of their french fries. The entire meal averages out to a weight of around 4.5lbs. There are options to remove certain toppings if you do not like them, however they will add more fries to get to the 4.5lb average weight.
– There is a 2 hour time limit to complete the entire burger and french fries.
– Successful completions win a the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and spot on the wall of fame. If you win the challenge, you may not attempt it again for another successful completion.

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Rapid City)
address: 3313 E Mall Dr, Rapid City, SD 57701
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Chute Rooster “Mile of Hell” Spicy Wing Challenge
address: 850 Chute Rooster Dr, Hill City, SD 57745

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Russell St.)
address: 1301 W Russell St, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.
– This 28″ diameter pizza is loaded with at least 3 toppings (2 have to be meat).
– You can choose from the gourmet / specialty options too.
– The entire pizza weighs around 10 lbs.
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish it.
– 1 person can attempt this challenge, as well.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $200 in gift card certificates.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Rapid City)
address: 1902 N Lacrosse St, Rapid City, SD 57701
description:

title: Uncle Louie’s 6lb Burger Challenge (Spearfish)
description:

– The challenge consists of a tower of a cheeseburger with onion rings and fries.

title: Uncle Louie’s 6lb Burger Challenge (Sturgis)
description:
– Uncle Louie’s Diner has 3 locations with each having this burger challenge available.
– The challenge consists of a tower of a cheeseburger with onion rings and fries.

title: La Cabaña’s Massive “Official” Burrito Challenge
description:
– Monster burrito filled with beef, pork, rice, beans, cilantro, onions, lettuce, and peppers.
– Served wet and topped with red sauce, queso cheese sauce, and a green chili sauce (each = 1/3).
– Served with rice, guacamole, and lettuce. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Keg Chicken’s “Yard Bird” Fried Chicken Challenge
description:
– 16 pieces of bone-in chicken or 20 boneless chicken tenders.
– Two sides are required (1 pint / EA).
– Choose between potato salad, coleslaw, or baked beans.
– The challenge also includes 1 pound of french fries.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Photo on their Wall of Fame with their Championship Belt

title: Sickies Garage’s “Victory Lap” Burger Challenge (Sioux Falls)
address: 2616 S Louise Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57106
description: – Sickie’s Garage has several locations, all based in the US, and all of them offer this challenge.

title: Boss Hog 28″ Pizza Challenge (Minnesota Ave)
address: 2111 S Minnesota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57106
description:
– Boss Pizzeria has several locations and several offer this challenge.
– This 28″ diameter pizza is loaded with at least 3 toppings.
– You can choose from the gourmet / specialty options too.
– The entire pizza weighs around 10 lbs.
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish it.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $200 in restaurant gift certificates (total)

title: Nick’s Hamburger Eating Record
description:
– 27 hamburgers were eaten in 58 minutes a while back. (This is the current record as of 8/15/2022)
– You must finish 28 in less than 75 minutes to win.
– Challenge is only available from 2 pm to 4:30 pm daily.
– Free Meal
– Free Sweatshirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Carnival Cafe’s Stacked Burger Record Challenge
description: Carnival Cafe offers both a Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Record Challenge AND a stacked cheeseburger record challenge. For the burger challenge, you have to eat one more 1/2 lb beef burger patty (topped with cheese) more than the current record, all within 1 hour (60 minutes). As of 8/27/2025, the record to beat is 6 lbs or six 1 lb beef hamburger patties with cheese. That means that you have to eat a 6.5 lb (3 kg) burger. The burger is served with fries but those are optional and not required to be finished in order to win the challenge. Winners get the entire burger meal free, a sweet T-shirt, a $50 gift card to come back and use later (we think), and the #1 spot on Carnival Cafe’s Wall of Fame for conquering the stacked burger challenge!! CLICK HERE to view their Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Challenge page if you are more interested in trying that one!! Win before you begin!!

title: Carnival Cafe’s Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Record Challenge
description: There are two brothers who own Carnival Cafe and they are both from the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area. This restaurant is Philly themed and they are known for serving up delicious, loaded, authentic Philly cheesesteak sandwiches. They do offer a 30″ Long Philly Cheesesteak Record Challenge where challengers have 1 full hour (60 minutes) to eat a giant 30-inch long cheesesteak that weighs 1/2 lb more than the current record. As of 8/27/2025, the current record to beat is 6.5 lbs (3 kg) within one hour. The sandwich is served with fries but they are just optional and not required to be finished in order to win the challenge. There are three 10″ loaves filled with sirloin beef, lots of white American cheese, and then lots of healthy grilled peppers and onions. Beat the record by eating a 7 lb (3.2 kg) cheesesteak within 60 minutes and win your entire Philly sandwich meal free plus a sweet T-shirt, a $50 gift card to come back and use later, and the #1 spot on Carnival Cafe’s Wall of Fame for conquering the Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Challenge!! Please note that they also offer a burger record challenge as well if you’re more interested in trying that!! CLICK HERE to view their burger challenge page!!

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Clarksville)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Project BBQ’s “Benjamin Franklin” BBQ Challenge (South Roan St)
address: 3209 S Roan St, Johnson City, TN 37601
description:
– This challenge features of a giant smoked meats BBQ platter with 1 lb of Texas-style smoked beef brisket, 1 lb of pulled pork, 1/2 lb of sausage, and 1 lb of smoked chicken breast. The platter comes with a full rack of pork spare ribs and three large sides of your choice.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish the entire BBQ platter and sides. Successful completions win the $100 barbecue meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a coffee thermos proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Hope Cafe & Store’s “Bottomless Pit” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists a Triple Defibrillator burger (which contains brisket, pulled pork, bacon, onions rings, and Mac and cheese sandwiched between 4 Texas toast grilled cheese sandwiches) and a giant helping of their bossman totchos (which contains pulled pork, Mac and cheese, bacon, and jalapeños).
– In addition to the items above, you also must finish two quart sized sides of your choice and a milkshake.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire platter including the sides. Successful completions win the meal for free, a t-shirt, and go up on their wall of fame.

title: Project BBQ’s “Benjamin Franklin” BBQ Challenge (North Roan St)
address: 3301 N Roan St, Johnson City, TN 37601
description:
– This challenge features of a giant smoked meats BBQ platter with 1 lb of Texas-style smoked beef brisket, 1 lb of pulled pork, 1/2 lb of sausage, and 1 lb of smoked chicken breast. The platter comes with a full rack of pork spare ribs and three large sides of your choice.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish the entire BBQ platter and sides. Successful completions win the $100 barbecue meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a coffee thermos proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Brown’s Diner’s Four “1927” Cheeseburgers Challenge
description:
– Brown’s Diner has been operating since 1927 and this challenge this challenge consists of four of their “1927 Cheeseburgers,” which is what they are known for. The “1927 Cheeseburger” is a meaty patty topped with lettuce, tomato, onion, and Duke’s Mayonnaise, with pickle chips speared atop the bun.  In addition to the burgers, it is served with a basket of fries.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish everything on the platter and complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a free Brown’s Burger Champion T-shirt.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: Block City Pizza’s “Big Block” Team Pizza Challenge (Hollow Rock)
description:
– Teams of two people are challenged with finishing a 24-inch three-topping pizza (8lbs total) and a 2-liter of soda (your choice). Two of the three toppings must be meats.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the the entire pizza and the two liter of soda.
– Your team is allowed up to 5 minutes for letting the pizza cool down, before time starts.
– Winning teams receive the meal for free, a custom pizza peel, and picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Block City Pizza’s “Big Block” Team Pizza Challenge (Huntingdon)
description:
– Teams of two people are challenged with finishing a 24-inch three-topping pizza (8lbs total) and a 2-liter of soda (your choice). Two of the three toppings must be meats.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the the entire pizza and the two liter of soda.
– Your team is allowed up to 5 minutes for letting the pizza cool down, before time starts.
– Winning teams receive the meal for free, a custom pizza peel, and picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Block City Pizza’s “Big Block” Team Pizza Challenge (McKenzie)
description:
– Teams of two people are challenged with finishing a 24-inch three-topping pizza (8lbs total) and a 2-liter of soda (your choice). Two of the three toppings must be meats.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the the entire pizza and the two liter of soda.
– Your team is allowed up to 5 minutes for letting the pizza cool down, before time starts.
– Winning teams receive the meal for free, a custom pizza peel, and picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: CiCi’s 28-Inch “Piezilla” Team Pizza Challenge (Lebanon, TN)
description:
– There are CiCi’s Pizza locations all over the United States and some of them offer a 28-Inch “Piezilla” Pizza Challenge. Each CiCi’s location has its own rules and prizes, so contact the CiCi’s Pizza near you to see if they host this challenge and find out what the rules and prizes are there.
– Teams of two people get 1 hour (60 minutes) to finish a 28-inch 1-topping pizza and 2 large fountain drinks.
– This is a pay-to-play challenge that costs $49.99 plus tax whether you win or lose. Winners get $100 cash, 12 free buffet coupons to come back and use later, and a spot on the CiCi’s location’s Wall of Fame!!
The photo below features four different specialty pizzas. Only one topping is required (plus cheese).

title: Attack of the Tatsu’s “Godzilla” Ramen Bowl Challenge
description: Pick any of the ramen bowl options on the menu and they supersize it up to a “Godzilla” bowl equivalent to four normal-sized portions. There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $50 Japanese food meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Wimpie’s Country Restaurant’s Eating Challenge
description: This challenge features 2 double cheeseburgers, 2 full loaded footlong hot dogs, and 2 pounds of fries. The burger patties are 6 ounces each and the hot dogs each weigh 8 ounces before toppings are added. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $50 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and a spot on the restaurant’s Wall of Fame!! As of 2/12/2025, nobody has completed the undefeated challenge yet.

title: Johnny Brusco’s 6lb “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge (Piney Flats)
where: Johnny Brusco's New York Style Pizza (Piney Flats)
address: 6681 Bristol Hwy, Ste #50, Piney Flats, TN 37686
description:
– This “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge features a 6 lb (2.73 kg) stromboli with all the toppings featured on Johnny’s Deluxe Pizza. It includes sausage, onions, mushrooms, green peppers, ground beef, Canadian bacon, and pepperoni. There is also a lot of shredded mozzarella cheese. There is no pizza / red marinara sauce inside the stromboli. Rather, it is served on the side in a bowl which is required to be finished as part of the challenge within the 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit.
– Fail and pay $49.99 plus tax for your meal. Winners get the entire stromboli meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– There are many Johnny’s (in Georgia) and Johnny Brusco’s restaurants all around the southeastern United States and most if not all of them can / will offer this stromboli challenge. Find and contact the location nearest you beforehand to set up your challenge so they can be prepared and ready for your challenge attempt!!
– CLICK HERE to check out the challenge terms and conditions on Johnny Brusco’s website!!

title: Johnny Brusco’s 6lb “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge (Bristol)
where: Johnny Brusco's New York Style Pizza (Bristol)
description:
– This “Ultimate” Stromboli Challenge features a 6 lb (2.73 kg) stromboli with all the toppings featured on Johnny’s Deluxe Pizza. It includes sausage, onions, mushrooms, green peppers, ground beef, Canadian bacon, and pepperoni. There is also a lot of shredded mozzarella cheese. There is no pizza / red marinara sauce inside the stromboli. Rather, it is served on the side in a bowl which is required to be finished as part of the challenge within the 1 hour (60 minutes) time limit.
– Fail and pay $49.99 plus tax for your meal. Winners get the entire stromboli meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– There are many Johnny’s (in Georgia) and Johnny Brusco’s restaurants all around the southeastern United States and most if not all of them can / will offer this stromboli challenge. Find and contact the location nearest you beforehand to set up your challenge so they can be prepared and ready for your challenge attempt!!
– CLICK HERE to check out the challenge terms and conditions on Johnny Brusco’s website!!

title: Backwoods Burger Bar’s “Ultimate Beast” Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of 14 beef patties, 14 slices of cheese, 7 strips of bacon, lettuce, tomato, onion, a deviled Squatch egg, and a side of pulled pork fries.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Each time the challenge is completed, the burger grows by 2 patties.
– Winners receive the $75 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Algood Diner’s “Rush Tow Truck” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a huge bacon cheeseburger topped with lettuce, tomato, pickle, onions, mayo, ketchup, and mustard, and served with a side of fries and tater tots.
– There is a 40 minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $30 meal for free, a $50 gift card, their picture on the Wall of Fame, a free T-Shirt, and a free $75 value local tow from Rush Towing. Losers go on the Wall of Shame.
– Challenge is only available on Fridays at 12 pm noon. Please call ahead to reserve your spot!!

title: Jack Brown’s “Deep Fried Oreo” Challenge (Edgehill, TN)
where: Jack Brown's Beer & Burger Joint Edgehill
description:
– This challenge consists of as many deep fried Double Stuf Oreo’s as you can eat.
– This challenge has a one-sitting time limit.
– To win, the current record must be beaten.
– Record resets at the beginning of every year; contact the Jack Brown’s location nearest you to find out the current record to beat!
– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

title: Jack Brown’s “Hamburger” Challenge (Edgehill, TN)
where: Jack Brown's Beer & Burger Joint Edgehill
description:
– This challenge consists of as many hamburgers as you can eat, each with a 4-ounce patty and a bun.
– This challenge has a one-sitting time limit.
– To win, the current record must be beaten.
– Record resets at the beginning of every year; contact the Jack Brown’s location nearest you to find out the current record to beat!
– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

where: Jack Brown's Beer & Burger Joint Germantown
description:

title: The Bunganut Pig Bar’s “Pig” 5-Stack Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 5 different burgers in one stack: Mother Trucker, Lotz O’ Bacon, Jalapeno, The Pig, and Black & Bleu. It also includes 1 side of your choosing.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $70 meal for free, and a free T-Shirt.
– Losers also receive a T-Shirt that proclaims their failure.
– Challenge is not available on Fridays or Saturdays after 5 PM.
– Drinks are not included in the price of the challenge.

title: Pho T & N’s Pho Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a 5-pound bowl of pho containing meat, broth, and noodles.
– There is a 45-minute time limit.
– Winners receive the $50 meal for free, $100 cash, and a free T-Shirt.
– Losers also receive a T-Shirt.

title: Star Rover Sound’s “76er” Steak Challenge
price: $99.95 ($230 if not ordered as a solo challenge)
description:
– This challenge consists of a 76-ounce steak, a salad, yeast rolls, a bowl of fries, and a side of onion rings.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything. Please schedule your challenge a few days in advance.
– Winners receive their $99.95 meal for free, their signature on the Steak Challenge wall, and a free T-Shirt.

title: Sunliner Diner’s “Jukebox Burger” Challenge (Pigeon Forge)
description:
– This pay-to-play challenge consists of a stack of three griddled burger patties, bacon, fried green tomato, onion ring, fried egg, fried pickles, and topped with American, Swiss, and cheddar cheese, drizzled with a creole hollandaise on a brioche bun, and a side of fries.
– One-sitting time limit.
– Order this burger and play any song of choice on the jukebox; finish the burger and winners will receive a “Sunliner” surprise.
Note: This challenge is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Steak Challenge (Gatlinburg)
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: Traveler’s 6lb “Smokehouse” BBQ Loaded Nachos Challenge
description:
– There is a half of a bag of nacho chips on the bottom and those are all topped with homemade baked beans, 1lb of Traveler’s Tennessee (Memphis) style bbq pulled pork, 1/2 pound of Traveler’s Texas-style beef brisket, nacho cheese sauce, pickled jalapenos, creamy coleslaw, and their signature barbecue sauce.
– The BBQ challenge includes a 1/2 rack of Kansas City style barbecue pork ribs and everything must be finished within the 30 minute time limit to win the $46 meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Luke’s 60oz “Heart Attack” Burger Challenge
description:
– This bacon cheeseburger challenge consists of 40 ounces of beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with 20 ounces of cheese and bacon. The challenge includes your choice of side plus some pickles, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Everyone pays $39.99 for the meal, but winners earn a sweet t-shirt proclaiming their victory plus a $25 gift certificate to come back and use later. Champions also get their name and photo posted up on Luke’s challenge Wall of Fame!! Note: This challenge meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Rhodes Family Diner’s 5-Pancake Stack Breakfast Challenge
description:
– There is a 1 hour time limit to eat five plate-sized very thick pancakes.
– The pancakes are served with butter and syrup, but those are just optional and not all required.
– Winners get the $10.99 pancake breakfast free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Mid City Grill’s Coup De Grace Burger Challenge
address: 106 S Commerce St, Johnson City, TN 37604

title: Go Burrito’s Monster Burrito Longboard Challenge (Johnson City)
address: 121 Commerce St, Ste #104, Johnson City, TN 37604
description:
– There are many Go Burrito locations and most of them offer this burrito challenge.
– You must schedule your burrito challenge in advance with at least 24 hours notice.
– There is supposed to be only 5 burrito tortillas filled with two scoops of 4 different meats.
– The four different juicy meats are steak, chicken, shredded beef, and marinated pork.
– The base consists of 2 scoops each of white rice, brown rice, pinto beans, and black beans.
– The burrito is filled with lettuce, pico de gallo, a spicy habanero salsa, sour cream, and more.
– The burrito is served wet and topped with queso cheese sauce and red enchilada sauce.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish. Winners get the $35 meal free and a sweet t-shirt.
– If you win, you get on the Wall of Fame. If you lose, your photo goes on the Wall of Shame.

title: Union Place’s Loaded Buffalo Chicken Cheese Fries Challenge
description:
– Union Place Bar & Grill is located in Knoxville, TN and Randy was the first to try this challenge.
– There is 2lbs of French fries spread out on a plate and topped with 1lb of buffalo chicken meat.
– That is topped with 1lb of queso cheese plus bacon bits, jalapenos, and 1/2 lb of cheese curds.
– The loaded cheese fries are surrounded by five of Union Place’s loaded baked potato skins.
– Challengers have 30 short minutes to finish the entire 6lb Super Stacker Homewrecker Meal.
– Winners receive the $45 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Union Place’s Wall of Fame.
– The beers in this video are not required for the challenge. It was just something special for Randy.

title: Legendairy Milkshake Bar’s “Gallon Challenge”
description:
– Legendairy Milkshake Bar has been open in Nashville, Tennessee for about 2 years so far.
– They specialize in creating gourmet freakshakes in jars topped with lots of specialty treats.
– Each regular sized milkshake is 16 oz so 8 of them is equivalent to 1 gallon of milkshake.
– Brave challengers have 1 hour to finish 8 gourmet freakshakes from their signature menu.
– They will bring you as many as you want. If you fail, you just pay for the ones you ordered.
– You must finish everything added, including everything stuck to the upper sides of the jar.
– Each champion will win a $100 Legendairy Milkshake Bar gift card and social media posts!!
– Click HERE to check out the rules listed on their website’s “Gallon Challenge” rules page!!

title: Daddy Billy’s “Big Daddy” Pizza Burger Challenge
description:
– Daddy Billy’s in Tullahoma, Tennessee has offered this food challenge for a few years now.
– There are four 1/2lb beef burger patties topped with cheese in between three thin 12″ pizzas.
– The pizzas are topped with pepperoni and made by Spinelli’s Pizzeria next-door (same owner).
– Along with the burgers, it is layered with 1/2lb of chicken tenders, potatoes, and onion straws.
– There are lots of healthy vegetables and the whole thing is topped with 4 chicken street tacos.
– There are no other sides included, and there is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a big spot on Daddy Billy’s Wall of Fame!!
– Note: A 3-4 days’ notice is recommended before attempting this challenge.

title: Bowie’s Nashville 3lb Burger Challenge
description: Bowie’s Nashville serves up a delicious and giant 3 lb burger (total weight including bun and toppings) that is topped with cheese, bacon, vegetables, and sauces, all on a large bun. The burger comes with a large portion of loaded waffle fries covered in bacon, cheese, and bell peppers, which weighs around 2 lbs total. In order to complete the challenge, you must finish everything within 30 minutes (around 5 lbs total). If you do, the burger becomes half-off and you receive a free sweet t-shirt. The full price of the meal if you fail is $45.00.

title: Chef’s Pizzeria’s 28-Inch “Big Chef” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Teams of 2 people have 1 hour to finish a 28-inch diameter 1 topping pizza.
– Free Meal
– $100 Cash
– Wall of Fame

title: Village Pizza’s 28-inch “Village Elder” Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– There is a 28″ pizza with 3lbs of dough, ~12 cups of their 5-cheese blend, and pizza sauce.
– You must pick 2 additional toppings for your pizza.
– If you are feeling brave, you can get more toppings.
– There is a 1 hour time limit for 2 people to finish the entire pizza.
– Each person must also finish a 32oz drink as part of the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 pizza free, sweet t-shirts, and a team photo on their Wall of Fame.
– Each person also gets a $50 gift certificate to come back and use later!!

title: Kanpai’s “King Kong” Sushi Roll Challenge
description:
– This challenge includes a delicious monstrous 6.5 lb King Kong Sushi Roll.
– The King Kong Sushi Roll has 2 lbs sushi rice, 1 lb crawfish, 1 lb snowcrab salad, 1 lb sake mix, and 1 lb of cucumber, avocado, cream cheese and shrimp tempura.
– Also comes with a 1/2 lb of toppings that include spicy mayonnaise, eel sauce, green onions, and fish eggs.
– There is a 40 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Milano’s Pizza’s 28″ Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– There is a delicious 28″ pizza with two toppings of your choice.
– There is a 1 hour time limit for 2 people to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– Two $250 gift certificates for Milano’s Pizza
– Losing teams get pictured on Wall of Shame.

title: KC Finn’s “Big Ass” Burger Challenge
description:
– 4 pounds of beef burger meat stacked on a 5″ bun.
– 16 slices of American cheese.
– Tomato, lettuce, onion, and pickle are required (or substitute bacon).
– Mayo, ketchup, and mustard are optional.
– The burger challenge comes as is with no other substitutions.
– You must also finish 1 lb of fries and a 20 ounce drink.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Sammies’ “Lock, Stock, & Barrel” Sandwich Challenge (Union City)
address: 1401 W Reelfoot Ave, Ste #104, Union City, TN 38261
description:
– You have 30 short minutes to finish a towering sandwich that is layered with many different meats, cheeses, and vegetables. Winners receive a free t-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame. If you can beat the current record, you will win the meal free too!! Contact the restaurant to find out the current time record.
– The current record is 10 minutes 31 seconds, as of 4/1/2022.

title: Sammies’ “Lock, Stock, & Barrel” Sandwich Challenge (Martin)
description:
– You have 30 short minutes to finish a towering sandwich that is layered with many different meats, cheeses, and vegetables. Winners receive a free t-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame. If you can beat the current record, you will win the meal free too!! Contact the restaurant to find out the current time record.
– The current record is 5 minutes 6 seconds, as of 10/13/2019.

title: Hod Rods 50’s Diner’s Chubby Burger Challenge
description: – If you can beat the record, your meal will be free too!! (Contact them for details)

title: Fox’s 30″ Big One Pizza Challenge (Hendersonville)
description:
– This 30″ pizza is loaded with toppings and weighs 12 lbs.
– You must choose 2 meat toppings, 4 veggie toppings, or 1 meat and two veggie toppings.
– You are allowed to split the pizza into halves and get different toppings on each half.
– You and a friend have 1 hour to finish everything
– Free Meal
– $100 Cash (total)
– Team picture on Wall of Fame

title: Los Aztecas’ “El Compadre” Burrito Challenge
description:
– You have 15 minutes to finish a massive burrito which weighs around 5.5 pounds.
– The burrito is stuffed with meats, veggies, rice, beans, cheese, and sauces.
– It is served “wet” and topped with more sauce and delicious cheeses.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Fountain City Diner’s Diner-Saurus Ice Cream Challenge
description: Note: The current record was around 8 minutes as of June 2016.

title: Loco Burro’s Whole 5lb Chihuahua Burrito Challenge
description: (Note: The burrito weighs between 5 and 6.5 lbs depending on the chef.)

title: Kooky Canuck’s 12lb Humonga Kookamonga Challenge (Cordova)
address: 1250 N Germantown Pkwy, Ste #123, Cordova, TN 38016
description:
– A 12lb massive beef burger patty
– The top and bottom buns each weigh 3lbs
– 7lbs of cheese, vegetables, & toppings
– 4 people have 1 hour to finish everything
– The burger weighs a total of 25lbs
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Kooky Canuck’s 6lb King Kookamonga Challenge (Cordova)
address: 1250 N Germantown Pkwy, Ste #123, Cordova, TN 38016
description:

– The top and bottom buns each weigh 1.5 lbs
– 3 lbs of cheese, vegetables, and toppings
– 2 people have 1 hour to finish everything
– The burger weighs a total of 12 pounds
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: Kooky Canuck’s 4lb Kookamonga Burger Challenge (Cordova)
address: 1250 N Germantown Pkwy, Ste #123, Cordova, TN 38016
description:
– A 4lb massive beef burger patty
– The top and bottom buns each weigh 1lb
– 1.5lbs of cheese, vegetables, & toppings
– 1 person has 1 hour to finish everything
– The burger weighs a total of 7.5lbs
– It comes with fries, but they are not required
– Click HERE to check out the restaurant’s challenge page
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Big Shake’s Hot Chicken “Death Row” Wing Challenge (Franklin)
description:
– Consume 3 chicken tenders doused in “Death Row Sauce”
– There is a 10 minute time limit to finish all 3 of them
– You are only allowed to drink 1 cup of water

title: Kooky Canuck’s 12lb Humonga Kookamonga Challenge (Memphis)
description:

– The top and bottom buns each weigh 3lbs

– Wall of Fame

description:

– The top and bottom buns each weigh 1lb
– 1.5lbs of cheese, vegetables, & toppings
– 1 person has 1 hour to finish everything
– The burger weighs a total of 7.5lbs
– It comes with fries, but they are not required

– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt

title: The Roaming Gnome’s Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 stacked bacon cheeseburgers with plenty of vegetable toppings
– It is served with 1 lb of fries and there is a 30 minute time limit
– The total challenge weighs around 4.5 lbs
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Sloopy’s 2lb Burger Challenge
description:
– The burger consists of 4 patties & 8 slices of cheese
– With a side of fries, the entire challenge weighs 2 lbs
– You have only 9 short minutes to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Harbor House’s Monster Burger Challenge
address: 2510 N Roan St, Johnson City, TN 37601
description:
– This stacked burger has 2 grilled cheese sandwiches serving as the buns
– The 3 lb challenge has a side of fries and must be finished in one sitting
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Sal’s 36″ Godfather Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This 36″ pizza is not extremely thick but the diameter is huge!!
– There is no topping requirement and it weighs around 11 lbs.
– You and a friend have just 30 minutes to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirts
– Wall of Fame

title: Rizzi’s 28″ Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– This 28″ diameter pizza must have 2 toppings
– The entire pizza weighs around 11 pounds total
– You and a friend have 45 minutes to finish it
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirts
– $100 Check (total per team)
– Team picture on Wall of Fame

title: The George Tavern’s “George’s” Burger Challenge
address: 101 E Main St Suite 135, Denison, TX 75021
description:
– This burger challenge is a “super sized” version of their “George’s Demise Burger” from the menu. This burger consists of 3lbs of burger topped with pepper jack and american cheese, bacon, jalapeños, spicy house sauce, and topped with a fried egg.
– In addition, there is a side of their loaded tots, loaded fries, onion rings, and funnel cake fries.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge. Winners get the meal for free and a sweet t-shirt.
– NOTE: The picture below is the normal menu sized “Demise Burger”, and not the challenge burger.

title: Fun Buns TX’s “Gluteus Maximus” Burger Challenge
description:
– The “Gluteus Maximus” burger challenge is a stacked burger consisting of four 1/2lb burger patties (2lbs total), six slices of cheese, six slices of cherrywood smoked bacon, lettuce, pickles, onions, and tomatoes.
– In addition to the burger, there is a large portion of fries and a large shake that is required for the challenge.
– There is a very short 22 minute time limit to finish the entire burger, fries, and milkshake. Successful completions win the meal for free and picture up on the restaurant’s wall of fame.

title: Gumby’s Pizza’s Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– There are many Gumby’s Pizza locations across the USA, but this location (College Station, TX) is the only Gumby’s locations that offers this team pizza challenge.
– The challenge consists of a 20” specialty pizza and 25 of their pepperoni rolls.
– Teams of two people have 30 minutes to finish the entire pizza and all the pepperoni rolls. Successful completions win the meal for free, sweet t-shirts, and a picture up on the restaurant’s wall of fame.
.

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Webster)
address: 1020 W NASA Pkwy, Ste #230, Webster, TX 77598
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Challenge (San Marcos)
address: 350 N Guadalupe St, San Marcos, TX 78666
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Challenge (Fort Worth)
address: 2858 W Berry St, Fort Worth, TX 76109
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Mg’s Restaurant’s “Believe It Or Not” Burger Record Challenge
price: Varies depending on what is ordered
description:
– This challenge is a record challenge for their burgers, where you must beat the prior person in order to win the challenge. You must notify the restaurant you would like to beat the current record on the wall prior to starting.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to eat more burgers than the current record holder.
– It would be best to contact the restaurant prior to attempting this challenge, so they can be ready and make sure it is a good time to attempt.
– Successful completions will have their name and amount of burgers added to plaque on the wall.
– NOTE: The meal is NOT free or discounted upon completion.

title: Brickhouse Pizza, Pasta, & Taproom’s 56 Oz. Prime Rib Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 56oz (3 1/2 lbs) of premium prime rib. In addition to the prime rib, there is an Italian chopped salad, a side of fettuccini alfredo, a baked potato, a mini bread loaf, some butter, a beverage of choice, and 1 serving of Graham chocolate moose cake.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the prime rib (minus any fat) and all the sides. Winners get the meal for free (or a $150 gift card), a champion t-shirt, and a picture on the wall of fame.
– Challengers are allowed one bite of the prime rib to ensure it is cooked to their satisfaction. After that, the challenge time limit starts. Once the clock is started you are not allowed to stand up or leave the table. Once completed, you must remain at the challenge table until a staff member declares a challenge victory.

title: Daddy’s Dogs and More’s Hot Dog Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of all 6 of their signature hot dogs. Each signature dog is a 1/4lb pure Angus beef hotdog. The six are: The Daddy’s Dog, The Mexican, The New Yorker, The Windy City, The Italian, and the Plain Jane.
– In addition to all six of the signature hot dogs, there is a double order of their Daddy Taters.
– There is a 5 minute “after period” once the challenge is completed where there must be assurance the challenger does not have a “reversal of fortune” before a victory is declared.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish the entire platter. Winners get the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and go up on the wall of fame.

title: Trinidad Cafe’s “Big Dog” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of eight sliced jumbo hot dogs, an order of fries, two pounds of chili, one pound of cheese, layered across seven slices of bread and topped with relish and onion.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $23 dollar meal for free, and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Bullfish’s Burger Challenge
address: 6223 W Round Bunch Rd, Orange, TX 77630
description:
– This is a burger challenge stacked with lettuce, tomato, onion, avocado, 6 slices of bacon, brisket, pulled pork, a burger patty, fried chicken breast, pickles, mayo, mustard, and a bun. It is also served with a 1/2-pound each of onion rings, seasoned fries, sweet potato fries, and dipper fries.
– There is a 15-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $45.49 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, a shout-out on social media, and a free T-Shirt or hat.

title: Cheba Hut’s 30″ Toasted Sub Sandwich Challenge (Denton)
description:
– There is a 30-inch long garlic herb loaf of bread with 3 meats: sliced roast beef, grilled chicken, and bacon. The meats are topped with provolone cheese, sliced raw jalapenos, and other healthy vegetables, plus 3 sauces: honey mustard, Chipotle mayo, and grape or strawberry jelly. There is a 30 minute time limit and no other drinks or side items are required.
– Winners earn the $36 sandwich meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame!!
– Note: This “Monster Kush” Sandwich Challenge is only available at the Denton, Texas location.

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Steak Challenge (San Antonio)
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: Hobbit Cafe’s “Morgoth” Burger Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 4 burger patties, 4 thick bacon slices, 4 cheese slices, 1 smoked jalapeno boudin link, 1 fried egg, avocado, sauteed jalapeno, spring mix, tomatoes, onions, pickles, chipotle Caesar dressing, a whole wheat bun, a jalapeno popper, fried pickles, and a cheese shrimp roll.
– Challengers must finish the whole burger in one sitting to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Shokku Ramen’s “Shinigami” Spicy Ramen Challenge (Houston)
address: Houston Heights, 933 Studewood St, Suite A, Houston, TX 77008
description:
The Japanese Grim Reaper, Death Bringer, or “Shinigami” is as daunting as their challenge! Measuring over 4 MILLION Scoville units of heat, the Shinigami Challenge is Las Vegas’ SPICIEST ramen challenge! Anyone brave enough to attempt this challenge has 8 minutes to finish over 24 ounces of Tonkotsu broth, loaded with over 3 pounds of noodles and toppings! All challengers are required to sign a waiver, and winners will receive their meal for free and have their pictures immortalized on our Wall of Warriors!
Can you handle The Shinigami Challenge? Here are the rules to participate:
Any challenger attempting The Shinigami Challenge:
– Must be 18 years or older and sign Shokku Ramen’s release of liability waiver.
– Must declare all food allergies (if any) to management before beginning the challenge.
– Will receive three portions of Shinigami Ramen.
– Will have 8 minutes to complete the entire bowl, including all of the broth and toppings in one sitting. The bowl must be empty of all contents before time has elapsed to be declared victorious.
– Will be disqualified if the challenger gets up to use the restroom or steps outside.
– If the challenger fails, they must pay for the Shinigami Challenge.
If the challenger emerges victoriously, the winner will receive the meal free of charge along with a Shokku Ramen gift card worth $25. Also, their picture will be posted on The Wall of Warriors and featured on their social media pages.
CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THE RESTAURANT’S WEBSITE CHALLENGE PAGE!!

title: Pluckers’ “Wall Of Flame” Wing Challenge (City View)
description:
– Pluckers has many locations and they all offer this challenge.
– You must finish 15 “Fire In The Hole” spicy wings
– You can choose bone-in or boneless wings
– Each bone-in jumbo wing is around 3.5″ long
– They must all be finished in 15 minutes
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Flame
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: Monty’s “Savage Ribasaurus” Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a full rack of deboned ribs on a giant bun with vegetables and 2 sides of your choice, 1lb apiece.
– Challengers have 45 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and $100.

title: Kenny & Ziggy’s “Zellagabetsky” Sandwich Challenge
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Acme Oyster House’s 15 Dozen Oysters Challenge (Houston)
description:
– Acme Oyster House has 6 locations, all based in the southern US, and all offer this challenge.
– Each 1 dozen oysters is served on an individual tray (they vary in size).
– You must eat 15 dozen in less than 1 hour to win the challenge.
– You may attempt to break the house quantity record by 1 full dozen.
– You can eat them with a fork or use your hands and “slurp” them.
– Escorted restroom breaks are allowed, per the official rules.
– You should call ahead to make sure they have enough oysters.
– Free Hat and T-Shirt inside a special mesh gift bag.
– Name on location’s plaque or Wall Of Fame.
– You get 1/2 off all 15 dozen oysters (see below about required tip).
– If you break the location’s record, all of your oysters are free!! (some additional rules apply).
– NOTE: Regardless whether you win or lose, there is an 18% required tip for the shuckers.
– NOTE 2: If you want to film yourself, you must contact their management team for permission.

title: Yummy Pho & Bo Ne’s Pho Challenge (Pearland)
description:
– Yummy Pho and Bo Ne has 3 locations, all based in Texas, and 2 of them offer this challenge.
– This pho challenge consists of 2lbs of pre-cooked noodles, 2lbs of meat, onions, cilantro, and plenty of broth.
– Challengers have 45 minutes to finish this massive bowl of pho.
– Winners receive $200!
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed but you can win $200!

description:

description:
