– Smothered with their special chili and more cheese
– Includes a huge pile of homefries and 2 large biscuits
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Name on Special Plaque

title: The Box’s “BAT” 5lb Taco Challenge
description:
– This challenge involves a 5lb breakfast taco filled with beans, cheese, potatoes, eggs, sausage, and bacon.
– Challengers have 30 Minutes to finish this huge taco.
– Winners receive a gift card, a cookie, and a spot on the wall of fame!
– Note: We don’t think the meal is free or discounted if you win.

title: Mutt Jeff’s “Jolly Roger” Burger Challenge
description: – This challenge consists of a 3 lb double cheeseburger and 3/4 lb of fries.

title: Yoyo’s “Gut Buster” 3lb Burger Challenge
address: 201 N Harborth Ave, Ste B, Three Rivers, TX 78071

title: Stomp’s “Stomperado” Burger Challenge (Webster)
address: 300 Bay Area Blvd Ste #800, Webster, TX 77598
description:
– This challenge is available at all 3 Stomp’s Burger Joint locations.
– You must finish the whole burger along with the chili cheese fries in one sitting to defeat the challenge.
– Winners receive a spot on the wall of fame and a free t-shirt.

title: Stomp’s “Stomperado” Burger Challenge (Bacliff)
description:
– This challenge is available at all 3 Stomp’s Burger Joint locations.
– You must finish the whole burger along with the chili cheese fries in one sitting to defeat the challenge.
– Winners receive a spot on the wall of fame and a free t-shirt.

title: Stomp’s “Stomperado” Burger Challenge (Pearland)
description:
– This challenge is available at all 3 Stomp’s Burger Joint locations.
– You must finish the whole burger along with the chili cheese fries in one sitting to defeat the challenge.
– Winners receive a spot on the wall of fame and a free t-shirt.

title: Fishing Cow’s “4 Story” BBQ Sandwich Challenge
description:
– There is 4 pounds of tasty BBQ meats on this massive sandwich!
– The meats are 1lb of chicken, 1lb of sausage, 1lb of brisket, and 1lb of pulled pork.
– All of the meat is then topped with seasoned fries and white queso.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the $60 meal for free and a collector’s plate!
– Note: You must call to set up your attempt at least 2 days prior.

title: Mark’s Outing’s 2lb Burger Challenge
address: 1624 E Commerce St, San Antonio, TX 78205
description:
– To conquer this challenge, you must finish this around 2.25lbs burger in one sitting.
– Winners earn their photo posted up on the Wall of Fame.
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Tacos La Shula’s 3ft Long 10lb Burrito Challenge
description:
– There is a 3ft long 10lb burrito filled with typical burrito deliciousness, topped with cheese.
– 1 person has 1 hour to finish the entire thing, or 2 people have 30 minutes to finish it all.
– Winners receive the $50 burrito meal free, a sweet custom t-shirt, and spot on Wall of Fame!!

title: Taco Tico’s “It’s All About The Taste” Food Challenge
description:
– Taco Tico Inc. is a privately held franchise corporation based in Wichita, Kansas. Founded by Dan and Robin Foley in the early 1960s, Taco Tico is a unique network of independently franchised, quick-serve restaurants famous for high-quality Mexican food and first-rate service.
– Jerry and Kim Gill used to love going to the original Taco Tico Texarkana, before it was shut down. In fact, that is where they had their first date back in the 80’s. Their energetic spirit led them to purchasing the Taco Tico franchise. Five years later, they were able to bring their favorite fast food restaurant back to Texarkana, TX. They feel so blessed to have had the opportunity.
– This massive “It’s All About The Taste” Challenge features lots of delicious items from their Mexican fast food menu: Super Deluxe Beef Nachos, Super Deluxe Sancho, 4 Taco Burgers, Texas Style Burrito, Texas Stacked Enchilada, Chili Burrito, and Cinnamon Crustos for dessert.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything, so you have time to enjoy the TASTY food!!
– Winners earn the massive Mexican fast food meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Wall of Fame!!

title: Buffalo Bell Burger, Wings, and Seafood Challenge!!
description:
– Buffalo Bell is a family owned business. They have been in the food industry for over 15 years. This is their first restaurant. They decided to open a restaurant at their location because they like the Longview area. They have worked very hard to bring Longview a place where everyone could enjoy some tasty food, beers, and sports.
– Buffalo Bell is well known for their tasty wings, burgers, and seafood. This challenge includes all 3!!
– There is a shrimp seafood boil topped with a garlic sauce, plus 1lb of crinkle cut French fries.
– There is a fried seafood platter with fried catfish filets, fried oysters, hush puppies, and more.
– There are some fried chicken tenders plus 12 buffalo chicken wings (your choice of sauce).
– There is a Buffalo Burger (bison) topped with veggies and “Boom Sauce” and it is delicious!!
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. The “Love Street” beers in the video were optional.
– Winners receive the $80 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on Buffalo Bell’s Wall of Fame!!

title: El Nayarita’s Mexican “Mega Charola” Team Seafood Challenge
description:
– The “Mega Charola” is a team challenge for three people. Choose your teammates wisely!!
– The seafood platter consists of lobster, prawns/shrimp, crab legs, tilapia, and more.
– Served with rice, bread, and and a house cocktail sauce.
– There is a 20 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– $50 Gift Card for each participant
– Wall of Fame

title: Pizza Bistro’s 24-Inch “Texan” Pizza Challenge
address: 8545 Boat Club Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76179
description:
– This “Texan” Pizza Challenge includes a 24-inch cheese or pepperoni pizza.
– Challengers can add as many toppings of their choice for an additional $5 per topping.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Gift Certificate for another free 24″ pizza in the future
– Wall of Fame

title: El Sombrero’s “El Gigante” Mexican Burrito Challenge (Kilgore)
description:
One “MUY GRANDE” stuffed flour tortilla with ground beef, shredded chicken, beef tips, rice, refried beans, black beans, topped with lettuce, sour cream, guacamole, pico de gallo & our famous white queso!!
*ONE PERSON WITH A 30 MINUTE TIME LIMIT.
Winners get the meal “On The Hat” (free)!!

title: El Sombrero’s “El Gigante” Mexican Burrito Challenge (Longview)
description:
One “MUY GRANDE” stuffed flour tortilla with ground beef, shredded chicken, beef tips, rice, refried beans, black beans, topped with lettuce, sour cream, guacamole, pico de gallo & our famous white queso!!
*ONE PERSON WITH A 30 MINUTE TIME LIMIT.
Winners get the meal “On The Hat” (free)!!

title: The Butcher Shop’s 5lb “Betcha Cain’t” Burger Challenge
description: Ok Butcher Shop family… who’s up for the challenge?? The Betcha’ Caint Burger is 5 lbs of their fresh ground beef, topped with half a lb of fresh shredded cheddar, all on a giant sourdough bun! Oh ya, a whole basket of fries on the side. They will give you 45 minutes to eat it all for a fancy Tshirt, your photo on the wall, and bragging rights! Your meal will be FREE too!! Available for groups to share. Please call ahead if you are up to the challenge because this massive burger takes a while to cook!!

title: Band of Brothers BBQ’s “Chuck Norris” Food Challenge
description:
– There is macaroni and cheese topped with a half chicken, baked beans, smoked sausages, and BBQ ribs.
– It comes out in a big can that gets emptied out on to your table (then the chicken and rib are added).
– We think there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. You may want to confirm with the restaurant.
– Free Meal
– T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Dick’s Last Resort’s “Big Meat” Steak Challenge (Dallas)
description:
– There are Dick’s Last Resort locations all around the country, and they all offer this “Big Meat” Challenge.
– The main feature of this challenge is two 12 oz New York strip steaks that are cooked to your liking.
– The steaks are the main feature of the challenge, but they aren’t really the hardest part to finish.
– Along with the steak, you must finish an order of their Macho Nachos which weighs over 3 lbs.
– The nachos are topped with cheese, homemade chili, Pico de Gallo, jalapenos, and sour cream.
– Another major feature of this challenge is Dick’s huge 12-inch footlong wiener hot dog loaded with chili, cheese, and onions. You must also finish a house salad, a double portion of their loaded red skin mashed potatoes (taters), and a double order of steamed broccoli. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the $79.99 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– Please note that the drinks and dessert featured in the video below were just optional and not required.

title: The Rogers Roundhouse Food Challenge
description:
– Rogers Roundhouse is train-themed and now now hosts this Roundhouse Challenge.
– Plate #1 features a Frog Dog and loaded Frog Fries in honor of TCU which is 1 mile away.
– Plate #2 features a signature Roundhouse Burger with an order of fried pickles.
– Plate #3 features a BYO (build your own) Burger with an order of fully loaded tater tots.
– Just FYI, the 3 pints of beer that I drank with my meal are not part of the base challenge.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything, including 3 ice cream sandwiches.
– 3 sets of cookies – Oreo cookies, red velvet cookies, and then Snickerdoodle cookies.
– Winners receive the $70 meal free, a sweet T-Shirt or hat, and photo on Wall of Fame!!

title: 1949 Burger Bar’s All American Burger Challenge (At Loaf’n Dog)
description:
– This food challenge is a collaboration of two restaurants, 1949 Burger Bar and Loaf’N Dog, which are both under the same ownership. They are both within walking distance of each other.
– Made by 1949 Burger Bar, there is a 4-patty “Atlas” Burger layered with cheese, bacon, jalapenos, and other healthy vegetables. There is also a side of hand-cut fries.

Served with 1/2 lb. of fries, sweet potato fries, onion rings, or tater tots. Nitro sauce has arbol peppers, diced dry chilies, crushed red pepper, garlic salt, cayenne pepper, jalapeno salt, liquid capsaicin, five bottles of hot sauces (including a ghost chili sauce and a habanero concentrate), and fresh habaneros. This is known as the hottest burger in Texas.
– There is no afterburn period. Liquids may be used and you can wipe and use sauces or other food during the challenge. No dairy products can be used until after the challenge has been completed. There is no set time limit, but everything must be finished in one sitting to win the challenge.

– You have only one hour to finish the entire 5.5 pound challenge
– The challenge is only available on WEDNESDAYS after 5 pm
– Free Meal
– Free custom t-shirt with your name on it
– Your whole party/table gets their meal for FREE
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Fry Street Tavern’s Swamp Donkey Burger Challenge
description:

– The burger is served with 1.5 lbs of fries and there is a 30 minute time limit

– Wall of Fame

title: Yesterday’s Diner’s Big Daddy Burger Challenge
description:
– Five 1/2 pound burger patties + 2 hot dogs stacked with 5 slices of American cheese
– Topped and layered with bacon, jalapenos, chili, onion strings, mustard, and Fritos
– Served on a large, thick, slightly oversized bun with over 1 pound of fries on the side
– The challenge weighs around 5 pounds total and there is a 45 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: The Bistro B Pho Challenge
description:
– This bowl of pho includes 6 lbs of noodles and 3 lbs of meat
– You get 90 minutes to finish the entire bowl of pho
– Free Meal

title: The Atomic Omelette’s Burger Challenge
address: 6313 Wooldridge Rd, Ste #10, Corpus Christi, TX 78414
description:

title: Maggiore’s Big Azz Texas 28″ Pizza Challenge
address: 1420 Cypress Creek Rd, Cedar Park, TX 78613
description:

title: J&J’s 7lb Monster Migas Breakfast Challenge
address: 300 West Whitestone Blvd, Cedar Park, TX 78613
description:
– J&J BBQ & Burgers serves up delicious barbecue, burgers, and breakfast items all day!!
– The challenge features over 4lbs of their breakfast “Migas” which is a Texan “Tex-Mex” dish.
– There are fried corn tortilla strip pieces mixed with pico de gallo and eggs, covered with cheese.
– That all comes with 6 flour tortillas plus 1lb sides of their home fries and some refried beans.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire 7lb Texan breakfast migas meal.
– Winners get the $19.99 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and Wall of Fame!!

where: Juan In A Million Mexican Restaurant
description:

– All tacos must be finished in one sitting in order to win the challenge
– They consist of potatoes, bacon, eggs, and cheese on a 6″ flour tortilla
– On the menu the taco is referred to as the “Don Juan el Taco Grande”
– Each breakfast taco is huge and weighs around 1 pound total
– The women’s record was 5 as of April 2016
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: The Moe Dogs Super Hot Dog Challenge
description:
– 8 jumbo wieners and 2 bratwursts are served on top of 2 open faced buns
– They are smothered with chili, cheese, onions, jalapenos, & fries
– The 4 lb challenge must be finished in 30 minutes or less
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: The Big Texan 72oz Steak Challenge
description:
– Entire meal must be completed in one hour. If any of the meal is not consumed (swallowed)…YOU LOSE!
– Before the time starts, you will be allowed to cut into the steak, and take one bite. If the steak tastes good and is cooked to your satisfaction, we will start the time upon your acceptable approval. The time will not stop, and the contest is on, so make SURE before you say “yes.”
– Once you start you are not allowed to stand up, leave your table, or have anyone else TOUCH the meal.
– You will be disqualified if anyone assists you in cutting, preparing or eating of your meal.
– You don’t have to eat the fat, but we will judge this. (When you are done they stop the clock and wait for a manager. They will then restart the clock if more needs to be eaten per the judge.)
– Should you become ill, the contest is over… YOU LOSE! (Please use the container provided as necessary.)
– You are required to pay the full amount up front; if you win we will refund 100%.
– You must sit at a table that we assign.
– The steak’s measurements (length x width x thickness) can vary depending on the day
– There is a garden salad, 3 pieces of shrimp cocktail, a roll, and baked potato included
– If you do not win the steak challenge, you are welcome to take the leftovers with you.
– No consumption or sharing of the leftovers is allowed in the restaurant once the contest is over.
– If you fail to complete the challenge, you must pay the full $72 dollars
– (Courtesy: Big Texan Steak Ranch website)
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt (you get one win or lose)
– Free Certificate Of Completion
– You get to sign the guest book
– Free cowboy boot mug (you get one win or lose)
– Online “Wall of Fame”

title: Firehouse Pizzeria’s 36-Inch “Monster” Pizza Challenge (Bear Lake)
address: 50 S Bear Lake Blvd, Garden City, UT 84028
description: There is a one hour (60 minutes) time limit for two people to eat Firehouse Pizzeria’s largest 36″ diameter pizza. This pizza challenge is available at all of their locations. Please contact the location you are interested in going to beforehand to schedule your challenge in advance so they can be ready for you. The pizza must only have one topping of your choosing, but you can add more if you are feeling confident. There are no drink requirements and you can ask for optional crust dipping sauce. Fail and pay $50 for the pizza. Winning team members each get the pizza for free plus a sweet t-shirt, a team photo on the location’s Wall of Fame, and free pizza for a year!! Note: Each person gets to order 2 free medium pizzas or one large pizza each month for a full year.

title: Tamarind’s “Pho King” Vietnamese Pho Challenge
address: 120 S Main St, Salt Lake City, UT 84101
description: This Vietnamese pho challenge features four pounds of rice noodles served with “1/2 lb” portions of meatballs and beef brisket, plus some healthy Asian vegetables. The massive bowl of pho is equal to about five normal-sized portions of their pho noodle soup options on the menu. The broth is not required to be finished in order to win the challenge. Fail and pay $50 for the meal. Losers also get their name and photo added to the Wall of “Pho-kups.” Winners get the $50 meal free plus $200 cash and a spot on the “Pho King Boss” Wall of Fame!!

title: Brooker’s “Liberty Bell” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge (Vineyard)
address: 568 N Mill Rd, Ste #A101, Vineyard UT 84059
description:
Every July 4th, this ice cream sundae record challenge starts over with the time limit set to 17 minutes and 76 seconds, or 18:16. Once somebody beats that time limit, that record becomes the time limit to beat until everything starts over on the next July 4th. The ice cream sundae is served inside a very expensive and heavy upside-down replica Liberty Bell. There are 13 softball-sized scoops of ice cream, one for each of the 13 original colonies. Brooker’s staff chooses the thirteen different flavors for the challenge, and you also get four scoops of four different dry toppings and four pumps of four different liquid toppings. That is all topped with whipped cream, nuts, Patriot Sprinkles, and multi-colored cherries. Beat the necessary time record and win the $76 sundae free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Brooker’s location’s Wall of Fame!! Please note that the record does not vary based on location, as with some challenges, and the record to beat is the same for all of them.
Contact the Brooker’s location you are interested in visiting to find out the current record to beat!!

title: Burly Burger’s “Brigham” Cheeseburger Challenge (West Haven)
address: 2970 W 4000 S, Unit #2, West Haven, UT 84401
description: There are four Burly Burger locations around the Salt Lake City area in Utah, and there is another Burly Burger hamburger restaurant in Idaho Falls, Idaho. All five offer this 10-Patty “Brigham” Cheeseburger Challenge, named after Brigham Young who led the Mormons to Utah back in 1847. There is a one sitting time limit to eat TEN 1/3 pound 50/50 beef hamburger patties stacked up high and layered with cheese slices. The beef patties are fresh-never-frozen and made with 50% beef brisket and 50% beef chuck. There is lots of homemade “Burly Sauce” or “Fry Sauce” and there are some healthy vegetables on the bottom of the burger. Randy Santel was given TWO large orders of their fries, as shown in the photos, but everyone else seems to get just one large order as shown in the other photo below. Challengers must finish a large milkshake and there is a one sitting time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $47 burger meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on the Burly Burger location’s Wall of Fame!! Contact the restaurant ahead of time to schedule your challenge if interested.

where: The Cereal Killerz Kitchen (Salt Lake City)
address: 153 Rio Grande St, Salt Lake City, UT 84101
weight: 80 ounces of cereal (+3/4-1 gallon of milk for "professionals")
description:
– Cereal Killerz Kitchen currently has 4 locations and all 4 of them offer this cereal challenge.
– The challenge is to finish a massive bowl filled with scoops from over 130 different cereals that Cereal Killerz Kitchen offers. The challenge bowl comes “as is” and you cannot just choose which cereals you prefer.
– The whole bowl of cereal, not including any milk, weighs around 80 ounces or 5 pounds total.
– Non-professionals get 1 hour to finish everything. There is no milk requirement for non-professionals.
– People deemed “professional” with lots of experience get only 45 minutes to finish the whole bowl, and pros must also finish either 1 full gallon of dairy milk, or 3/4 gallon of unsweetened almond milk or other non-dairy milk alternative option.
– 1 gallon of whole dairy milk or 2% dairy milk is included with the $35 fee that must be paid in advance when you order the challenge bowl online via their website. You can request a non-dairy alternative which costs an extra $5.00 on the day of your challenge.
– You must order the challenge online more than 24-48 hours in advance, and let them know your desired location, so the staff can prepare the challenge bowl ahead of time which takes more than 1 hour to prepare. CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THIER CHALLENGE PAGE WHERE YOU PLACE YOUR ORDER.
– Winners receive the whole cereal bowl free plus a sweet T-Shirt, a spot on the Wall of Fame, and a $50 gift card to come back and use later (good for all locations).

title: The Wing Coop’s 11 Wing Challenge (Marmalade)
address: 569 N 300 W, Salt Lake City, UT 84103
description:

title: Ashton’s Burger Barn’s “Meathead” Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish eight 1/4 lb beef patties stacked and layered with cheese on a bed of lettuce, pickles, and Ashton’s special sauce. The burger comes with 1 lb of fries and endless drinks as needed.
– Winners earn a sweet free t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.
– Note: This is a pay-to-play challenge so the meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: The Sensuous Sandwich “24 Inchers Club” Challenge (Orem)
address: 1680 S State St, Ste #104, Orem, UT 84097
description:

– For the base challenge, brave challengers have 30 minutes to eat any 24-inch / 2-foot long sandwich from the menu, and it must have at least one meat and one cheese. This is a pay-to-play food challenge and the sandwich costs $23.99 ($24) whether you win or lose. Winners get a sweet t-shirt and a polaroid photo posted on the Sensuous Sandwich location’s Wall of Fame!! Each time you wear the shirt, you get a free medium drink to enjoy along with the food you order (one per day).
– Please note that the photo below pictures TWO 24″ long sandwiches, and there are no required vegetable toppings either. You can walk in and order this sandwich challenge. You do NOT need to call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance. Thousands of people have won between both of the SLC metro area locations.

description:

– The challenge includes 1 lb of fries and there is a 15 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Angie’s Kitchen Sink Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This huge bowl of ice cream is covered in delicious toppings
– It is topped with syrups, nuts, whipped cream, & cherries
– The entire sundae weighs around 3 pounds
– It all must be finished in one sitting to win
– Free bumper sticker
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Burger Stop’s Deuce Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 lb stacked burger with cheese and tomatoes
– The burger is served with 1/2 lb of french fries
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish it all
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Rozzi’s “Reaper” Spicy Wing Challenge
description:
– Rozzi’s Lakeshore Tavern in Colchester, VT offers 2 food challenges (This spicy wing challenge and a burger challenge).
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Papa Pete’s Giant Pancake Challenge
description:
– The challenge includes three 14-inch buttermilk pancakes.
– The pancakes weigh 6 lbs total and one has to finish everything in one sitting.
– Advance notice is required so be sure to call and schedule your challenge.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Burger Bar’s 6lb Loaded Burger Challenge
description:
– There is a delicious 6 lb burger served on a homemade bun.
– It’s a combination of their three most popular tower burgers.
– Those include the Big Texas, Big Baconator, and the Big Red.
– Lots of bacon, banana peppers, cheese, onion rings, mustard, and spicy BBQ sauce.
– Also comes with Frank’s RedHot sauce and includes a 1 hour time limit to finish.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame.

title: Soup’er Heros’ “Edible Hulk” Sandwich Challenge
address: 282 Berlin Mall Rd, Berlin Corners, VT 05602
description:
– 1.5 lbs of black angus roast beef, 1.5 lbs of ham, 1.5 lbs of turkey, 1.5 lbs of bacon, two large tomatoes, two jars of sandwich stacker pickles, lettuce and 2 lbs of cheese, plus the bread.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– $100 Cash
– Wall of Fame

title: Our House Bistro’s Hungry Man Challenge
description:
– A huge breakfast skillet with eggs, bacon, ham, sausage, toast, and more
– The platter weighs 4.5 lbs and there is a 45 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: Only available Saturdays 10am – 2pm and Sundays 9am – 2pm

title: Ramunto’s Cal-Mungo Calzone Challenge
address: 18 Taft Corners Shopping Plaza, Williston, VT 05495
description:
– This huge calzone is filled with lots of cheese and 3+ toppings
– There are many different meats and vegetables to choose from
– It is served with some marinara sauce to dip the crust
– The 5.5 lb challenge has a 45 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: Rozzi’s “Dozer” Burger Challenge
description:
– Rozzi’s Lakeshore Tavern in Colchester, VT offers 2 food challenges (This burger challenge and a spicy wing challenge).
– Two 1-pound patties
– Eight strips of bacon
– Four slices of cheddar cheese
– Served on a cornbread roll
– A bed of crispy French fries
– There is a 30-minute time limit
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Newsome’s Restaurant’s “The Farm” Burger Challenge
address: 235 Jessie Dupont Memorial Hwy, Burgess, VA 22432
description:
– “The Farm” challenge consists of a stacked burger with two 1/4lb burger patties, 2 slices of provolone cheese, 2 slices of American cheese, two 1/5lb chicken fillets, 10 slices of bacon, 2 fried eggs, 1/3lb Virginia honey ham (yum), lettuce, tomato (optional), and mayo.
– In addition to the burger, there is a 1.5 lb portion of cheese fries and a 32 oz milkshake. Challengers can choose what milkshake they want from the following options: chocolate, vanilla, strawberry, or Dreamsicle.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire platter and complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free, an “I Ate The Farm” bumper sticker, and name and photo on “Newsome’s Farmer Wall of Fame”.
– Note: All contestants receive a free “Newsome’s Farm” cup, which can be refilled anytime for $0.99.

title: Tickles Table’s Burger Challenge
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of two stacks of 10 1/4-lb burger patties, choice of a bowl of loaded baked beans or 12 bone-in chicken wings, a large order of bacon cheese fries, and a 32-oz milkshake.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $99 meal for free.

description:

– This challenge has a one-sitting time limit.
– To win, the current record must be beaten.
– Record resets at the beginning of every year; contact the Jack Brown’s location nearest you to find out the current record to beat!
– Winners receive the meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame and social media, and get to choose from either a T-Shirt, hat, hoodie, or sweatshirt, depending on the season.

title: Anthony’s “Warrior” 30-inch Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– Anthony’s Pizza in Stephens City, VA has a massive 5 topping 30-inch pizza challenge.
– You and a partner have 45 minutes to finish the whole pie.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and their picture on the wall of fame.

title: RJ’s 26-inch Party Pizza Challenge
description:
– RJ’s Pizza has been serving pizza and Italian foods to the Galax, Virginia area since 1986.
– They have a 26″ x 17″ rectangular-shaped “Party Pizza” on their menu that consists of 24 slices since the pizza is cut up into 4 rows of 6 slices. They now offer this pizza as a challenge for 1 person to finish the entire pizza with a few toppings within 1 hour. Call ahead if interested to schedule your challenge.
– RJ’s Pizza uses shredded white Cheddar cheese rather than mozzarella which is so good!!
– Randy got cocky and ordered their “Super Deluxe” Pizza with hamburger, ham, sausage, pepperoni, banana peppers, green peppers, black olives, onions, mushrooms, and more. You don’t need that many toppings on your pizza for this challenge.
– Winners earn the $30 pizza free plus a sweet t-shirt, groovy hat, and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Baron Pub’s “Baronator” Burger Challenge
description:
– Baron’s Pub has 2 locations but this challenge is only available at the Suffolk location.
– The Baronator is a 5lb all-beef patty burger smothered in American and provolone cheese
– It is topped with onions, mushrooms, lettuce, tomatoes, mayo, and pickle spears, and served on a large sourdough bun.
– The challenge is served with fries and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive their meal for free and a sweet t-shirt.
– Note: A 2 hour notice and signing a waiver is required upon ordering the challenge.

title: Wood Booger Grill’s “Super WoodBurger” Challenge
description:
– For this challenge, there are 2 twin hamburger patties plus some juicy BBQ pork.
– Topped with fried green tomatoes, pickle chips, white cheddar and pepper jack cheeses, and cheese sauce.
– Served with homemade french fries, and contestants have to finish everything in one sitting to win.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Rapid Pizza’s 28″ Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– The challenge features a 28″ diameter pizza with 3 different topping options.
– You and your teammate get to choose between Meat Lovers, Deluxe, or a Veggie pizza.
– This is a team challenge for 2 people and a 2-liter bottle of soda must also be finished.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Mickey G’s Bistro’s 28″ Mega Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– You and a partner must finish a 28″ 1-topping mega pizza.
– As a team you must also finish a full pitcher of soda.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Note: The restaurant is closed on Tuesdays.
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame
– Each person receives a $25 Gift Card

title: Fat Shack’s “5K” 5,000 Calorie Menu Eating Challenge (Seattle)
description:
There are more than 30 Fat Shack locations around the United States now, with most of them near major universities and college campuses, offering “Late Night Done Right.” Almost all of them currently offer a 5,000 Calorie “5K” Menu Eating Challenge. Challengers get just 15 minutes to quickly eat a few different items from the menu. There is a “Fat Shack” Sandwich that features cheesesteak meat, four chicken fingers, jalapeno poppers, fried mozzarella cheese sticks, French fries, and the sauces of your choosing.
The challenge also includes two orders (12) of Fat Shack’s Mac N’ Cheese Bites, a classic double cheeseburger served with fries, and five (5) deep fried Oreos. The order of fried pickle spears featured in the photo and linked video was just optional and not required as part of the actual 5,000 calorie food challenge. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt of your choosing, a headband proclaiming your victory, and a spot on the Fat Shack location’s Wall of Fame. You should be able to walk in and order the challenge at most locations with no prior notice, but you may want to contact the Fat Shack fast food restaurant you are interested in visiting ahead of time so they can be prepared and ready for your attempt. Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

Good luck, eat fast, and win before you begin!!

title: Kasa Taphouse’s “Big Mouth Burger” Challenge
address: 908 N Howard St STE 101, Spokane, WA 99201
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of 8 beef patties, 8 slices of thick cut bacon, American cheese, pickles, red onions, lettuce, house burger sauce, a brioche sesame bun, and a moat of Double Dirty Fries.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $55 meal for free and a free T-Shirt.

title: The Bearded Ginger’s “Thor’s Hammer” Eating Challenge
address: 8125 East Sprague Avenue, Spokane Valley, WA 99212
description:
– This challenge consists of a large beef shank, macaroni and cheese, coleslaw, BBQ beans, chicken wings, mozzarella sticks, garlic toast, and your choice of french fries, tater tots, or jo-jos.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.

title: The Junk Yard’s Burger Challenge
address: 6412 E Trent Ave, Spokane Valley, WA 99212
description:

– There is a 40-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $40 meal for free and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: El Mazatlan’s “Taco Takedown” Team Challenge
address: 900 W National Hwy Suite 9, Washington, IN 47501
description:
– This team challenge consists of 50 soft-shelled tacos weighing about 4-ounces each, filled with your choice of ground beef, chicken, steak, or shrimp.
– There is a 36-minute time limit to finish the challenge.
– Winners receive the $120 meal for free, two $40 gift cards, $50 cash each, and free T-Shirts.

title: El Mazatlan’s “Taco Takedown” Solo Challenge
address: 900 W National Hwy Suite 9, Washington, IN 47501
description:

address: 100 N Hayford Rd, Airway Heights, WA 99001
description:

title: Westside’s 18″ Death By Pizza Challenge (Blaine)
description:
– There are around 40 Westside Pizza locations, most of them are around the Pacific Northwest United States.
– Almost all of them offer an 18-inch “Death By Pizza” Challenge loaded with lots of tasty toppings.
– The “Death By Pizza” is their most popular specialty topping option w/ 5 meats plus a lot more!!
– Toppings: pepperoni, Canadian bacon, sausage, beef, real bacon, canned pineapple, mushrooms, black olives, onions, and green peppers.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish the pizza, including all the toppings. Substitutions are allowed.
– Winners receive the $27.99 pizza free (price can vary based on location), a sweet t-shirt, $50 cash, and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.
– If you are a location’s 1st winner or if you break the time record, you get an extra $50 cash ($100 total).
– At some locations, you can walk in and try it, but you are encouraged to schedule your attempt in advance.

description:

title: Charlie’s “Bigfoot” Breakfast Challenge

– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.
– Note: This challenge is offered only in the summertime.

title: Port of Subs’s 2ft Sandwich Challenge (Bellingham)
description:

– This challenge consists of a 2ft long sandwich, which you are allowed to pick from any of their sandwich options and customize to your liking.
– Challengers have 20 minutes to finish the sandwiches.
– Winners go up on the wall of fame and get a free foot-long sandwich.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: The Wing Dome’s “7-Alarm” Wing Challenge (Armory)
description:
– You must finish 7 extremely spicy wings and you have 7 minutes to finish all of them.
– Check out the restaurant’s website challenge page with all the rules and details!!
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame

title: That One Place’s “Quad Nasty” Burger Challenge
address: 1397 Olney Ave SE, Port Orchard, WA 98366
description: – Challengers have 45 minutes to finish this whole meal.

title: Tacoma Burger Co’s Ultimate Food Warrior Burger Challenge
Nicki’s Bella Marina’s Super Monster Mega Challenge Burger
address: 2615 South Harbor Loop Dr, Bellingham, WA 98255
description:

– Beef is topped with American cheese, lettuce, tomato, special sweet red relish, and mayo.
– Served with ~3 lbs of steak fries, and there is a 20-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free “Fender Squire Stratocaster” Guitar
– Wall of Fame

where: Piroshki on 3rd Restaurant, Bakery, and Cafe
description: For this challenge you must order one of their delicious giant-sized piroshki from their menu which can be savory or sweet. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the 6.75 lb piroshki and winners receive the meal free, two $25 Gift Cards, and spot on their Wall of Fame!! Watch Raina Huang’s video below for more details. You must schedule your challenge more than 48 hours (2 days) in advance if you are interested in trying it yourself.

title: Billy’s Cafe’s Breakfast Challenge
description:
– Two pounds of potatoes with peppers and onions.
– Three homemade biscuits covered with gravy.
– Topped with five eggs, cheddar cheese, and bacon.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– Free T-Shirt

title: C&D’s Tekoa “Big Daddy” Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 lbs of beef on a 2.5 lb homemade bun (weight may vary) plus loads of delicious toppings.
– Topped with eggs, bacon, and healthy vegetables – lettuce, tomatoes, and onions.
– Served with a basket of French fries, sweet potato fries, tater tots, or waffle fries.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt (you get one whether you win or lose)
– Wall of Fame

title: 291 Brewhouse’s Kitchen Sink Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– This includes 4 large scoops of ice cream of your choice on top of 3 sliced bananas.
– The ice cream scoops are topped with whipped cream and toppings of your choice.
– Contestants must finish everything in 10 minutes to win the challenge.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted.

title: Wave Island’s Gigantic Sushi Roll Challenge
where: Wave Island Sports Grill & Sushi Bar
description:
– This gigantic sushi roll is filled with crab mix, cream cheese, tempura shrimp, spicy tuna, cucumber, and tempura asparagus.
– Topped with sashimi, avocado, lots of sauces, tempura crumbs, and scallions.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Sharps RoastHouse’s Monster Burger Challenge
description:
– This includes two prime marbled beef patties with lettuce, tomato, dills, candied bacon, cheddar cheese, grilled double sandwich in the center, sauce, and two fried eggs all on a monstrous homemade Sourdough Brioche bun.
– Served with fries and there is a 5-minute time limit finish everything.
– Free Meal
– “Monster” Wall of Fame

title: Playmakers’ “Red Zone” Reaper Wing Challenge
address: 15 E Main St, Battle Ground, WA 98604, USA
description:
– There are 10 delicious, hot, and spicy wings.
– Their newly enhanced wing sauce is made from 80% fire-roasted Carolina Reapers, 10% Ghost Peppers, and 10% Thai Chilies (2x hotter than the last recipe)!!
– There is a 10 minute time limit to finish everything with a 5 minute “afterburn” period.
– Free Meal
– Free Playmakers T-Shirt
– $25 Gift Card to use later
– Name and photo on “Wall of Flame”

title: AB Crepes’ 26 Crepe Team Challenge
description:
– Eat 26 plain crepes within 60 minutes split between you and a partner.
– It is okay for one person to eat more than the other. It doesn’t have to be 50/50.
– If you are feeling brave, you can make some of them specialty crepes from their menu.
– Your team pays $60 beforehand plus a $20 refundable “throw-up deposit.”
– Winning team members receive their money back, sweet t-shirts, and a pic on the Wall of Fame.
– You both each get 50% crepes there for the rest of your lives!! (A great prize!!)

title: The Bullseye Burger Challenge
description:

address: 303 12th Ave S, Ste A, Seattle, WA 98144
weight: 6 lbs of food + 6.6 lbs of broth (Total weight can vary)
description:

– There is a 90-minute time limit and all of the broth must be finished too.
– The bowl is 16″ diameter by 5″ high and the soup comes up to 1.5″ from the top.
– Time starts as soon as they serve it. You can let it cool, but it will be part of your 90 minutes.
– You can ask them to hold it in the kitchen and let it cool for a few moments beforehand.
– You are allowed to use the restroom during the challenge (no throwing up though)
– Free Meal
– $100 Cash
– Your photo on their Wall Of Fame (flat-screen television)
– Note: You must set this challenge up with the restaurant through FB first.

description:
