description:
– There are many beef burger patties stacked high and layered with cheese, bacon, fried eggs, and more.
– Including the side of fries the burger is served with, the entire meal weighs around 4.5 pounds.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Red Onion Burgers’ Intimidator Burger Challenge
address: 21005 44th Ave W, Ste #101, Mountlake Terrace, WA 98043
description:
– Six 1/4 pound burger patties stacked and layered
– Bun > 2 patties > bun > 2 patties > bun > 2 patties > bun
– Includes lettuce, onions, pickles, tomatoes, and cheddar cheese
– Also includes Thousand Island Dressing (no substitutions allowed)
– Sides of spicy chili, mac & cheese, and 1/2 lb of french fries
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything
– More info: http://www.redonionburgers.com/intimidator-challenge
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame (Losers go on the Wall Of Shame)

title: Stuffy’s Large Stuff Breakfast Challenge
description:
– The Stuff is hash browns grilled with cheese, ham, green peppers, and onions and topped with country gravy and served with sour cream and salsa on the side.
– There are different options to choose from when ordering
– Specialty Options: Fajita Stuff, Ham & Cheese Stuff, or Taco Stuff
– Weighs around 7 pounds and is served on a 16″ pizza tray (about 3.5″ high).
– You are allowed to cut it or spread it around before time begins.
– You have 45 minutes to finish everything on the platter
– Free Meal (Only if finished in less than 45 minutes)
– Free T-shirt or hat (even if finished after the 45 minute limit)
– Picture on Wall of Fame (even if finished after the 45 minute limit)
– Note: Available all day and not just during breakfast hours.

title: Stuffy’s 10lb Cinnamon “Bear Roll” Challenge
description:
– This cinnamon roll is sweet and gigantic
– It weighs 10 pounds total!! There is a 75 minute time limit.
– You must call & book a few days in advance
– Free Meal (Only if finished in less than 75 minutes)
– Free T-shirt or hat (even if finished after the 75 minute limit)
– Picture on Wall of Fame (even if finished after the 75 minute limit)

title: Stuffy’s Almost A Dozen Egg Omelet Challenge
description:
– The meal consists of an omelet with 12 eggs (despite the name of the challenge), tons of hash browns, ham, sausage, bacon, onions, green peppers, tomatoes, American cheese, Swiss cheese, and cheddar cheese and topped with more cheese; along with even more hash browns on the side and 4 slices of buttered toast.
– Weighs around 7 pounds and is served on a 16″ pizza tray (about 2.75″ high).
– You are allowed to cut it or spread it around before time begins.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything on the plate.
– Free Meal (Only if finished in less than 45 minutes)
– Free T-shirt or hat (even if finished after the 45 minute limit)
– Picture on Wall of Fame (even if finished after the 45 minute limit)
– Note: Available all day and not just during breakfast hours.

title: Ramblin’ Jack’s Cattle Drive Burger Challenge
description:
– Fairly large burger topped with cheese & veggies
– It is served with a large order of french fries
– The challenge also includes a 1 lb cinnamon roll
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Bumper Sticker
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Kobe Sushi Bar’s 3 Liter Ramen Eating Challenge
description:
– Challenge consists of a 3 liter massive bowl of authentic ramen
– Your choice of noodles: Tonkotsu (pork based) or Shoyu (soy sauce based)
– Includes bean sprouts, onions, chives or green onions, and 4 slices of pork
– Topped with 1 hard boiled egg plus the 3 liters of required ramen broth
– You have only 5 minutes to let it cool down before your time clock starts
– You can add ice or cold water to help it cool but you must drink that too.
– You can bring your own utensils but you cannot use a strainer/colander.
– They let you us a small additional bowl if needed. 30 minute time limit.
– Click here to check out their website challenge page!!
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame
– $100 gift certificate

title: The Family Kitchen and Smokehouse’s Burger Challenge
description:
– The Family Kitchen and Smokehouse is home to a food challenge with three variations. The challenges is one of their menu item specialty burger/sandwiches, just super-sized 4X. You can choose from Drew’s Patriot Burger (The Megladon), Tyler’s Stuffed Pig (The Porky Pig), and the classic BLT (The Godzilla).
-The Megladon consists of a fresh grilled 2lb burger patty topped with American cheese, bacon, lettuce, tomato, ketchup, and mustard. All of this is sandwiched between an oversized bun. In addition to the giant burger, there is a large side of hand cut French fries.
– The Porky Pig consists of a fresh grilled 2lb burger patty topped with American cheese, fresh smoked pulled pork, onion rings, and house made BBQ sauce. All of this is sandwiched between an oversized bun. In addition to the giant burger, there is a large side of hand cut French fries.
– The Godzilla consists of 24 slices of bacon, lettuce and tomato. All of this is sandwiched between an oversized bun. In addition to the giant sandwich, there is a large side of hand cut French fries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge platter. Successful completions win the meal free and a sweet t-shirt.

title: Giovanni’s 30″ Pizza Challenge (West Logan)
description:
– There is a giant 10lb 30″ diameter pizza.
– This pizza can be eaten as just as a cheese pizza. Toppings are not required.
– You and your partner have 1 hour to finish the whole pizza.
– Winners receive the pizza for free.
– The current record, as of 8/14/2022, is 11 minutes 43 seconds.
– Be sure to call ahead.

title: Buffalo Trail’s “Feud” Burger Challenge
description:
– Contestants must finish this whole burger in less than 30 minutes.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a free t-shirt, and a picture on the wall of fame.
– Also, you can do this challenge as a duo, but you and your partner will only have a 15 minute time limit.
– They require you to call one day prior to your attempt of this challenge. Good luck!!

title: Village Pizza’s 30-Inch 3-Person Team Pizza Challenge
description:
– The challenge is to finish a 30 inch diameter pizza.
– The pizza must have 3 toppings.
– You and 2 teammates have a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winning teams receive the $60 meal for free!
– Losers have to pay the $60!

title: Mason Jar Saloon’s Might Steak Challenge
The Poky Dot’s He-Man Breakfast Challenge
description:
– The Poky Dot in Fairmont, WV has 2 food challenges (this ice cream one and a breakfast challenge).
– The challenge platter consists of 4 pancakes, 4 eggs, 4 slices of bacon, 2 sausage patties, 2 sausage links, 4 pancakes, 2 ham slices, 2 slices of toast, fried potatoes, and 2 biscuits & gravy.
– Challengers have only 45 minutes to finish everything.
– Winners receive a free t-shirt.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if finished.

title: The Poky Dot’s “Humongous” Banana Split Challenge
description:
– The Poky Dot in Fairmont, WV has 2 food challenges (this ice cream one and a breakfast challenge).
– Two people must finish a “humongous” 9lb banana split topped with huge scoops of ice cream.
– This banana split involves 3 chocolate ice cream scoops, 3 strawberry ice cream scoops, 3 vanilla ice cream scoops, chocolate sauce, strawberry sauce, pineapple sauce, whipped cream, nuts, sprinkles, and bananas.
– There is no specific time limit, but the whole thing must be finished in one sitting to win.
– Winning teams receive the meal for free.

title: Hillbilly’s Homewrecker Hot Dog Challenge (Lesage)
description:
– Jalapeños, sautèed, peppers and onions, nacho cheese, habenero, chili sauce, mustard, slaw, lettuce, tomato, and shredded cheese, piled high on a 15-inch, 1-pound all beef weenie in a big ‘ol bun! As Sharie says, “It’s 15-inches of pure eatin’ pleasure!!” (directly from their website) You have only 12 minutes to finish everything.
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame
– Free Meal only if record broken (2 minutes 34 seconds as of 9/19/2018)

title: Grumpy Troll Brew Pub’s “The Hungry Troll” Food Challenge
description:
– “The Hungry Troll” food challenge is a variety platter consisting of a giant pretzel, a large order of Mac and cheese bites, a large order of cheese curds, their “Meat Breath” Burger (Beef patty with a smear of Habanero pepper mayo, smoked pulled pork, bacon, cheddar cheese, bbq sauce on a brioche bun), and a bowl of soup.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge platter. Successful completions win the meal for free, some cool merch, and a spot on the wall of fame.
– Please note, there is no getting up to use the restroom during the challenge. Any drinks are acceptable. Once the win is declared, the challenger must remain at the table for 5 minutes to ensure there are no “reversals of fortune”.

title: Bronco Billy’s Saloon & Grill’s “Buckin’ Bronco” Burger Challenge
address: S2545 County Hwy BD, Baraboo, WI 53913
description:
– The “Buckin’ Bronco” Burger Challenge consists of six 1/3lb all-beef patties, six layers of cheddar, American & pepper jack cheeses, onion rings, and cheese curds. All of this is sandwiched on a brioche bun with BBQ sauce.
– In addition to the burger, there is a full pound side of either fries, chips, or tater tots (your choice)!
– In order to beat the challenge, you have to complete the challenge quicker than the current record. Successful completions win the meal for free, a sweet t-shirt, and picture up on their wall of fame.
– As of July 31, 2025, the current record is 14:06.

title: Las Brisas Plymouth’s “De Panza Grande” Burrito Challenge
description:
– This burrito consists of two meats of your choice plus rice, beans, lettuce, cheese, sour cream, and guacamole.
– The burrito weighs 3 lbs total and there is a 10 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners receive the meal for free, a sweet hat, and picture on the Wall of Fame.
– Beware! If you lose, you pay full price and your picture goes on the Wall of Shame!

title: Juanita’s Burrito Challenge
address: 1476 Blazing Star Blvd Ste 1, Altoona, WI, 54720
description:
– This challenge consists of an enormous burrito filled with rice, beans, chicken, steak, chorizo, shrimp, cheese, sour cream, guacamole, and pico de gallo.
– There is a 30-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive a coupon for 50% off their next purchase at the restaurant, and their picture on the Wall of Fame.

title: Gronk’s Grill’s 5lb “Enger Tower” Solo Burger Challenge
description:
– There are SIX 1/2 pound beef hamburger patties, stacked and layered with slices of American cheese.
– No bacon required. Challengers must finish 2 pounds of Gronk’s hand-cut fries surrounding the burger.
– There is a 1 hour time limit for one brave challenger to finish everything. Call ahead if you can, please!!
– Winners get the 6-patty cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Gronk’s Wall of Fame.
– Click here to check out Gronk’s website challenge page that also lists their team “Great Divide” Challenge.

title: Brunch It Up’s “Ultimate Dad Bod Brunch” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 1 cup of waffle fries, 2 cups of breakfast potatoes, 6 eggs, 4 sausage links, 4 sausage patties, 8 slices of bacon, 2 S’mores pancakes, 2 lemon berry pancakes, 1 waffle, 4 pieces of Brioche French toast, 1 biscuits & gravy with sausage gravy, 1 biscuits and gravy with chorizo gravy topped with pico, and 1 chicken & waffle.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $60 meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.

title: The Dog House’s Challenge Burger
where: The Dog House Bar and Grill
description:
– This is a burger challenge consisting of a 2-pound burger patty, 12 slices of bacon, 6 slices of pepper jack cheese, 6 slices of American cheese, 6 onion rings, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickle, and avocado all on a sourdough round loaf, along with a 1-pound side of fries.
– There is a 40-minute time limit to complete the challenge, with a 15-minute “settle” period to follow.
– Winners receive the $30 dollar meal for free, their picture on the Wall of Fame, and a free T-Shirt.
– Must call 24 hours in advance to schedule the challenge.

title: In Plane View’s “Mile High” Burger Challenge
description: – There are SIX 1/2 pound beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with 1 lb of cheese, lots of bacon strips, and some healthy vegetables. There are 2 grilled cheese sandwiches that serve as the buns. The challenge includes 2 lbs of their thick battered fries and you must also finish a 22 ounce beer or other beverage of your choosing. Finish within the 30 minute time limit and you get your $50 cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the “Mile High Club” Wall of Fame!!

title: Manitowoc Pho & Grill’s Asian Pho Challenge
description:
– This is a pho challenge consisting of 2 pounds of meat and 2 pounds of rice noodles (dry weight).
– The beef meats include sliced meatball, brisket, and steak. Some are cooked by the hot pho broth.
– Sides are served with the pho, such as bean sprouts, but those are optional and not required.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to complete the challenge (4 quarts of broth are not required).
– There is over 1 gallon of beef pho broth added to the bowl, but the broth does not have to be finished.
– Winners receive the $60 Asian pho meal for free, a $50 gift certificate, and a free sweet T-Shirt.

title: Crafty Cow’s “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Chicken Sandwich Challenge (Oconomowoc)
description:
– Crafty Cow had 3 locations serving the greater Milwaukee, Wisconsin area in Wauwatosa, Oconomowoc, and the Bay View area south of downtown Milwaukee.
– All 3 locations host this “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich Challenge.
– There are three (3) thick 6-8oz chicken breasts breaded and fried, smothered in a spicy sauce.
– The top layer features their “Nashville Hot” sauce with cayenne pepper and more spicy deliciousness.
– The middle layer has their “414 Fire” sauce which is made with Ghost Chilies / Peppers.
– The spiciest bottom chicken breast is smothered with their “MKE Lava” Carolina Reaper sauce.
– There is a Snap Pea, Kale, Radish, & Broccoli Slaw added on top and bottom of the sandwich.
– It is served with a bowl of creamy macaroni & cheese plus a drink of your choice, but neither of those are required to be finished as part of the food challenge.
– Brave challengers have 15 short minutes to finish the entire sandwich, including any debris.
– Winners earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a $30 gift card to use later, and Wall of Fame.

title: Crafty Cow’s “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Chicken Sandwich Challenge (Wauwatosa)
description:
– Crafty Cow had 3 locations serving the greater Milwaukee, Wisconsin area in Wauwatosa, Oconomowoc, and the Bay View area south of downtown Milwaukee.
– All 3 locations host this “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich Challenge.
– There are three (3) thick 6-8oz chicken breasts breaded and fried, smothered in a spicy sauce.
– The top layer features their “Nashville Hot” sauce with cayenne pepper and more spicy deliciousness.
– The middle layer has their “414 Fire” sauce which is made with Ghost Chilies / Peppers.
– The spiciest bottom chicken breast is smothered with their “MKE Lava” Carolina Reaper sauce.
– There is a Snap Pea, Kale, Radish, & Broccoli Slaw added on top and bottom of the sandwich.
– It is served with a bowl of creamy macaroni & cheese plus a drink of your choice, but neither of those are required to be finished as part of the food challenge.
– Brave challengers have 15 short minutes to finish the entire sandwich, including any debris.
– Winners earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a $30 gift card to use later, and Wall of Fame.

title: Bilda’s “Two-Mile High” Reuben Sandwich Challenge
price: $29.95 as solo challenge | $39.95 if shared or not challenge
description: The Reuben sandwich consists of 12 pieces of Swiss cheese, 3 pieces of rye bread, 1/2 pound of sauerkraut, 1 pound of corned beef, and lots of dressing. The sandwich is served with 1 pound of French fries topped with 1 bowl of chili, 1 cup of diced onions, 1 cup of shredded cheese. The challenge includes 12 pickles and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $29.95 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and Wall of Fame!!

title: Big Sur Cantina’s ~3lb Mexican Burrito Challenge
description:
There is a “larger than life” burrito made with fries, Queso Oaxaca, guacamole, sour cream, Pico de Gallo, Mexican rice, queso dip, black beans and marinated carne asada. It is served wet and topped with cheese, and there is just a 12 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the $34.95 burrito meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Big Sur’s Wall of Fame.
Note: The size depends on who you are and whoever makes the burrito. Some challenges have just involved a ~3-3.5lb burrito without any fries on the side. Some challenge platters have had fries as well. If they consider you a pro with experience, you will likely get a burrito ~150% bigger than usual, so it’s a tougher challenge. The burrito is delicious, but try to promote the restaurant via a YouTube channel and other social media, and they will make it harder for you, so there is less time to actually promote the food and establishment. Makes sense, right?

title: The Kitchen’s Massive Wisconsin Breakfast Platter Challenge
description:
– There is a 45 minute time limit to feast on 6 scrambled eggs, 1 lb of breakfast potatoes, 5 slices of sourdough toast, 8 normal breakfast sausages, 4 larger sausages made with “Hatch” green chilies, 6 slices of bacon, an order of chicken fried steak smothered with sausage gravy (or an order of chicken & waffles), an order of 2 biscuits and gravy (4 halves), and 2 orders (6 EA) of “the” Kitchen’s giant chocolate chip pancakes.
– Winners receive the $45 breakfast meal free plus a sweet T-Shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Strings Ramen’s “Monster Hell” Ramen Challenge (Madison)
description:
– Strings Ramen has 6 locations, all in the Midwest, and all offer this challenge.
– Shoyu broth base with Chinese Tian Jing red chili, Szechuan chili bean sauce, Thai chili, Piquin chili, Ghost peppers, and Scorpion pepper.
– Topped with Asari, ground pork, crispy pork skin, and hot pepper and chili made from “hell.”
– Served with broth, one glass of water, and there is a 20-minute time limit.
– Click here to check out the restaurant’s website challenge page!!
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– $50 Gift Card Certificate

title: Crawdaddy’s 5 Foot Long Cajun Po’boy Sandwich Challenge
address: 9427 W Greenfield Ave, West Allis, WI 53214
description:
– Crawdaddy’s On Greenfield has been serving the West Allis and Milwaukee area since 2018.
– Crawdaddy’s serves up a delicious Cajun menu which includes traditional Po’boy sandwiches.
– For this food challenge, there is a 5 foot long French baguette that weighs 2lbs total.
– The baguette is broken into 5 footlong sections, each with a different Cajun-themed protein.
– There is fried catfish, blackened catfish, grilled shrimp, blackened shrimp, and fried alligator.
– Each footlong section includes traditional Cajun Po’boy toppings – lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, and mayo.
– There are no sides included and the fresh beignets Randy enjoyed for dessert were just optional.
– The beer in the video was a Strawberry Cognac Beignet Ale by West Allis’ Westallion Brewing Company.
– 1 hour time limit. Winners earn the $50 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Crafty Cow’s “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Chicken Sandwich Challenge (Milwaukee)
description:
– Crafty Cow had 3 locations serving the greater Milwaukee, Wisconsin area in Wauwatosa, Oconomowoc, and the Bay View area south of downtown Milwaukee.
– All 3 locations host this “Heat & Repeat” Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich Challenge.
– There are three (3) thick 6-8oz chicken breasts breaded and fried, smothered in a spicy sauce.
– The top layer features their “Nashville Hot” sauce with cayenne pepper and more spicy deliciousness.
– The middle layer has their “414 Fire” sauce which is made with Ghost Chilies / Peppers.
– The spiciest bottom chicken breast is smothered with their “MKE Lava” Carolina Reaper sauce.
– There is a Snap Pea, Kale, Radish, & Broccoli Slaw added on top and bottom of the sandwich.
– It is served with a bowl of creamy macaroni & cheese plus a drink of your choice, but neither of those are required to be finished as part of the food challenge.
– Brave challengers have 15 short minutes to finish the entire sandwich, including any debris.
– Winners earn the $40 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, a $30 gift card to use later, and Wall of Fame.

title: Wisconsin Cafe’s “Big Porker” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– Wisconsin Café is located inside the Farm Wisconsin Discovery Center in Newton, Wisconsin which is south of Manitowoc and north of Sheboygan (closer to Manitowoc).
– Located inside the Farm Wisconsin Discovery Center, the Wisconsin Café offers fresh, locally-sourced options for breakfast and lunch. Each dish is prepared with ingredients grown and raised throughout the state, offering guests a true farm-to-table experience. Stop back time and time again to discover new dishes that change with each season.
– This “Big Porker” Breakfast Challenge has 30 minute time limit to finish everything on the platter.
– There are 3 giant pancakes with 6 pork sausages, 6 strips of pork bacon, and 1 big ham steak.
– There is 1lb of fried breakfast potatoes, 6 farm fresh eggs, and 4 slices of buttered bread.
– The orange juice, sausage gravy, and extras like butter & jam in this video were optional.
– Winners earn the $30 breakfast meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Bean City Bar and Grill’s 6lb Double Cheeseburger Challenge
address: N2505 Bean City Rd, New London, WI 54961
description:
– Bean City Bar & Grill has been serving the New London, Wisconsin area for less than 1 year.
– The area is called Bean City because years ago, farmers grew lots and lots of soybeans.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish this double cheeseburger meal weighing ~6 lbs total.
– There are two juicy 2 lb beef burger patties stacked and each layered with 4 slices of cheese.
– There are no other toppings required, but Randy did order healthy grilled onions and mushrooms.
– It is all served on a giant 1 pound freshly baked bun and the challenge includes 18 oz of fries.
– Winners earn the $35 double cheeseburger free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Yetti’s Team 16-Inch Pretzel and Sliders Eating Challenge
Coach’s 7lb “Grave Digger” Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– Coach’s Pub N Grill is well known for their broasted chicken, pizzas, and Friday night fish fries!!
– Coach’s is also known for hosting this monster-sized “Grave Digger” Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge.
– It is named after Gilbert “Grave Digger” Brown who played for the Green Bay Packers NFL team.
– There is a 2lb beef hamburger patty topped with lots of cheese, bacon, and healthy vegetables.
– There is lots of lettuce, raw onions, tomato slices, and almost a whole jar of dill pickle slices.
– That all comes on a giant bun weighing over 1lb, served with a 2-3 lb basket of crinkle cut fries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Please call ahead to schedule your challenge.
– Winners earn the $39.99 bacon cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and Wall of Fame.

title: Chubbie’s 5lb Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– Chubbie’s has been serving the Racine, Wisconsin area for many years, offering pizzas, sandwiches, gyros, “Bombers,” subs, melts, and more. There is a very diverse menu at Chubbie’s that you must try!!
– For this 5lb burger challenge, there are FIVE 1lb 100% beef burger patties cooked how you want.
– The burger patties are stacked & layered with your choice of cheese. Extra toppings are optional.
– The bun is freshly baked and pretty easy to eat without a lot of intense chewing! You will like it!!
– To win, you must beat the current time record. As of 12/23/2022, the record is/was 17:59. Shut up and eat!!
– Winners who beat the time win the $50 burger free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame!!

title: Frankie’s Quadruple Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– Frankie’s Pub & Grill has been serving the Sheboygan, Wisconsin area for over 12 years now.
– Frankie’s has offered this 5.5-6lb Quadruple Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge for most of them.
– Four 12oz beef burger patties are stacked and layered with 3 slices of cheese on each patty.
– There are lots of crispy bacon strips on each of the cheeseburger patties as well. Good luck!!
– There are 3 pieces of bun used to hold all this together with onions, pickles, tomatoes, and lettuce added.
– There is a 45-minute time limit to finish everything. There are no other sides or drinks required.
– Winners earn the $50 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt, a $20 gift card for later, and Wall of Fame.

title: Pioneer Keg’s “Brew Masters” 3lb Burger Challenge
description: – Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Fat Boys Bar and Grill’s “Fatboy” Burger Challenge
description:
– Fat Boys Bar & Grill has been serving the Abbotsford, Wisconsin area for a few years now.
– Fat Boys is owned by our friend Chad and his girlfriend who are both from around the area.
– There are six 90/10 extra lean beef burger patties stacked up high on a delicious pretzel bun.
– There are 4 pieces of cheese and 4 strips of bacon added to the bottom 2 burger patties.
– It is all topped with healthy vegetables and a Tzatziki-based “Fatboy” sauce which is delicious!!
– The food challenge includes 1lb of Fat Boys’ fries and there is a 30-minute time limit to finish.
– Winners earn the $40 burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Nutz Deep II’s “Pounder” Burger Challenge (Marshfield)
description:
– Nutz Deep II has 2 locations, both based in WI, and both offer this challenge.
– Note: This is a pay-to-play challenge. It is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Nutz Deep North’s “Pounder” Burger Challenge (Spencer)
description:
– Nutz Deep II has 2 locations, both based in WI, and both offer this challenge.
– Note: This is a pay-to-play challenge. It is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Uncle George’s “Quadruple Bypass” Burger Challenge
description:
– Uncle George’s Bar and Grill has been one of Silver Lakes’ favorite watering holes since 1999. Uncle George has survived much adversity in its past and has remodeled to become a much more modern interior with all new kitchen. They serve some of the best burgers in Salem Lakes!! Stop by for great food, cocktails, or carryout!!
– This Quadruple Bypass Burger Challenge started just a few years ago and is super delicious!!
– There are four 1/2 lb beef burger patties stacked and layered with 8 slices of cheese and 4 eggs cooked to your liking. There is lots of bacon and you can add healthy grilled vegetables too, but those are optional.
– The burger is served with a small side of coleslaw and a 1 lb basket of hand-cut French fries.
– The base challenge costs $26 and if you finish within 30 minutes, you win a sweet t-shirt and a spot for your name & photo up on Uncle George’s Wall of Fame. No beer is required for this.
– You can also attempt to beat the record challenge. If you finish the base challenge plus a 32oz pitcher of beer (your choice), and beat the current time record, you still pay $26 but you win a crisp $100 bill to cover it and earn you $74 profit!! Call ahead to schedule your challenge if interested!!
– As of 1/25/2022, the current time record to beat is 11:24. Good luck!!

title: Third Street Tavern’s “Six Stack” 4-Minute Burger Challenge
address: 1110 N Old World 3rd St, Milwaukee, WI 53203
description:
– Contestants have 4 short minutes to finish 6 beef patties (24oz or 1.5lbs total) layered with cheese.
– The burger is topped with an onion ring and is served with 6oz of tater tots.
– Winners receive the $22 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!
– The current time record is 2:40 held by Ethan Teske as of 7/14/2021.

title: Kern’s Kurbside Bar’s “Super Mammoth” Burger Challenge
description:
– There are two 1lb beef burger patties stacked & layered with cheese between three pieces of Texas Toast.
– The challenge includes 1lb of Wisconsin cheese curds, 1lb of fried onion rings, and 1lb of seasoned fries.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal (includes soft drinks)
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Pine Cone Cafe’s 12-Egg Ultimate Breakfast Scramble Challenge
address: 4187 County Rd B, Land O' Lakes, WI 54540
description:
–  This breakfast challenge started out as an omelet challenge, but now is a giant breakfast scramble.
– There is 1 lb of hash brown potatoes topped with a huge load of grilled breakfast meats and vegetables, plus lots of Wisconsin shredded cheeses. You must choose at least 5 meats and veggies that typically get served as part of an omelet or breakfast scramble. That all gets smothered with 5 ladles of white country sausage gravy and 12 eggs cooked however you want (fried, scrambled, etc…). The challenge also includes 2 regular-sized pancakes and either 2 pieces of toast or an English muffin. The cinnamon roll pictured below was optional and not required as part of the base challenge.
– Finish within one hour and win your $30 breakfast scramble meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame. Finish within 45 minutes and win all that plus a $10 gift certificate to come back and use later.

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Franklin)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Hudson)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Pleasant Prairie)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (La Crosse)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: Taco House’s Jumbo Burrito Challenge
description:
– Taco House has been proudly serving the Appleton, Wisconsin area for over 2 full years now.
– This Triple Meat 8+lb Jumbo Burrito Challenge has been available since Taco House opened.
– There are 1lb portions of 3 tasty meats – grilled chicken, grilled beef steak, and pork al pastor.
– 1lb Mexican rice, 1lb “Drunken” pinto beans, and lots of shredded cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes.
– It is all topped with sour cream sauce, an avocado green sauce, and lots of tasty queso sauce.
– Everything is wrapped inside 4 huge burrito tortillas with a 30 minute time limit to finish it all.
– Winners earn the $57.99 burrito free plus a sweet custom t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Ramone’s 16-Scoop “Milk Pail” Ice Cream Sundae Challenge
description:
Ramone’s Ice Cream Parlor has been voted #1 best place for dessert in Eau Claire, Wisconsin for 3 years in a row. For their new 16-scoop “Milk Pail” Ice Cream Challenge, challengers have 30 minutes to finish 16 softball-sized scoops of ice cream, chosen from their 24 rotating available options. All the ice cream is scooped into a milk pail and topped with toppings plus pieces of homemade waffle cone. There are also 3 slices of fruit pie of your choosing added on top from a local bakery. Lastly, you must also finish a bottle of soda made by Sprecher Brewery, and there are a few options to choose from. The whole challenge weighs around 6 pounds. You still pay $50 for the challenge whether you win or lose. $20 from each challenge and/or family purchase (to split) gets donated to a charity and winners receive a $50 gift card to use later plus a Ramone’s t-shirt or hat.
Winners also get their photo added up on Ramone’s new Wall of Fame!!

title: Coliseum Sports Bar’s “Coliseum” Stacked Gyro Challenge
address: 91 S Main St, Fond Du Lac, WI 54935
description:
– Coliseum Sports Bar & Grill has been offering this Greek Gyro Challenge for many years now!!
– There is over 2lbs of freshly cut lamb gyro meat layered between a stack of 5 giant pita bread.
– Optional homemade Tzatziki sauce is served on the side with fresh onion and tomato slices.
– There is a 40 minute time limit to finish all the lamb gyro meat and the 5 delicious pita bread.
– Winners earn the $35 gyro meal free plus a sweet Coliseum t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame!!

title: Dells Distillery’s Cheesy Tater Tot “Can” Challenge
description: Lots of tater tots, green peppers, onions, Philly steak, and cheese is assembled in a can and then flipped over on to a tray. 2 people have 20 minutes to finish it all, or 1 person has a 30 minute time limit. Whether you win or lose, the meal costs $30 and is not free or discounted. Winners get a sweet t-shirt proclaiming their victory.

title: The Big Boar “Ultimate Platter” BBQ Challenge
description:
– There is a 1/2 lb of pulled pork, 1/2 lb of chopped beef brisket, and 1/2 a smoked whole chicken.
– Comes with 1/2 a rack of ribs, 4 slices of bread, a 16 oz drink, and three big sides of your choice.
– 3 of the side options are baked beans, macaroni salad, and potato slaw. Coleslaw is an option too.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge meal and get the victory.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Mulligans Irish Pub’s 8lb Shepherd’s Pie Challenge
description: Mulligans Irish Pub & Grill offers 2 delicious food challenges – a “Paddy’s Lament” Burger Challenge and this 8lb Shepherd’s Pie Challenge. Challengers have 45 minutes to finish 8 lbs of shepherd’s pie, or technically cottage pie since it includes beef and not lamb. It is equal to 4 of their large normal-sized 2 lb portions. The challenge also includes 4 large slices of Irish stout marble rye bread. Winners receive the meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and their name and photo posted on Mulligans’ Wall of Fame at the restaurant’s front entrance.

title: Dalles House’s “Dam” Burger Challenge
address: 720 S Vincent St, St Croix Falls, WI 54024
description:
– 1 lb ground chuck steak beef patty on a large homemade bun.
– Topped with lettuce, tomato, onion, bacon, and yummy cheese.
– Served with fries, and you must finish everything in one sitting.
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Franks Diner’s “Red Men” Breakfast Challenge
description:
– This is a breakfast challenge consisting of a garbage plate breakfast that has 5 real eggs with all their meats, cheeses, and vegetables.
– Meats – ham, bacon, sausage, Chorizo, SPAM, and corned beef hash.
– Cheeses – American, Cheddar, Swiss, Hot Pepper Jack, Feta, and Mozzarella.
– Vegetables – zucchini, mushrooms, tomatoes, green pepper, spinach, onions, and jalapenos.
– That is all loaded up on a giant plate with a few orders of hash brown breakfast potatoes.
– It is served with 2 giant slices of Franks’ home-baked bread and 3 plate-sized pancakes.
– Randy ordered his pancakes with OPTIONAL fillings (chocolate chips, blueberries, and Reese’s).
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. The syrups Randy received were optional too.
– Winners earn the meal 1/2 price (cash only), a sweet t-shirt, and spot on Wall of Fame plaque!!

title: DD’s BBQ “Taco Tuesday” Eating Challenge
description:
– The challenge includes 10 BBQ street tacos and a side of your choice.
– The tacos consist of your choice of pork, chicken, brisket, or pork belly
– Each taco is covered with coleslaw, aioli, and cilantro.
– The side choices include Mac & Cheese, baked beans, coleslaw, french fries, potato salad, and chippers.
– Contestants must finish everything within the 30 minute time limit.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt or Hat
– Wall of Fame

title: Lakehouse Bar’s “Get Tatered” Loaded Tater Tots Challenge
address: W6547 County Road C, Plymouth, WI 53073
description:
– Choose 6 different tater tot bowls (10-12 options to choose from per menu below).
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish all 6 loaded tater tot bowls.
– Each bowl has ~ 1/2 lb of tater tots plus over 1/4 lb of toppings.
– Some options are tougher than others, so choose wisely!!!
– You can drink anything you want as part of the challenge.
– Challenge weighs around 5.5-6 lbs depending on which bowls you choose.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame
– $100 Cash!!
– LakeHouse Bar also offers an incentive where you can win an extra $100 cash if you can eat more than just the 6 required bowls within the 1 hour time limit. Contact the restaurant for more details and information if interested in that, for $200 cash total (in addition to the free meal and sweet t-shirt).
– Note: As of 6/14/2024, Molly Schuyler has the true record of 13 bowls!!

title: SafeHouse Milwaukee’s “OOMG” Burger Challenge
description:
– The “OOMG” Burger consists of fifteen 3.5 oz beef hamburger patties, layered with cheese slices.
– The challenge used to include 3 slices on each patty, but now there is just 1 per layer (15 slices total).
– The challenge includes 2 lbs of fried Wisconsin cheese curds and 51 ounces of “Proprietary Code” Beer.
– The beer is a red amber lager but can be substituted for if you do not or cannot drink beer / alcohol.
– Winners receive the $75 cheeseburger meal free, “Spytastic” merch, and a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: 11:11 Burgers & Beignets Man vs Food Burger Challenge
address: 718 W Johnson St, Fond du Lac, WI 54935
description:
– 11:11 Burgers & Beignets has been rated as the home of Wisconsin’s Best Burger twice now (in 2019 and 2020) by BigSevenTravel. They’ve also been rated as having Fond du Lac’s Best Burger 5 years in a row!!
– This 11:11 Comfort Food Challenge has been available for many years now and quite a few “eaters” have completed the challenge – Magic Mitch, Ethan Teske, Molly Schuyler, and Katina Eats Kilos.
– The main entrée is a 40 oz quadruple patty burger with four 10 oz beef burger patties stacked and layered with cheese, healthy vegetables, and sauces on a tasty bun. You can add more toppings if feeling brave!!
– There is a huge basket of fries, a bowl of creamy and cheesy macaroni & cheese, 8 freshly baked beignets, and for dessert, a deluxe flavored milkshake of your choosing. Randy ordered a strawberry milkshake in his video!!
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. The beers drank in the video were optional.
– Winners still pay $30 for the meal (pay to play), but you get a $30 gift certificate to come back and use later along with a sweet t-shirt and spot up on the Wall of Fame hanging in the restaurant.

title: Bobbers Island Grill Big Juicy Bobber Burger
address:
750 Wisconsin Dells Pkwy S
Wisconsin Dells, Wisconsin
description:
Two Angus burger patties covered in American cheese, jerk pulled pork, bbq sauce, grilled onion, bacon, lettuce, and tomatoes.
Free T-shirt

title: Pizza Pub’s 20″ Big Kahuna Pizza Challenge
address: 1455 Wisconsin Dells Pkwy, Wisconsin Dells, WI 53965

title: The Brothers On Oak Quadzilla Burger Challenge
description:
– 4 beef patties stacked and layered with cheese.
– 16 strips of bacon are included on the burger.
– 1 lb of fries and a 48 oz pitcher of draft beer.
– You must break the current record to win.
– The record was 14:47 as of 10/29/2017.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Eggrolls Inc’s H’mongous Dozen Eggrolls Challenge
weight: 4lbs/1.82kg (can vary depending on your choice of meat)
description:
– Winners receive a $150 gift card which is equivalent to the reward listed in the photo above.
All 16 Different Egg Roll Flavors: Pork, Spicy Pork, Ginger Pork, Mexican, Chicken, Spicy Chicken, Spicy Curry Chicken, Sophia (Italian), Spicy Caribbean Jerk Chicken, Spicy Thai Beef, Garlic Beef, Shrimp, Spicy Cajun Shrimp, German, Cheeseburger, and Hawaiian. There are vegetarian egg roll options too, but those are not included as part of this challenge (we don’t think).
Note: Each eggroll is filled with about 7-8 ounces (volume) of stuffing.
CLICK HERE TO WATCH A FACEBOOK VIDEO WHICH EXPLAINS THE RULES TOO!!

title: Pete’s Garage Bar’s Prime Rib “Meat” Burger Challenge
description:
– Pete’s Garage Bar is a local tavern in the heart of southside Oshkosh. Since its grand opening in 2005, Pete’s Garage Bar has offered sarcastic service with a smile, along with the “Best Burger in Oshkosh.” It has a unique atmosphere that appeals to clients both young and old in the Oshkosh area. Whether you’re looking for a place to watch the game, eat a meal, or you just need to hide from your boss, Pete’s Garage Bar is the place for you.
– Pete’s has offered this prime rib quadruple bacon cheeseburger challenge for many years now.
– There are four big juicy 1/3 pound beef burger patties and 2 giant slabs of Wisconsin prime rib.
– There are 8 slices of cheese, 8 strips of pork bacon, and lots of healthy grilled mushrooms and onions all served on 2 hamburger buns. The challenge includes a large basket of fries too.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. The beer drank during the video was optional.
– Winners earn the $40 burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Pete’s Wall of Fame.

title: AJ’s Insanity Chicken Wing Challenge
address: S90 W13970 Boxhorn Dr, Muskego, WI 53150
description:
– You must finish 10 wings drenched in their “Insanity Sauce”
– There is a 15 minute time limit + 5 minute “afterburn” period
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Willie Beamon’s “Mad Cow” Burger Challenge
description:
– Willie Beamon’s has been serving the Neenah, Wisconsin area since 2003! The menu is delicious!!
– Willie Beamon’s is huge with pool tables and more, attached to a baseball/softball complex!!
– Willie Beamon’s is famous for this giant “Mad Cow” Burger Challenge with a 30 minute time limit.
– There is a giant 2.5lb juicy beef burger patty covered with Cheddar cheese slices on a huge bun.
– There are lots of healthy vegetables – tomatoes, pickles, onions, and lettuce.
– The challenge includes a large basket of French fries or tater tots. Maybe even green beans??
– Winners earn the $25 cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Zesty’s 20 Scoop Custard Challenge
description:
– 20 scoops of chocolate or vanilla frozen custard
– Whipped cream & hot fudge
– 2 cookies and 2 cones
– Sprinkles & a cherry on top
– The sundae weighs 5.5 lbs
– There is a 1 hour time limit
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– $15 gift card
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Gronk’s Grill’s 8lb “Great Divide” Team Burger Challenge
description:
– There are SIX 1 pound beef hamburger patties. Each is basically 3 of their 1/3 lb burgers smashed together.
– There are three slices of cheese added to each stacked burger patty, so there are 18 cheese slices total.
– No bacon required. Challengers must finish 2 pounds of Gronk’s hand-cut fries surrounding the burger.
– Teams of two people have 1 hour to finish everything, or you can also try to finish it all by yourself, solo!!
– Winners get the $49.11 cheeseburger meal free (8lbs total) plus t-shirts and a photo on the Wall of Fame.
– Click here to check out Gronk’s website challenge page that also lists their solo “Enger Tower” Challenge.

title: The Longhorn Saloon’s Sandwich Challenge
description:
– This 2′ sandwich has lots of burger patties and cheese
– It is served with fries and the challenge weighs 7 lbs
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: The Jolly Roger’s 26″ Pizza Challenge
address: 220 W N Water St, New London, WI 54961
description:
– Jolly Roger’s Pizzeria has been serving the New London, Wisconsin area for over 28 years now!!
– For this food challenge, you must finish a 26-inch diameter pizza with 1 topping of your choosing.
– For the base pizza challenge, there is a 1 hour time limit for 1 person to finish the entire 26″ pizza.
– You can order more toppings if you are feeling cocky like Randy was, but extra toppings are optional.
– Each pizza is made with 2lbs of dough, 1.5lbs of pizza sauce, and 2lbs of Wisconsin mozzarella cheese.
– Winners of the base pizza challenge earn the $25 pizza free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame.
– If a guy can walk in and beat the men’s time/speed record, he earns an additional $100 cash!!
– If a girl can beat the women’s time/speed record, she earns an additional $100 cash!!
– You do not need to call ahead and schedule your challenge if interested. Walk in and try it!!

title: Ward’s House of Prime Rib Wall of Fame Challenge
description:
– Ward’s House of Prime in downtown Milwaukee, Wisconsin is well known for serving up delicious and juicy prime rib, and they can serve you as much as you want to order!! Order and finish more than 40 ounces of prime rib and eat it within one sitting, and get your name added to their Wall of Fame, categorized by how much you finish, in 8oz increments (note: the weights include bone).
– Molly Schuyler has the overall quantity record which is 360 ounces, or 22.5 pounds.
– Randy Santel has the #2 highest amount, which is 208 ounces, or 13 pounds.
– Finish 216 ounces or more within one sitting and earn your prime rib dinner FREE, and get your image turned into a caricature which gets added to the Wall of Fame, hanging up in the restaurant.

title: AJ O’Brady’s Burger Challenge Tuesday
address: N88W16495 Main St, Menomonee Falls, WI 53051
description:
– 2 lbs of beef with 2 toppings of your choice
– 1 side of your choice
– There is a 22 minute time limit
– This challenge is only offered on the first Tuesday of each month
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: WeatherVane’s “Tsunami” Breakfast Omelette Challenge
description:
– WeatherVane offers breakfast and lunch in the historic district of downtown Menasha, WI.
– Hundreds of people have tried this breakfast omelet challenge with only 6 winners (as of 5/4/2022).
– The breakfast omelet has 6 fresh eggs plus 3 breakfast meats – ham, sausage, and bacon.
– There are 4 Wisconsin cheeses – Swiss, American, Cheddar, and Pepper Jack Cheese.
– Lots of healthy vegetables – tomatoes, green peppers, onions, spinach, and mushrooms.
– A flour tortilla helps keep all the ingredients together. The omelette has 14 ingredients total!!
– The breakfast challenge includes 1+lb of hash browns, 2 pieces of toast, and 4 large pancakes.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Call ahead in advance if you are interested.
– Winners receive the $30 breakfast meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Luigi’s “Football” Team Pizza Challenge (Menasha)
description:
– There are many different individually-owned Luigi’s Pizza & Pasta locations around Wisconsin.
– Luigi’s in Menasha, WI offers this 32″x16″ football-shaped pizza as a challenge for 2 people.
– 2 brave teammates have 1 hour to eat the pizza covered with at least 3 hefty pizza toppings.
– In the video, Randy & Katina ordered their Philly Cheesesteak specialty pizza with red pizza sauce.
– It had authentic ribeye meat plus lots of onions, green peppers, and mushrooms (the “works”).
– The base was covered with mozzarella cheese, and it was all topped with Swiss cheese slices.
– You are welcome to order a specialty pizza too, or make your own 3-topping pizza to enjoy!!
– Winners receive the $50 pizza free plus sweet t-shirts, $100 and team photo on Luigi’s Wall of Fame.

title: Marge’s Bill’s 6lb Breakfast Burrito Challenge
description:
– This is basically their Unk’s Mess Challenge wrapped in a tortilla
– A huge burrito filled with tasty breakfast foods totaling 6 pounds
– Eggs, hashbrowns, meats, green peppers, onions, and cheese
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win the challenge
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Marge’s Unk’s Mess Breakfast Challenge
description:
– A huge tasty pile of breakfast foods totaling 5.5 pounds
– Eggs, hashbrowns, meats, green peppers, onions, and cheese
– It is served with toast and it all must be finished in one sitting
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Black Otter’s “Extreme Cut” 160oz Prime Rib Challenge
where: Bob & Geri's Black Otter Supper Club
description:
– Bob & Geri’s Black Otter Supper Club has operated in Hortonville, Wisconsin for many years!!
– There is an all-you-can-eat salad bar and it’s one of the top supper clubs in all of Wisconsin!!
– Black Otter Supper Club offers a “Super Cut” 116oz Prime Rib Challenge along with this one.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish this “Extreme Cut” 160oz Prime Rib Steak Challenge.
– There are 4 bones included as part of this 160oz challenge. FYI the 116oz challenge has just 3 bones.
– There are no other side items or beverages required. You just have to finish all the prime rib.
– You can order an optional salad and baked potato with your meal, but those are not required.
– Winners still pay $123 for the meal, but they win a $20 gift certificate to come and use later.
– More importantly, prime rib champions earn a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Black Otter’s “Super Cut” 116oz Prime Rib Challenge
where: Bob & Geri's Black Otter Supper Club
description:
– You must finish a 116 oz slab of prime rib (that weight includes 3 bones).
– You must finish the prime rib. Sides (salad and baked potato) are optional.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish everything. Win before you begin!!
– Black Otter offer’s an “Extreme Cut” 160 oz prime rib challenge too!!
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge.

title: The Big Bad Beezer Burger Challenge
description:
– 2 lb burger patty topped with cheese & vegetables
– Served with sides of potatoes and coleslaw
– The 3.5 lb meal has a 30 minute time limit
– Free T-shirt
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Champions’ Gravedigger Burger Challenge
address: W16751 Pow Pow Ln, Galesville, WI 54630
description:
– Three pounds of ground beef on a 12″ bun plus toppings
– There is a massive pile of crispy golden waffle fries
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the 5 lb meal
– Proceeds benefit men’s breast cancer research
– Free T-shirt
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Mulligans Irish Pub’s “Paddy’s Lament” Burger Challenge
description:
– 3 lb beef patty plus 1 lb corned beef
– It is loaded with cheese & vegetables
– The burger is served with a pile of fries
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish it all
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Wausau)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Appleton)
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Big Milwaukee Burger Challenge (Eau Claire)
address: 2620 E Clairemont Ave, Eau Claire, WI 54701
description:
– There are 7 Milwaukee Burger Company locations all around Wisconsin offering this challenge.
– There are 8 one-third pound juicy beef burger patties cooked to your liking, stacked up high.
– Each juicy burger patty gets a slice of American cheese and there are lots of other toppings.
– Milwaukee Burger Co’s signature sauce is added on top with 2 giant cheddar cheese curds.
– No sides are included, and there is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything on your plate.
– Winners still pay $23 for the meal but get a sweet t-shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame!!
– You do not need to call ahead. Just walk in and try the challenge at the location nearest you!!

title: The Timeline Saloon Burger Challenge
description:
– A 7lb patty served with lots of toppings on a gigantic bun
– The burger is actually 12lbs but you just have to finish the meat
– Ride on timeline motorcycle
– Picture on Wall of Fame
– Note: Meal not free or discounted

title: Sangria’s Mexican Grill’s 7lb Grande Burrito Challenge
description:
– Sangria’s Mexican Grill has been serving the Appleton, Wisconsin area since back in 2008.
– This fully loaded 7 lb wet burrito challenge has been available for many of those 23+ years.
– There are 4 large tortillas filled with your choice of meat plus Mexican rice and refried beans.
– You can order your burrito with ground beef, juicy pulled chicken, or a half and half mix of both.
– The burrito is stuffed with 1lb of mozzarella cheese and topped with Red & Ranchero Sauces.
– It is topped with queso fresco cheese and pico de gallo served with sour cream & guacamole.
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish the 7 pound burrito plus sides of rice and refried beans.
– Winners earn the $28 Mexican food meal free plus a spot on Sangria’s Wall of Fame (no shirt).
(Note: It is no longer advertised on the menu. Call ahead and schedule your challenge if interested.)

title: Prime Quarter’s 40oz “Beefeater” Steak Challenge (Janesville)
description:
– There are three Prime Quarter Steak House locations in Wisconsin and Princeton, Illinois.
– Their famous 40oz Beefeater Steak Challenge has been attempted thousands of times.
– Brave challengers must finish a 40oz “Beefeater” sirloin steak along with a piece of Texas toast, a baked potato, and a side salad made from their popular all you can eat salad bar.
– There is a 75 minute time limit to finish the base challenge. Winners still pay $42 for the steak dinner but they get a Prime Quarter medallion that they can bring back anytime for a $35 credit off their next meal.
– Please note: There are TWO “Beefeater” Steak Challenges pictured. The challenge is to finish just one.

title: Prime Quarter’s 40oz “Beefeater” Steak Challenge (Green Bay)
address: 2610 S Oneida St, Green Bay, WI 54304
description:
– There are three Prime Quarter Steak House locations in Wisconsin and Princeton, Illinois.
– Their famous 40oz Beefeater Steak Challenge has been attempted thousands of times.
– Brave challengers must finish a 40oz “Beefeater” sirloin steak along with a piece of Texas toast, a baked potato, and a side salad made from their popular all you can eat salad bar.
– There is a 75 minute time limit to finish the base challenge. Winners still pay $42 for the steak dinner but they get a Prime Quarter medallion that they can bring back anytime for a $35 credit off their next meal.
– Please note: There are TWO “Beefeater” Steak Challenges pictured. The challenge is to finish just one.

title: Jacz’s Team Ice Cream Challenge
description:
– Jacz Drive-in in Etna, WY offers 2 food challenges (This one and a burger challenge).
– Note: This challenge is only available seasonally, as this restaurant is open seasonally.

title: Craves’ “The Karen” Burrito Challenge
description: – Winners will receive $250!

title: Benny’s 28-inch Pizza Challenge (Casper)
description:
– Benny’s Pizza has many locations, with most offering a 28-inch pizza challenge!!
– Note: The challenge is now the same for both amateurs and professionals, but the cash prize is different.

title: Jacz’s 3lb Burger Challenge
description:
– Jacz Drive-in in Etna, WY offers 2 food challenges (This one and a team ice cream sundae challenge).
– Note: This challenge is only available seasonally, as this restaurant is open seasonally.

title: Uncle Louie’s 6lb Burger Challenge (Sundance)
description:
– Uncle Louie’s Diner has 3 locations with each having this burger challenge available.
– The challenge consists of a tower of a cheeseburger with onion rings and fries.

title: Absaroka Lodge’s “Mountain Man” Burger Challenge
description:
– Contestants have one sitting to finish this 3lb burger challenge.
– This challenge is only available seasonally, as the lodge is only open certain times of the year (Mid-May through the start of October is a safe bet to visit but call ahead).
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you are able to complete it.

title: Boot Hill’s Legendary 5lb Steak Challenge
where: Boot Hill Legendary Nightclub & Sports Bar
description:
– The challenge features a 5 lb rib-eye steak that is char grilled.
– For this challenge, it is served with a side salad and bread roll.
– There is a 75 minute time limit to finish the entire challenge.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Born in a Barn’s “Born” Burger Challenge
where: Born in a Barn - Wings, Burgers, Beer
description:
– The Born Burger includes fourteen 1/2 beef patties, lettuce, onion, burger sauce, and cheese all on a bun.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour including, the 1 lb of fries and 32 oz soda.
– There is also a wing challenge available at this restaurant if you are interested.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Abuelita’s 7lb Monster Burrito Challenge
description:
– This gigantic burrito weighs over 7 lbs and is almost 2 feet long.
– It includes four 14-inch tortillas, 2 lbs of beef, beans, cheese, sour cream, guacamole, and cheddar cheese.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour.
– Free Meal
– $100 gift certificate

title: Ken & Betty’s BellyAche Ice Cream Challenge
where: Ken & Betty's Main Street Ice Cream
description:
– There are 10 scoops of ice cream complete with 10 toppings.
– Whipped cream and cherries are also added on each scoop.
– Everything must be finished in one sitting to win.
– Free Meal
– Free T-shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: JC Burgers’ Bearry Freez Malt Challenge
description:
– You must finish 5 malts within the 20 minute time limit
– You can choose the flavors and each malt is 24 oz
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame
– One free meal per month for the next 6 months

title: JC Burgers’ Ring Of Fire Burger Challenge
description:
– 16 beef burger patties totaling 2 pounds
– 2 pounds of green chilies & other peppers
– Served on French loaf with mozzarella cheese
– There is 2 pounds of French fries included
– You have 30 minutes to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame
– One free meal per month for the next 6 months

title: Thornlie Sports Bar’s Burger Eating Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of a stacked burger with 4 beef patties, each of which are topped with bacon and cheese.
– In addition to the burger, there is a side of onion rings, chicken bites, chicken wings, and chips.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish the entire burger and all the sides. Winners get a $50 bar tab voucher.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Cedar & Stone Woodfired Pizza Bar’s 6 “Suicide” Wings Challenge
address: 13/685 Old Cleveland Rd E, Wellington Point QLD 4160, Australia
description:
– Cedar & Stone Woodfired Pizza Bar is home to a spicy chicken wings challenge. The challenge involves six different sauces of varying increasing spice level – Buffalo, Sriracha, Mango Habanero, Green Dragon, Sweet & Sour Suicide, and Black Death. The Sweet & Sour Suicide and Black Death are made with Carolina Reapers.
– Challengers have a short 6 minute time limit to eat all 6 wings without anything to drink.
– Following completion of the final wing with Black Death sauce, there is a 60 second waiting period before the win is declared and the challenger can drink something.
– Winners get a restaurant voucher or merchandise credit.
– NOTE: The meal is not free or discounted upon completion.

title: Ninth Street’s “Down The Dog” 32-Inch Loaded Hot Dog Challenge
description: The hot dog challenge consists of a 2 kg loaded hot dog served with 1 kg of chips. There is a 32-inch long French baguette sliced open and filled with 4-5 hot dogs / sausages, topped with homemade chili, cheese sauce, healthy onions, jalapenos, tomato slices, scallions, and then ketchup and mustard. There are no drinks or desserts required. Finish within 30 minutes and earn the $49 AUD meal free plus a sweet T-Shirt, Certificate of Completion, $50 AUD gift voucher to come back and use later, and spot on Ninth Street’s Wall of Fame.

title: Hashtag Burgers and Waffles’ 20-Minute Burger Challenge
address: Shop 3/477 Brunswick St, Fortitude Valley QLD 4006, Australia
description: There are 2 Australian smash burger patties stacked and layered with cheese and bacon, plus a fried waffle, 2 fried macaroni and cheese patties, and 2 fried chicken thighs. The towering burger also has lots of healthy vegetables and a few different sauces. The challenge includes a large order of loaded chips plus a thick deluxe Chocolate Brownie Milkshake for dessert. Finish within the 20 minute time limit and win the $55 AUD meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame. Please schedule your “Hashtag” Burger Challenge in advance if interested!!

title: Phat Boyz’ 3.5kg Monster BBQ Sandwich Challenge
description: The actual name of this challenge is the Monster Burger Challenge, because Australians call anything between a hamburger bun, whether it is beef, fish, chicken, pork, or anything else… a burger. To keep things consistent with the rest of the site, we’ve called it the Monster BBQ Sandwich Challenge, or “sanga” as they say for sandwich in Australia. There is a 45 minute time limit to feast on 1 kg of Phat Boyz’ halal smoked beef brisket plus 1 kg of their juicy pulled pork with lots of bacon too. The sandwich is topped with American cheese slices, 4 fried eggs, and 100 g of creamy coleslaw, all on 600 g of freshly baked bun that is 30 cm in diameter. No sides are included. Finish within 45 minutes and win the $100 AUD BBQ sanga free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Phat Boyz’ Wall of Fame!! Please schedule your challenge in advance if you are interested in trying it!!

title: Berry Springs Tavern’s “Parmageddon” 1.5kg Parmy Challenge
address: 795 Cox Peninsula Rd, Berry Springs NT 0838, Australia
description:
– Thou shall eat a 1.5kg parmy plus chips and salad in thirty minutes or less.
– Winners get the parmy meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame!!
– CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT ALL THE RULES ON THEIR WEBSITE!!

title: Lisa’s Lunch Bar’s Giant Malaysian Laksa Soup Challenge
description: There is a 35 minute time limit to feast on a huge supersized bowl of Malaysian style laksa noodle soup filled with lots of egg noodles, vermicelli rice noodles, healthy vegetables, and 4 proteins – chicken, pork, beef, and tofu. There were 6 giant ladles of laksa broth made with coconut milk, and I even added some spicy diced peppers that were optional. I was trying to become the first champion to finish the whole bowl of soup within 35 minutes to win my $60 AUD Malaysian food meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Lisa’s Wall of Fame.

title: District North Kitchen’s 2kg “Top G” Burger Challenge (Palmerston)
description:
District North Kitchen (DNK) offers 4 different pay-to-play burger challenges, varying in size, with the largest being their 2kg “Top G” Burger Challenge which has a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. The chips/fries served with the burger are just optional. The burger itself weighs around 4.5lbs/2kg and consists of 3 smashed Australian beef hamburger patties, 3 Bookvale Union Ginger Beer Battered Chicken patties, 3 fried chicken schnitzel patties, beef brisket, pork belly, healthy lettuce, tomatoes, 6 slices of bacon, pineapple slices, beetroot, 3 Cheddar cheese slices, Cheddar cheese sauce, Captain Morgan rum barbecue sauce, DNK House Sauce, caramelized onions, and pickles, all between a normal sized hamburger bun. The fried onion rings served on top are required, but the chips/fries served below are not. You pay $100 AUD whether you win or not, but champions who finish within 30 minutes earn a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.
Note: The burger challenges are only available at the Palmerston location east of Darwin, NT.

title: Mack Daddy’s “Big Clug’s” 22-Inch New York Pizza Challenge
where: Mack Daddy's New York Slice Pizza
address: 560 Beaufort St, Mount Lawley WA 6050, Australia
timeLimit: You MUST set a top #5 time!!
description:
– The contender can pick between the 22″ Tony’s Pepperoni or 22″ Mama Mack’s Margherita (Vegetarian).
– Any contender that eats a 22” pizza of choice in one of the top 5 times will go on the WALL OF PIZZA LEGENDS and get a $50 Mack Daddy’s Voucher.
– $5 from every competition pizza will go to Liam James Mclaughlin Memorial Ltd.
– CLICK HERE FOR MORE 22″ PIZZA CHALLENGE RULES AND DETAILS!!

title: Mack Daddy’s Monster 28-Inch New York Pizza Challenge
where: Mack Daddy's New York Slice Pizza
address: 560 Beaufort St, Mount Lawley WA 6050, Australia
description: Brave challengers have just 45 minutes to feast on a 28″ diameter pizza that weighs around 7.5lbs or 3.5kg total. You can get 1 set of toppings on the whole pizza, or you can split the toppings into 1/2, 1/3, or even 1/4 sections for lots of variety. Winners get the $99 AUD pizza meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame. CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THEIR WEBSITE 28″ CHALLENGE PAGE!! If this 28″ pizza challenge sounds a little too BIG for you, they also have a smaller “Big Clug’s” 22-Inch Pizza Challenge.

title: Foodie Boutique Perth’s 2.5kg Conti Roll Sandwich Challenge
description: There is a 45 minute time limit to feast on a giant supersized continental sandwich roll that featured a 700 g freshly baked bread roll with 4 different deli meats – sliced Hungarian salami, prosciutto, Mortadella, and ham. There are 2 layers of sliced Cheddar cheese, and the sandwich also included healthy mixed leaf lettuce, artichokes, and Caponata with eggplant. Those who finish in less than 45 minutes earn the $75 AUD continental roll free plus a sweet T-shirt, $150 AUD cash, and a spot on the Wall of Fame. Beat the current time record and they will double the prize money up to $300 AUD cash.

title: Seacliff Beach Hotel’s Rotating Monthly Food Challenges
description: Seacliff Beach Hotel offers a different man vs food challenge each month, so contact them or follow on social media to see what eating challenge is currently being offered. Randy Santel was there while they offered a 2ft long deli meat sandwich challenge, as seen in the photos used. There was a one sitting time limit for the sandwich challenge, but rules might vary depending on the monthly rotating challenge.

title: Remy’s “Royal Rumble” Chicago Style Deep Dish Pizza Challenge
address: 2-10 No Fixed Address Lane, Adelaide SA 5000, Australia
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to finish a 12″ diameter Chicago style deep dish pizza with the toppings of your choosing. You are encouraged to choose just 1 set of toppings to make things easier, but Remy’s can split it into halves as well, like Randy and Katina each did. The challenge includes a large basket of chips / fries, and challengers must also finish a full 1-liter beer of their choosing. If you do no or cannot drink beer / alcohol, substitutions are possible, and contact the restaurant about that and to schedule your challenge. Winners receive the $65 AUD pizza meal free plus a sweet T-Shirt and spot on Remy’s Wall of Fame.

title: CREAM’s Fried Chicken and Hotcakes Breakfast Challenge
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to feast on 1kg of hotcakes batter broken up into 6 delicious similar-sized hotcakes, which are a bit thicker than normal pancakes, and more “cakey.” The hotcakes are stacked and layered with 20 strips of maple bacon total, and the stack is topped and surrounded with over 500 grams of hand-breaded fried chicken tenders. You must finish both ramekins of syrup along with a coffee drink or milkshake from the menu. A Milo chocolate milkshake is included in the photos. Winners receive the $65 breakfast meal free plus a sweet T-Shirt and spot on CREAM’s Wall of Fame.

title: The Famished Wolf’s “Skyscraper” Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge (Croydon)
description: There are multiple Famished Wolf locations around the greater Melbourne, Victoria area, and they can each offer this challenge if you call ahead or email them in advance to schedule your 15-Patty “Skyscraper” Burger Challenge. Brave challengers get a quick 20 minute time limit to eat a giant towering cheeseburger that consists of 15 Australian beef hamburger patties, stacked and layered with 15 slices of cheese and 30 pieces of bacon. It is all served on top of one piece of healthy lettuce, and it is topped with The Famished Wolf’s Burger Sauce. Winners receive the $85 AUD cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet T-Shirt and spot on the location’s Wall of Fame. Contact The Famished Wolf restaurant location nearest you for more details!!

Beat the current time record for the challenge and you also get your name up on a special plaque!! title: Twelve Boar’s Ever-Increasing Burger Challenge
description:
Twelve Boar would like to introduce to you a glutton’s dream: The EIBC. That’s “The Ever-Increasing Burger Challenge” for the lay man. A burger challenge that increases by 100 grams each time it is beaten – UNTIL the bar is set so high, we will search the flat earth ‘til we find someone to set a new record.
Starting at a humble 2kg, this sucker will grow till she can’t grow no more.
This colossal burger consists of delicious slow-smoked pulled pork and beef brisket, crispy onion rings, house-made BBQ sauce and fresh cut ‘slaw in a creamy dressing. You can wash it down with as much of our famous Iced Tea or Pink Lemonade you want – and you have 40 minutes to complete the challenge!
3 Challengers compete at the same time; dates are set as challengers are confirmed.
10% of profits on sales each challenger evening are donated to a local charity.

title: Batch 69’s Cookie Speed Challenge
description:
