title: Hungry Dane’s 2.5kg Double 5-Stack “Royal” Burger Challenge
description: Hungry Dane Burgers created this 2.5 kg (5.5 lbs) Double 5-Stack Danish Wagyu Beef Burger Challenge that includes 500 grams of fries, which all must be finished within 45 minutes to win. Each burger consists of five 150 gram ground wagyu beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with cheddar cheese slices, pickles, a homemade relish, and lots of sauces. There are 10 patties total which equals 1.5 kg (3.3 lbs) of wagyu beef alone!! The two 1 kg “Royal” Burgers are served with 500 grams of double-dipped gourmet chips/fries and there is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the 434 DKK (~$64 USD) cheeseburger meal free plus some sweet Hungry Dane Burgers merch and a spot on their Wall of Fame. If you beat the current time record (9:04 as of 8/13/2025), you also win 750 DKK in cash as well, in addition to all the base prizes!! Please call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance if interested!! *Please note that you can also try to eat just one of the 5-patty burgers within 3 minutes. Do that and you’ll get your burger free!!

title: Dirty Ranch Steakhouse’s 1kg Veal “Weinerschnitzler” Challenge
description:
Each “Weinerschnitzler” Challenge platter includes a 1kg (2.2lbs) veal schnitzel served with potatoes, peas, your choice of dipping sauce, and “Wiener Boy” which consists of capers, raw horseradish, lemons, and anchovies. The challenge includes a 1-liter beverage of your choice and everything must be finished within 1.5 hours or 90 minutes. The challenge is only available on Tuesday evenings and this is a pay-to-play eating challenge that is not free whether you win or lose. Champions earn a Certificate of Completion proclaiming their victory!!
*Please note that there are TWO challenge meals featured in the photo above!!
CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE ABOUT THEIR 3-COURSE STEAK DINNER CHALLENGE!!

title: Dirty Ranch Steakhouse’s 3-Course Danish Steak Challenge
description:
– This challenge comes in three (3) delicious phases: appetizer, second course, and main (entree) course.
– The “appetizer” includes 200g of beef tenderloin, sides, and your choice of 0.5 L drink (beer or soda).
– The “second course” includes 300g of ribeye steak with sides and your choice of 0.5 L drink (beer or soda).
– The “main course” includes 500g of grilled T-bone steak with sides and your choice of 1 L drink (beer or soda).
– Everything must be finished within 2 hours (120 minutes) to win this 3-course Danish steak challenge!!
– Certificate of Completion
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.
CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE ABOUT THEIR 1KG VEAL SCHNITZEL CHALLENGE ON TUESDAYS!!

title: Hungry Boys’s 3.5kg BBQ Burrito Challenge
address: The Plough, 74 West St, Farnham GU9 7EH, United Kingdom
description:
– This giant burrito is stuffed with 1kg short ribs, 1kg smash patties with cheese and bacon over the top, 500g mac and cheese, 500g salted fries, 8 tortilla wraps, and 400g cheese crust.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish the entire burrito. Winners get the meal for free, bragging rights, and naming rights of the burrito.

title: Patty Freaks’ “Atlas” Cheeseburger Challenge
address: City Arcade, Lichfield, England WS13 6LY, UK
description: This beautiful and delicious, well-presented craft burger challenge is modeled off of the “Atlas Stones” event, involved in most strongman competitions. It was made famous by being part of the World’s Strongest Man competition. There is a 45 minute time limit to eat five beef and chicken burgers from Patty Freaks’ regular and secret menu. They are each stacked on a different pillar, varying in height. Burger #1, the “Cheesy McChick,” is made with one fried chicken thigh patty. Burger #2, the “Sticky Thigh,” is made with two fried chicken thigh patties. Burger #3, the “Sweet Freak,” is made with 3 quarter-pound beef smash burger patties plus three stroopwafels, some chili jam, and more. The fourth “McHattan” Burger has four smash hamburger patties, and the fifth “Dirty South” Burger has five smashed burger patties. There are no sides or drinks included that must be finished as part of the challenge. Finish everything within 45 minutes and win the £50 gourmet cheeseburger meal free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on The Patty Freaks’ Wall of Fame!! Be sure to win before you begin!!

title: Copper Kettle Cafe’s “666” Full English Breakfast Challenge
address: South Leicester Industrial Estate, 13a South St, Ellistown, Coalville, England LE67 1EU, UK

title: 1950’s American Diner’s “Mac Mountain” Mac & Cheese Challenge
address: John St, Church Gresley, Swadlincote, England DE11 8EJ, UK
description: There is a 40 minute time limit to eat 3.4 kg of creamy macaroni & cheese topped with 500 grams of hot honey fried chicken tenders and two homemade sweet waffles split into four halves. It all together weighs 8.8 lbs or 4 kg total. Winners earn the £40 feast free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame hanging up inside the restaurant!! Note that there is also a “Double Dogged” 24-Inch Loaded Hot Dog Challenge available, too!!

title: 1950’s American Diner’s “Double Dogged” Hot Dog Challenge
address: John St, Church Gresley, Swadlincote, England DE11 8EJ, UK
description:
There is a 30 minute time limit to eat two 12″ footlong hot dogs. One is loaded with pulled pork and the other is topped with chili beef and nacho cheese sauce!! 1950’s American Diner offers five different side options (coleslaw, fries, Boston baked beans, macaroni & cheese, and/or onions rings), and challengers must choose three of them to finish along with the hot dogs, all within 30 minutes. Winners earn the £40 feast free plus a sweet T-shirt and spot on their Wall of Fame hanging up inside the restaurant!!
Please note that there is also an 8.8 lb / 4 kg “Mac Mountain” Mac & Cheese Challenge available, too!!

title: The Honey Bee’s 48oz “Titanic” Rump Steak Challenge
address: Doverdale Ln, Droitwich, England WR9 0QB, UK
description: The Honey Bee is one of six King George’s Taverns. We are not sure if all six offer this same steak challenge. There is a one sitting time limit to feast on a 48 oz / 3 lbs / 1.36 kg English rump steak served with some chips, a scoop of peas, and half of a tomato. This is a pay-to-play food eating challenge, so you must pay £43.95 for the steak dinner whether you win or lose. Champions earn a sweet Certificate of Completion, a pin proclaiming their victory, and a spot on The Honey Bee’s “Titanic” Wall of Fame!!

title: Grumpy’s Diner’s Four Man vs Food Challenges
address: 759 Southchurch Rd, Southend-on-Sea, England SS1 2PP, UK
description: Grumpy’s Diner offers four different food challenges, as of January 12, 2026. They could rotate or change at some point, so please contact the restaurant to see what challenges are currently being offered.

title: Dough Daddy’s 24-Inch Pizza Challenge
address: 34-36 Streatham High Rd, London, England SW16 1DB, UK
description: Challengers have just 30 minutes to eat a 2-topping 24″ diameter pizza. You get to choose the toppings and there are no other sides or beverages required to be finished as part of the base challenge. Finish and win the £26 pizza free plus a spot on Dough Daddy’s Wall of Fame!! Please schedule your challenge in advance!!

title: Camden BBQ’s “Man V Ribs” Fully Loaded Challenge
address: 18 Chalk Farm Rd, London, England NW1 8AG, UK
description: There are two giant Memphis-style racks of BBQ pork ribs served over 1 kilogram total of “Fully Loaded” Fries topped with macaroni and cheese, smoked pulled pork, and pickled jalapenos, plus more. There are no other sides or beverages required. Finish within the very short 30 minute time limit and win the £50 barbecue feast free plus a spot on Camden BBQ’s Wall of Fame!! This is a very tough challenge, so win before you begin!!

title: The Woods’s “OMG Step” Burger Challenge
address: 55-59 Portland Rd, Worthing BN11 1QG, United Kingdom
description:
– This challenge consists of a six patty cheese and bacon burger, an order of their porki boi fries (fries covered in BBQ pulled pork, caramelized onions, cheese sauce, and garlic mayo), and an order of mozzarella sticks.
– If the challenge is finished in one sitting, the winner receives a free beer or wine.
– If the challenge is finished in under 15 minutes, the winner gets a picture on the wall of fame.
– If the challenge is finished in under 10 minutes, the meal is also free.

title: Django’s Smokehouse’s “Man vs. Django’s” BBQ Challenge
description:
– Django’s Smokehouse has two different food challenges – a spicy wings challenge and a BBQ challenge.
– The BBQ challenge requires pre-booking. So make sure to contact the restaurant ahead of time to ensure you have a spot to try the challenge.
– The BBQ challenge consists of pork spare ribs, a double up beef smash burger, an order of pulled pork loaded fries, an order of Django’s BBQ wings and sides of Mac and cheese, onion rings, and house slaw.
– Challengers have a 45-minute time limit to finish the entire BBQ platter.
– Participation comes with a few important rules. Challenges are for one person only—no assistance allowed. You must remain seated throughout the challenge, and there are no bathroom breaks permitted. Ribs and wings must be cleaned of meat, and any vomiting results in immediate disqualification.
– Winners get the meal for free, bragging rights, a sweet t-shirt, a £50 Django’s voucher, and your photo on Django’s Wall of Fame! Fail and you’ll find your photo on the Wall of Shame instead.
Check out Django’s Smokehouse’s Food Challenges on their website!

title: Django’s Smokehouse’s 6 “Danger” Wings Challenge
description:
– Django’s Smokehouse has two different food challenges – a spicy wings challenge and a BBQ challenge.
– The spicy wing challenge is available on Wing Wednesdays only and requires pre-booking. So make sure to contact the restaurant ahead of time to ensure you have a spot to try the challenge.
– These wings are not for the faint-hearted—they’re coated in a fiery sauce made with chili extract at a scorching 6.4 million Scoville units, combined with other potent chilis.
– Challengers have a 10-minute time limit to eat all 6 wings without anything to drink. As a safety requirement, all challengers are required to wear gloves and goggles. The restaurant staff will determine if there has been enough meat eaten off the bone.
– Following completion of the final wing, there is a 5-minute afterburn period. No drinks, no wiping your mouth, and no leaving the table.
– Winners get the meal for free, bragging rights, a sweet t-shirt, a £50 Django’s voucher, and your photo on Django’s Wall of Flame! Fail and you’ll find your photo on the Wall of Pain instead.
Check out Django’s Smokehouse’s Food Challenges on their website!

title: Dirty D’s “Dirty Dozen” Doughnuts Challenge
address: 4 Church Walk, Malvern, England WR14 2XH, UK
description: Brave challengers have just 1 hour (60 minutes) to eat 12 (1 dozen) doughnuts, one of each flavor offered at the time you try the challenge. You must also finish a milkshake and winners get the £30 meal free plus a spot on Dirty D’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Greyhound Inn At Yarlet’s “Two Fat Fellows” Ultimate Challenge
address: Stone Rd, Yarlet, Stafford ST18 9SD, United Kingdom
description:
– This challenge consists of a massive 80-oz steak, chips, peas, 2 sides, and a baguette with butter.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the £49.95 meal for free.

title: Krispy Treats’ “4 Stack Waffle” Challenge
address: 13 North St, Wisbech PE13 1NP, United Kingdom
description:
– This challenge consists of a stack of 4 Belgian waffles with flavors of choice, along with 4 scoops of ice cream.
– There is a 20-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free and £30.

title: Krispy Treats’ “12 Donut” Challenge
description:
– This challenge consists of 12 donuts with 4 different flavors of choice.
– There is a 25-minute time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the meal for free and £25.

title: Cattlemans Steakhouse’s Bucket Challenge
address: The Parkers Arms TQ4 7DE Paignton, UK
description:
– This challenge consists of nearly 3 pounds of chips/fries, 2 pounds of chicken nuggets, and 1.5 pounds of onion rings, all topped with shredded cheese.
– There is a 1-hour time limit to complete the challenge.
– Winners receive the $37.70 meal for free, and $62 dollars in cash.

title: Doughnotts’ 14-Inch Monster Doughnut Challenge (Beeston)
address: 40 High Rd, Beeston, Nottingham, England NG9 2JP, UK
description:
– Doughnotts has 6 locations around the Midlands and this challenge can be made available at most of them if you call or email ahead of time to schedule your challenge. They need time to order and prepare the doughnut.
– Challengers have just 40 minutes to finish a massive 14″ diameter doughnut lathered with buttercream frosting and covered with toppings. If you have any allergies or don’t like a certain British candy bar, you must let them know ahead of time when you place your order. What Randy and Katina got was a little different than what previous British challengers received, so your set of toppings might vary too, depending on the season and what toppings they have available where the doughnuts are produced.
– They have a limited selection of coffees and milks available for you to drink with the challenge, and you can also bring your own if you want to, since you might need to drink a lot to get this massive doughnut down!!
– Winners get the £45 doughnut free plus a t-shirt and a spot on the Doughnotts location’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Take 5 Tea Room’s Mega English Breakfast Fry Up Challenge
address: 49 High St, Lincoln LN5 8AN, United Kingdom
description:
– Take 5 Tea Room Lincoln offers this Mega Breakfast Challenge along with an Afternoon Tea Challenge.
– You have 40 minutes to finish a giant breakfast fry up that is served on multiple plates to your table.
– Winners receive the £22 breakfast fry up meal free plus a coveted spot on their Wall of Fame.

title: Take 5 Tea Room’s “Mega Mix” British Afternoon Tea Challenge
address: 49 High St, Lincoln LN5 8AN, United Kingdom
description:
– Take 5 Tea Room has been proudly serving the Lincoln, Lincolnshire area for many years now.
– Take 5 Tea Room offers an English breakfast fry up challenge and this British afternoon tea.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything served on their double-layer serving platter.
– There are 4 sandwich halves – egg and mayo (egg salad), grated cheese, ham, and pulled pork.
– There are some healthy vegetables served like a salad on top with healthy fruit on the bottom.
– There is a Scotch egg, a sausage roll, a fruit scone, Quiche Lorraine, pork pies, and there is also a few crackers served with 2 different cheeses. The challenge includes a bowl of prawn crisps / chips and challengers must finish the sides of butter, fruit jam, and clotted cream.
– You cannot have afternoon tea without some cake, so there is a slice of caramel Millionaire’s Shortbread plus a French Fancy and piece of Cherry Bakewell cake. Challengers must also finish a cup of coffee or Yorkshire tea.
– Winners receive the £20 afternoon tea meal free plus a coveted spot on their Wall of Fame.

title: Beast Burger’s 20-Patty “Beard” Burger Challenge (Keelby)
where: Beast Burger UK (The Kings Head Keelby)
address: The Kings Head, 18 Victoria Rd, Keelby, Grimsby DN41 8EH, UK
description:
– Beast Burger has 3 restaurant locations in Grimsby, Keelby, and Hull, England, UK.
– Randy Santel attempted their “Beard” Smash Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge at the Grimsby, England restaurant which is located inside of Freeman Street Market.
– This Beast Burger (Keelby) restaurant is located inside The Kings Head in Keelby, Lincolnshire, England.
– This cheeseburger challenge is called the “Beard” Burger Challenge because it used to be a record food challenge, until Adam “Beard Meats Food” Moran went and smashed the previous record by eating TWENTY 3-4 oz smash burger patties stacked and layered with 40 slices of cheese and 20 rashers of English bacon, all topped with Beast Burger Sauce plus healthy onions and pickles.
– There is now a 30 minute time limit to finish this same 20-patty “Beard” Smash Bacon Cheeseburger.
– No sides or beverages are included or required. Finish in under 30 minutes and win the £30 burger free plus a spot on the Beast Burger location’s Wall of Fame. If you beat the current overall time record, you will also win £200 cash!! Unfortunately, winners do not also get a free sweet t-shirt.

title: Beast Burger’s 20-Patty “Beard” Burger Challenge (Hull)
address: Trinity Market, Lowgate, Hull, England HU1 2JH, UK
description:
– Beast Burger has 3 restaurant locations in Grimsby, Keelby, and Hull, England, UK.
– Randy Santel attempted their “Beard” Smash Bacon Cheeseburger Challenge at the Grimsby, England restaurant which is located inside of Freeman Street Market.
– This Beast Burger (Hull) restaurant is located inside Trinity Market in Hull, East Yorkshire, England.
– This cheeseburger challenge is called the “Beard” Burger Challenge because it used to be a record food challenge, until Adam “Beard Meats Food” Moran went and smashed the previous record by eating TWENTY 3-4 oz smash burger patties stacked and layered with 40 slices of cheese and 20 rashers of English bacon, all topped with Beast Burger Sauce plus healthy onions and pickles.

– Parmo, or Teesside Parmesan, is a dish originating in Middlesbrough, North Yorkshire, and a popular item of take-away food in the Teesside area. It consists of a breaded cutlet of chicken or pork topped with a white béchamel sauce and cheese, usually cheddar cheese.
– The Teesside Chicken Parmo is ranked by pro eater Randy Santel as England’s best tasting food!!
– The base challenge features 2 giant chicken parmos served with lots of chips plus mushrooms, some fried onion rings, and a bowl of healthy vegetable salad. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.

title: Muhoksen Autogrilli’s Finnish Burger Challenge
description: There is a 5.5 lb (2.5 kg) burger served with 2.2 lbs (1 kg) of fries, and everything must be finished within the 45 minute time limit. Winners get €200 cash and a spot on the Wall of Fame. (Note: We are not currently sure what the price is and whether or not the challenge is also free if you win.)

title: Herkkupaussi Oy’s Finnish Burger Challenge
description:
This food challenge consists of a big 1kg hamburger, a big loaded fries with your choice of toppings, onion rings, two 0.5 L (500 mL) soft drinks (1 L total), and two dipping sauces of your choosing. Topping options for the loaded fries include blue cheese & blue cheese mayo OR cheddar cheese & bacon OR jalapeno slices & jalapeno mayonnaise. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything, and you must remain at the table for the duration of the challenge. This is a pay-to-play challenge that costs €50 whether you win or lose.
Winners get a sweet t-shirt and picture on the Wall of Fame!!

title: Pizza Hour’s Five Neapolitan-Style Pizzas Challenge
description: There is a 35 minute time limit to finish FIVE Neapolitan-style pizzas from Pizza Hour’s menu. Finish all five pizzas within the 35 minute time limit and win the €75 pizza meal free plus €200 cash and a spot on Pizza Hour’s Wall of Fame!! The restaurant has offered a three pizzas challenge in the past as well, so contact them if you are more interested in that one instead. They can give you more details on which challenges are available.

title: Sauhu Bistro’s “Rekkamies 2.0” Eating Challenge
description: The challenge platter features 500 grams of BBQ pork ribs, a double cheeseburger, two orders of seasoned fries, 2 required dips of your choosing, 15 chicken wings, some coleslaw, 4 pieces of cheesy chorizo bread, and more!! There is a caramel ice cream cookie dessert, and you must also finish a 1/2 liter soda / fountain drink along the way. This is a pay-to-play challenge that costs €75 whether you win or lose. Finish within 45 minutes and win some sweet Sauhu merch plus a gift certificate to come back and use later, and spot on Sauhu’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Mike’s Diner’s Quadruple Burger Challenge
description: There is a one sitting time limit to eat four Finnish beef burger patties, stacked and layered with many different toppings. There are three layers of nacho chips, 2 fried eggs, and each patty is topped with pickled jalapenos, cheese, and strips of bacon. The whole burger is smothered with nacho cheese sauce and served with a side of garlic fries plus two sauces of your choosing. The challenge includes a flavored milkshake of your choosing and also a full 1-liter soft drink of your choosing. This is a pay-to-play challenge and it costs €39.90 whether you win or lose. Winners get a €20 gift certificate to come back and use later, plus a spot on Mike’s Diner’s Wall of Fame hanging up inside the restaurant. Note: You can just walk in and order this challenge without advanced notice.

title: Miller’s “Meat Impossible” Finnish BBQ Platter Challenge
description:
For the base challenge, there is a one hour time limit to feast on a giant platter of food that features lots of smoked BBQ meats and sides on Miller’s BBQ’s menu. There is lots of sausage, smoked beef brisket, beef cheek, and pork belly. As for sides, the base challenge features creamy macaroni & cheese (shells) topped with fried onions, fried potatoes, and coleslaw. Sauces of your choice are required, and challengers must also finish 1 liter of liquids, not including water (soda or beer). For dessert, you must finish 500 mL (0.5 L) of their vegan ice cream (your choice of flavor). Finish the base eating challenge within one hour (60 minutes) and earn the €140 Finnish barbeque meal free plus sweet merch and a spot on Miller’s BBQ’s “Meat Impossible” Wall of Fame.
Beat the fastest time and win an extra €100 cash in addition to all the base prizes!!
*Please note that in the image above, the chicken thigh, 1/2 rack of ribs, and piece of corn bread were just added as extras and were not required to be finished as part of the base challenge. The actual base challenge is pictured with Katina Eats Kilos below.

title: Puoti & Sumppila’s 5kg Karjalanpiirakka Rice Pasty Challenge
description: A karjalanpiirakka is a traditional Finnish food served with breakfast and also at other times of the day. There is lots of rice, butter, and more, wrapped inside a rye bread dough, baked in the oven. Oddly enough, the pasty gets covered with and egg and butter mixture. This whole team food challenge meant for two people to share weighs around 11lbs or 5kg, which includes a supersized Karelian Rice Pasty plus a mixture with 800 grams (1.76 lbs) of butter and 17 whole eggs served in a bowl on the side. You can distribute the egg butter mixture as you wish, but it all must be finished too within the 1 hour time limit. Winners still pay €70 for the meal, but get sweet t-shirts and a spot on Puoti & Sumppila’s Wall of Fame. If you beat the current time record for the challenge, you also get your whole meal free!! Note: Please contact the restaurant in advance to schedule your challenge if interested, since they will have to prepare it for you ahead of time.

title: Ravintola Karhunmäki’s Finnish Mixed Grill Challenge
description: There is a 3kg (6.5lbs) and also a 4kg (8.8lbs) Finnish mixed grill challenge available here. Only one person has attempted and beaten the 4kg challenge which is pictured. Multiple people have won the 3kg version which is the original challenge that Ravintola Karhunmäki started with. The 3kg version features 600 grams of grilled steak meat, 6oo grams of grilled chicken, and 600 grams of grilled marinated pork. Each meat comes with a potato side item, either creamy potatoes or fries. The 4kg version includes a 250 gram pork schnitzel served with more fries or creamy potatoes. The 4kg challenge meal costs €150 if you fail to finish everything within the 1 hour time limit, and the 3kg version costs a little less, but both challenges are free if you finish and you also get your named and photo added up on the Wall of Fame!!

title: John Scott’s Arkadia’s 2.5kg Fish and Chips Seafood Challenge
description: There are many John Scott’s locations around Finland, but this 2.5kg Fish and Chips Challenge is only available at John Scott’s Arkadia in Helsinki. There is a 45 minute time limit to eat 1.2kg (2.64lbs) of fried cod filets served over 1.3kg (2.86lbs) of chips, with some fresh grilled lemons and two optional tubs of tartar sauce. Finish everything within 45 minutes and win the €80 fish & chips meal free plus some merch and a spot on John Scott’s Arkadia’s Wall of Fame!! Note: Please call and schedule your challenge in advance if interested!!

title: Herkkules’ “Gunniagalleria 2.0” Finnish Brunch Food Challenge
description: There are two Herkkules restaurant locations in the Porvoo, Finland area and they both offer this “Gunniagalleria 2.0” Brunch Food Challenge. “Gunniagalleria” translates in English to “Gallery of Honor.” There is a one sitting time limit to eat lots of different breakfast and lunch items from Herkkules’ menu. The challenge platter consists of a triple cheeseburger plus sausages, bacon strips, fried eggs, a pork schnitzel, kebab meat, Finnish meatballs, a few drinks, and a whole platter of crinkle cut fries. If you finish everything within one sitting, you still pay €39.90 for the brunch meal, but you get a sweet Herkkules t-shirt and coveted spot on their “Gallery of Honor” / Wall of Fame. Note: You can just walk in and order this challenge without scheduling it in advance.

title: Pizza Hour’s Meter-Long Doner Kebab Challenge
description: There is a 25 minute time limit to eat a full 1-meter-long Turkish-style doner kebab made with with 800 grams of beef kebab meat topped with lots of healthy vegetables and four delicious sauces, with just one of them being spicy. Four pizza dough balls are used to create the wraps used to keep the kebab all together. Fail to finish within 25 minutes and pay €50 for Finland’s biggest doner kebab, which is large enough for a family or group of friends to split. Winners earn the €50 meal free plus a spot on Pizza Hour’s Wall of Fame and €100 cash!!

title: Hook’s “Naga Moritz” Spicy Wing Challenge (Lahti)
description:
– Ravintola Hook has several locations around Finland and they all offer this challenge!!
– Challengers have 15 minutes to eat eight (8) super spicy chicken wings.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if you win the challenge.

description:

title: Ravintola Siilinpesä’s Family-Sized “Sukupizza” Pizza Challenge
description: – Finnish a 4-topping “Sukupizza” by yourself within 45 minutes and win your pizza and drinks free!!

title: Rock’n Roll Diner’s V8 Burger Food Challenge
description:
– Platter has a triple burger, 500 g pork BBQ ribs, hot wings, and a 300 g sirloin with whisky-pepper sauce.
– Comes with two fried pickles, bacon, an XL portion of fries, garlic, and chipotle & ranch dipping sauces.
– Served with a 1 L beverage, and there is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Good luck!!
– 50% off Meal
– Wall of Fame
– Certificate of Honor
– Note: The meal is not free if you beat the challenge.

title: Sticky Wingers’ Luckyaki Spicy Food Challenge (Oulu)
description:
– For this challenge, there is a 1.5 kg burger and 12 of the spiciest wings dipped in a house sauce.
– The burger includes 3 patties, onions, lettuce, tomato, and Trinidad Scorpion chili all on a bun.
– Contestants must finish everything in 1 hour, including 500 g of fries which come with habanero mayo.
– The challenge is only available at the Sticky Wingers – Oulu location.
– 30% off the meal price
– Free T-Shirt
– Free bowl of ice cream
– Wall of Fame

title: Grilli Kivelä’s “Nightmare” BBQ Platter Challenge
description:
– This monstrous BBQ platter includes fries, fried sliced sausages, 2 fried eggs, 2 slices of bacon, 2 franfurters, 180g patty, Wiener schnitzel, 2 big sausages, a slice of pineapple, blue cheese, mayonnaise, and vegetables.
– Comes with a 42 oz Coca-cola or Fanta.
– You must finish everything in one sitting to win.
– Wall of Fame
– Note: The meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Holy Smoke’s B52 Burger Challenge
description:
– Includes four 200 g burger patties, bacon, BBQ pulled pork, cheddar cheese sauce, and veggies.
– The burger is served with a 1 lb of fries.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Au Royal Kebab’s Taco Challenge
description:
– The challenge includes a 5.5 lb taco filled with 5 different meats of your choice, french fries, and cheese sauce all wrapped inside 6 large tortillas.
– The meats are steak, chicken tenders, Mexican chicken, merguez (mix of lamb,beef, and mutton), and kebabs.
– No forks, knives, or other utensils can be used during the challenge.
– Contestants have to finish everything in one sitting and challenge is available on Tuesday nights.
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Takos King “Le King” Challenge (Lille)
description:
– A 2 kg taco filled with 4 different meats
– Also comes with french fries and cheese sauce, wrapped inside 6 large tortillas.
– You are allowed to use a fork, knife, or other utensil during the challenge
– No time limit
If completed:
– 10 % discount during one year on all the tacos
– Certificate

title: O’Tacos’ Gigatacos Challenge (La Rochelle)
address: 23 Avenue Amerigo Vespucci, 17000 La Rochelle, France
description:
– A 5.5 lb taco filled with 5 different meats (ground meat, chicken, sausage, blue ribbon, and nuggets).
– Also contains french fries and cheese sauce, wrapped inside 6 large tortillas.
– You are not allowed to use a fork, knife, or other utensil during the challenge.
– There is a very long 2 hour time limit to finish the entire challenge meal.
– The challenge is only available on Thursday evenings!!
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Vortex Coffee’s VX Burger Challenge
description:
– The 30 cm cheeseburger features four 500 g steak burger patties
– Topped with vegetables, homemade sauce, bacon, and cheddar cheese
– You must drink 1/2 liter of cola and you may not use any cutlery
– The entire challenge weighs around 5.5 pounds or 2.5 kilograms
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything on your plate
– Note: The challenge is held every Thursday from 7 pm to 8 pm
– CLICK HERE TO READ AN ARTICLE ABOUT THE CHALLENGE
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Memphis Coffee’s “Crazy Memphis” Burger Challenge
address: 1 Rue du Château d'Isenghien, 59160 Lille, France
description:
– The 6 burger patties total up to weigh around 600 g or 1.32 lbs.
– Topped and layered with 4 buns, tomatoes, cheddar cheese, vegetables, bacon strips, onions, and sauce.
– The challenge burger is served with coleslaw, 2 onion rings, french fries, and Memphis sauce.
– Free ice cream sundae if you can finish everything in just one sitting.

title: O’Tacos’ Gigatacos Challenge (Lille)
description:
– A 5.5 lb taco filled with 5 different meats (ground meat, chicken, sausage, blue ribbon, and nuggets).
– Also contains french fries and cheese sauce, wrapped inside 6 large tortillas.

description:

– Wall Of Fame

title: The Bird’s “Big Bird” Triple Cheeseburger Challenge
description: There are three 250 gram (8.8 oz) German beef hamburger patties, stacked and layered with cheese, bacon strips, and more!! The triple burger is served with healthy vegetables plus over 1 kg (2.2 lbs) of The Bird’s hand-cut fries. The 1-liter Kellerbier pictured and in the video was optional and not required. There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners earn the €49 burger meal free plus a spot on the “Big Bird” Wall of Fame!!

title: Ali Baba’s 4kg 2-Meter Turkish Döner Dürüm Kebab Challenge
description:
Challengers get just 1 hour (60 minutes) to eat an entire 2-meter-long dürüm kebab wrap filled with 1.8 kg (4 lbs) of döner chicken meat plus lots of healthy vegetables!! The dürüm wrap includes carrots, lettuce, red cabbage, red onions, diced tomatoes, cucumber slices, and three sauces of your choosing. It is all wrapped in aluminum foil and served on a custom-made device with 200-centimeter-long measuring tapes on both sides. There are no other side items or beverages required to be finished as part of the challenge. Winners earn the €70 supersized Turkish kebab meal free plus a spot on their empty Dürüm Kebab Challenge Wall of Fame.
*Please note that Ali Baba also offers a smaller 2 kg XXL Döner Kebab Challenge as well.

title: Django’s 2kg Turkish Döner Kebab Challenge
description: There is a short 30 minute time limit to feast on 800 grams (1.76 lbs) of freshly baked Turkish flatbread, 800 grams of beef and turkey döner kebab meat, and then lots of healthy vegetables plus your choice of sauces. Winners earn the €45 supersized Turkish kebab meal free, plus a €50 gift card / voucher to use later and a spot on Django’s Wall of Fame!! You might want to call in advance, but you can also likely walk in and order it!!

title: Smashup! am Dom’s Smash Burger Challenge
description:
– This smash burger challenge is labeled as the “Smash Burger for Super Heroes”. It consists of 9 smash patties, 9 slices of cheddar cheese, onions, and pickles.
– In addition to the giant smash burger, there is a side of onion rings and a pile of cheesy fries.
– There is a one hour time limit to finish the entire burger and sides. Successful completions win the meal for free and a place on the Wall of Heroes.

title: Ali Baba Kebaphaus’ 2kg XXL Döner Kebab Challenge
description:
There is a 30 minute time limit to eat a 4.5 lb / 2 kg Turkish döner kebab made with lots of meat, veggies, and your choice of sauce(s). Winners get their meal free plus a spot on Ali Baba’s Wall of Fame!!
*Please note that Ali Baba also offers a 4 kg 2-Meter-Long Turkish Döner Dürüm Kebab Challenge, too!!

title: DaIvo Burger’s 8-Patty Germany Cheeseburger Challenge
description: There are 8 German beef hamburger patties stacked and layered with cheese slices and healthy vegetables. Sometimes, there are two quadruple cheeseburgers on the platter, and the challenge includes 1 pound of fries plus a large 500 mL drink of your choosing. Finish within 30 minutes and win the €34.99 burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on DaIvo Burger’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Chillers’ Ultimate German Burger Challenge (Wiesbaden)
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to finish six German beef hamburger patties, stacked and topped with 2 fried chicken patties. There is cheese and bacon layered throughout the tall burger, and the cheeseburger is surrounded by more than 1.5 KILOGRAMS of Chillers’ fries which get smothered in cheese sauce. Some locations add in 3 variations of fries: regular fries, seasoned curly fries, and sweet potato fries. The milkshake pictured is/was just optional and not required. Finish within 30 minutes and win your entire burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Chillers location’s Wall of Fame. There are many Chillers locations around Germany and most if not all offer this same food challenge.

title: Chillers’ Ultimate German Burger Challenge (Pforzheim)
description: There is a 30 minute time limit to finish six German beef hamburger patties, stacked and topped with 2 fried chicken patties. There is cheese and bacon layered throughout the tall burger, and the cheeseburger is surrounded by more than 1.5 KILOGRAMS of Chillers’ fries which get smothered in cheese sauce. title: Harzer Schnitzelkonig’s Royal Food Fight Challenges
price: Depends on which meal you order
weight: Varies based on which meal you order
timeLimit: As fast as you can finish
description:
– Your choice of one of the following XXL dishes.
– A 750 g XXL curry sausage, 1 kg of schnitzel, 1.2 kg of rump steak, or a 30 cm giant burger of your choice.
– Challenge is based on points to indicate the level of difficulty.
– Curry sausage is 61 points, schnitzel is 120 points, rump steak is 120 points, and a burger is 180 points.
– CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THEIR WEBSITE CHALLENGE PAGE WITH MORE DETAILS!!
– Certificate of Completion
– Wall of Fame (on their website)

title: Staren Kebab’s 2kg Döner Kebab Challenge
description: You have to finish 2kg (4.5lbs) of delicious Döner Kebab. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Each time somebody loses the challenge, a certain amount is added to a jackpot pool. If you win the challenge, you get 100% of what is in the jackpot. Be sure to call ahead and schedule your challenge so they can be ready!!

title: Star Diner’s 1kg Rump Steak Challenge
description:
– There is a delicious 1 kg Rump Steak.
– Comes with a side dish of your choice that includes either a small mixed salad that has spicy chili beans, sweet corn, Champignon cream sauce, Bernaise sauce, & BBQ sauce or potato wedges or french fries.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything.
– Call in advance to make a reservation.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Ketch May Beef’s Strong Max Big Five Burger Challenge
description: You must finish a 1 kg burger plus a side of fries and a drink of your choice as fast as possible. There is no set time limit.  The one who has the best time at the end of every month will get a 20 € voucher.

title: O’Kellys Irish Pub’s Godfather Burger Challenge
Sandbacher Hof’s XXL Schnitzel Challenge
address: Sandbaher Str. 58, 94474 Vilshofen an der Donau, Germany
description: *Be aware that this restaurant will charge you for ALL drinks ordered and/or brought out to your table while you are attempting the challenge. Bottles of water are each €5 or more.

title: XXL Essen und Trinken’s 2.5kg Schnitzel Challenge
description:
– You must finish 2.5 kilograms of delicious schnitzel
– There is a 2 hour time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– 100 € Cash
– Wall Of Fame

title: Zum Propeller’s 2kg XXL Schnitzel Challenge
description:
– 1.8 kg of delicious schnitzel (four 1 lb schnitzels)
– Your choice of sauce / gravy
– There is a 1 hour time limit
– Free Meal (drinks are NOT included)*
– Wall Of Fame
– €50 Cash!!
– NOTE: Be careful when ordering drinks. They offer you water and a whole bunch of beverages and act really nice, but then they overcharge you for every last drop, and even charge for drinks you never even ordered so that they can recover some of the €50 prize money if you win.

title: Waldgeist Hofheim’s XXL Schnitzel Record Challenge
description:
– You must break the schnitzel record within one sitting
– The platter comes with fries but they are totally optional
– The current record as of 8/19/2016 is 2.9 kilograms
– You must eat 3 kg or more in order to win the challenge
– Free Meal
– Free Shirt
– Wall Of Fame

title: Haus Heuberg’s Championplatte XXL Schnitzel Challenge
description:
– 2 kg Schnitzel + your choice of side
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Kolosseum-Bruhl’s XXL Schnitzel Platte Challenge
description:
– 2.4 kg Schnitzel + your choice of side
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: William’s Dorfklause’s Double Giant Schnitzel Challenge
description:
– Challengers must finish TWO 1.5 kg schnitzel platters. 1.5 kg is the weight MINUS the breading, so each one weighs more than 1.5 kg. Each schnitzel is also served with a side of fries and a salad as well.
– This challenge is especially difficult because you cannot order both schnitzel platters at the same time. You can order the second one after you finish the first one. It takes quite a long time for them to come out with the second platter, allowing the challenger to start feeling full before starting on the second one.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish both schnitzels along with the two sides of fries and two side salads. They do charge you for the waters, sodas, and/or other beverages that you order along with the challenge.
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame
– Contact restaurant for other possible prizes, if any.

title: Take More’s 3kg Master Cheeseburger Challenge
description:
– 30 cm diameter burger totaling 3 kilograms
– There is a large side of french fries included
– The whole challenge weighs around 3.5 kg
– 45 minute time limit to finish everything
– Free Meal
– Certificate of Completion
– 50 € food voucher to be used later
– Photo featured on Wall Of Fame

title: Seeteufele’s XXL 1kg Monster Schnitzel Challenge
description:
– 1 kg monster schnitzel
– Your choice of side item and salad
– There is a 45 minute time limit
– Free Drink
– 15 € coupon to be used later
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

title: Roadhouse Diner’s Monster Killer Steak Challenge
description:
– 2 kg steak served with french fries
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish
– Free Meal
– Wall Of Fame

title: Roadhouse Diner’s Burger-Meister Challenge
description:
– Five 180 gram burger patties (900 grams)
– Topped with cheese, bacon, veggies, and sauce
– Served with a large portion of french fries
– Everything must be finished in one sitting
– Free Burger-Meister hooded sweatshirt
– Photo featured on their Wall Of Fame
– Note: Meal is not free or discounted

description:

title: Chili’s Ultimate Eating Championship Challenge
address: 13, Ventura Building, Hiranandani Business Park, Central Avenue Road, Powai, Mumbai
description:
They say that it takes a lot to be a winner, but do you have what it takes to be the Ultimate Champion? The foodies of Mumbai are always up for a challenge; so, here we are to satisfy the hunger!
Get your forks and knives ready as for the first time ever, Chili’s is hosting the Ultimate Eating Championship!
All you need to do is to be the fastest to finish the special Eating Challenge Platter. Also if you finish the platter within 15 minutes you stand to win INR 5,000 worth Chili’s vouchers on the spot.
The Eating Challenge Platter consists of:
-Chili’s legendary Baby Back Ribs smothered in Original BBQ sauce
-Crispy chicken crispers with honey mustard sauce
-Signature Chicken Wings in hot sauce
-Onion rings
-Home style fries
-Corn on the cob
-Bottomless Coke

title: Holy Guacamole’s 1kg “El Diablo” Mexican Burrito Challenge
address: Jl. Melasti No.16, Legian, Kec. Kuta, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361, Indonesia
description: The base eating challenge features a 1 kg Mexican burrito made with 1 large flour burrito tortilla, filled & topped with spicy chicken plus rice, beans, lots of healthy vegetables, sauces, and 2 different cheeses. It is served on a platter with some nacho chips and challengers must also finish a 0.5 L (500 mL) Diablo Session IPA canned beer within the 30 minute time limit. This is a pay-to-play food challenge so the burrito platter costs Rp 349,000 whether you win or lose. Finish within 30 minutes and win a sweet t-shirt, a framed Certificate of Completion, and a spot on Holy Guacamole’s Wall of Fame. Finish with a top time and also get your name on the restaurant’s electronic leaderboard!! You can walk in and order the challenge. You do not need to call ahead in advance.

There is lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, beetroot slices, pineapple slices, and lots more, plus some of Fat Bowl’s burger sauce. No sides or beverages are required as part of this Fat Burger Challenge. Finish everything within 30 short minutes and win the Rp 520,000 (~$35 USD) Indonesian cheeseburger meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Moo Moo’s Steakhouse’s 1kg T-Bone Steak Challenge
address: Jl. Padma No.17, Legian, Kec. Kuta, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361, Indonesia
description: The base challenge is for one person to finish one 1 kg Aussie T-Bone Steak platter that comes with a bowl of sauce (your choice), a jacket baked potato, some healthy grilled vegetables, and corn-on-the-cob all within a 30 minute time limit. This is a pay-to-play steak challenge that costs Rp 699,000 Indonesian Rupiah whether you win or lose. Finish within 30 minutes and win a sweet t-shirt, a framed Certificate of Completion, and a spot on their Wall of Fame!! Finish with a top time and you get your name on the steakhouse’s electronic leaderboard!!

title: Woodfire & Wings’ “Family Meal” Pizza and Wings Challenge
address: Unit 7, Dutch Village Shopping Centre, Woodford Walk, Knockmitten, Clondalkin, Co. Dublin, D22 V290, Ireland
description:
– Woodfire & Wings has been proudly serving the Clondalkin, Co. Dublin area since back in 2019.
– As part of their takeaway menu, they offer a “Family Meal” Special meant to feed 3-4 people which this pizza and wings challenge is based off of.
– Woodfire & Wings is highly regarded for serving delicious wood fired Romana style pizzas.
– Challengers must order two 12″ diameter Romana style specialty pizzas from their menu.
– The family meal challenge includes 1kg of chicken wings with your choice of sauce added.
– A side item is included. Randy chose to order their loaded chicken tenders which were delicious!!
– A milkshake is included too, and there are lots of flavor options to chose from on the menu.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything by yourself. Winners receive the €55 “Family Meal” deal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on their Woodfire & Wings Wall of Fame.

title: Revolution Waterford’s “Mega” Burger Challenge
address: The Apple Market, 19 John St, Waterford, X91 V520, Ireland
description:
– Revolution Craft Beer & Whiskey Bar has been serving Waterford, Ireland for over 20 years now.
– This delicious Mega Burger Challenge has been available for over 12 years since around 2010.
– There is a 25 minute time limit to finish three 1/2 lb Irish beef burgers and 3 portions of chips.
– Each burger includes the bun and lots of toppings – cheese, bacon, healthy veggies, and sauce.
– Winners earn the €25 mega cheeseburger free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.
– Since the challenge started, well over 6,000 people have tried and failed, with ~125 winners.

title: Hogs & Heifers’ “Man vs Hogs” Burger Challenge
address: Airside Retail Park, Swords, Co. Dublin, IRL
description:
– Hogs & Heifers is part of the Michael J Wright Group, part of Airside Retail Park located in Swords, Co. Dublin, Ireland (open since 2013)!! Their burgers are made in-house daily from 100% Irish beef.
– The beef burger patties are made from 50% Irish flank steak and 50% Irish beef brisket.
– This “Man vs Hogs” Challenge features six of these big 1/2lb (8oz) 50/50 burger patties.
– They are all stacked and layered with six slices of cheese, lots of stringy bacon, plenty of their Hogs & Heifers House Sauce, and there are also lots of healthy tomato slices and red onions.
– Each beef patty and slice of cheese was also topped with a portion of shredded braised beef.
– The food challenge includes a big bowl of chips and challengers must finish a pint of Guinness.
– There is a 30 minute time limit. Please call and schedule your challenge in advance if interested.
– Winners get the €45 Irish bacon cheeseburger free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on Wall of Fame.

title: Four Star Pizza’s 24-inch Team Pizza Challenge (Galway)
address: Kiltartan House, 1 Forster St, Galway, H91 T1KX, IRL
description:
– There are more than 57 Four Star Pizza locations around Ireland and Northern Ireland.
– This 24-inch Team Pizza Challenge is mostly available at the Limerick, Ireland location, but can be done at the Galway, Ireland location upon request. Please call ahead to schedule your team’s pizza challenge in advance if you are interested.
– A team of 2 people gets just 20 minutes to finish a 24″ pizza with 5 different toppings.
– Teams who lose pay €20 which gets donated to a local charity.
– Winning teams receive the pizza free plus Wall of Fame and each person gets a sweet hat.

title: Four Star Pizza’s 24-inch Team Pizza Challenge (Limerick)

title: Pip’s Cafe’s Irish Breakfast Roll Sandwich Challenge

– Pip’s Café and Deli has been serving the Crumlin area of Co. Dublin, Ireland for three years now!!
– There is a 22″ long Parisian bread baguette that is lathered with delicious Irish butter.
– It is filled with 10 sausages split into halves, 10 rashers of Irish bacon, 6 fried eggs, 6 jumbo black pudding, 6 jumbo white pudding, and 6 thick hash browns, all topped with a large portion of baked beans.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish the entire sandwich plus a large box of Pip’s fries.
– Winners earn the €50 breakfast roll free plus a spot on Pip’s Wall of Fame inside the restaurant.

title: The Lantern’s Chinese Dry Hot & Spicy Chicken Challenge
where: The Lantern Chinese Restaurant & Take Away
address: Emmet St, Abbeyhalfquarter, Ballina, Co. Mayo, F26 XH50, Ireland
description:
– A family restaurant & take away since 1986, The Lantern Chinese Restaurant is famed for its signature dish, Chicken Dry Hot and Spicy. Customers from all corners of Connacht and even Ireland travel miles just to order the Lantern’s Chicken Dry Hot & Spicy, which some have aptly dubbed “The Taste of Ballina.”
– Since 2014, The Lantern has offered this Dry Hot & Spicy Chicken Challenge with a 30 minute time limit that is way spicier than their normal heat signature dish.
– There is 1lb of their Dry Hot & Spicy Chicken loaded with numerous spicy Chinese peppers.
– There is 1lb of spicy chicken wings also served dry hot and loaded with Chinese peppers.
– Finally, there is 1lb of fries/chips served dry hot and loaded with many Chinese peppers.
– The toughest part of the challenge is that you cannot drink any liquids at all or use any extra sauces. Continuing to swallow each bite without any water was truly a super tough challenge.
– Winners receive the €23.70 spicy Chinese meal free plus Wall of Fame and €50 if gift certificates to come back and use later.

where: Il Maritozzo Rosso - Maritozzi e Cucina
address: 26, Vicolo del Cedro, 00153 Roma RM, Italy
description:
– Il Maritozzo Rosso is known around Rome, Italy for their delicious pastas and Italian food dishes.
– The main portion of this pasta challenge is the 1kg (2.2lbs dry weight) of thick spaghetti noodles.

– There are 8 massive eggs, each made with 2 egg whites. There are 8 rashers of Irish bacon, 8 Irish sausages, 8 full slices of potato bread (16 halves), 500g of grilled mushrooms, and 500g of grilled onions, all served on a full round loaf of Irish soda bread slices in half.

– There is over 2kg (4.4lbs) of whipped ice cream all throughout this massive ice cream sundae.

– All challengers pay £44.95 for the pizza, win or lose. Champions who finish in less than the 45 minute time limit win £100 cash and a spot on the Wall of Fame. If you can beat the current time record, then they double the prize money and you win £200 cash!!
– Please call ahead if interested in taking the challenge so Stephen and his team can be ready.

address: Foxton Dr, Glenrothes KY7 4UZ, United Kingdom
description:
– The Foxton Bar & Grill has been serving the Glenrothes, Scotland area for many years now.
– The Foxton offers a few different burger challenges, in addition to this new burrito challenge.
– There are 5 large burrito tortillas filled with sour cream, guacamole, slices of spicy Mexican cheese, white rice, and crumbled nacho chips. This is a triple meat burrito with chilli con carne, pulled peri peri chicken, and spicy chorizo sausage.
– The burrito is surrounded with more nacho chips topped with gooey nacho cheese, fresh pico de gallo, more sour cream, more guacamole, and diced peppers.
– There is a 40 minute time limit to finish everything. There are no drinks or other sides required.
– Winners receive the £40 burrito meal free plus a spot on The Foxton’s Wall of Fame. There is a Wall of Shame as well, so losers get their name and photo posted on there.

title: Porto Piri Piri’s “Cheeky” Peri Peri Chicken Food Challenge
address: 49 Kilmarnock Rd, Shawlands, Glasgow G41 3YN, United Kingdom
description:
– Porto Piri Piri has been serving the South Glasgow region of Scotland for many years now.
– Porto Piri Piri offers lots of different sauce options and you choose what goes on everything.
– There are 5 grilled chicken wings, 5 grilled chicken tenders, 1 grilled chicken breast, and 2 corn on the cob.
– There is 2 pieces of garlic bread, 5 fried mozzarella cheese sticks, and 2 large orders of fries.
– The toughest part of this challenge is that you must finish a ~3lb “Cheesy Tater Tot Box” with lots of hash browns covered with more grilled piri piri chicken pieces, loads of cheese, and your choice of sauce.
– There is a giant overstuffed wrap filled with mozzarella cheese, chicken tenders, and veggies with your choice of sauce. Challengers are also required to finish their choice of canned beverage in addition to a pint of flavored Ben & Jerry’s ice cream for dessert.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything. Good luck and win before you begin!!
– Winners receive the £37 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.
– If you beat the current time record, you also win the £250 cash incentive prize!!

title: The Plough Hotel’s Full Scottish Breakfast Challenge
address: 507 Main St, Stenhousemuir, Larbert FK5 4EY, UK
description:
– The Plough Hotel has a restaurant, bar, hotel, and function suite serving the greater Larbert area.
– There are 3 scrambled eggs, 3 fried eggs, 3 rashers of Scottish bacon, 3 Tattie scones, lots of mushrooms, 2 tomatoes (halves), 3 regular Scottish sausages, 3 Scottish Lorne square sausages, 2 full slices of toast, 2 full slices of French toast, 2 black pudding, 2 Scottish haggis, and 2 portions of baked beans.
– The time limit changes based on people winning and/or losing. Each time someone wins, the time limit goes down by one minute. Each time someone loses, the time limit goes up by one minute.
– Winners earn the £17.95 breakfast meal free plus a spot on The Plough Hotel’s Wall of Fame.

title: The BUF Prestwick and Big Dibby’s Scottish Burger Challenge
where: The BUF Prestwick + Big Dibby's Kitchen
address: 32 Main St, Prestwick KA9 1NX, United Kingdom
description:
– Big Dibby’s Kitchen has been serving food in collaboration at The BUF Prestwick for a while now.
– The “Big Dirty Cow” Burger has five 6oz Scottish beef hamburger patties, stacked and layered with cheese slices, hand-dipped & fried onion rings, ladles of beefy chilli con carne, and healthy vegetables on a normal-sized bun held together by lots of wooden skewers.
– The challenge includes 10 Buffalo & Dry Rub (5x each) “Not So Jumbo” Chicken Wings, 8 fried Chicken Tempura, a bowl of Scottish creamy coleslaw, and a giant portion of chilli beef chips / fries. Along with all that, you must finish a tall Scottish pint of delicious Tennent’s Lager beer.
– There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners receive the £50 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt, a spot on The BUF’s Wall of Fame, and £50 to use for travel expenses.

title: Wings’ “Suicide” Spicy Wings Challenge
address: 7 Old Fishmarket Cl, High St, Edinburgh EH1 1RW, UK
description:
– Before trying this challenge, you are required to try just a bit of sauce for the restaurant staff to deem if you are prepared to take on the challenge.
– This challenge consists of 6 super spicy wings.
– Challengers have one sitting to finish all the wings.
– Winners go up on the wall of fame.
– Note: This meal is not free or discounted if completed.

title: Tophski’s Boneless Wings Food Challenge
description:
– Tophski’s is located next to Cathcart Old Parish Church, a Protestant church in South Glasgow, Scotland.
– Tophski’s specializes in serving delicious burgers, chicken, fries, and milkshakes to the local community.
– This massive Tophski’s Challenge has been available for years now. Hundreds have tried and only 2 people had previously been able to finish everything within the very short 30 minute time limit.
– There are 15 giant hot Buffalo boneless wings and 15 large BBQ boneless wings on the platter.
– Challenge includes 1.1kg (2.4lbs) of Tophski’s Cajun fries plus 6 fried mozzarella cheese sticks.
– There are no other drinks or sides included. There is a 30 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners get the £40 meal free plus a sweet t-shirt or hoodie and spot on Tophski’s Wall of Fame.
– Champions also win 1 or 2 trays of extra delicious brownies baked by Tophski’s awesome staff.
– Be sure to call ahead to schedule your challenge in advance so Tophski’s can be ready for you.

title: Kismot “Killer” Spicy Curry Challenge
address: 29 St. Leonard's St, Edinburgh EH8 9QN, UK

title: The Elizabethan’s “Lizzie” Scottish Breakfast Challenge
address: Halbeath Rd, Dunfermline, KY12 7LX, United Kingdom
description:
– The Elizabethan is named after the daughter of James VI, Elizabeth Stuart (Queen of Bohemia), who was born in Dunfermline Palace on 19th August 1596.
– This massive “Lizzie” breakfast fry up includes 5 full slices of toast (10 halves), 10 fried or scrambled eggs, 10 rashers of Scottish bacon, 10 locally sourced sausages, 10 Scottish Lorne sausages, 10 fried hash browns, 10 mushrooms, 5 grilled tomatoes (10 halves), and 800 grams of baked beans. The tasty challenge also includes a cup of coffee or tea and there is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners earn the £30 Scottish fry up meal free plus a spot on The Elizabethan’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Buck’s Bar’s Ultimate “Bird Box” Spicy Wings Challenge

– There is a 20-minute time limit to finish everything.

– Bottle of Buck’s Hot Sauce
– Note: Unfortunately the meal is not free or discounted if you win.

title: Foxton Bar’s “Mac Daddy” Burger Challenge
address: Foxton Dr, Glenrothes, Scotland, UK KY74UZ
description:
– This monstrous burger includes two 1 lb homemade steak burger patties stuffed with mozzarella cheese.
– Topped with mac and cheese, 8 rashers of smoked streaky bacon on a homemade parmesan and herb bun.
– Served with 8 mozzarella sticks and a portion of cheesy fries.
– There is a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Buddy’s Hot Wing Challenge
address: 705 Pollokshaws Rd, Glasgow, Scotland, UK G412AA
description:
– There are 6 chicken wings coated in a sauce containing Naga Viper and Scotch Bonnet Chili’s which are some of the world’s hottest chili peppers! No napkins or drinks are allowed.

– The main entrée is a quadruple bacon cheeseburger with four 6oz Scottish beef burger patties (24oz total) layered with cheese and rashers of Scottish bacon on a pretzel bun.
– The challenge includes 2 ears of corn on the cob soaking in melted butter, a bowl of Scottish kale slaw, 4 whole BBQ chicken wings, a huge order of loaded fries/chips topped with chilli con carne, melted cheese, and juicy pulled pork, and for dessert – a 30oz deluxe milkshake.
– There is a 35 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners earn the £35 cheeseburger meal free plus a spot on Scotch & Rye’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Foxton Bar’s “El Nacho Grande” Burger Challenge
address: Foxton Dr, Glenrothes, Scotland, UK KY74UZ
description:
A 5lb Food Challenge consisting of a 2lb Burger on a homemade Chilli bun with chilli con carne, chilli cheese nachos, lightly spiced slaw, chilli cheese fries, 6 x Jalapeño Poppers and 6 x Level 3 Spicy Chicken wings! Eat it on under 45 mins and it is free! You also receive a free tshirt and a place on the wall of fame!
Fail and the wall of shame awaits you!

title: The Ashvale Fish Restaurant’s “Ashvale Whale” Challenge

description:
– This “Fat Matt” Scottish Burger Challenge has been available for the past 8 years of the 20+ years that The Grange has been proudly serving the North Berwick community. Over 1,500 people have tried and failed the challenge.
– There are two 10oz Scottish beef burger patties plus one 10oz healthy chicken breast stacked and layered with 4 different cheeses along with 4 thick pieces of black pudding, 4 big thick pieces of Scottish haggis, 10 strips of streaking American-style bacon, a homemade bacon jam, and healthy vegetables – lettuce and tomato slices – all on some normal sized hamburger buns.
– The challenge includes a bowl of creamy Scottish coleslaw plus 2 pickles, 6 fried onion rings, and a large order of The Grange’s loaded chilli cheese chips/fries. There is just a 45 minute time limit to finish everything.
– Winners earn the £25 burger meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the “Fat Matt” Wall of Fame.

description:
– Ad Lib has been located on Hope Street in city centre Glasgow, Scotland for many years now.

– There are two 600 gram Scottish beef burger patties (1.2kg total or 2.64lbs) stacked and layered with Cheddar cheese slices and lots of healthy vegetables – lettuce, tomato slices, and pickles – all between 3 big pieces of freshly baked bread bun.

description: There are 8 All Day Sammies (sandwiches) stacked up and served with a bowl of tomato-based chorizo macaroni and cheese plus a side of Breakfast Grill’s fries. There is a short 30 minute time limit to finish everything. Winners get the S$190 SGD brunch sandwich meal free plus a sweet t-shirt and spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: OBBa Jjajang & BBQ’s Jumbo Korean Jjajangmyeon Challenge
description: Korean Jjajangmyeon translates to “black bean noodles” in English. Challengers have just 15 minutes to feast on lots of Asian wheat noodles topped with a black bean paste / sauce that is sticky and delicious. There are some healthy vegetables served on top that are required, but all the sides served next to the bowl are just optional and don’t have to be finished within the time limit. Winners receive the S$58 SGD noodle bowl meal free plus S$100 SGD cash and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.

title: OBBa Jjajang’s Jumbo Korean Jjajangmyeon Bowl Challenge
description: Korean Jjajangmyeon translates to “black bean noodles” in English. Challengers have just 15 minutes to feast on lots of Asian wheat noodles topped with a black bean paste / sauce that is sticky and delicious. There are some healthy vegetables served on top that are required, but all the sides served next to the bowl are just optional and don’t have to be finished within the time limit. Winners receive the S$58 SGD noodle bowl meal free plus S$100 SGD cash and a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.

title: Shrimp Prawn Seafood’s Seafood Thai Vermicelli Platter Challenge
description: Shrimp Prawn Seafood offers several different sharing platters, but the “Zermatt” Platter is the largest which normally feeds 6-8 hungry people. There are 3 lbs of perfectly cooked Thai vermicelli noodles mixed with lots of garlic cloves and clams on the bottom of the platter. As for the fresh seafood boil, there are 2 whole giant River Prawns plus 2 whole mud crabs. There are lots of crayfish plus Tiger Prawns and scallops, and let’s just say that there is a lot of shellfish cracking as part of this challenge. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything. Winners earn the $340 SGD (~$255 USD) seafood Thai vermicelli feast free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Satay Power 6’s Singaporean Chicken Satay Record Challenge
address: Stall #6, Lau Pa Sat Festival Market, 18 Raffles Quay Singapore, Singapore 048582
description: There is a 20 minute time limit to break the current Singaporean chicken satay stick eating record. The current record as of September 8, 2023 is 253 satay sticks held by competitive eater Zermatt Neo. Good luck breaking that!! Fail and pay for all the S$0.80 chicken satay sticks ordered. Break the record and win your entire meal free plus a spot on Satay Power 6’s Wall of Fame!!

title: Gourmet Pizza To Go’s 12lb Team Pizza Challenge
where: Gourmet Pizza To Go (Kallang Wave Mall)

– One half has toppings with chicken and the other half has toppings with beef.
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

– 1 kg of noodles

– 30 minute time limit
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: The Pancake Boss Martabak Challenge
description:
– You have 10 minutes to finish two 1 lb stuffed martabak.
– A martabak is an Indonesian street food (stuffed pancake).
– You will be amazed by how much butter is in each one.
– The red one in the photo is red velvet and delicious!!
– Free Meal
– Wall of Fame

title: Harley’s “Fat Boy” Burger Challenge
address: Av. de España, 3, 38670 Costa Adeje, Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Spain
description:
The Fat Boy Burger Challenge is unique to Harley’s in Tenerife. The challenge is available on Wednesday nights at 10 pm and needs to be booked in advance and secured with a 20 euro deposit.
In return our chefs will prepare for you 3 giant size burgers weighing in total 1.5 kilo of beef (3 x 500 gram patties) plus chilli con carne, bacon, cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes, all served on an extra large bun.
This challenge is not for the faint-hearted. It’s a real belly buster!! The challenger has one hour to complete – we want to see an empty plate – and in return they will win a cash prize of €400 (~$436 USD) and a Harley’s winner t-shirt. We even give our losers a t-shirt for being a good sport. Come and have a go if you think you’re hard enough and get your photograph put up on our Fat Boy Burger Wall of Fame.
Click here to check out the restaurant’s website challenge page!!

title: Finca Vaquero Grill’s “Indomitable Buffalo Bill” Steak Challenge

description:
– The pizza has to be eaten by a single person to beat the challenge.

address: Paseo de la Castellana, 132, 28046 Madrid, Spain
description:
– To win this challenge, you must break the current burger patty record.
– As for toppings, you get to pick whichever burger you want from the menu.
– There is no set time limit, and everything just has to be finished in one sitting.
– The bun they use is small and the weight of toppings depends on your burger choice.
– The current patty size record as of 8/26/2018 is 3.2 kg (7 lbs).
– To win the challenge you must finish a burger patty weighing 3.3 kg or greater.
– This challenge is more to feed your ego than anything. It’s not free if you finish.
– You win a sweet t-shirt and your photo is displayed at all 5 Bentley’s locations.
– Your photo sits on the front counter of each location proclaiming your record.
– Note: Bentley’s does have a smaller 1kg burger challenge. Watch the video below for details.

title: Texas Tavern’s Grizzly Burger Challenge
address: 28440, Calle del Dr. Fleming, 2A, 28440 Guadarrama, Madrid, Spain
description:
– 2-3 pounds of burger patties served on a ciabatta bread loaf.
– Topped with cheese, bacon, healthy veggies, and sauces.
– Free Meal
– Free T-Shirt
– Wall of Fame

title: Möllers Bryggeri’s 40-Egg Äggakaka Swedish Egg Cake Challenge
description:
– There is a 1.6 kg (3.5 lbs) eggy pancake / omelet cake made with 40 eggs, flour, cream, sugar, and more.
– That is topped with 700 grams (1.5 lbs) of pork belly, which is thicker than bacon, called fläsk.
– That is all topped with lots of locally-sourced lingonberries. The challenge weighs around 5.5 lbs / 2.5 kg.
– There is a 1 hour time limit. Winners get the 350 SEK meal free plus a spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: ROST’s Swedish Burger Record Challenge
description: ROST in Ängelholm has offered this burger record challenge for many years now. To win, you must eat at least 100 grams more than the current record, within one hour. There are three burgers, and you get to pick which ones you want off their menu. The weight includes the cheese, buns, and other toppings that are part of your burgers. As of October 13, 2024, the record is currently 7.7 lbs or 3.5 kg, and it took 24 115 gram (4 oz) burger patties to create that burger challenge. You might have to eat 25 or more, to eat 3.6 kg worth of burgers!! There are no drink requirements, and time starts as soon as you take your first bite. Also note that the weight is “raw” and taken before the burgers are cooked. Finish your winning burger and earn the 1,000 SEK meal free plus a sweet t-shirt, a 1,000 SEK gift certificate to come back and use later, and the top spot on their Wall of Fame!!

title: Håstensgrillen Rockers Pub’s Many Food Challenges
description: Håstensgrillen Rockers Pub in Varberg, Sweden offers more than 24 food challenges, which are all pay-to-play eating challenges. You pay for your meal, regardless of whether you win or lose. Every challenge has a one sitting time limit. Some rotate and others are permanent. Almost all the challenges are available anytime when the restaurant is open. Check out their website to see all the challenges currently offered!!

title: Tasty Bros Foodtruck’s Swedish Burger Patty Record Challenge
description:
– Tasty Bros Foodtruck is well known around Örebro for serving up delicious hamburgers and cheeseburgers!! For this challenge, you simply have to eat one more burger patty with cheese than the current record.
– There is a one sitting time limit to finish everything, and no sides or sauces are required.
– Each patty weighs around 115 grams, or 4 ounces (1/4 pound).
– As of October 13, 2024, the current record is 24 burger patties eaten within one sitting, so you must eat 25 or more in order to win your burger free and the top spot on Tasty Bros’ Wall of Fame.
– Please note that this is not really a challenge that you can just walk up and attempt. This is more of a challenge for “eaters” with social media who intend to film the challenge and post content on their social media accounts. Contact either of the owners / brothers if you are interested in setting up a challenge attempt.

title: Brogrillen’s 3kg “OMG” Tunnbrödsrulle Sausage Wrap Challenge
description:
– Tunnbrödsrulle translates to “thin bread roll” and is a tasty, traditional Swedish street food, typically made with sausages, mashed potatoes, shrimp salad with lots of mayonnaise, some healthy vegetables, and more if interested. Translated in English, it’s more of a Swedish flatbread wrap.
– For this challenge, there is a 46 minute time limit to finish a supersized sausage wrap that consists of 20 sausages, 1kg (2.2lbs) of creamy homemade mashed potatoes, lots of shrimp salad, lettuce, and tomatoes.
– Winners get the 500 SEK street food meal free plus ice cream and a spot on Brogrillen’s Wall of Fame!!

title: PRUK’s 2kg “Maxi” Slovak Burger Challenge
description:
One person is allowed 20 minutes to finish everything solo, or 2-person teams are allowed just 10 minutes to finish everything. Pick any burger you want to from PRUK’s menu, and they will “Maxi-size” it with an 800 gram Australian beef hamburger patty, loaded with all the toppings of your choosing. Depending on the burger chosen, the burger will weigh around 2 kg to 2.5 kg total. Winners get the €40 cheeseburger meal free plus a spot on PRUK’s Wall of Fame!! Be sure to call ahead and schedule your challenge in advance to make sure that they have a supersized bun available. Note: Their PRUK Bacon Cheeseburger is featured in the photo / video!!
*Also please note that the beer pictured is/was optional and not required as part of the challenge.

title: Manzo’s “Little Spencer” Burger Challenge
description:
– This burger consists of 700g of beef, cheddar, bacon, eggs, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, pickles, and a 450g bun. Challengers have 30 minutes to finish. Winners receive a free meal, a free t-shirt, and the progressive jackpot.
– Note: The restaurant does allow people to try to eat TWO of the burgers if they’re feeling really hungry!!

title: Nase Bistro’s Tower of Pancakes Challenge
description: There is a 700 g heavy tower of pancakes covered with Nutella, jam, fruit, ice cream, and caramel. There is a 12 minute time limit to finish everything. If you eat it in the time limit, you have it for free! If you don’t finish, the cost is 15 euros. By taking the challenge, you agree to let them video your challenge and take photos.

title: BeAbout’s Men vs Burger Challenge
description:
– 10 burger meals must be ordered from their menu and each burger has a 500 gram patty.
– Each burger is served with fries, onion rings, and veggies bringing the plates to 750 g / EA.
– The challenge is meant for teams of 5 people but can be attempted with fewer people.
– There is a 1 hour time limit to finish everything, including the vegetable garnishes.
– Winning teams get the whole meal FREE.
– Teams with the Top 10 times are posted on their Wall of Fame leader-board.

title: Butcher King Burger’s Monster Thai Cheeseburger Challenge
address: Donki เอกมัย ชั้น 1 107 Soi Sukhumvit 63, Khlong Tan Nuea, Watthana, Bangkok 10110, Thailand
timeLimit: 40 Minutes for 1 person | 30 Minutes for 2 people
description:
Butcher King Burger has a cheeseburger challenge that we are aware of, but we are not sure about all the details. Here is a photo from their Facebook page with some information.
Please contact the restaurant for more details if interested.

title: Sri Leung Pochana’s 3kg Thai Chicken Rice Challenge
where: Sri Lueng Pochana Chicken Rice & Pork Noodles
address: 45 6-7 Saliratthawiphak Rd, Samsen Nai, Phaya Thai, Bangkok 10400, Thailand
description: ศรีเหลืองโภชนา สะพานควาย-ข้าวมันไก่ไจแอนท์ is the Thai name for this restaurant which translates to Sri Leung Pochana in English. This challenge has been available for more than 10 years (1 decade) now and thousands of people have tried it. There is a 1 hour time limit to finish 2 kg of Thai rice topped with 1 kg of steamed chicken thighs and breasts with skin included. The cucumbers, congealed blood, soup, and sauce in the photo are all optional. Fail and you must pay ฿650 Thai Baht for the platter. Winners get the entire meal free plus a big spot on the Wall of Fame.

title: Bamee Lom Yuk’s Thai Pork Wonton Noodles Challenge
where: บะหมี่ล้มยักษ์ สาขาเพิ่มสิน (Bamee Lom Yuk)
address: WJ3X+H46, Thanon Phoem Sin, Sai Mai, Bangkok 10220, Thailand
description: บะหมี่ล้มยักษ์ สาขาเพิ่มสิน is the Thai name for this restaurant which translates to Bamee Lom Yuk in English. There are apparently other locations where this challenge is available, but Randy Santel and Katina Eats Kilos attempted it at this location. There is a one sitting time limit to finish lots of noodles topped with marinated pork, Chinese cabbage, and pork wontons. The soup in the photo was optional and we aren’t sure whether the 2 sauce bowls were required or not. Randy and Katina both added them to the noodles. Fail and you only pay ฿195 Thai Baht which is still a great deal!! Winners get the meal free plus a spot on the location’s Wall of Fame.

title: Big Al’s Island Grill’s Ultimate Slider Challenge
address: Grace Bay Rd, Grace Bay, TKCA1ZZ, Turks and Caicos Islands
description:
– Big Al’s Island Grill has served the island of Providenciales, Turks and Caicos for many years.
– Big Al’s offers quite a unique selection of burgers including their New Mexican Burger, the Sicilian Burger and the Smashed Onion. Fries are offered in shoestring, krinkle or waffle cut. Burgers are not the only meals you will find at Big Al’s. Don’t miss out on their wraps and salads, grilled chicken, fish or steak options. Gluten-free and vegetarian choices are available too.
– For this food challenge, you must eat 12 sliders, 18 hand-dipped onion rings, and drink a large milkshake.
– Each slider has a 2oz beef patty topped with cheese, pickles, and sauce, on a freshly baked bun.
– There is a 30 minute time limit. Winners get the $50 meal free, a sweet t-shirt, and Wall of Fame!!

– In addition to the burgers, there is 800g of Cajun chips, 8 onion rings, 500g of coleslaw, BBQ sauce, and relish.
– There is a 50 minute time limit to finish the burgers and sides.
– Successful completions earn the meal for free and £50!
– Please ensure you pre-book the challenge with the restaurant before heading there.

title: Castell-Y-Bwch’s “Castell Whale 50/50” Food Challenge
